title: The vehicle-mounted pedestrian detection method of convergence strategy based on target recognition and tracking
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of vehicle-mounted pedestrian detection method of the convergence strategy based on target recognition and tracking, it is related to computer vision field, including：1 detects moving region using the background estimating method of the positive and negative subtractive of three frames, then is partitioned into moving target by Otsu, Canny edge detection operator and Morphological scale-space method；2 carry out motion estimate using the cascade classifier of fusion feature and combination Gentle Adaboost and SVM, judge whether target belongs to pedestrian；3 carry out pedestrian tracking using based on Kalman filter method；4 carry out the pedestrian detection of the convergence strategy based on identification and tracking, and use different inspection policies to the target of different conditions.The problem of moving object detection is disturbed by light in onboard system is the method overcome, convergence strategy avoids unnecessary computing, so as to shorten system operation time and improve discrimination, with good application value.

title: System and method for detecting pedestrians
abstract: A method is provided for detecting a pedestrian exterior to a vehicle by use of a vehicle-mounted image-based monitoring system. An edge-based pedestrian detection analysis is applied to the input image data to determine an edge-based confidence value of a candidate image area being a pedestrian. A motion-based pedestrian detection analysis is applied to the input image data to determine a motion-based confidence value of a candidate image area being a pedestrian. A final confidence value is obtained by combining the edge-based confidence value and motion-based confidence value using weighting factors that are functions of vehicle speed. The final confidence value is compared to a threshold value for determining whether to generate a warning that a pedestrian may be present in the input image data.

title: Self test for obstacle detection system
abstract: An object detection system and method for detecting the presence of objects in the path of a vehicle, and in which includes a self test operation. The system includes a transmitter which transmits object detection signals and a receiver which receives reflections of the transmitted object detection signals. A controller is provided for adjusting the gain and signal threshold of the receiver so that the receiver initially is able to detect reflections from irregularities in the ground surface. Once the receiver receives a signal reflected from the ground surface, an indication is provided that the system is in a ready or operable state. Thereafter, the controller adjusts the receiver gain and signal detection threshold so that signals reflected from the ground surface are effectively ignored and only signals reflected from significant objects in the path of the vehicle are detected. An alarm signal is generated in response to the receiver receiving signals reflected from the object. The system may continuously repeat the cycle of alternating between a self test mode and a object detection mode, or intermittently alternate between the self test mode and object detection mode.

title: Enhanced lane-keeping system for automated vehicles
abstract: A lane-keeping-assist system suitable for use on an automated vehicle includes a camera, a steering-actuator, and a controller. The camera detects a lane-marking of a travel-lane traveled by a host-vehicle. The steering-actuator controls a travel-direction of the host-vehicle. The controller is in communication with the camera and the steering-actuator. The controller determines a lane-width of the travel-lane and determines a centerline of the travel-lane based on the lane-marking. The controller further determines an offset-position of the host-vehicle within the travel-lane based on the lane-marking. The controller further determines a clearance between the host-vehicle and the lane-marking based on the offset-position. The controller further determines an adaptive-threshold based on the lane-width. The controller further determines that the host-vehicle is approaching the lane-marking when the clearance is less than the adaptive-threshold, and activates the steering-actuator to steer the host-vehicle toward the centerline of the travel-lane.

title: Link identity determination and signaling
abstract: A method, a computer-readable medium, and an apparatus for V2V, V2X, or D2D communication may be a transmitting device configured to determine a source ID for communication over a link, to determine a destination ID for the communication over the link based on a type of the communication. The transmitting device may be further configured to transmit at least one control message over the link, where the control message(s) indicate the source ID and the destination ID. In certain aspects, a receiving device may be configured to receive the control message over the link, where the control message indicates the source ID and the destination ID. The receiving device may be configured to receive a data message over the link and to determine whether to attempt to decode the data message received over the link based on the source ID and the destination ID indicated in the control message.

title: Cruise control system having a stop function
abstract: A cruise control system for motor vehicles is described, having a sensor device for measuring the vehicle's performance characteristics and for measuring the distance to a target object ahead of the vehicle, and a controller which is used to control the vehicle's speed or acceleration as a function of the measured performance characteristics and distance data and has a stop function for automatically braking the vehicle to a standstill as well as at least one standstill state in which the vehicle is held in a stationary position by automatic brake activation, and from which it may only drive off again via an operational command by the driver, the operational command becoming effective only when a confirmation signal is present in addition to the operational command.

title: Intelligent parking management system
abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent parking management system. The intelligent parking management system comprises a charging module, a parking stall management module, a traffic guidance module, a monitor module and a clearing system. The charging module comprises electronic plate readers and a charging controller. As a vehicle installs an electronic plate, a bank card opens an attached payment service and the electronic plate readers are installed at an inlet and an outlet of a parking lot, when the electronic plate reader at the inlet of the parking lot identifies an electronic plate of an entering vehicle, an automatic rod is lifted up to permit entering of the vehicle, and when the electronic plate reader at the outlet of the parking lot identifies the electronic plate of the vehicle, the charging controller calculates parking fee, the clearing system counts the total paring fee and then sends fee data to a bank system for carrying out parking fee deduction. Thus, electronic parking fee collection is achieved and a vehicle can enter and leave the parking lot quickly. The intelligent parking management system can identify electronic plates of motor vehicles, the traffic jam in the parking lot can be tackled, and convenient pass services are provided for clients.

title: Intelligent transportation system with unmanned driving and field return charging functions and implementation method
abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent public transportation system with unmanned driving and field return charging functions.The intelligent public transportation system comprises a management platform, a vehicle-mounted terminal, a network traffic control system, a user terminal, a charging station management terminal and a cloud data management terminal.The vehicle-mounted terminal comprises an unmanned intelligent driving system, an automatic charging electricity receiving system, a vehicle status monitoring system, an identity information recognition system and a charging system, all of which are connected with the management platform.The unmanned intelligent driving system and the vehicle status monitoring system are both connected with the cloud data management terminal.The identity information recognition system and the charging system are both connected with the user terminal, and the identity information recognition system is connected with the charging system.The charging station management terminal is connected with the cloud data management terminal.The electric vehicle technology and the unmanned driving technology are combined, a cloud data analysis and intelligent management system achieves a special vehicle use operating mode, and on the premise that safe vehicle use is guaranteed, an individual, intelligent and green public transportation means is provided for a user.

title: Temporal data associations for operating autonomous vehicles
abstract: Systems and method are provided for controlling a vehicle. In one embodiment, a method includes: selecting, by a controller onboard the vehicle, first data for a region from a first device onboard the vehicle based on a relationship between a time associated with the first data and a frequency associated with a second device, obtaining, by the controller, second data from the second device, the second data corresponding to the region, correlating, by the controller, the first data and the second data, and determining, by the controller, a command for operating one or more actuators onboard the vehicle in a manner that is influenced by the correlation between the first data and the second data.

title: Error sensing system for vessels with absolute zero referencing
abstract: An error sensing system for use in marine autopilot systems of the type having a photographic film compass disk aligned with the direction North and sensing means associated with the disk is operative to sense relative movement between the disk and the sensors in response to changes in the heading of the vessel. A first direction error surface portion on the disk has opaque and transparent areas defining a zero reference therebetween, a second magnitude error surface portion on the disk has a second zero reference position in predetermined relation to the first zero reference position and an area of variable transparency extending along the second surface portion. The first and second surface portions are defined by images along the peripheral surface of the photographic film disk. The disk sensing system has first and second light sensors aligned with the first and second surface portions, respectively, to generate direction error and magnitude error signals representative of the direction and extent of movement of the vessel away from a given heading.

title: Image processing apparatus, method and program
abstract: An object characteristic detection performance is improved. In step S54, the feature point density parameter is set based on the distance to the object in the ROI. In steps S56 to S60, feature points are extracted from the feature point candidates in descending order of feature amount, and feature point candidates whose distance from the extracted feature points is within the feature point density parameter are not extracted as feature points. title: Systems and methods for self-driving vehicle collision prevention
abstract: Systems and methods for self-driving collision prevention are presented. The system comprises a self-driving vehicle safety system, having one or more sensors in communication with a control system. The control system is configured determine safety fields and instruct the sensors to scan a region corresponding to the safety fields. The control system determines exclusion regions, and omits the exclusion regions from the safety field. The safety system may also include capability reduction parameters that can be used to constrain the drive system of the vehicle, for example, by restricting turning radius and speed in accordance with the safety fields.

title: Robotic platform and method for performing multiple functions in agricultural systems
abstract: An autonomous vehicle platform and system for selectively performing an in-season management task in an agricultural field while self-navigating between rows of planted crops, the autonomous vehicle platform having a vehicle base with a width so dimensioned as to be insertable through the space between two rows of planted crops, the vehicle base having an in-season task management structure configured to perform various tasks, including selectively applying fertilizer, mapping growth zones and seeding cover crop within an agricultural field.

title: Safety monitoring device for unattended car washer
abstract: Unmanned on duty car washer safety monitoring device includes and sets up the locomotive camera at the top of car washer frame, respectively sets up vehicle position sensor at the both sides inner wall of car washer frame, drives the other vehicle recognition device that sets up of slide rail of entry one side at the car washer, vehicle recognition device include a support, set up vehicle recognition sensor, rear of a vehicle camera and license plate recognition camera on the support. This scheme mainly comprises locomotive camera, vehicle position sensor, vehicle identification sensor, rear of a vehicle camera and license plate identification camera, and after the vehicle drove into the car washer, vehicle position sensor sensed the vehicle, starts locomotive camera and rear of a vehicle camera, shoots vehicle profile information to judge whether can the carwash, record whole carwash process when the carwash, information recording transmission is preserved to the backstage and is handled. This scheme realizes providing the data of car washer immediately to the real time monitoring of car washer, eliminates the trouble hidden danger, improves the security and the reliability of car washer.

title: Cruising-controlled executing mechanism of automobile
abstract: The invention is concerned with a kind of administer framework of vehicle cruise control, relating to guy cable wheel, throttle guy cable enwinding on the guy cable wheel, gag bit ring fixed on this guy cable wheel through spring, electromagnetism clutch, touching piece connecting with control unit of the automatic cruise control system as a lock switch and shell. It drives the hydraulic pressurejar through the road of hydraulic pressure oil, and the road of hydraulic pressure oil connects with the control unit of the automatic cruise control system. The end of piston to this hydraulic pressure jar connects with a pushing pole, the other end of pushing pole connecting with the suction pad of the said electromagnetism clutch forms connecting pole framework. The guy cable wheel and the suction pad fix inside of shell through bearing and supporting axis. The administer framework uses the existing hydraulic pressure drive on vehicle to reduce the inner control of circuit and avoid the swing during the cruise control process.

title: Drive system for an image sensor and its optical accompanying elements of an image or video recording device
abstract: The invention relates to a drive system for the image sensor and its optical accompanying elements, within a device which is equipped with a camera. The drive system is capable of quickly and silently rotating the image sensor and its optics elements in almost any direction, enabling fast moving targets to be captured without the need for the entire housing of the device in which the camera is mounted is built to move. The drive system finds application in devices of all kinds, which have an image sensor, such. B. Digital cameras of all kinds (including video cameras), smartphones, notebooks, smartwatches, tablet PCs, as well as webcams, drone cameras, vehicle cameras or surveillance cameras, data glasses, etc .. The camera is almost like a human eye moved or rotated.

title: Vehicle to everything service sending method and apparatus, and resource configuration method and apparatus
abstract: The present invention provides a Vehicle to Everything (V2X) service sending method and apparatus, and a resource configuration method and apparatus. The V2X service sending method comprises: a first on-board unit (OBU) acquires a sending resource for sending a V2X service, wherein the sending resource comprises resources required for sending V2X service data in the V2X service and scheduling information, and the scheduling information is used for indicating information required for scheduling resources for the V2X service data; the first OBU sends, on the sending resource, the scheduling information and the V2X service data to a second OBU, wherein the scheduling information and the V2X service data are frequency-domain multiplexed in a same sub-frame in the sending resource, and the scheduling information instructs to perform resource configuration on the V2X service data in the same and/or different sub-frames. The present invention resolves the problem of the D2D technology in the related art that resource scheduling information and V2X service data can only be sent separately, and fills the gap in the related art.

title: OBJECT DETECTION AND DETECTION SECURITY SUITABLE FOR AUTONOMOUS DRIVING
abstract: In various examples, captured object data representative of positions of captured objects in a field of view can be determined. One or more clusters of the detected objects can be generated based at least in part on the positions, and features of the cluster can be determined for use as inputs to one or more machine learning models. A confidence score may be received that was calculated based at least in part on the inputs from the machine learning model (s), the confidence score being representative of a probability that the cluster corresponds to an object that is at least partially in the field of view is shown. Other examples provide approaches to determining reference data for training object detectors, such as determining coverage values for reference objects using associated shapes, and determining soft coverage values for reference objects.

title: Vehicle-mounted pedestrian area estimation method based on optical flow clustering
abstract: The invention discloses a vehicle-mounted pedestrian area estimation method based on optical flow clustering, which comprises the steps of carrying out optical flow estimation on an image acquired by a camera to obtain an image optical flow field; then carrying out optical flow clustering to estimate a background area; removing background areas, and dividing foreground areas by using a graph division algorithm; the vehicle-mounted pedestrian area estimation method based on optical flow clustering avoids blind search of pedestrian identification caused by the fact that a traditional pedestrian detection system adopts global template search matching identification, is suitable for vehicle intelligent auxiliary driving, unmanned driving and the like in a vehicle-mounted environment, overcomes the problem that Gaussian distribution of a background is difficult to determine by common EM (effective electromagnetic) algorithms, K-means and other clustering algorithms, can estimate the background area more effectively, and can effectively remove non-pedestrian areas and obtain pedestrian areas by using human morphological characteristics in the process of distinguishing the foreground pedestrian areas.

title: Anti-hijacking system operable in emergencies to deactivate on-board flight controls and remotely pilot aircraft utilizing autopilot
abstract: In an anti-hijacking system for autopilot equipped aircraft, a transceiver communicates with at least one remote guidance facility. A panic button is activated by flight crew in case of hijacking. A manager is coupled to the transceiver and the panic button, as well as existing avionics including the aircraft's master computer and autopilot. Optionally, a relay is coupled between the pilot controls and selected aircraft flight systems. The manager recognizes predetermined override inputs, such as activation of the panic button or receipt of override signals from the remote guidance facility. Responsive to the override input, the manager deactivates on-board control of selected aircraft flight systems and the autopilot system, and directs the autopilot to fly the aircraft to a safe landing. Flight routing and landing instructions are obtained from the remote guidance facility, or by self-evaluating nearby airports in view of the aircraft's position and various preestablished criteria.

title: Autonomous vehicle and diagnosis method therefor
abstract: An autonomous vehicle and a diagnosis method for the autonomous vehicle are provided. The autonomous vehicle includes a memory that stores a driving record of the vehicle and a processor that establishes a diagnosis plan. The vehicle diagnosis is performed while operating the vehicle autonomously, when a stopping period of the vehicle is greater than or equal to a predetermined reference period, based on the driving record.

title: Radom
abstract: Radome, in particular for a distance warning radar for motor vehicles, with a cover plate made of a material transparent to radar beams, with a front side with a front surface and with a rear side with a rear surface, the rear surface being interrupted by at least one three-dimensional structure designed as a depression, characterized in that the recess has a surface with an edge region which, in the transition to the rear surface, assumes an angle of approximately 90 ° to the rear surface and the surface of the recess is coated, the coating in the edge region having a varying coating thickness, which for back surface decreases.

title: Multifunctional electronic accelerator cruise control system
abstract: The utility model relates to a multifunctional electronic accelerator cruise control system which comprises a main controller, and a control handle and a display device that are respectively connected with the main controller, wherein the main controller is connected with an electronic accelerator position sensor by an accelerator adapter; the main controller is connected with a vehicle speed sensor by a vehicle speed signal wire; the main controller is connected with a clutch by a clutch signal wire; the main controller is provided with two braking signal wires which are respectively connected with a stop lamp fuse and a stop lamp; the accelerator adapter is connected with an engine electronic control unit (ECU); the main controller comprises two micro-programmed control unit (MCU) chips, wherein one is used for a main control MCU circuit, and the other one is used for a monitoring MCU circuit; and the main control MCU circuit and the monitoring MCU circuit are used for mutually monitoring. The multifunctional electronic accelerator cruise control system can be applied to all electronic accelerator automobiles, and is added with speeding alarm or speed limit function based on traditional cruise control, thus being especially suitable for being used in urban areas, reducing speeding violation caused by the fault of a driver and fundamentally stopping overspeed driving.

title: Method for operating cruise control in vehicle, involves calculating cruise control commands based on adaptive scaler values and controlling speed of vehicle based on cruise control commands
abstract: The method involves determining adaptive scaler values based on a cylinder deactivation signal and calibrated scaler values. The cruise control commands are calculated for an engine (12) based on the adaptive scaler values for controlling speed of a vehicle (10) during the enabling and disabling of the active fuel management (AFM) control. An independent claim is included for controller for operating cruise control in vehicle.
text: Method for operating cruise control in vehicle, involves calculating cruise control commands based on adaptive scaler values and controlling speed of vehicle based on cruise control commands The method involves determining adaptive scaler values based on a cylinder deactivation signal and calibrated scaler values. The cruise control commands are calculated for an engine (12) based on the adaptive scaler values for controlling speed of a vehicle (10) during the enabling and disabling of the active fuel management (AFM) control. An independent claim is included for controller for operating cruise control in vehicle.

title: Coasting management control of a vehicle with a road speed governor
abstract: A system, method, and apparatus includes management of coasting during operation of a vehicle having an engine that is selectively engageable to a driveline, a cruise control mode of operation, and a road speed governor mode of operation. A road speed governor mode of operation of the vehicle is active in response to a road speed governor operation condition being present wherein the driveline is engaged with the engine. When a coasting management condition is present, operation of the vehicle in the road speed governor mode is disabled, the driveline is disengaged from the engine, and the vehicle is operated in a coasting mode of operation. The coasting mode of operation can be canceled when a coasting mode of operation cancellation condition is present to operate the vehicle in a road speed governor mode of operation with the driveline re-engaged with the engine.
text: Coasting management control of a vehicle with a road speed governor A system, method, and apparatus includes management of coasting during operation of a vehicle having an engine that is selectively engageable to a driveline, a cruise control mode of operation, and a road speed governor mode of operation. A road speed governor mode of operation of the vehicle is active in response to a road speed governor operation condition being present wherein the driveline is engaged with the engine. When a coasting management condition is present, operation of the vehicle in the road speed governor mode is disabled, the driveline is disengaged from the engine, and the vehicle is operated in a coasting mode of operation. The coasting mode of operation can be canceled when a coasting mode of operation cancellation condition is present to operate the vehicle in a road speed governor mode of operation with the driveline re-engaged with the engine.

title: Parking support system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a parking support system which makes a vehicle mounted with an on-vehicle camera and an automatic drive unit perform smooth automatic travel in a parking facility including a slope road surface.SOLUTION: When a vehicle 100 performs automatic travel in a parking facility, an automatic drive unit 57 acquires parking support map information including slope road surface information in the parking facility from a parking support control device 120 of a parking facility side terminal. When determining that a travel position of the own vehicle 100 reaches a slope road surface position (Step S102: YES), the automatic drive unit 57 converts coordinates of a slope road surface Pb in a captured image acquired through an on-vehicle camera 20 into the coordinates of a flat road surface Pa on the basis of the parking support map information including the slope road surface information, converts the coordinate-converted captured image into a planar view image, and makes the vehicle 100 perform the automatic travel on the slope road surface.

title: Vehicle control system and method
abstract: A vehicle control system and method employs a sensing system and a controller. The sensing system is disposed on a host vehicle and configured to sense a visual condition of a driver of the host vehicle. The controller is configured to control an autonomous vehicle control system on board the host vehicle to stop the host vehicle at a stopping location based on the visual condition and at least one point of interest external to the host vehicle.

title: On-vehicle radar
abstract: An on-vehicle radar device capable of stably detecting a target object without losing sight of the target object even when the vehicle is stopped even when transmission power is limited to a predetermined output or less when the vehicle is stopped.   In an in-vehicle radar device that transmits a radio wave toward a target object and measures a distance to the target object based on a received radio wave reflected by the target object, the vehicle stops or falls below a predetermined speed. Vehicle speed determining means for determining whether or not the vehicle is running, and transmission output control for setting the transmission output to be smaller than that during traveling when the vehicle speed determining means detects that the vehicle has stopped or has fallen below a predetermined speed. And reception sensitivity control means for setting the reception gain amount to be larger than that during traveling.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Laser scanning device for an object detection device of a vehicle and corresponding object detection device
abstract: The invention relates to a laser scanning device (12) for an object detection device (10) of a vehicle, wherein the laser scanning device (12) comprises a laser light source (16) and a deflection unit (24) for generating a scanning movement of the laser light. It is contemplated that the deflection unit (24) comprises a MEMS-based bending actuator (20). The invention further relates to a corresponding object detection device (10).

title: Traveling safety device for vehicle
abstract: (57) [Problem] To detect a turning locus of an oncoming vehicle immediately when the oncoming vehicle is determined by the object detection means. SOLUTION: Oncoming vehicle Ao based on relative angle θ and relative distance L detected by a radar device mounted on own vehicle Ai.   Is calculated, and a circle C having a radius equal to the appropriate lateral distance dc (the distance necessary for the own vehicle Ai to pass the oncoming vehicle Ao properly, for example, 3 m) is drawn around the position of the oncoming vehicle Ao. When a circle that touches the traveling direction of the vehicle Ai at the position of the vehicle Ai and touches the outside of the circle C is drawn, the circle becomes an appropriate turning locus of the vehicle Ai. A circle having a turning radius Ro smaller than the turning radius Ri of the proper turning locus of the own vehicle Ai by the proper lateral distance dc and sharing the center O is the turning locus of the oncoming vehicle Ao to be obtained. By dividing the vehicle speed Vo of the oncoming vehicle Ao by the turning radius Ro of the oncoming vehicle Ao, the yaw rate γo of the oncoming vehicle Ao is calculated.

title: Exposure controller of in-vehicle camera
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an exposure controller of an in-vehicle camera in which the exposure of the camera is appropriately controlled even if a preceding vehicle exists.  <P>SOLUTION: When the preceding vehicle 120 is detected in front of an own vehicle, photometry windows L4 to L6 and R4 to R6 are shifted in right/left directions and are set so that they are not overlapped with the preceding vehicle 120 when the photometry windows are set on an image-picked up image. A concentration value of a lane mark in the photometry window shifted by using a concentration ratio of a road surface and a lane mark in the photometry window which is not shifted and the concentration value of the road surface in the shifted photometry window is estimated. The exposure of the camera is controlled by using the estimated concentration value of the lane mark and the concentration value of the lane mark in the photometry window which is not shifted. Thus, a brake lamp or the like of the preceding vehicle is prevented from being reflected in the photometry window. Exposure can precisely be controlled and the lane mark can stably be detected.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2005,JPO&NCIPI

title: Vehicle comprises a steering wheel which can be automatically adjusted between a geometrically small shape and a geometrically large shape depending on the state of the autopilot system
abstract: Vehicle comprises a steering wheel (2a) which can be automatically adjusted between a geometrically small shape when the autopilot system (3) is switched on and a geometrically large shape when the autopilot system is switched off depending on the operating state of the autopilot system. Preferred Features: The steering wheel has sections (6a) which move with respect to a base (4a) and which can be adjusted between a drawn-in position forming the small shape and a telescopic position forming the large shape.

title: Road side processing device for correcting obstacle detection data
abstract: (57) [Summary] Roadside processing characterized in that information on an obstacle that cannot be detected by a detection device is created by estimating from information collected in the past and information is provided to a vehicle via a road-to-vehicle communication device. Provide equipment. When an obstacle on a road once detected by a detection device cannot be detected by the detection device, information that cannot be detected by the detection device is estimated from information collected in the past. A roadside processing device for correcting obstacle detection data, wherein the information is provided to a driver via a road-to-vehicle communication device.

title: Method and apparatus for analyzing personalized multi-omics data
abstract: A method and apparatus for analyzing personalized multi-omics data are disclosed. The method includes acquiring a plurality of biological data groups from an individual's gene sample, estimating indices indicating a degree of genetic abnormalities for the biological data groups, and generating a combined index by merging the estimated indices.

title: Unmanned library system
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide an unmanned library system capable of allowing a user to search books at any time and place to preselect books to be borrowed. To this end, the unmanned library system according to the present invention manages information on books, authenticates a user according to login information transmitted from a user terminal, and manages a library managed by the user terminal server; And an unmanned library device for lending or returning a book according to a control signal transmitted from the library management server, wherein the unmanned library device further comprises a remote control unit for, when the user terminal approaches within a predetermined distance, The library management server recognizes the unmanned library apparatus using the communication ID transmitted from the user terminal, and the user terminal determines whether to lend the book for loan or not When the loan processing menu is selected by the user on the loan screen, information indicating that the loan processing menu has been selected is transmitted to the library management server, and the library management server determines that the loan processing menu is selected When information is received from the user terminal, Unattended library device, and transmits the information on the books for the loan, the library unattended device when information is received on the use of the loan book and the loan book loan for.

title: Vehicle alarm system
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] To output various kinds of alarm sounds of a car as sounds from a speaker of an audio device without using a warning buzzer, so that the sounds can be easily identified. SOLUTION: An output signal of a radio unit 9, a cassette unit 10 or the like is input to an amplifier 13 via a microcomputer 8, and various alarms of a voice synthesis IC 12 are used as one of input signals of an audio device that emits a voice from a speaker 14. Use signals. Since a sound corresponding to the content of the alarm is emitted from the speaker 14, there is no possibility of erroneous recognition.

title: Acrylate elastic emulsion with excellent low-temperature breaking elongation and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses acrylate elastic emulsion with excellent low-temperature breaking elongation, comprising, by weight, 100 parts of deionized water, 70-90 parts of butyl acrylate, 10-30 parts of 2-ethylhexyl acrylate, 5-15 parts of styrene, 5-10 parts of acrylonitrile, 1-5 parts of methacrylic acid, 1-5 parts of acrylamide, 0.1-0.5 part of glycidyl methacrylate, 1-5 parts of aminopolysiloxane, 2-10 parts of an emulsifier, and 0.1-0.5 part of persulfate. The acrylate elastic emulsion has excellent low-temperature breaking elongation.

title: Portable electronic devices
abstract: Provided is a portable electronic device capable of easily investigating a cause of failure.   A non-contact type IC memory is provided in a main body of a digital camera. This non-contact type IC memory includes an IC memory chip 37 that stores information and an antenna unit that transmits and receives electromagnetic waves, and can access and write information to the IC memory chip 37 wirelessly. The IC memory chip 37 records failure information that is written when the system controller determines that a failure has occurred, and operation history information that includes status information and a record in which imaging processing has been executed. For this reason, even when a failure that is not determined to be a failure by the system controller occurs, it is possible to know the progress up to the failure by reading the operation history information, so that the cause of the failure can be easily identified.   [Selection] Figure 2

abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To achieve a guide to an article on display with a high degree of certainty.  <P>SOLUTION: A guide device (portable information terminal 20) for guiding to a guide position by reading guide position information printed or embedded in a medium 10 includes: a positioning unit 212 for positioning the present position information; an azimuth determination unit 213 for determining an azimuth orientation by detecting geomagnetism; and a guide position leading unit 214 for generating and outputting the guide information including the traveling direction to the guide position, based on the present position information positioned by the positioning unit and the azimuth information determined by the azimuth determination unit and the guide position information read from the medium.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2011,JPO&INPIT

title: Pinch tube tank level control valve with snap-action shutoff
abstract: A liquid level control apparatus for a flush tank includes an upstanding fill tube integral at its upper end with a valve housing carrying a flexible resilient pinch tube valve member. The valve housing defines a conduit which communicates with a downwardly extending tube parallel to the fill tube. A float has portions respectively receiving the fill tube and the downwardly extending tube therethrough so that the float slides vertically along the tubes as the water level in the tank varies. In one embodiment, an actuator rib on the float fits in a slot in the housing to directly engage the pinch tube valve member, and in another embodiment an actuator pivots on the housing and is coupled by linkage to the float. In the one embodiment an arresting flange on a resilient portion of the float engages an arresting flange on the fill tube for arresting upward movement of the float until the tank is full to provide a snap-action shutoff of the valve. In the other embodiment the coupling linkage includes a control mechanism having a cam slot engageable with a cam follower roller to provide the arresting and snap action.

title: Wi-Fi networking method and system based on LED devices
abstract: The invention discloses a Wi-Fi networking method and system based on LED devices. The system comprises a Wi-Fi router, the multiple LED devices and an intelligent terminal; each LED device is internally provided with a Wi-Fi module; the intelligent terminal is connected to the Wi-Fi network provided by any LED device in a Wi-Fi mode; the APP of the intelligent terminal issues a Wi-Fi scanning instruction to the Wi-Fi modules; the Wi-Fi modules carry out Wi-Fi scanning and then upload results to the intelligent terminal; a user can appoint an SSID of the Wi-Fi router according to the scanning list and store the encryption mode and the encryption password of the Wi-Fi router, the scanning results are filtered through MAC, the APP of the intelligent terminal is connected to the LED devices according to the filtering results and issues the stored information of the Wi-Fi router to the LED devices, the LED devices receive the information of the Wi-Fi router, then configure the information and restart to take effect, and then the LED devices will be automatically connected to the wireless network provided by the Wi-Fi router. The system and method are simple in implementation principle, convenient to use and intelligent in networking.

title: Instant hot water supply system
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] Even when a plurality of hot water taps are used at the same time in an immediate hot water system, with the pipe diameter of each pipe connecting the hot water heat exchanger and hot water header kept small. Make it possible to prevent fluctuations in the amount of hot water. [Composition] A connection conduit 50 is provided for connecting a first conduit 14 and a second conduit 16 that connect the hot water heat exchanger 10 and the hot water header 12 to each other, and the connection conduit 50 is controlled to be turned on / off. A possible first solenoid valve 52 is arranged. Furthermore, the second pipeline 16   A second solenoid valve 54, which can be controlled to be turned on and off, is arranged at. When hot water is not supplied, the first electromagnetic valve 52 is closed and the second electromagnetic valve 54 is opened via the control device 28. Thereby, the hot water circulates in the first pipeline 14 and the second pipeline 16. When hot water is supplied   The first solenoid valve 52 is opened and the second solenoid valve 54 is closed via the control device 28. Accordingly, the hot water from the hot water supply heat exchanger 10 passes through the two routes R1 and R2 and the hot water supply header 12   Is supplied to.

title: Piezoelectric thin film resonator and method for manufacturing piezoelectric thin film
abstract: A piezoelectric thin film resonator capable of expanding a design range of a specific band and a frequency temperature characteristic and capable of greatly increasing a degree of design freedom is obtained.   SOLUTION: First and second electrodes 5 and 7 are provided so as to face a piezoelectric thin film 6 made of Sc-containing aluminum nitride having a non-uniform concentration distribution of Sc in the thickness direction with the piezoelectric thin film 6 interposed therebetween. The piezoelectric thin film resonator 1 further includes a substrate 2 that supports the piezoelectric vibrating portion including the piezoelectric thin film 6 and the first and second electrodes 5 and 7. title: Mounting assembly for a lavatory
abstract: The invention relates to a mounting assembly for a lavatory, which has a rear wall which can be placed against a wall. The mounting assembly comprises a locking arm which is connected to the wall via a support and, by means of an operating mechanism, can be pivoted between a locked position, in which the locking arm acts on the rear wall of the lavatory and presses it against the wall, and a release position, in which the locking arm releases the rear wall so that the lavatory is freely movable. The operating mechanism may comprise a screw which is mounted in the support.

title: Easily disassembled, one-way check valve
abstract: A check valve for a fluid line which can be easily disassembled and assembled for cleaning, inspection, or repair. The valve finds particular utility in cleaning-in-place equipment such as dairy pipe lines and in which the valves and other components must be quickly, easily, and completely disassembled for thorough cleaning at frequent invervals. The valve includes identical end sections which are formed of resilient material such as plastic or the like and which can be snapped on a central valve element guide and also easily disassembled therefrom. A shiftable valve element is located on the central valve guide and can also be easily disassembled therefrom for frequent and thorough cleaning. The width of the central guide is such that the valve element which is also of resilient material, is properly tensioned to insure its accurate location.

title: Method for suspension-polymerizing vinyl chloride
abstract: In a method for suspension-polymerizing at least one monomer taken from the class consisting of vinyl chloride and a mixture of vinyl monomers having vinyl chloride as a main component in the presence of a suspending agent and a polymerization catalyst in an aqueous medium under agitation and with primary cooling in a vessel, said vessel having a condenser for auxiliary cooling, a passageway between said vessel and said condenser, the improvement which comprises keeping said passageway closed until a conversion of at least 5% is obtained, then opening said passageway and maintaining said auxiliary cooling when said passageway is open.

title: Button-free electronic time reporting watch adopting voice recognition technology
abstract: The utility model provides a button-free electronic time reporting watch adopting the voice recognition technology. The button-free electronic time reporting watch comprises an electronic watch shell (1) and a speaker (2). The button-free electronic time reporting watch is characterized in that the electronic watch shell (1) is only provided with the speaker and not provided with any buttons, and the electronic watch shell (1) can be of a circular or an elliptic structure. Visually impaired people can enable the electronic watch to complete voice broadcasting of the current time just through a way of talking without a need of manual operation, and time modification and setting of alarm clock information are completed under the guidance of voice prompts of the electronic watch.
text: Button-free electronic time reporting watch adopting voice recognition technology The utility model provides a button-free electronic time reporting watch adopting the voice recognition technology. The button-free electronic time reporting watch comprises an electronic watch shell (1) and a speaker (2). The button-free electronic time reporting watch is characterized in that the electronic watch shell (1) is only provided with the speaker and not provided with any buttons, and the electronic watch shell (1) can be of a circular or an elliptic structure. Visually impaired people can enable the electronic watch to complete voice broadcasting of the current time just through a way of talking without a need of manual operation, and time modification and setting of alarm clock information are completed under the guidance of voice prompts of the electronic watch.

title: Food stirring machine with weighing device
abstract: The utility model relates to a food stirring machine, in particular to the food stirring machine with a weighing device. The food stirring machine with the weighing device comprises a stirring head, a machine base and a stirring basin. The machine base is composed of a chassis and a supporting base, and the supporting base is arranged at one side of the chassis; the stirring basin is placed on the chassis, the stirring head is placed at the upper end of the supporting base, and a stirring knife is inserted in the stirring basin; the weighing device is also provided on the stirring machine, and the weighing device in a drawer type is provided on the chassis of the machine base. Because the weighing device is provided on the chassis of the machine base, the food stirring machine solves the defect that the stirring head is needed to turn up to easily bump the weighing device because of taking out the stirring basin; the height of the supporting base is not needed to increase, not only the material is saved but also the volume is reduced, the production cost is decreased, the stirring head is convenient to turn up, and the convenience is brought to users.

title: Single armed hangs hoisting accessory
abstract: The utility model relates to a single armed hangs hoisting accessory, include vertical support bar, lift by crane reel and lifting motor, vertical support bar is last to be equipped with horizontal bracing piece, lifting motor's output shaft with lift by crane the reel and be connected, lift by crane to be equipped with on the reel and lift by crane the couple, be equipped with drive screw in the recess of horizontal bracing piece, the last slider that is equipped with of drive screw, drive screw one side is connected with driving motor, the slider lower extreme is connected with the mount, the mount lower extreme with lift by crane the reel, lifting motor is connected. The utility model discloses a set up drive screw, slider, will lift by crane the reel like this when the in -service use, lifting motor installs on the mount, when the position that needs the regulation and lifting device, through drive motor drive drive screw's rotation, realize the removal of slider to promoting hoisting device and carrying out position adjustment, hoisting device moving accuracy is high under drive screw's effect like this, and convenient operation satisfies the actual demand.

title: Method for planarizing dielectric layer of semiconductor device
abstract: The present invention relates to a method of planarizing an ILD, IMD, or PMD constituting an insulating film by using a chemical mechanical polishing process. The planarizing method of the present invention includes an insulating film on an upper portion of a semiconductor wafer on which a lower structure including metal wiring is formed. Forming a; Forming a step reducing deposition film in a space between stepped portions of the insulating film formed by the lower structure; And planarizing the insulating film. Here, the insulating film is any one of an inter level dielectric (ILD), an inter metal dielectric (IMD), and a pre metal dielectric (PMD), and may be formed of TEOS. The step reducing deposition film is formed of SOG or BPSG, and is formed to be 0.5 times or more the thickness of the stepped portion.

title: Miningwinches lifting weight torquemoment type weighing method and apparatus
abstract: The present invention discloses a weight hoisting torque type weighing method for a mine winch. The method is that a torque type weighing way easy to carry out is used, to measure the torque (torque sampling value) when the mine winch moves in uniform speed to a certain set point, the torque is inputted to a monolithic microcomputer system, a calibration parameter is drawn on through a monolithic microcomputer to operate a subsection interpolation operational program to operate, and then a winch hoisting weight is gotten. The method overcomes the disadvantages of the prior art, thus the intrinsic mine equipment which is not required to be renovated is easy to carry out. According to the method, the present invention also discloses two weight hoisting torque type weighing devices for the mine winch, one is a weight hoisting electromagnetic torque type weighing device for the mine winch, and the other one is a weight hoisting phase position torque type weighing device for the mine winch. The two weight hoisting torque type weighing devices for the mine winch uses sensors such as a current sensor, a voltage sensor, a Hall sensor, and a photoelectric sensor, etc., a power measurement circuit module and the monolithic microcomputer system, etc. belongs to a mature technology, the precision is high, the cost is low, the installation is convenient. Thus the present invention specially applies to well top weighing and metering, such as a mine tax monitoring system, etc.

title: Image processing system, image processing method, and program
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To easily include a content such as an advertisement in a scan image and provide them to a user.SOLUTION: An image processing system having one or more devices for outputting a first image subjected to reading processing on the basis of a paper document comprises: content storage means that stores a second image corresponding to a predetermined content; generation means that generates a composite image obtained by inserting the second image into the first image; and outputting means that outputs the composite image generated by the generation means.

title: Immune detection signal amplifying system and its making method and application
abstract: The present invention relates to preparation of protein, especially the immune detection and amplifying system for preparing coupling agent and its preparation and application. The present invention is one kind of immune signal amplifying system including the compound of staphylococcal protein A (SPA) and streptomycin antibiotic. The system has high detection sensitivity, short operation time.

title: Air-fuel learning control device for internal combustion engine
abstract:
PURPOSE: To precisely perform the fuel correction quickly responding to the air-fuel ratio change for each operation condition by securing the degree of convergence of air fuel ratio learning, and performing the air-fuel ratio correction finely responding to the difference of the correction request due to the difference of the operation region.  
     CONSTITUTION: The operation condition of an internal combustion engine is detected by a means I, and the basic fuel feed quantity is set by a means II. The air-fuel ratio is detected by a means III, and the air-fuel ratio feedback correction value is set by a means IV. The air-fuel ratio learning correction values for individual operation regions in multiple learning maps are stored in a means V, the air-fuel ratio learning correction value is updated by a means VI in the direction to decrease the deviation of the air-fuel ratio feedback correction value from the reference value, and this updating is progressed from the larger operation region of the learning map by a means VII. The basic fuel injection quantity is corrected and the fuel feed quantity is set by a means VIII, and fuel feed is controlled by a means IX. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1991,JPO&Japio

title: Device for separating flow of bulk materials
abstract:
FIELD: agriculture. 
     SUBSTANCE: invention relates to agriculture. The device for separating the flow of bulk materials comprises a receiving neck, a stabilising container and a housing. On the side wall of the stabilising container the discharge canals are made in the form of slits. The discharge canals are connected to the housing cavity, separated by a vertical partition. The tubes are attached to the housing. The receiving neck is attached by the planks to the stabilising container and has a circular section in its upper part and an oval - in its lower part. In the upper part the receiving neck is framed by the attachment flange. The lower oval section of the receiving neck is located with its large symmetry axis perpendicular to the side wall of the stabilising container. 
     EFFECT: device provides high-quality separation of the flow of bulk materials. 
     3 dwg

title: The preparation method of a kind of hydrophilic polyvinylidene fluoride flat sheet membrane and hollow-fibre membrane
abstract: The invention provides the preparation method of a kind of hydrophilic polyvinylidene fluoride flat sheet membrane and hollow-fibre membrane, it is characterized in that, concrete steps comprise: under inert gas shielding, macromole evocating agent end halogen dimethyl siloxane, complexing agent, monomer and solvent and catalyst cuprous halide is added in reaction vessel, react 1 ~ 24 hour be warming up to 40 ~ 120 DEG C under the condition of magnetic agitation after, purifying, obtains triblock polymer; Under inert gas shielding, in another reaction vessel, add the triblock polymer, complexing agent, monomer, solvent and the catalyst cuprous halide that obtain in the first step, be warming up to 50 ~ 120 DEG C under agitation, react 6 ~ 24 hours, purifying, obtains amphiphilic five block polymer; Casting film, obtains hydrophilicity kynoar film.Preparation method of the present invention is simple, is reached the object of hydrophilic modifying by blended amphipathic polymer, the final antifouling property improving film.

title: Large surface area press - has control hydraulic cylinder assemblies between ram and tool holder
abstract: The ram with tool holder is driven by an eccentric mechanism. A pin fitted to the flywheel has a connecting rod acting at the same time as a plunger with hydraulic piston. It is in connection with the hydraulic control system of the press. Between press head and tool holder a number of hydraulic units are fitted and connected to the control system. During the initial stage of operation the rotating crank pin pulls out the plunger from the cylinder creating suction. As the cylinder is in communication with the hydraulic system, hydraulic fluid is withdrawn from the hydraulic cylinders and the pistons together with the tool holder receed.

title: Method and system for passively exercising selected portions of a human body
abstract: A method and system for passively exercising a selected portion of a human body by applying a partial vacuum pressure to the selected portion of the human body; maintaining the partial vacuum pressure applied to the selected portion of the human body for a first predetermined period of time; releasing the partial vacuum pressure so that substantially atmospheric pressure is applied to the selected portion of the human body; and maintaining the substantially atmospheric pressure applied to the selected portion of the human body for a second predetermined period of time.

title: Pillow convenient for arrangement of hands
abstract: A pillow convenient for the arrangement of hands comprises a pillow body (1). The side surface of the pillow body (1) is provided with an arm placing hole (2) which is internally provided with a replaceable pillow inner (3), and an MP3 player (4) and an electronic temperature measuring instrument (5) are arranged in the pillow body (1). The pillow convenient for the arrangement of the hands has the advantages of being convenient for the use of different groups, not changing the sleeping position, also avoiding pressing the arm, simultaneously leading a user to listen music for hypnosis and measure body temperature when in sleeping, being simple in structure and convenient in use, improving the sleeping quality and being beneficial to the health of a human body.

title: Application of PTD-SOD fusion protein to anti-fatigue product
abstract: The invention relates to application of PTD-SOD fusion protein to an anti-fatigue product. The PTD-SOD is fusion protein PTD-SOD which is formed by connection of a protein transduction domain with superoxide dismutase, and the PTD-SOD is used for preparing an anti-fatigue product. The product can enhance activity of SOD in cells, and can effectively protect and restore cells with damaged free radicals caused by fatigue. The PTD-SOD can be used as anti-fatigue food or effective constituent of drugs, and has the advantages of protecting and restoring cells with damaged free radicals caused by fatigue and enhancing anti-fatigue ability of bodies.

title: Sealed confinement appliance, for delivering a substance
abstract: Leaktight confinement appliance ( 1 ), intended to cooperate with an independent receptacle ( 3 ) containing a substance ( 4 ), having its own means ( 8 ) for transfer into and/or out of the receptacle, and with an independent means ( 71 ) for delivery of a material. The appliance includes a handling chamber ( 2 ) defined by a wall ( 13 ) of flexible material substantially leaktight with respect to the external environment. A pouch is formed within the wall of the handling chamber ( 2 ) for retaining an interconnection device. The handling chamber ( 2 ) is arranged to connect at least the transfer means ( 8 ) of the receptacle ( 3 ) to the delivery means ( 71 ) through the interconnection device.

title: Core network device, radio communication base station device, and radio communication method
abstract: It is possible to provide a core network device, a radio communication base station device, and a radio communication method which can improve the radio resource use efficiency of the entire network without increasing UE battery consumption. According to the devices and the method, a user quantity counting unit (163) of UPE (160) counts the number of UE which have performed a position registration in each position registration area containing a plurality of cells. A user quantity comparing unit (164) selects MCT if the counted UE quantity is not smaller than a predetermined threshold value and SCT if the counted UE quantity is smaller than the predetermined threshold value, thereby appropriately performing switching between SCT and MCT in accordance with the UE quantity. Only when the SCT is selected by the UPE (160), eNB counts the number of users in the cell managed by the local device.

title: Audio / musical sound signal encoding method and recording medium storing a program for executing the method
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Problem] To provide a voice / musical sound signal encoding method that suppresses a decrease in quality of a voice / musical sound reproduction signal based on a given amount of information and a signal band. SOLUTION: A voice / musical sound signal is converted into a frequency domain component on a frame basis, and the frequency domain component is deformed by attenuating the amplitude of a component equal to or less than a predetermined threshold value. Is flattened by the spectrum envelope of the voice / sound signal, and the spectrum envelope component and the flattened frequency domain component are quantized to output auxiliary information and main information.

title: Method of extracting information about a sample by nuclear magnetic resonance measurements
abstract: According to an aspect of the present inventive concept, there is provided a method of extracting information about a sample, the method comprising: performing a plurality of magnetic resonance measurements on the sample, each measurement including subjecting the sample to an encoding sequence, at least a part of the sequence being adapted to encode a magnetic resonance signal attenuation due to nuclear relaxation and diffusion, wherein at least one parameter of a gradient pulse sequence is varied between at least a subset of said plurality of measurements,and at least one measurement of said subset includes a gradient pulse sequence having a diffusion-encoding tensor representation with more than one non-zero eigenvalue, and wherein at least a subset of said plurality of measurements include encoding for different levels of magnetic resonance signal attenuation due to nuclear relaxation; and extracting information about the sample from signals resulting from said plurality of magnetic resonance measurements, the information including nuclear relaxation and diffusion characteristics for the sample.

title: Improvements in Writing Machines.
abstract: 23,327. Smith, W. D. Nov. 18. Writing-machines, script or autographic.-Relates to apparatus for writing or tracing one or more predetermined symbols on a recording-surface. Fig. 1 shows a plan, and Fig. 2 a sectional elevation. The tablet A and its extension d are slotted along two edges to engage slides on the frame B, so that, by turning the shaft F, driving the screw C which engages the nut e, the tablet A is moved relatively to the frame B. The scribing-point h is connected by links K, L to spring-held slides J, I, which are actuated by two adjacent cam discs of the series P carried on the shaft F. At the completion of each symbol, the sliding sleove M, carrying the cam discs P, is moved forward by means of the screw disc N and the rack O, the cam discs being so set that during this period of advancement the slides I, J move on parts of the cam discs of equal throw. In a modification, the slides I, J are actuated by cam strips pushed through the apparatus by hand.

title: Manufacturing method of shallow trench isolation structure
abstract: The invention provides a manufacturing method of a shallow trench isolation structure. In the method, a second mask layer with smaller thickness and uniform coverage is obtained by angle preservation deposition, pressure and time spent by chemo-mechanical polishing are effectively reduced, the flatness and the integrity of the surface of a dielectric medium surrounded by the second mask layer are ensured, the generation of the depression effect is avoided, and finally the shallow trench isolation structure with the intact surface is obtained.

title: Method of and apparatus for feeding and registering sheets for facsimile recording
abstract: A facsimile apparatus is provided with a sheet feeding mechanism for supplying sheets of original documents and/or copy paper from a pile 28 to a rotatable scanning drum 10. Rollers 22, 42, 44 advance these sheets on a sheet-by-sheet 26 basis along a transport path 59 which includes a plurality of sensors 60, 72. Feeding is interrupted by sensor 60 detecting a sheet and causing the rollers 42 and 44 to separate and the sheet to be squared up ready for final feeding to drum 10. Such feeding recommences upon receipt of a signal that the apparatus is ready to receive a transmission. <IMAGE>

title: Online pickling device for wire rod
abstract: The utility model provides an online pickling device for a wire rod, which is applied to the field of wire rod production and processing and comprises a wire releasing mechanism (1), a wire winding mechanism (2), a driving mechanism (3) and a pickling processing device (4) for the pickling of the wire rod (7). The pickling processing device (4) is arranged between the wire releasing mechanism (1) and the wire winding mechanism (2) which is driven by the driving mechanism (3) to rotate. The driving mechanism (3) is connected with an electric control system (36) for controlling the driving mechanism (3). The pickling of the wire rod can be directly finished on the production line, and the wire rod is not required to be carried to a pickling tank from going in the production line to going out of the production line, thereby reducing labor strength and improving production efficiency.

title: Production of cut pile knit fabric
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain the subject fabric in high productivity while preventing the dust pollution liable to occur in knife-cutting process by subjecting a double- knit fabric to dyeing, steaming, washing, softening, dehydration, drying and tentering procedures and cutting the pile.  
     CONSTITUTION: A double-knit fabric D produced by a double-raschel machine, etc., is subjected to dyeing treatment, steaming treatment, washing treatment, softening treatment, dehydration treatment and drying and tentering treatment and is cut to knit fabrics D1 and D2 with an endless knife 61 attached to a knife-cutting apparatus 60 to obtain the objective cut pile knit fabric. title: System and method for providing quality inter-domain network time transport
abstract: A method is provided in one example embodiment and includes providing a time protocol assistant associated with a time-synchronized domain (TSD). The TSD includes a set of nodes that are synchronized to a same time source. The TSD has defined egress and ingress edge points where bidirectional measurements can be made and the egress and ingress edge points are coupled to the time protocol assistant. The method also includes synchronizing one or more packets flowing through a network that includes the TSD through the same time source. In more specific embodiments, the nodes are synchronized to the same time source via the network and the same time source is a grandmaster clock that synchronizes one or more transparent clocks. In yet other embodiments, the transparent clocks manipulate precision time protocol (PTP) packets sent by the grandmaster clock.

title: Method for producing textured transparent conductive oxide film of thin-film solar cell
abstract: The invention relates to a method for producing a textured transparent conductive oxide film of a thin-film solar cell, which is used for producing large-area uniform low-cost textured transparent conductive oxide (TCO) films and belongs to the technical field of thin-film solar cells. The technical scheme comprises steps of depositing the transparent conductive oxide film by using target materials with different dosage concentrations and a magnetron sputtering technology on a substrate at the temperature below 100 DEG C, subjecting the produced transparent conductive oxide film firstly to annealing and then to chemical wet etching processing or firstly to the chemical wet etching processing and then to the annealing to form a textured structure, and obtaining the textured transparent conductive oxide film which is applicable to thin-film solar cell production. Large-area films with good light-trapping effects produced by the method can be widely applied to various efficient photoelectric elements, flat-panel displays, solar cells, and particularly to production of thin-film solar cells and photoelectric conversion efficiency of solar cells can be improved. The method reduces energy consumption, and simultaneously lowers requirements for vacuum equipment so as to reduce production cost.

title: Travel reservation support system
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Problem] In a conventional system, a system user planning a trip had to individually access various information sites and search for vacant seat information and route information, so that it took time to search for information. And it is difficult to obtain desired information. In addition, there is a problem that users cannot use the reservation system comfortably because reservations for travel-related sites are concentrated in reservations for large holidays, Bon, and New Year tickets. A travel reservation support server receives a reservation information requesting a travel reservation from a user terminal via a network. The travel reservation support server 1030 performs an inquiry process to the travel-related web site 1050 in a priority order based on the feature information indicating the feature of the booking information.

title: Pipeline valve dismounting assistive tool and pipeline valve dismounting method
abstract: The invention discloses a pipeline valve dismounting assistive tool and a pipeline valve dismounting method. The dismounting assistive tool comprises a mobile trolley; a lifting worktable is arranged on the mobile trolley and provided with a rotary supporting seat for supporting a pipeline valve. The pipeline valve dismounting method can realize dismounting of the pipeline valve by using the pipeline valve dismounting assistive tool; the pipeline valve dismounting assistive tool and the pipeline valve dismounting method disclosed by the invention can be used for conveniently and rapidly dismounting high-attitude pipeline valves and valves which are heavy in weight; the high-attitude pipeline valves and the valves which are heavy in weight are convenient to operate, labor can also be saved, the work efficiency can be improved and the safety in work can be guaranteed as well.

title: Mobile terminal and method for controlling the same
abstract: Disclosed are a mobile terminal and a control method thereof. According to an embodiment of the present invention, the method for controlling the mobile terminal includes the steps of: displaying an execution screen of a first application on a first touchscreen; displaying a guide allowing an area selection when a first input regarding a first area of the first touchscreen is received; selecting a second area by adjusting the location or size of the guide upon receiving a second input regarding the guide; and generating a widget of the first application with the execution screen of the first application corresponding to the second area to display the widget on a second touchscreen when a third input regarding the second area is received. According to the present invention, the first or second touchscreen is used to provide a part of the execution screen of a different application as a widget during a multitasking operation also executing the different application.

title: Die for producing internal splined sleeve
abstract: The utility model discloses a die for producing an internal splined sleeve. The die is characterized in that an annular groove is arranged outside the die, an annular slot is arranged at the middle part of the die, the lower end of the annular slot is provided with an annular hole which is also communicated with the annular slot, and the communicated part of the annular slot and the annular hole is provided with a chamfer. Because of adopting a 'one die with two cavities' design, in the process of extrusion, the die disclosed by the utility model has the advantages of good shaping effect, the product has high quality, which is convenient for subsequent machining; in addition, the utilization ratio of blanks is high, thereby reducing the use quantity of the blanks and reducing the cost.

title: Information conversion device and meteorological forecast system
abstract: This information conversion device is used by a meteorological forecast system provided with a meteorological sensor and a meteorological model calculation device. The meteorological sensor generates meteorological data by observing meteorological elements. The meteorological model calculation device takes macrometeological forecast information and the meteorological data into a pre-constructed meteorological model, and by executing a simulation by means of the meteorological model, calculates meteorological model data forecasting local-region weather. The information conversion device is provided with an observation data conversion unit and a social model conversion unit. The observation data conversion unit receives observation data resulting from observing state quantities in social infrastructure, converts the received observation data to a form that can be reflected in the meteorological model, and transmits the converted data to the meteorological model calculation device. The social model conversion unit receives social model data simulating a forecast of the state quantities in the social infrastructure, converts the received social model data into a form that can be reflected in the meteorological model, and transmits the converted data to the meteorological model calculation device.

title: Image pickup device
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain an image of high quality having no flare by installing a plate type optical body which diffuses and reflects all of opposite-directional light reflected by an image pickup element, etc., out of an optical system while transmitting light from a subject at the side of light entry from the subject.  
     CONSTITUTION: Light from the subject 1 is image-formed on the photoelectric conversion surface 5 of the image pickup element 4 through the optical system 3 composed of a lens 2, etc., and the image is led out in the form of an electrical signal to obtain a necessary electric signal from a signal processing circuit 6. A cholesteric polymer film 7 is arranged on the front surface of the image pickup element 4 at a proper angle to a plane perpendicular to an optical axis as shown in a figure and its periphery is covered with a light absorber 8. When clockwise polarization characteristics are used as the circular polarization dichromatism of said polymer film 7, diffuse reflected circular polarized light is transmitted.

title: Preparation of dispersion
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain a dispersion easy to handle as a high molecular coupler zinc salt by subjecting a high-molecular compound having a salicylic acid unit as a partial skeletal to dispersing treatment along with zinc oxide.  
     CONSTITUTION: A high-molecular compound having a salicylic acid unit in its main chain or side chain as a partial skeletal is subjected to dispersing treatment along with zinc oxide. The high-molecular compound having said salicylic acid unit in its main chain or side chain as a partial skeletal is obtained by a method polymerizing salicylic acid having a vinyl or vinylidene group, the reaction of salicylic acid having a hydroxyl or amino group with an active compound such as an acid anhydride, acid chloride, an epoxy compound or polyisocyanate or condensation utilizing a compound having a plurality of amino or hydroxyl groups. As zinc oxide used in double decomposition, one having a particle size of 3μm or less is favorable because of rapid chlorination of zinc. Zinc oxide is used in an amount of about 0.5-10 times one pts. of a high-molecular salicylic acid derivative. In the dispersing treatment of zinc oxide and the salicylic acid derivative, for example, PVA, sodium hexametaphosphate, sodium dioctyl sulfosuccinate, PEG or a quaternary salt are pref. used. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1991,JPO&Japio

title: Pavement repair material cart
abstract: A portable cart (11) for transporing and dispensing heated pavement repair materials (101) which is capable of being moved and operated by one person, the cart applying a heated asphaltic/polymeric binder material. The cart comprises a heating chamber (13) having an enclosed interior (91) and providing dry radiant heat and a containment chamber (59) located within the enclosed interior of the heating chamber (13), the containment chamber (59) narrowing towards on opening (67). Fuel gas is used to provide dry, radiant heat to the road repair materials to create a fluid material to apply to the surface to repair. The cart (11) further comprises a hand operated gating means (31) controlling gravity-dispensed material within the ocntainment chamber (59). The cart is ideal for repairing cracks and filing expansion channels in concrete and/or asphalt roadways and driveways.
