title: Wrench with metal wire
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a new connection technique capable of efficiently and simply attaching and tensioning an end portion of a attached metal wire at an appropriate midpoint of a connected metal wire.   SOLUTION: A fitting vertical through-hole 42 which is set in an appropriate shape in an arrangement orthogonal to an operating rod portion 21 at a head 22 of a wrench main body 2, and the fitting vertical through-hole 42 on an outer circumferential surface over the entire length thereof. The main shaft 4 formed with a mounting gap 44 connected to the head is pivotally attached with the ratchet mechanism 5, the mounting opening 25 that can communicate with the mounting gap 44 is opened in the head 22, and the main shaft 4 is fitted. The longitudinal through hole 42 has an outer shape that is substantially coincident with the fitted through longitudinal through hole 42, has a longitudinal groove portion 61 that extends to the vicinity of the center at a predetermined width on the outer peripheral surface over the entire length thereof, and is exposed through the main shaft 4. The middle shaft 6 on which the locking collar 62 is formed is placed concentrically at an appropriate eccentric position outside the groove portion 61, and the longitudinal groove closing metal fitting 71 is combined so as to be temporarily fixed by the middle shaft retaining portion 8. This is a wrench 1 for wearing a metal wire rod.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Rapid annealing SAR image segmentation method based on MRF
abstract: The utility model relates to a SAR image segment method for the flash annealing based on a MRF, which is characterized in that: 1) The original split field is defined, 2) The local energy of each pixel point in the current split field is calculated; 3) The current pixel point sentinel is changed: firstly, whether a prior dominant sentinel is in the current pixel point neighborhood is determined, if yes, the new sentinel of the current pixel point is marked as the prior dominant sentinel; if no, the sentinel of the current pixel point is changed randomly to get a new sentinel, if the new sentinel calculated energy is lower than that of the current sentinel, the new sentinel is accepted, otherwise a value is randomly selected between 0 and 1, if the possibility rate corresponding to the energy differential value between the new energy and the current energy is larger than or equal to the selected value, the sentinel is accepted, otherwise the new sentinel is not accepted; 4) A global energy in the current state and in the new state is calculated, if the variable value of the global energy is less than a threshold value defined in advanced, the iterative optimization process is over. The utility model has advantages of increasing the processing speed, and facilitating the application of the SAR image segment method based on the analogue annealing in processing system.

title: Intake throttle control device for internal combustion engine
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] It is possible to accurately diagnose whether or not there is a control abnormality in the intake throttle system of the internal combustion engine, and to suitably judge whether or not this can contribute to fail-safe in the event of a fuel injection control system abnormality. An intake throttle control device capable of assisting is provided. An intake throttle control device includes a sub-throttle valve 60 arranged in an intake pipe of an engine for controlling an intake amount thereof.   Is configured. Here, for example, vibration prevention control at the time of engine stop by this control device is utilized to detect the state of the ignition switch 97, and the sub-throttle valve 60 is controlled to be fully closed based on the detection of OFF of the switch 97. At this time, the rotation speed sensor 35 also detects whether or not the engine is rotating, and determines whether or not the engine is not rotating before the fuel injection to the engine is stopped. Then, when it is determined that the stop of the engine (no rotation) is detected after the fuel injection is stopped, it is diagnosed that the intake throttle system is abnormal.

title: Light earthquake driller
abstract: The utility model relates to a light material-exploration driller, and is a light manpower dispersing removal driller with high efficiency designed for the requirement of seismic exploitation and shot hole. The driller is a rotary power head type dead-weight pressure continuous driller matched with a single-screw pump water supply. The motor winch of a planet gear and a split type brake band control the rising, descending and stopping of a loop wheel machine and boring tools, and each component connects with an under frame by a hinge pin, a block, a press-draw shift and a hook. The device can be quickly decomposed into a loop wheel machine, a base, a head frame, an under frame and a water pump five parts and is convenient for the frequent removal in field construction. The driller is applied to non-rock ground layer, in particular seismic exploitation well drilling in water net and inconvenient traffic and geography condition, with drilling depth 15-25 meters and bore diameter 110 millimeters.

title: Electric vehicle
abstract: An object of the present invention is to achieve both protection of equipment and ensuring the traveling performance of evacuation travel by performing appropriate control according to the type of abnormality in an electrical system.   An electric system of an electric vehicle includes a converter connected between a battery and power lines, and inverters connected between the power line and MG1 and MG2, respectively. When an overcurrent or overvoltage abnormality occurs in the electrical system, ECU 170 stops the device in which the abnormality has occurred. On the other hand, ECU 170 stops the boosting function and causes power line PL and battery 150 when an abnormality (second type abnormality) in which an abnormal part cannot be specified from a plurality of places where there is a possibility of abnormality occurs in the electric system. During this time, converter 200 is operated in a state where a bidirectional energization path is secured, and the running of the electric vehicle is continued in a state where the operations of inverters 210 and 220 are continued.   [Selection] Figure 4

title: Photosensitive resins comprising poly(siloxane) derivatives
abstract: Poly(siloxane) derivatives useful as a resist material in the fabrication of semiconductor devices are described. The derivatives comprise siloxane units having at least one functional group selected from an unsaturated group, an alkyl group and a halogenated alkyl group and a polysilanyl end group capable of generating an active species upon application of deep UV whereby the derivatives exhibit high sensitivity, high resolution and high O₂-RIE resistance.

title: Cable securing device of elevator
abstract: Cable vibration generated during elevator driving is reliably suppressed, and the vibration is prevented from propagating to the floor and causing noise.   A plurality of cable fixing devices 21 are arranged at regular intervals along cables 22a to 22c that connect an inverter device of an elevator and an electric motor. The cable fixing device 21 includes fixing plates 31 and 32, and has a plurality of grooves for holding the cables 22a to 22c in a horizontal row. The fixing plate 32 is fixed to the cable installation surface 30 with the cables 22a to 22c being sandwiched between the grooves. Thereby, the vibration of the cables 22a to 22c generated during driving can be suppressed, and the vibration can be prevented from being transmitted through the cable installation surface 30 and causing noise.   [Selection] Figure 2

title: Repairing method and device for concave-convex defect of inside-laser powder feeding cladding
abstract: The invention discloses a repairing method and device for a concave-convex defect of inside-laser powder feeding cladding. The repairing method comprises the following steps of S1, controlling a concave point in a concave-convex defect surface of a base material to be located on an initial negative defocusing position of an annularly-tapered focused laser beam; S2, controlling the annularly-tapered focused laser beam, a powder beam located inside the laser beam and a protective gas located at the periphery of the powder beam to coaxially emit; S3, controlling the laser beam, the powder beam located inside the laser beam and the protective gas located at the periphery of the powder beam to move along the concave-convex defect surface; and S4, melting the powder beam on the surface of the material by using the laser beam, solidifying to form a cladding runner, and repeatedly moving to repair the concave-convex defect step by step in a layer-by-layer cladding way. The repairing method disclosed by the invention is used for repairing the concave-convex defect surface of the base material based on hollow laser and inside-laser powder feeding; and meanwhile, an even cladding layer is formed on the concave-convex defect surface through reasonably controlling the defocusing amount of laser, so that the unevenness caused by accumulation on a forming surface in a cladding accumulation forming process is repaired.

title: Upper mounting type ball valve
abstract: The utility model relates to a loading type ball valve, wherein traditional split ball valve can not realize online maintenance and the connecting flange directly bears the stress of pipeline to cause leakage of gasket. The valve body of the loading type ball valve is connected in a pipeline all the time and can realize online operation. The valve is composed of a valve body, a ball, an axle sleeve, a bearing, a spring, a graphite ring, an O-shaped ring, a valve seat support ring, a seal ring, a valve cover gasket, a valve cover, a valve rod and a gland. The loading type ball valve has the advantages of low weight, full bore, non leakage, low operation torque, fire resistant structure and the application in long pipeline system. The valve can realize full-bore, injection, discharge and dredging or the like according to API 6D demands, is suitable for natural gas, oil product, chemical, metallurgy and pharmacy or the like, and can be used to open and close a pipeline.

title: Control method of remaining fuel for fuel filled cylinder
abstract:
PURPOSE: To attempt to prevent a claim due to lack of gas, etc., by setting a warning value that notifies a center device connected with a public switched line of warning when remaining fuel becomes less than a fixed value, notifying the center device of the warning value, and preparing a schedule of delivery practice.  
     CONSTITUTION: In a control system, the center device 10 of a LP gas sales shop and domestic devices 40 are connected through a public switched network 30. Multiple warning values that notify warning when the remaining fuel of the LPG cylinders 43 of the terminal devices 41 of respective domestic devices 40 are set by the center device 10. As well as performing down load of warning values, the terminal devices 41 notify the center device 10 of the warning values when the remaining quantity became less than a specified value in accordance with the warning values, and schedules of delivery practice of the LPG gas cylinders are prepared by the center device 10. As a result, claims due to lack of fuel from users, etc., can be prevented.

title: Anti-occupation safety blind road floor tile
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of municipal construction, and particularly relates to an anti-occupation safe blind road floor tile which comprises a hollow brick body, wherein the upper end of the brick body is provided with an opening, a flexible pedal is fixedly connected to the inner side wall of the brick body, a whistle pipe penetrates through the flexible pedal, a threaded rod is fixedly connected to the lower surface of the flexible pedal, the lower end of the threaded rod is rotatably connected with a spring, the lower end of the spring is fixedly connected with the inner bottom surface of the brick body, a threaded barrel is rotatably connected to the inner bottom surface of the brick body, the threaded barrel is sleeved outside the threaded rod and is in threaded connection with the threaded rod, and fan blades are fixedly connected to the side walls on the two sides of the threaded barrel. The invention can produce sound through the whistle pipe, even if the bulge on the floor tile is ground flat, the invention can also give an auditory prompt to the blind person, thereby having good guiding function and higher safety.

title: Impregnated salts, a method for producing said salts, and the use of the same
abstract: The invention relates to impregnated salts, containing at least one salt of one or several organic carboxylic acids in which 0.5 to 30 wt. % of at least one organic carboxylic acid has been incorporated in relation to the carboxylic acid salt. The invention also relates to preservatives containing an impregnated salt and optionally, at least one carrier substance and/or formulation auxiliary agents. Said preservatives can be covered with a covering agent and/or a powdering agent. Finally, the invention relates to a method for producing the impregnated salts and the preservatives, and to the use of said salts and preservatives for treating foodstuffs and animal food, and for silage or for treating leather.

title: Multi-station automatic collecting device of automatic rib cutting system
abstract: The invention discloses a multi-station automatic collecting device of an automatic rib cutting system. The multi-station automatic collecting device of the automatic rib cutting system comprises a transition station, a receiving station and a collecting station, wherein each of the transition station, the receiving station and the collecting station is provided with a collecting plate positioning plate which limits the position of a collecting plate; a collecting plate fixing block which is matched with the collecting plate and a cylinder (a) which drives the collecting plate fixing block to move in the left-right direction are arranged on the bottom of the receiving station; a cylinder (b) which upwards supports the collecting plate is arranged on the bottom of the transition station; a collecting plate pulling block which prevents the collecting plate from dropping is arranged on the collecting plate positioning plate of the transition station; a cylinder (c) which upwards supports the collecting plate is arranged on the bottom of the collecting station; and an automatic collecting plate locking device which prevents the collecting plate from dropping is arranged on the collecting plate positioning plate of the collecting station. Compared with the existing collecting device, the multi-station automatic collecting device of the automatic rib cutting system has the advantages that the automatic rib cutting system can automatically collect materials quickly and continuously; the automation of the automatic rib cutting system for integrated circuit products is high; and the production efficiency is improved.

title: Nurse call system
abstract: An object of the present invention is to elucidate the cause of a patient pressing a nurse call.   A nurse call slave device 200 is provided at a position where a patient can operate, and transmits a call signal for calling a nurse call master device 300. Nurse call parent device 300 receives the call signal transmitted from nurse call child device 200. The bedside monitor 400 and the storage device 500 monitor the patient's biological information. The extraction device 600 uses the biometric information monitored by the bedside monitor 400 and the storage device 500 as a reference when the call signal is transmitted by the nurse call slave device 200 or when the call signal is received by the nurse call parent device 300. Extract biological information monitored during the period. The storage device 700 stores the biological information extracted by the extraction device 600.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Thermal fixing roller
abstract: In a heat fixing roller having an elastic rubber layer on the outer peripheral surface of a roller shaft and a toner release layer on the outer periphery, the thermal conductivity after curing of the elastic rubber layer is 0.16 W / m · ° C. or less. A heat fixing formed by a cured product of an addition curable silicone rubber composition, wherein the toner release layer is formed by a cured product of the addition curable silicone rubber composition having a higher thermal conductivity than the elastic rubber layer. roller.   [Effect] The heat-fixing roller of the present invention has two heat conductive layers, has low heat conductivity as a whole, hardly peels off between the two layers, and has excellent durability. title: A kind of device for gathering blasting vibration signal
abstract: The utility model is a kind of device for gathering blasting vibration signal.The device described in the utility model includes vibration measuring stake, sensor placement platform, vibration monitor protective shelter, three-dimensional acceleration transducer, signal transmssion line, Blast Vibration Monitoring instrument.The utility model gathers vibration signal using the mode that the drilling at monitoring point pours vibration measuring platform, it is adaptable to the blasting vibration signal collection of top layer rock mass soft broken；The utility model is solved in Blast Vibration Monitoring, due to the distorted signals problem that the interference of the joint fissure and weak intercalated layer of earth's surface soft rock mass is caused, to control stability and the blasting vibration harm of surrounding rock body, it is ensured that shotfiring safety operation provides foundation.

title: Electrophotographic photoreceptor and method of manufacturing the same
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a coating solution for forming a photosensitive layer which can be stored for a long period of time, and to provide a method for producing an electrophotographic photosensitive member using the same. A coating solution for a photosensitive layer forming layer is prepared which contains a charge generating substance, a polyvinyl butyral resin, methyl ethyl ketone, and 0.1 to 20 times N, N-dimethylformamide with respect to the charge generating substance. As the charge generating substance, 7.4 ± of the Bragg angle (2θ ± 0.2 °) with respect to the CuKα characteristic X-ray in the X-ray diffraction spectrum.   Hydroxygallium phthalocyanine having strong diffraction peaks at 0.3 ° and 28.2 ± 0.3 ° is preferred. When the photosensitive layer has a two-layer structure, the charge transport layer is formed at a drying temperature in the range of 140 to 200C.

title: Apparatus and method for analyzing golf swing
abstract: The present invention relates to an apparatus for analyzing a golf swing. In particular, the present invention relates to a golf swing analyzer comprising two or more lights on an extension that is attached to a connector. In turn, the connector is capable of being attached to a golf club shaft or hosel, without being attached to the head of the club.

title: Skewer thrusting device
abstract:
PURPOSE: To provide a skewer-thrusting device which thrusts a number of skewers automatically and certainly, comprising a disposing plate having a number of disposing grooves each of which contains a skewer, and having a number of protrusions to thrust said skewers by the action of a sliding mechanism.  
     CONSTITUTION: A case C containing foods F is placed in the proper position of a frame 1. A sliding plate 4 is retreated and skewers S are inserted into the disposing grooves 30 of the disposing plate 3. The sliding plate 4 is transferred toward the case C by the action of the lever 58 turned by the motor 50. The protrusions at the bottom of the sliding plate 4 push the rear ends of the skewers S in the disposing grooves 30, and the foods F in the food case C are skewered with the shewer S.

title: Laundry detergent composition
abstract: The present invention is directed to a laundry detergent bar composition which includes an anionic surfactant system including a linear alkylbenzene sulfonate and an alkyl sulfate, and the combination of a certain modified polyethyleneimine polymer and a stilbenedisulfonate brightener to provide improved dye transfer inhibition.

title: Furnace wall composite structure of heating furnace
abstract: The utility model relates to a furnace wall composite structure of a heating furnace. The furnace wall composite structure sequentially comprises a refractory clay brick layer, a thermal insulation layer and a steel plate layer from the interior of the heating furnace to the exterior of the heating furnace, wherein the thermal insulation layer is divided into three layers, namely a thermal insulation cotton fiber layer I, a thermal insulation clay layer and a thermal insulation cotton fiber layer II from the interior of the heating furnace to the exterior of the heating furnace. The furnace wall composite structure has good heating and thermal insulation effects, the outer wall temperature of the furnace wall with the structure is only 60 DEG C, and production energy sources are saved by 2-3%, the production cost of enterprises is reduced, and the amount of waste gas discharge is also reduced, therefore the furnace wall composite structure is energy-saving and environment-protective, and worth greatly promoting.

title: Pneumatic action figure
abstract: A pneumatic action figure doll is disclosed with articulated limbs controlled by a hand operated pneumatic pump. The articulated limbs may comprise connected limb members and links configured to move in a plane. Operation of the handheld pump may cause the articulated limbs to extend and retract. When the limbs are arms, operation simulates arm swinging motions similar to fighting or boxing. The doll may include actuators to extend articulated arms in response to operation of the pump. The doll may be articulated at the waist to provide movement of the torso when articulated arms extend and retract. The doll may be used alone or with other similarly configured dolls. The dolls may be placed opposite each other. Simultaneous extension and retraction of the doll arms in response to simultaneous operation of the handheld pumps may resemble fighting or boxing between the dolls.

title: Gate opening and closing system
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Problem] To provide a gate opening / closing system that can automatically open a gate when a user approaches and automatically close the gate after the user goes away. SOLUTION: The portable device has a portable device carried by a user and a gate side unit 4 mounted on a gate post 3a. The gate unit 4 transmits an ID signal at an arbitrary timing. When the portable device approaches the gate unit 4, the ID signal is received by the portable device. Then, when the ID of the portable device and the ID of the gate-side unit 4 can be collated,   An ID signal is transmitted from the portable device to the gate side unit. When the ID of the portable device and the ID of the gate-side unit can be checked in the gate-side unit, the gate 2 is automatically opened. Thereafter, when the portable device moves away from the gate-side unit 4, the gate 2 is automatically closed. By such an operation, the user can easily pass through the front opening of the gate 2 without opening and closing the gate.

title: Valve for LPG bottle
abstract: The utility model relates to a valve used for a liquefied gas bottle, mainly comprising a hand wheel, a pressing nut, a valve pad, a flap, a connection strap and a valve rod which is positioned in the valve body and connected with the flap via the connection strap. The upper end of the valve rod is connected with the hand wheel via the pressing nut, the position of the valve rod positioned in the pressing nut is sealed by two ducts of O-typed sealing rings, and a sealing gasket is arranged at the contact end of the pressing nut and the valve body. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, good air tightness, nonperishable abrasion and long service life. The utility model is mainly used on the liquefied gas bottle and can be served as the replacement product of a YSF-1 type cylinder valve used greatly in China at present.

title: Voltage controlled oscillator, voltage controlled oscillator device and radar device
abstract: A voltage controlled oscillator, a voltage controlled oscillator device and a radar device provided with the same, which can detect when the oscillation frequency becomes uncontrollable. In one embodiment, a Gunn or other oscillation device is connected to a main line and a varactor diode, which is a variable reactance element, is connected between the main line and a secondary line to form a voltage controlled oscillator. A control voltage is applied to a varactor diode via a switching circuit, and the presence or absence of oscillation or a malfunction of the varactor diode or the oscillation device is detected by a detection signal, for example from the varactor diode while being monitored by a voltage monitor, and / or from that Oscillating device while being monitored by a current detection device.

title: For the vibrating screen classifier system that pulp or fruit grain are produced
abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of vibrating screen classifier system of producing for pulp or fruit grain, described system: comprise Buffer Pool, first point of measuring tank, some one-level screening machines, second component groove, some permeate secondary screening machines, at least one trapped substance secondary screening machine and three-component groove, described Buffer Pool is communicated with first point of measuring tank by chute, the discharging opening of first point of measuring tank is placed in above the charging aperture of one-level screening machine, the permeate outlet of one-level screening machine is communicated with second component groove, the discharging opening of second component groove is placed in above permeate secondary screening machine charging aperture, the discharging opening of permeate secondary screening machine is communicated with three-component groove, the trapped substance of one-level screening machine is discharged by the port of export, then by artificial or lift mechanism lifts in trapped substance secondary screening machine.The automatic feed of the utility model energy, automatic sieving, self-emptying, can enhance productivity greatly, reduces production cost, makes whole pulp, fruit grain production system continuity good.

title: Intelligent body-building cycle
abstract: The utility model belongs to a toy cycle for children. At present, toy cycles for the children are generally driven by feet and are steered by hands, while the utility model designs the novel toy cycle which is driven by the hands and is steered by the feet. The utility model is composed of an operating handle connected to a rear wheel axle and a seat cushion connected to a front wheel axle by a supporting rod, wherein the supporting rod for the seat cushion is connected with the operating handle by a pin axle and springs, and ratchet wheel assemblies are respectively arranged in a front wheel and a rear wheel, wherein the ratchet wheels are respectively fixed to the front wheel axle and the rear wheel axle, and detents and the springs are connected in the front wheel and the rear wheel.

title: Polarization-distributed adjustable vector beam generating device
abstract: The utility model relates to a polarization-distributed adjustable vector beam generating device, which consists of a light source, a reflection-type conical-surface reflector, a conical-surface polarization apparatus, an inner-reflection-type conical-surface reflector and two parallel half wave plates, wherein the light source is arranged on a symmetric axis of a system, the reflection-type conical-surface reflector, the conical-surface polarization apparatus and the inner-reflection-type conical-surface reflector are sequentially arranged on an emitting light path of the light source, and the two half wave plates are provided with a rotating movable part. The emitting beam of the light source is reflected by an outer-reflection conical-surface reflector to form a conical-surface transmitting beam with a radial transmission batch and an axial transmission batch, and the polarization state of the beam is changed by the conical-surface polarization apparatus, and the beam is reflected by the inner-reflection-type conical-surface reflector to form a vector beam which is distributed in a polarization way, and the polarization distribution of the beam can be adjusted by adjusting an angle between an optical axis of the two half wave plates through the rotation movable part. The device has the advantages of reasonable structure design, less part, convenient application and the like.

title: A panel of a ocher house
abstract:
The present invention relates to an ocher panel structure capable of building ocher houses of various shapes desired by the user using ocher.
   
   
    An object of the present invention is to manufacture ocher panels using insulation and bamboo, and to change the shape of the ocher panels to meet the needs of users, and then to fill the ocher panels with ocher, to make various ocher houses. To provide a panel structure for building houses.
   
   
    The present invention for achieving the above object is a lattice-like assembly consisting of a crossbar and a first longitudinal, a squirrel to which the lattice-like assembly is attached / coupled to both sides, and a brace formed to be inclined at a predetermined angle on the upper side of the crossbar. The member is formed as a second longitudinal coupling formed on the brace member.
   
   
    Here, the crosspiece or the first and second vertical poles and the bracing member are fixed / supported to the squirrel by the 'U'-shaped combination, and the surface of the crossbar or the first and second vertical poles and the bracing member has elvan or germanium powder. It is preferable to apply.

title: Plasma spectroscope and forming apparatus for thin film
abstract:
PURPOSE: To enable long-time monitoring of a plasma state by a construction wherein an electrode for generating a state of local discharge is provided in a weak ionization plasma or in the vicinity of an incidence port of an optical waveguide.  
     CONSTITUTION: An optical waveguide 2 has a silica fiber 21 as a main component, and doubled silica glass windows 22 and 23 and a condenser lens 24 are provided in the fore end part thereof. The silica glass window 22 being an incidence port is fitted to an insulator ring of Teflon or the like and an electrode 27 is fitted to the outer peripheral part thereof. The optical waveguide 22 is inserted into a plasma to be observed and a prescribed power is impressed on the electrode 27 from a power source 3. Thereby a local discharge is generated in the vicinity of the silica glass window 22 being the incidence port. Some charged particles accelerated by this local discharge collide with the silica glass window 22 and sputter away a substance sticking on the silica glass window 22. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1992,JPO&Japio

title: Sub-synchronous resonance filters for series capacitors
abstract: A passive filter device for a capacitor in series with a substantially inductive transmission line of an electric transmission system is disclosed. The passive filter device comprises a double-loop RCL filter in parallel with the series capacitor. At power frequency, the filter device allows the power frequency current to pass through the series capacitor with minimum power losses. At sub-synchronous resonance frequencies, the passive filter device provides bypassing of the series capacitor with maximum selectivity of the RCL filter.

At sub-synchronous resonance frequencies, the passive filter device provides bypassing of the series capacitor with maximum selectivity of the RCL filter.

title: Ski fastening
abstract: The invention concerns a ski fastening for fixing a skiing shoe (1) on a ski, said fastening comprising a body part (2) to be fixed on the ski and a catch member (3) pivotally attached to the body part and with the aid of which, by mediation of an eye-like hook member (4) on the skiing shoe the shoe becomes fixed to the body part (2). The surface of the body part (2) abutting on the shoe tip forms a wedge-like surface (6) substantially conforming to the tip (5) of the shoe and tapering in the direction forward. In the narrowest part of the surface (6), the front part (7), has been provided for the hook member (4) an aperture (8). Furthermore, the catch member (3) comprises a locking claw (9) of curved shape for locking the hook member (4) that has been pushed through the aperture (8) and, along with it the tip (5) of the skiing shoe (1), to be substantially immovable relative to the body part (2).

title: Desert ecological brick and preparation method thereof
abstract: The present invention provides a kind of desert ecological brick, including multiple decomposable brick ontologies, the intrinsic top of brick is equipped with water collection chamber and lower part is equipped with and cultivates chamber, it is equipped in the water collection chamber for catchmenting and preventing moisture evaporation to go out the water storage portion outside chamber, the water storage portion is equipped with the first communication port and multiple deflector holes, the lower section of the water storage portion is equipped with fixed plate diagonally downward, the cultivation intracavitary, which is equipped with, cultivates block, the peripheral edge for cultivating block is equipped with the first bushing, it is equipped with plant at the center for cultivating block, the second communication port is equipped at the center of the fixed plate, the fixed plate is set between water collection chamber and cultivation chamber, and with this body by integral forming of brick, the upper surface of the brick ontology is equipped with degradable reflector, the lower end of the brick ontology is equipped with the bottom baffles of permeable watertight.Desert ecological brick has water collecting function and nutritional ingredient, provides plant growth environment, and then effective Desert Control, prevents from desertifying, and improves vegetation vital conjuncture.

title: Improvements in bags for domestic vacuum cleaners or like apparatus
abstract: 1,094,832. Suction cleaners. P. & B. PLASTICS Ltd. Oct. 31, 1966 [July 30, 1965], No. 32851/65. Heading A4F. [Also in Division B1] A vacuum-cleaner dust bag A comprises a tube of impervious polyethylene or P.V.C. having a single outlet aperture closed by a filter pad B, of foamed plastics and impregnated with a distinfectant or deodorant solution for treating the air in a room. The bag is made from a sheet, welded lengthwise, and two pads B may be welded thereto, inside and outside of the aperture (Fig. 3, not shown). The lower end of the bag is attached to the cleaner delivery nozzle by a draw string C<SP>1</SP>, and the upper end is closed, by welding or by a closure plate (D) to which the bag is secured by a second draw string (C<SP>2</SP>) (Fig. 5, not shown). The bag A may be used as a disposable liner or may be coloured and act as an appearance bag and filter combined. A suspension eyelet C<SP>4</SP> may be incorporated in the upper end of the bag.

The lower end of the bag is attached to the cleaner delivery nozzle by a draw string C<SP>1</SP>, and the upper end is closed, by welding or by a closure plate (D) to which the bag is secured by a second draw string (C<SP>2</SP>) (Fig. 5, not shown). The bag A may be used as a disposable liner or may be coloured and act as an appearance bag and filter combined. A suspension eyelet C<SP>4</SP> may be incorporated in the upper end of the bag.

title: Tape cutter
abstract:
PURPOSE: To make easy drawing of a coil-like adhesive tape in a tape cutter used by means of being attached to the tape by providing a drawing portion on the lower side of a cutting portion inclined in the tape drawing direction with respect to the normal line of the outer peripheral surface of the tape.  
     CONSTITUTION: A knife edge 2 is inclined at angles of 45 degree to a tangential line of the outer peripheral surface of a tape T, and has a projection streak so as to be sticked with the adhesive surface of the extreme end Ta of the tape. A cutting portion 3 has a cutting edge 3a is inclined in the drawing direction to the normal line of the outer peripheral surface of the tape T, and is further formed with a drawing portion 3b on the lower side of a front surface. The drawing portion 3b prevents the extreme end Ta of the tape from being sticked onto the cutting portion 3. A tape cutter 1 is attached to a main body of the coil-like tape T. As the tape main body is rotated reversely to the tape cutter 1, the extreme end Ta of the tape is peeled off to be raised, thus making easy the drawing of the tape. The extreme end Ta of the tape after being cut is returned to the knife edge 2 without being sticked on the cutting portion 3.

title: Conduction copper base for carbon brush base of electric machine
abstract: The utility model relates to a conduction copper base for carbon brush base of electric machines, which is in a hollow cross shape. The utility model is a unit piece before the utility model is punched; the upper part of the utility model is protruded with a current conducting end piece, and the lower part of the utility model is provided with a convex lug; one side end is provided with two beveled edge grooves; a bottom of the utility model is provided with a half convex lug, and the position which corresponds to the other side end is provided with two beveled edge scarfers with the half convex lug and shapes opposite to the beveled edge grooves; the utility model is formed by being punched, the two convex lugs which are outwards turned over are perpendicular to the current conducting copper holder; the outside of the utility model is extruded and coated for one time by electric plastics; the two convex lugs extend out, and a carbon brush base end is formed. The utility model has the advantages that the utility model can be quickly formed, the cost can be reduced, and the utility model is stable and reliable.

title: Method and device for determining toxicity using luminous microorganism
abstract: The present invention is a first container for applying a sample containing a luminescent microorganism and toxic substances, a second container for applying a control containing a luminescent microorganism but no toxic substances, measuring the amount of light emitted from the first container Using a light-emitting microorganism comprising a first light receiving unit for, a second light receiving unit for measuring the amount of light emitted from the second container, and an operational amplifier for amplifying the difference between the light emission amount detected in the first light receiving unit and the second light receiving unit Regarding the toxicity analyzer and the method for analyzing the toxicity, the toxicity analyzer and the method for analyzing the toxicity according to the present invention is advantageous in that it is portable and does not require separate data correction.

title: Endless loop voice data storage and retrievable apparatus and method thereof
abstract: Apparatus and method for storing and retrieving audio data simultaneously. A digital audio logger is provided with a digital audio tape (DAT) for permanent storage of audio data and with a random access storage (RAS) device that provides fast retrieval of audio. Both the DAT and RAS devices have audio written from a buffer that initially stores audio data temporarily. Two pointers are provided for the RAS device. Because of the randomness characteristic of the RAS device, data can be retrieved rapidly with a first one of the pointers and for this reason has advantages in fast retrieval. The RAS device communicates with a supervisor whereby data can be retrieved therefrom through the first pointer while the RAS device is receiving data from the buffer through the second pointer.

title: Multilayered wafer, its manufacturing method, and its inspection apparatus
abstract: Displacement between patterns on each layer can be detected with small variations in the amount and direction of errors, and the process for detecting misalignment can be configured simply and performed in a short time. Furthermore, the present invention provides a multilayer wafer composed of a multilayer thin film, a manufacturing method thereof, and an inspection apparatus thereof that can suppress the area occupied by the overlay marker on the multilayer thin film.   Overlay markers 62a, 70a, 66a for enabling detection of relative displacement between patterns 62, 66, 70 in each layer are provided in each layer, and observation of a specific overlay marker 70a in at least one layer is provided. Overlay markers 62a, 70a, and 66a are provided so that a plurality of overlay markers 62a and 66a different from the layer can be observed from the position.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Self-balancing in vitro magnetic driving system of artificial heart
abstract: The invention relates to a self-balancing in vitro magnetic driving system of an artificial heart, and belongs to the field of biomedical engineering. The self-balancing in vitro magnetic driving system comprises an in vitro driving device, a pump body arranged in the ascending aorta blood vessel, an in vivo space self-adaptive device and an in vitro force balancing device, wherein the in vitro driving device consists of a driving motor and a permanent magnet cylinder which is magnetized along the radial direction; the pump body is a cylindrical shell, and a permanent magnet auger-shaped impeller which is magnetized along the radial direction is arranged in the shell; the in vivo space self-adaptive device consists of a rotary circular truncated cone-shaped permanent magnet which is magnetized along the radial direction, and a sealed shell; the in vitro force balancing device consists of a permanent magnet rotating body which is magnetized along the radial direction, and a driving motor. The in vivo space self-adaptive device is used for compensating the deviation of the transmission angle and the axial position between the in vitro driving device and the artificial heart pump body, so that the magnetic field force applied to the artificial heart pump body can be maintained to be balanced by adjusting the position of the in vitro force balancing device and the magnetic field force.

title: Voice control method for electronic cigarette and electronic cigarette
abstract: The invention is related to a voice control method for an electronic cigarette and the electronic cigarette, used for performing vocal praising when a one-time smoking duration exceeds a longest one-time smoking duration. The method executes the following steps when a smoking signal is received: S 1 , start an atomization operation for an electronic cigarette, and time a current one-time smoking duration; S 2 , determine whether the current one-time smoking duration is greater than a longest one-time smoking duration recorded in the electronic cigarette, and if yes, proceed to step S 3 , otherwise, proceed to step S 4 ; S 3 , a voice praising a user is played, and the longest one-time smoking duration is updated using the current one-time smoking duration, and the method enters step S 4 ; S 4 , the method waits for the smoking signal to be received once again, and when the smoking signal is received, proceeds to step S 1.

title: Riveting mould
abstract: The utility model discloses a riveting mould, which comprises a mould shank, an upper mould holder fixedly connected with the mould shank, a backing plate fixed at the lower end of the upper mould holder, a riveting punch fixing plate connected with the backing plate, a lower mould holder and a lower mould fixed on the lower mould holder. The riveting mould is characterized in that at least two riveting punches are arranged on the riveting punch fixing plate; at least two grooves used for adapting rivets are arranged on the lower mould, and the grooves and the riveting punches are opposite to each other vertically. Due to the arrangement of a plurality of riveting punches and grooves, a plurality of rivets can be used for riveting at the same time, the riveting operation is convenient, the quality of products is stable, and the riveting efficiency is high.

title: Automatic assembly machine for switch components
abstract: The invention provides an automatic assembly machine for switch components. The automatic assembly machine is capable of substituting for manual assembly, high in production efficiency and low in defective percentage. The automatic assembly machine is characterized by comprising a control box (2), a base (15) and an electric control center. A rotating platform (11) is arranged on the base (15). A component-taking unit (4), a spring assembly unit (6), a spring detecting unit (7), a toggle assembly unit (8), a toggle detecting unit (10), a defective recycling unit (12) and a finished product receiving unit (14) are evenly distributed on the base (15) along the clockwise direction on the circumference of the rotating platform (11). Electric control components on each unit are electrically connected with the electric control center, and the electric control center is electrically connected with the control box (2). Each of the seven units has a corresponding clipping component (23) mounted on the rotating platform (11).

title: Clamping apparatus for rolling roller
abstract: The present invention relates to a clamping device for a rolling roller, and more particularly, to automatically perform a ring carrier thrust reciprocating driving in the longitudinal direction of a shaft, including clamping / release driving in a roller shaft center direction. The ring-shaped first ring gear 20 is installed around the shaft, the first drive gear portion 30 for rotating the first ring gear 20, and the ring-shaped to be installed around the shaft divided into equal parts And a plurality of clamp pieces 40n, the clamps 40 being provided to reciprocate in the direction of the center of the shaft when the first ring gear is rotated, and installed around the shaft of the side of the first ring gear 20. A second ring gear 60 having a ring shape, a second drive gear part 70 for rotating the second ring gear, and a ring shape to be installed around the shaft, and coinciding with the second ring gear. The second ring gear for a clamping device consisting of rollers, including the carrier ring (80) to enable trust reciprocate in the longitudinal direction of the shaft is provided at the time of rotation.

title: Multi-level dynamic menu which suppresses display of items previously designated as non-selectable
abstract: A process control interface includes a multi-level dynamic menu for selecting processes from a set of processes that are organized into groups and subgroups. An engineering set up control program enables an engineer to denote which of these groups, subgroups and processes are available for selection by an operator using the process control interface. Only those groups, subgroups and processes which are available for selection are displayed in the dynamic menu. The set of processes defined by the engineering set up control program can be stored on individual operator-related disks so that each operator has access to a distinct set of available processes. Process subgroups and groups can be duplicated by the engineering setup control program to facilitate the setting up of new control processes. In addition, the engineering set up control program can denote parameters used by a process as required entry parameters, fixed value parameters, operator alterable parameters, and single forced entry parameters--the latter being parameters which must be assigned a value only the first time that a process is run.

title: Aerial working platform for shot blasting by self adaption on hull surface
abstract: The utility model discloses an aerial working platform for shot blasting by self adaption on a hull surface. A turntable (7) is arranged on an underframe (8) of the aerial working platform; a telescopic boom (2) is arranged on the turntable (7); the upper end of the telescopic boom (2) is connected with a bracket platform (4) through a leveling mechanism (9); the bracket platform (4) is connected with an impeller head (3) through a telescopic cylinder (5) via a spherical hinge; a rodless cavity of the telescopic cylinder (5) is communicated with an energy accumulator; a roller (6) is arranged on the bottom surface on which the impeller head (3) and a hull are in contact. The aerial working platform can be applied to most of aerial working platforms, so that environmental pollution in common hull blasting derusting work is simply and reliably solved, the health of a worker is protected, and the operation efficiency is also greatly improved.

title: Plastic hinge
abstract: An extruded thermoplastic hinge having drastically improved ability to withstand flexure cycles at room as well as at low temperatures is disclosed. The hinge comprises a flexible cross-section of polyester elastomer and a co-extruded section of rigid or semi-rigid thermoplastic material selected from the group comprising rigid polyvinyl (PVC), acrylonitrile-butadyene-styrene (ABS), impact modified or general purpose acrylic or high impact styrene. The flexure cross-section may have the thickness ranging from ten percent to 100% of the thickness of the semi-rigid cross-section.

title: Production method of flavoured dark beer
abstract:
FIELD: food industry. 
     SUBSTANCE: method comprises mixing anise and hop in mass ratio 1:10 and extracting obtained mixture by liquid nitrogen with corresponding miscella separation. Yacon is cut, dried in microwave field till residual humidity about 20% at microwave field power providing warming of yacon inside the bits till temperature 80-90°C during at least an hour and fried. Fried yacon and malt are loaded together into cryomill in mass ratio 1 : (10-25), then they are mixed; obtained mixture is impregnated with separated miscella with simultaneous pressure boost till pressure level of nitrogen saturated vapours at impregnation temperature. It is followed by depressurisation till atmosphere pressure with simultaneous freezing of mixture and its cryomilling in medium of evolved nitrogen. Hereafter sugar is added, mixture is filled with drinking water and saccharified to obtain the wort; beer yeast is added to wort, the main fermentation is performed and the young beer is postfermented and filtered. 
     EFFECT: process technology duration is reduced and foam stability of the target product is increased.

title: Semiconductor integrated circuit device
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve the D/A conversion accuracy as the entire circuit by deciding the element size of each switch so as to change the ON resistance gradually to be 2<n-1> time from the MSB side switch toward the LSB side switch. CONSTITUTION:In MISFETs P1-Pn and N1-Nn, the element size (W/L) of each MISFET is formed to be 1/2 time, 1/4 time, 1/8 time...1/2<n-1> time from the MSB side switch MISFETs P1, N1 toward the LSB switch MISFETs PnNn. In applying the same voltage between the source and drain of each MISFET, the ratio of on-resistance of each MISFET is formed to be 1:2:4-:2<n-1>.

title: Improved process for making a briquetted fuel and product obtained by this process
abstract: 437,870. Materials for making coke. SOC. DE RECHERCHES ET DE PERFECTIONNEMENTS INDUSTRIELS, 87, Avenue du President-Wilson, Puteaux, Seine, France. March 27, 1935, No. 9504. Convention date, April 20, 1934. [Class 55 (ii)] Carbonized briquettes are made by mixing a small amount of finely powdered dry amylaceous binder with a larger amount of very fine coal powder having coking properties, mixing the product with anthracite or similar close burning fines, slightly heating and briquetting the mixture and finally baking the briquettes at about 560-650‹ C. If the fines have a humidity of 10 per cent or less drying is unnecessary. The mixture may be worked up at about 70-80‹ C. in apparatus heated by superheated steam and briquetted in a continuous rotary press, afterwards being distilled at 550-650‹ C. in an oven of the type employing a rapidly circulating gas in contact with the briquettes. In an example 1À8 parts of rice starch are mixed with 30 parts of powdered coking coal having 27 per cent of volatiles and 19 per cent of ash, this mixture being added to 68À2 parts of fines and the whole heated by superheated steam to 80-100‹ C. and pressed. The briquettes are baked for 50-60 minutes up to 600‹ C. Other amylaceous binders include the starch of rye, corn, maize, potato and chestnut. High volatile coals, bituminous, flaming, cannel, &c., which fuse on heating but do not yield a good coke may be used as the coking powder.

title: Waste water treatment method and waste water treatment equipment used therefor
abstract: An object of the present invention is to grasp the detailed state in an aerobic tank and perform control according to the state, thereby significantly reducing the circulatory rate of nitrification liquid and the amount of air supplied to the aerobic tank while reducing the quality of treated water. Wastewater treatment method that improves the efficiency, increases the amount of water that can be treated, shortens the treatment time, reduces the amount of power consumed per amount of treated water, and excels in the efficiency of wastewater treatment, the stability of the quality of the treated water, and energy conservation The purpose is to provide.   A reaction step of simultaneously performing nitrification and denitrification in an aerobic tank by increasing or decreasing the amount of air so that the measured fluorescence amount and pH fall within a certain range and changing the dissolved oxygen concentration according to load fluctuations. And a nitrifying solution circulation step of circulating waste water (nitrating solution) nitrified in the aerobic tank in the anaerobic tank upstream of the aerobic tank in the reaction step.   [Selection] Figure 2

title: Process for protecting surfaces from weld spatter and metal sparks
abstract: A method for protecting a surface from the spatter of molten metal or metal sparks during welding or grinding operations using thin, protective sheets (e.g., paper sheets). The sheets may be integrally provided with a pressure sensitive adhesive for removably attaching the sheet to the surface.

title: Security protection host machine simple to disassemble
abstract: The invention discloses a security protection host machine simple to disassemble. The host machine comprises a main shell and a bottom cover; two supporting columns are fixed to the bottom surface of the top plate of the main shell; connecting plates are fixed to the bottom surfaces of the two supporting columns; the bottom cover abuts against the bottom end surface of the main shell; the edge portion of the top surface of the bottom cover is provided with a plurality of upwardly-extending extension columns; the extension columns are inserted in insertion holes in the bottom end surface of the main shell; the middle of the bottom cover is provided with an upwardly-extending protrusion portion; the inner side wall of the bottom of the main shell is in screwed connection with a plurality of positioning ball plungers; the steel balls of the positioning ball plungers are nested in a plurality of recessed holes in the outer side wall of the protrusion portion; the top surface of the protrusion portion is provided a plurality of elastic protruding columns; a circuit board is sandwiched between the elastic protruding columns and the connecting plates; the bottom portions of fixing rods are provided with connection flat plates; the connection flat plates are nested in grooves at the top surfaces of the elastic protruding columns; and the connection flat plates abut against the bottom surfaces of the grooves. The various components of the host machine are convenient to install and disassemble, and the heat radiation effect of the host machine is good.

title: Facility monitoring system
abstract:
PURPOSE: To easily monitor states of facilitates to be monitored from a place other than a central monitoring room by outputting audible fault and warning messages from a local radio paper.  
     CONSTITUTION: This facility monitoring system is provided with a remote processor 7 which is connected with (n) (n: a positive integer) sets of facilities 8 1 -8 n  to be monitored and controlled, receives monitoring information, and transmits controlling information and a central processor 3 which is connected with the processor 7 through a communication channel 11, receives monitoring signals from the processor 7, and transmits controlling signals to the processor 7. In addition, a transmitter 2 associated with a local radio paper 1 is connected with the processor 3 and audible fault and warning messages on the facilities are outputted from the paper 1. Therefore, an security attendant can monitor the facilities even when he patrols or carries on maintenance works on the facilities.

title: Control unit for upper swivel body of hydraulic excavator
abstract: This invention relates to a control unit for an upper swivel body of a hydraulic excavator which is used in order to prevent an abrupt pressure rise in a hydraulic line and to make a smooth swivel control when the upper swivel body equipped with a driver's cabin and a working machine and having a large inertia is accelerated or decelerated. To this end, pressure control valves (10), (11) controlled together with proportional solenoid valves (8), (8a) by a controller (7) are connected to a discharge line and return line of a hydraulic pump (1) so as to control an input pressure and an output pressure of an upper swivel body driving motor (3) when the motor rotates. Particularly, one of the pressure control valves (10) controls and increases the driving pressure of the driving motor (3) in accordance with a speed increase signal outputted from the controller (7) and the other pressure control valve (11) controls and decrease the braking pressure of the driving motor (3) in accordance with a speed decrease signal outputted from the controller (7).

title: Progressive identifying method for problem cable and concentrated loads based on mixture monitoring in time of angular displacement
abstract: The invention discloses a progressive indentifying method for a problem cable and concentrated loads based on mixture monitoring in time of angular displacement. The identifying method determines whether the mechanical calculation reference model needs to be updated or not based on the mixture monitoring through monitoring the support angular displacement, cable structure temperature and environmental temperature, so that a mechanical calculation reference mode, considering the support angular displacement, the cable structure temperature and the environmental temperature, of a cable structure is obtained. On the basis of the model, a unit damage monitored parameter numerical value matrix is obtained through calculation. According to the approximate linear relation existing between the current numerical value vector of monitored coordinates and the current initial numerical value vector of the monitored coordinates, the unit damage monitored coordinate numerical value change matrix and a current evaluated object nominal damage vector to be solved, the non-inferior solution of the current evaluated object nominal damage vector is calculated, and therefore when the support angular displacement and temperature changes happen, influences of interference factors can be removed, and the variable quantity of concentrated loads and the problem cable can be identified.

title: Generating software development tools via target architecture specification
abstract: Technologies are provided for automatically generating software development tool components and associated software development tools for a target architecture via a target architecture specification. title: Production of chlorinated vinyl chloride resin
abstract:
PURPOSE: To produce the title resin excellent in heat stability and transparency by photochlorinating in an aqueous medium a polymer prepared by polymerizing a vinyl chloride monomer in the presence of a specified dispersant in an aqueous medium by using an oil-soluble polymerization initiator.  
     CONSTITUTION: A chlorinated vinyl chloride resin is produced by polymerizing 100 pts.wt. vinyl chloride monomer in the presence of 0.01-2.0 pts.wt. dispersant comprising a polyethylene oxide of an average molecular weight of 50000-4800000 in an aqueous medium by using an oil-soluble polymerization initiator (e.g. t-butyl peroxyneodecanoate) and photochlorinating the obtained vinyl chloride resin in an aqueous medium. Because the obtained resin is very excellent in heat stability and transparency, it is suitable for uses requiring high heat stability and transparency. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1992,JPO&Japio

title: Structural member stress concentration site detection method using optical fiber sensor
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a method for detecting a stress-concentrated portion of a structural member using an optical fiber sensor capable of accurately detecting a stress-concentrated portion generated in a structural member in a narrower range with high distance resolution. SOLUTION: An optical fiber sensor 1 is fixed to a member 3,   A strain measuring device 2 is connected to one end of the fixed optical fiber sensor 1, an optical pulse is input from the strain measuring device 2 to one end of the optical fiber sensor 1, and the input optical pulse is fixed to the member 3. For example, at the stress concentration site existing in the region 13 of the optical fiber sensor 1, the spectral width of the frequency spectrum of the Brillouin backscattered light, which is a change in the optical characteristics of the scattered light, is changed. Received by the strain measuring device 2,   The stress concentration site is detected based on the spectrum change and the return time of the scattered light.

title: Electronic routing slips for inter-organizational electronic mail
abstract: A system and method for separating inter-organizational email from the intra-organizational processing of that email are described. An email message is received by an email client program executing at a client computing system. A route operation is selected for the email message. A routing slip is generated in response to the route operation. The routing slip includes an electronic representation of the email message and can be sent to other members of an organization bearing this representation. Each recipient of the routing slip can access the email message through the electronic representation. Information that becomes part of the routing slip remains separate from the contents of the email message. To reply to the email message, an unroute operation restores the email message from the routing slip. A reply to the email message can then be sent without any of the information in the routing slip appearing the reply.

title: Device for production of the aerocrete mixture
abstract:
FIELD: building materials industry; devices for preparation of the aerocrete mixture. 
     SUBSTANCE: the invention is pertaining to production of the construction cellular concretes and may be used for production of the heat-insulating-constructional material and the constructional materials at manufacture of the components of the buildings and structures in the industrial and civil construction. The technical result of the invention is the increased homogeneity of the aerocrete mixture. The device for preparation of the aerocrete mixture consists of the vertical mixing shaft with the fixed on it mixing vanes and the stationary cylindrical body electrically insulated from each other, with the capability after preliminary stirring action of the source components of the concrete mixture of feeding of the direct electric current at operation of the mixing shaft between the racers of the rolling-contact bearings mounted on the mixing shaft, and the components of their fixation to the body there are the arranged shims - bushes made out of the electro-insulating material - the textolite; on the outer side of the mixing shaft there is the collector ring with the carbon brushes for hooking up of the mixing shaft to the positive pole of the direct-current source; the indicated body is hooked up to the negative pole of the direct-current source with the voltage of 30 V; the stirring vanes have inclination of 10-15° to the mixing shaft and are supplied with the rubber pads along the edges with provision of the dense adhering to the indicated body. 
     EFFECT: the invention ensures the increased homogeneity of the aerocrete mixture. 
     1 ex, 2 tbl, 3 dwg

title: Sponge fine crusher
abstract: The invention relates to a sponge fine crusher which comprises a machine frame and a fine crushing chamber arranged on the machine frame, wherein the upper part of the fine crushing chamber is communicated with a feed cylinder which extends obliquely upwards; a stirring feeder is installed in the feed cylinder; the front end of the feed cylinder is connected with a feed hopper; the bottom wall of the fine crushing chamber is made of a cambered nozzle plate; the nozzle plate is provided with a plurality of nozzle holes; the machine frame is provided with a receiving chamber at the lower part of the fine crushing chamber; the side wall of the receiving chamber is provided with a discharge port; the discharge port is connected with a discharge pipeline; a rotating shaft, which driven by a motor to rotate, is rotatably installed in the fine crushing chamber; the rotating shaft is provided with a round roller tool rest; the round roller tool rest is rotatably provided with a plurality of blades which are arranged around the circumference of the cylindrical surface at intervals; and the inner wall of the fine crushing chamber is provided with a cambered barrier device which forms a cutting fit with the blades in the position opposite the feed cylinder. The crusher has the advantages of favorable crushing effect, high work efficiency and low tendency to blockage, and is convenient to operate.

title: Preparation method of snow melting agent
abstract: The invention relates to a preparation method of a snow melting agent. The preparation method comprises the steps of taking straw ash, drying, sieving with a screen with larger-than-50 mesh, placing the sieved material in a volumetric flask for future use, adding waste liquor of acetic acid into the straw ash, wherein the applying ratio of water to waste liquid is 8-10:1, heating in water bath, keeping the heating temperature at 80-90 DEG C, controlling the heating time to be 60-90 minutes. The snow melting agent has the advantages of being cheap in price, environment-friendly and economical, good in snow melting effect, free of pollution and free of corrosive effect.

title: Mouth wash for preventing recurrent canker sore
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of oral cavity nursing, and particularly relates to mouth wash for preventing recurrent canker sore. The mouth wash is prepared from thymol, silene armeria essential oil, green fructus forsythia extracts, zinc citrate, grewia biloba extracts, hirtula roses extraction liquid, tea polyphenol, sweetening agents, humectants and distilled water. Compared with the prior art, the mouth wash has the following advantages that the mouth wash can be used for cleaning the oral cavity and treating the canker sore in an auxiliary way; partial active ingredients in the mouth wash can replace ingredients in oral saliva; the continuous bacteriostatic effect can be achieved in the oral cavity; meanwhile, the fast heeling of the wound is facilitated; the functionality is high; the inhabitation effect is achieved on the recurrent canker sore; and the mouth wash is suitable to be popularized and used.

title: Constant resolution frequency synthesizer
abstract: A frequency synthesizer which has a constant resolution over an octave frequency range is disclosed. The frequency synthesizer has a presettable high speed counter, a low speed counter, an adjusting counter, and a count selector. The low speed counter provides a first output signal whose frequency is rapidly alternated between two closely-spaced frequencies so that the average frequency of the output signal is the desired frequency. The adjusting counter determines the period of time that each of the closely-spaced frequencies is present at the output. The count selector determines the frequency of each of the two closely-spaced frequencies. The frequency synthesizer also has a phase splitter and provides a second output signal which is also of the desired frequency but which is phase-shifted by ninety degrees from the first output signal.

title: Optimization method and device of dialog system knowledge base
abstract: The invention discloses an optimization method and device of a dialog system knowledge base. The optimization method comprises the following steps: obtaining target question and answer information: judging whether assessment parameters of question and answer information to be analyzed conform to an optimization standard or not, and taking the question and answer information to be analyzed as the target question and answer information when the assessment parameters of the question and answer information to be analyzed conform to the optimization standard; and generating an update answer set: on the basis of question information of the target question and answer information, obtaining a corresponding answer information set, independently calculating a relevance parameter of each piece of answer information in the answer information set, and generating the update answer set which aims at the question information in the target question and answer information according to the relevance parameters. The method can realize automatic update of the dialog system knowledge base, so that a dialog system can output answers which more conform to the use habit and the expectation of users so as to improve the user experience and the user viscosity of the dialog system.

title: Building element for buildings
abstract: The wall (1) has an absorption panel (5) for thermal radiation. The absorption panel forms a partition, forming two compartments (8,9), i.e. the front one (8) bounded by the transparent plate and the partition, while the rear one (9) is formed by the latter and the wall. To the cavity are coupled air inlet and outlet ducts (6,7) passing through the wall. The top edge of the front compartment is coupled to the air inlet duct (6) for the associated inner space of the building. The outlet air duct (7) leads to the lower part of the rear compartment. ADVANTAGE - Effective heating and ventilation of building interior.

abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of electric power cabinet automatic open-close thermal window structure, including：Cabinet, louvered radiator window and controlling organization, the controlling organization includes expansion link, push rod and seal sleeve, the seal sleeve, push rod and expansion link have two groups, the louvered radiator window of both sides is corresponded to respectively, and seal sleeve is fixed at the top of cabinet, setting piston in it, the top of the push rod is connected on piston, the expansion link is weldingly fixed in each rotating shaft, and expansion link is articulated and connected with push rod, and thermal media is filled with the rodless cavity of seal sleeve.The utility model experiences environment temperature by thermal media, thermal window openings of sizes is controlled according to variation of ambient temperature, then reduce opening when environment temperature is low to be even switched off, it is being not required to close radiator window in the case that in-cabinet temperature is not high, so as to reduce the time that radiator window is opened on the whole, the probability that foreign matter enters in cabinet is reduced, improves electrical equipment job stability and service life in cabinet.

title: Device for sealing the air intake of a motor vehicle, corresponding front-end module and motor vehicle
abstract: The invention relates to a device ( 1 ) for sealing an air intake of a motor vehicle, comprising:—at least one sealing means ( 3 ) intended to be arranged in an air intake of the motor vehicle, and—a support ( 5 ) for the sealing means ( 3 ) in order to retain the sealing means ( 3 ) and intended to be attached on a load-bearing structure of the motor vehicle. According to the invention, the support ( 5 ) comprises damping guidance means ( 15 ) for the sealing means ( 3 ) in order to allow, in the event of an impact on the sealing means ( 3 ), the movement of the sealing means ( 3 ) from an initial retaining position to a position retracted with respect to the initial position. The invention also relates to a front-end module for a motor vehicle comprising such a sealing device.

title: A method and a portable electronic device for automatically rating a music track
abstract: A portable electronic device (100) for automatically rating a music track comprised in a set of music tracks and a method therein are provided. Next, the portable electronic device (100) adjusts a rating of the music track based on the detected at least one user interaction, thereby automatically rating the music track.

title: Pulse valve companion flange with good sealing performance
abstract: The utility model relates to a pulse valve companion flange with good sealing performance, which is composed of a flange body, a sealing piece, a screw and a gland nut, wherein the flange body is connected and fixed on an air pocket through the gland nut and the screw, and the sealing piece is clamped in a groove arranged on the contact surface of the flange body and the air pocket; the gland nut is an integral nut; and the integral nut is clamped on the inner wall of the air pocket. Compared with the prior art, the pulse valve companion flange changes the structure of the gland nut and utilizes the fact that the screwed integral nut and the shell wall of the air pocket have two contact points, so that the installation is more reliable and simpler, and the stability and the connecting strength are greatly increased.

title: Sole Assembly for an Article of Footwear
abstract: The present invention is related to an article of footwear that has an upper extending around at least a portion of a foot. The outsole is secured to the upper. The article of footwear has a midsole that is detachably secured to the outsole. This midsole has a vertically projecting generally dome shaped support element located in the heel portion of the midsole. The dome shaped support element may be in contact with outsole interior sidewalls only while in an compressed state or it may remain in contact with the interior sidewalls in an uncompressed state. The dome shaped support element is at least partially covered by a cushioning cover that is made of a material less stiff than the material comprising the dome shaped support element. The cushioning cover may be partially covered by a heel plate that extends from the heel of the shoe towards the toe of the shoe. The heel plate may or may not extend the entire length of the shoe.

title: Louver Fin for Heat Exchanger with High Effective and Low Noise, and Manufacturing Method Thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to an improved louver fin structure for increasing heat exchange performance between a gas and a heat radiating fin in a heat exchanger. The louver pin of the present invention improves the louver pin composed of the same louver angle and louver pitch as all conventional louvers, so that the gas is gradually changed from the inlet of the gas to the first louver or the first louver sequentially. The louver flow generated through the louver pin is closer to the ideal louver flow. Therefore, the heat exchange efficiency of the louver fin heat exchanger of the present invention is greatly increased compared to the louver fin heat exchanger of the conventional regular structure, which can reduce the volume of the heat exchanger and reduce the frictional drag of the gas. Even if the pressure is low, efficient heat exchange is possible, which can significantly reduce noise generated during heat exchange.

title: Armor plate damage detection system
abstract: An armor plate damage detection and testing system is disclosed that uses an initial electrical signal to generate mechanical energy waves that travel across the armor plate and reflect off the plate surfaces, wherein the reflections of those waves are recorded and analyzed with reference to a previously stored wave reflection signature to determine if damage has occurred to the armor plate. The analyzed results are communicated to the user in real time using a display unit and can further be communicated to a remote entity through an incorporated wireless transmitter.

title: Charcoal roaster
abstract:
The present invention is a charcoal roaster for baking food by heating the grill, the grill is seated and the charcoal container accommodates the combustion charcoal is accommodated therein and an air inlet and an air outlet are formed on one side; A blowing member communicating with the air inlet and the air outlet to supply air to the body or to suck air from the body; A fire control member having the charcoal seated therein and having vents communicating the charcoal and the air inlet, and controlling the air volume provided from the blower member to the charcoal; An adjustment knob connected to the thermal power control member and a plurality of links to adjust the opening and closing number of the vent by an external force; And a sensing member providing an electrical signal to the blowing member to turn on / off the blowing member in association with the operation of the adjusting knob.
   
     
   
    Charcoal, roaster.

title: Device of grinding one's teeth in sleep is corrected in medical oral cavity

title: Hypothetical reference decoder parameters in video coding
abstract: A device performs a hypothetical reference decoder (HRD) operation that determines conformance of a bitstream to a video coding standard or determines conformance of a video decoder to the video coding standard. As part of performing the HRD operation, the device determines a highest temporal identifier of a bitstream-subset associated with a selected operation point of the bitstream. Furthermore, as part of the HRD operation, the device determines, based on the highest temporal identifier, a particular syntax element from among an array of syntax elements. The device then uses the particular syntax element in the HRD operation.
