title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR ELIMINATING CROSS-SECTION CONSTRUCTIONS OF A HOLLOW CYLINDER BODY, PREFERABLY A TUBE READY TO BE INSTALLED
abstract: A method for removing cross-sectional restrictions in a hollow cylindrical body, preferably a pipe ready to be laid, for example a dredging pipe for dredging work, the said restrictions having been caused by deformations, e.g. dents and the like. The method is intended, in particular, for the removal of the cross-sectional restriction at the site in open country where the pipe is to be laid and is distinguished by the fact that the pipe from which the dent is to be removed is connected to a second pipe arranged in parallel with it, in that a tool situated at the end of a turning rod and having pressure members which can be laid against the inner wall of the pipe is set to the cross-sectional width of the pipe and inserted into the end of the pipe, the pressure members being laid against the inner wall of the pipe, and in that the turning rod and hence the tool are turned and simultaneously moved in the longitudinal direction of the pipe. The use of a vehicle, in particular an agricultural tractor, as a drive for turning the turning rod by way of a power take-off connection of the agricultural tractor and for moving the turning rod and the tool in the longitudinal direction of the pipe by the driving action of the tractor is particularly advantageous.

title: Protection open cut tunnel and tunnel structure
abstract: The invention relates to a protection open cut tunnel and a tunnel structure; the protection open cut tunnel comprises a protection cover crossing a road and arranged above the road, and bases arranged on the ground and positioned on two sides of the road; the bottom of the protection cover is fixed on the bases. Construction people can arrange the bases on the ground and mount the protection cover, so construction is convenient, thus saving time and labor; the protection open cut tunnel is simple in structure, concise in construction technology, low in cost, and very suitable for being applied to railways and roads in operation.

title: Automobile cable socket
abstract: An automobile cable socket. The automobile cable socket including a first socket member that is disposed to surround the first cable and includes a plurality of sawtooth portions formed on an external surface thereof in a direction in which the first cable extends, a second socket member coupled to the first socket member and including an engaging portion, a spring installed outside of the second socket member, and a position fix member that is disposed between the second socket member and the spring, releases engagement between the engaging portion of the second socket member and the plurality of sawtooth portions of the first socket member by pressing the spring, and engages the plurality of sawtooth portions with the engaging portion when the spring is restored to an original position.

title: Transparent thermal insulation material and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a transparent thermal insulation material, which is characterized in that: the material is codoped by cross-group elements. A preparation method of the material has the characteristics of simple process and cost saving, and is specially used for preparing composite wolfram oxygen chloride powder with a chemical formula being CsxNyWO3-ZCIC, wherein Cs is cesium; N is Sn or Sb or Bi; W is wolfram; O is oxygen; and X, Y, Z and C are positive numbers and meet the following conditions that: X is less than or equal to 1.0, Y is less than or equal to 1.0, Y/X is less than or equal to 1.0, Z is less than or equal to 0.6, and C is less than or equal to 0.1. A transparent thermal insulation film prepared by the composite wolfram oxygen chloride powder has the characteristics of high transparency and high thermal insulation, is applied to paste on glasses of buildings and automobiles so as to separate infrared wave bands with wavelength of 800-2000nm, contributes to realizing effects of thermal insulation and energy conservation, and also can be used for a combined type base plate of an electronic component.

title: Imaging lens assembly
abstract: This invention provides an imaging lens assembly including: in order from an object side toward an image side: a first lens with positive refractive power having a convex object-side surface and a convex image-side surface, a second lens with negative refractive power having at least one of its object-side surface and image-side surface being aspheric, a third lens with negative refractive power having a concave image-side surface, and both of its object-side surface and image-side surface being aspheric. An aperture stop is positioned between the first lens element and second lens element. The imaging lens assembly further comprises an electronic sensor on which an object is imaged, and there are three lens elements with refractive power.

title: Electroplate supporting small rail car of core rod workpieces
abstract: The utility model relates to an electroplate supporting small rail car of core rod workpieces, consisting of rail car wheels, a frame, an upright column and a support frame, wherein two pairs of wheels are arranged below the frame through cross beams; the upright column is arranged on the frame; the upper end of the upright column is fixedly provided with the support frame; the lower part of the upright column is coaxially arranged in a hollow vertical pipe fixedly arranged together with the frame; the upright column in the vertical pipe is provided with screw threads, the upright column with the lower part processed with the screw threads is meshed with an upright column bevel gear with an inner hole processed with screw threads, and the vertical pipe is horizontally provided with an adjusting cross rod that is fixedly provided with a driving bevel gear at the end part of the vertical pipe; and the driving bevel gear is meshed with the upright column bevel gear. The electroplate supporting small rail car has simple structure and scientific and reasonable design, solves the problems of the existing support frame and ensures the electroplate quality of core rods.

title: Printer capable of displaying selected font
abstract: A printer of the type in which a plurality of fonts, each having its own name and its own configuration, are incorporated. A font selection key is provided in a panel display unit for selection of a desired font. In one aspect of the invention, when the key is depressed, the configuration and the name of a font are displayed in two separate displays. In another aspect of the invention, a printer mode such as the number of sheets to be printed is displayed with the font selected by the font selection key. Accordingly, the font to be selected is visually recognizable and hence the selection of a font can be easily achieved.

title: Ink compositions comprising modified colored pigments and methods for preparing the same
abstract: The present invention describes an ink composition comprising a liquid vehicle and a modified colored pigment. title: Airbag device
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide an airbag device which is simple in structure and can be provided at a low cost, operates reliably, and can be compactly stored in a vehicle body. SOLUTION: The bag is provided along an inner wall or an interior material of a vehicle in a folded state, and both ends thereof are connected to the inner wall or the interior material of the vehicle, and the bag body linearly extends between the connecting portions at the time of deployment. In the airbag device 1, one end of the flexible tubular bag body 6 is folded inward to form a bottomed bag-shaped pressure receiving portion 1.   0, and the tubular bag 6 is supported in an annular shape so that the inward inversion is allowed and the outward inversion is not allowed in the folded portion 9. The other end of the tubular bag 6 is connected to both connecting portions, and a part of the tubular bag 6 is turned at the folded portion 9 by the pressure of the gas supplied into the pressure receiving portion 10 at the annular support portion 11. The entire length is shortened when the outside is reversed inside and shifted to the pressure receiving portion 10.

title: Reinforcement material for boat hulls - has glass fibre fabrics bonded by interlocking profiled ribs
abstract: The construction of a reinforcement layer, for use in the construction of boat hulls and similar structures of synthetic materials, uses two layers of fabric woven from continuous glass fibre rovings with interlocking ribs which give a T-shape or an L-shape. title: Method for changing route in wireless communication
abstract: A method for changing a route in wireless communication involves: when there is subscriber equipment requesting a change of route in a cell, a base station negotiates downlink measurement contents with a relay station facilitating the route change in the cell; a network side informs the subscriber equipment requesting a change of route of the negotiated downlink measurement contents, and the subscriber equipment executes a downlink measurement according to the received measurement contents and reports the downlink measurement results to a radio access point; and the radio access point executes the route change for said subscriber equipment according to the received measurement results. The method can effectively improve the accuracy of the route change and alleviate the delay due to the route change.

title: Virtual address-based mailbox mass sending method and mailbox mass sending system
abstract: The invention discloses a virtual address-based mailbox mass sending method which comprises the following steps: a sender sends a mail to a mail transmission agent by a mail user agent; the mail transmission agent generates a query request according to virtual mail address, and sends the query request to a mail address processor; the mail address processor looks up an entity mail address according to the virtual mail address, and sends the entity mail address to the mail transmission agent; and the mail transmission agent transmits the mail to a receiver according to the entity mail address. The invention further discloses a virtual address-based mailbox mass sending system. According to the virtual address-based mailbox mass sending method and the mailbox mass sending system, the virtual mail address is established by special code technology, and a mapped virtual mail address is automatically distributed by each organization structure unit, so that single mail list and mail maintenance established for each organization structure unit can be avoided, the complicated enterprise management efficiency of organization structure can be greatly improved, and additional system resources cannot be occupied.

title: A kind of method and device of luminosity calibration
abstract: An embodiment of the present invention provides a kind of method and device of luminosity calibration, wherein the described method includes：Determine the penalty coefficient matrix of binocular camera, wherein, the binocular camera is to carry out the camera of luminosity calibration；Obtain the destination image data of the binocular camera shooting；Using the penalty coefficient matrix, gamma correction is carried out to the destination image data.The embodiment of the present invention can utilize the brightness of penalty coefficient matrix correction destination image data so that image brightness values are more accurate in binocular camera imaging process, and then improve the precision and robustness of depth of field recovery algorithms.

title: Sensor cable system for intrusion detection and intrusion point location
abstract: The present invention relates to a system for providing intrusion detection as well as intrusion position information using a sensor cable of electromagnetic induction type by magnetic force. When the sensor cable composed of two freely moving sensor wires and two fixed insulated wires is subjected to an impact or vibration at some point outside, voltages are induced in the sensor wires by electromagnetic induction. A sensor wire and an insulated wire are circuits for detecting the intrusion position.The voltage induced by the sensor wire is applied to both terminals of the sensor wire by the formula E (voltage) = I (current) * R (resistance) according to Ohm's Law. Calculate the intrusion point by calculating the difference between the two detected voltages and the resistance distribution capacity for the cable length. The other sensor wire and the fixed insulation wire detect the intrusion of the conventional method by the terminal voltage and output the audio signal. Precise signal analysis uses different digital processors and displays the intrusion location numerically. Only when the positioning signal and the intrusion detection signal which analyze and output the signals from the two processors are received at the same time, the double confirmation alarm signal is output so that the accuracy of the alarm signal output by the intruder is greatly improved.

title: Image-forming method and image-forming apparatus
abstract: A microscopy and apparatus capable of obtaining superresolution, and a fringe projection light-cut microscopy and apparatus capable of obtaining a natural light-cut image and enabling real-time observation. At the component separating step, a plurality of modulated images of an observation object (O) are formed by subjecting the observation object (O) to spatial modulation including a plurality of modulation components while varying the component ratios of the modulation components by moving a diffraction grating ( 21 ), which modulates the observation object (O), to a plurality of different positions. The modulated images are detected with an image pickup device ( 22 ). Modulated image components corresponding to the modulation components are separated from the number of modulated images that is not less than the number of the modulation components by using linear computation. At the component demodulating step, at least one of the separated modulated image components is demodulated.

title: Wire extruding mechanism applied to 3D (Three-dimensional) printer ejector
abstract: The utility model discloses a wire extruding mechanism applied to a 3D (Three-dimensional) printer ejector. The wire extruding mechanism comprises a front end cover and a rear end cover, wherein a wire feeding wheel which is connected with a motor output shaft is arranged between the front end cover and the rear end cover; V-shaped bearings are connected with two sides of the wire feeding wheel; a printing wire material is embedded between the V-shaped bearings and the wire feeding wheel; a gear is arranged on the outer surface of the wire feeding wheel; the addendum angle of the gear is an acute angle of 10-20 degrees; and V-shaped grooves in the V-shaped bearings are matched with the wire material so as to tightly adhere the wire material to the gear of the wire feeding wheel. The addendum angle of the wire feeding wheel of the wire extruding mechanism can tightly hold the wire material, and the wire material can be reliably extruded into the ejector when the wire feeding wheel rotates by virtue of the clamping force applied to the wire material by the V-shaped bearings, so that the phenomenon of skidding between the wire feeding wheel and the wire material is effectively avoided, and the requirement on the precision of wire materials is greatly lowered. Therefore, the wire extruding mechanism is applicable to wire materials of different sizes and hardness, and has a large application range.

title: Deep-water bridge elevated pile cap grouped pile foundation connecting structure
abstract: The utility model discloses a deep-water bridge elevated pile cap grouped pile foundation connecting structure. Pile foundations of a grouped pile are connected through horizontal connecting elements, and the horizontal connecting elements are cross arms, bridgings, K-shaped supports or Bailey trusses which are connected with the pile foundations through reserved brackets, reserved embedment blocks or joint plates fixed on the pile foundations. Horizontal and vertical displacement and torsion deformation of the pile foundation are limited by horizontal and slant connection of piles in a certain section above the pile foundation exposed out of the soil layer and under the pile cap, pile foundation buckling or instability is avoided, the entire rigidity, resistance and stability of the pile foundation can be improved, and simultaneously the influence of deep water on structure power performance can be effectively reduced. The connecting structure plays a role of shock resistance, is conductive to structural aseismic design, and improves the aseismic capacity and aseismic safety coefficient.

title: Preparation method of glass fiber reinforced polypropylene
abstract: The invention relates to a preparation method of glass fiber reinforced polypropylene. The method uses a single screw extruder and an injection molding machine to carry out mixing and processing, and the thermal deformation temperature of the prepared glass fiber reinforced polypropylene is -40-120DEG C. The method selects a proper chemical coupling technology to improve the interface of polypropylene and glass fibers in order to improve the mechanical strength of polypropylene and improve the impact toughness of polypropylene, so the normal temperature notch impact strength of the glass fiber reinforced polypropylene is improved above 2 times, the mechanical strength, the hardness and the thermal deformation temperature of glass fiber reinforced polypropylene are reserved, the application field of the glass fiber reinforced polypropylene is widened, and good economic and social benefits are achieved.

title: Document camera
abstract: A document camera includes a base, a first arm, a second arm, and a camera head assembly. The base includes control electronics. The first arm is connected at a first end to a side of the base utilizing a first hinge. The second arm is connected at a first end to a second end of the first arm utilizing the second hinge. The camera head assembly is connected at a first end to a second end of the second arm utilizing the third hinge. The camera head assembly includes a lens adjuster and an imaging sensor and movement of the lens adjuster changes an orientation of the imaging sensor. The first side of the first arm is connected to a first side of the base and a second side of the first arm is connected to the second hinge.

title: Safe heat sink device of the plasma display panel television
abstract: The present invention relates to a safety heat dissipation device of a plasma display television, and since the heat flow to the heat dissipation fan flows according to the orifice principle, when the heat dissipation port is blocked, the heat dissipation fan is maximized while maximizing the heat dissipation effect, thereby improving safety and unnecessary air. A cooling duct formed at an upper portion of the back cover to form an opening having a two-stage refraction portion in which an orifice effect is generated so as to improve the strength by removing the flow passage; A flow sensor installed on one side of the cooling duct; And a heat dissipation fan spaced apart from the duct by a predetermined distance and installed to be transportable in a horizontal direction according to the signal of the flow sensor, the heat dissipation fan having an extension duct formed on the top thereof. When the heat dissipation caused by the air flow state is detected, it is possible to safely cope with the unexpected air flow failure that the internal temperature rises, so that the internal temperature rise of the plasma display TV is prevented and the strength of the back cover is reinforced. It works.

title: Sewage treatment process
abstract: The method of treating waste materials such as aqueous sewage involves the steps of simultaneously comminuting and oxidizing waste suspended in an aqueous medium while said waste is being held under flow equalizing and Biochemical Oxygen Demand (B.O.D.) equalizing conditions, preheating aqueous waste withdrawn from said oxidizing zone for delivery to a radiant heating zone to a temperature level for pasteurization of said waste and above the vaporization temperature of water at the gas pressure maintained in said radiant heating zone, subjecting at least part of the preheated aqueous waste, introduced into said radiant heating zone under conditions to break up the liquid into droplet form, to direct radiant heat whereby the aqueous portion of said aqueous waste is immediately converted to vapor, the unsatisfied B.O.D. of the solid waste is substantially eliminated and viable material is destroyed, and separately discharging inert ash solids and the mixture of gases and vapor produced in said radiant heating zone.

title: Set of construction members for realising a construction body and method for producing and using the same
abstract: The present invention relates to a set of construction members comprising a plurality of construction members (1) which can be joined together for building outer walls tightly connected together as well as partitions (17) connected together by key-slot couplings in order to form outer or inner walls. The outer-wall members (1) can be used for forming wall, angle or curved sections and consist in reinforced members assembled on the spot with concrete so as to be rigidly interconnected. Their upper and lower outer edges are used as a form-work for the slab (4) to be poured using concrete as well as for the floor-covering plates (26), which eliminates the need for any wooden form-work. Other construction members for the inner walls (17) can be connected together and with the outer walls (1) using key-slot couplings. The floor-covering plates (26) are obtained by pouring concrete on finished plates (19) while the outer-wall members (1) are simultaneously filled with concrete. The plates (19) can be mounted on the already-assembled outer and inner walls (1, 17) using a reduced quantity of connectors (18).

title: Method and means for reducing power requirements of supersonic wind tunnels
abstract: A system for reducing the power requirements of supersonic wind tunnels of the type having variable geometry diffusers which involves especially a pumping system which is capable of creating the pressure ratio across the tunnel necessary for starting conditions in a blow down configuration at small mass flow rate of air and which at the same time is sufficiently variable or flexible that it is capable of pumping the designed mass flow rate of air through the tunnel at a lower pressure ratio when the tunnel achieves a steady-state condition.

title: Infant and child car seat for thermally conditioning a body
abstract: Disclosed is both an apparatus and method for thermally conditioning a body in an infant or child car seat. The apparatus includes an envelope containing a phase change material and an insert compartment residing within the car seat adapted to receive the envelope wherein the envelope resides within the insert. The method providing an envelope containing a phase change material and inserting the envelope into a compartment residing within the car seat adapted to receive the envelope for conditioning the body.

title: Controller for four-wheel drive vehicle
abstract:
PURPOSE: To check any backlash noise in driving gears in an effective manner by controlling a 2/4 selector mechanism so as to be selected to a 4WD state when engine speed is less than the specified value and car speed is more than the specified value.  
     CONSTITUTION: A four-wheel drive vehicle is provided with a transfer with a built-in 2/4 selector mechanism 38 selecting a driving state for wheels to a 2WD or 4WD state, in the midway of a power transmission path 11. In this case, there is provided with a driving state detecting means 79 which detects such a driving state that speed of an engine 1 is less than the specified value and car speed is more than the specified value. When the driving state like this is detected, the 2/4 selector mechanism 38 is controlled so as to be selected to the 4WD state by a control means 80. Mass in a driving system is increased by this selection to this 4WD state, whereby a large torque variation in the engine 1 is attenuated, thus control over any backlash noise in driving gears is promoted.

title: Dental treatment apparatus
abstract:
PCT No. PCT/DE78/00027 Sec. 371 Date June 15, 1979 Sec. 102(e) Date June 11, 1979 PCT Filed Oct. 16, 1978 
     In dental treatment apparatuses with a plurality of instruments which are connected to a supply component across spirally coiled supply lines attached to the apparatus at an upper level, and with a mounting for the instruments disposed at a lower level, it is required that the instruments be able to be removed from and inserted into the mounting comfortably and without mutual disturbance. It is proposed that the supply component is at an upper level, that each supply line has its individual point of attachment to the apparatus in its connection to the supply component and is spirally coiled in its entire length from the supply component at an upper level to the instrument mounted on a lower level, that the coil formed by each supply line from the connection to the supply component to the instrument runs freely suspended in an approximately straight line at a slight angle to the vertical, and that the instruments are suspended, pointing downward, in slots in the instrument mounting by means of molded parts on the end of the supply lines by the instruments or on the instruments themselves.

title: Integration of automatic and manual defect classification
abstract: A method for defect classification includes storing a definition of a defect classification associated with one of the classification rules in a multi-dimensional feature space. Receiving inspection data relating to defects detected in one or more samples at the time of inspection. An automatic classifier is applied to the inspection data according to the definitions, thereby generating a plurality of first classification results, the plurality of first classification results including a defect level label and a corresponding degree of reliability. When a degree of confidence in a defect is determined to be below a predetermined threshold of confidence, a plurality of second classification results are generated by applying at least one inspection modality to the defect. A report is generated by combining the plurality of first classification results with the plurality of second classification results, the report including one of the plurality of defects in the plurality of defect levels.

When a degree of confidence in a defect is determined to be below a predetermined threshold of confidence, a plurality of second classification results are generated by applying at least one inspection modality to the defect. A report is generated by combining the plurality of first classification results with the plurality of second classification results, the report including one of the plurality of defects in the plurality of defect levels.

title: Apparatus and processes for compressing and/or biodigesting material
abstract: Apparatus and process for compressing moisture containing material including a pair of opposed rolls for receiving and advancing the material therebetween to apply rolling load thereto to compress the material and remove at least a portion of said moisture therefrom, and differential means for causing one of said rolls to rotate at a lower speed than the rolling speed of the other of the rolls, the differential rolling speeds developing friction between the rolls causing the rolls to be heated and apply heat to said material to further remove moisture therefrom, to cause the compressed material to adhere to the one roll and to cause the removed moisture to adhere to the other roll, also alone and in combination, apparatus and process of decomposing organic material such as animal biomass by the action of aerobic microorganisms in the presence of oxygen, including introducing the organic material into a container having an end adapted to receive the organic material and an output end adapted to discharge the organic material, introducing a medium containing oxygen into the container to facilitate decomposition of the organic material by action of said microorganisms, and advancing the organic material through the container and upon decomposition of the organic material discharging the decomposed organic material out the output end of the container.

title: Device for growing nanometer crystal silicon powder
abstract: The invention discloses a device for growing nanometer crystal silicon powder. The device comprises a reaction cavity, an air inlet pipeline arranged on the top of the reaction cavity, a collection cavity formed at the bottom of the reaction cavity, a radio frequency source positioned outside the reaction cavity and a collection net arranged inside the collection cavity. The key points include: a pair of electrodes is arranged in the reaction cavity vertically; quartz sheets serving as medium barrier layers are fixed to two ends corresponding to the electrodes to form a pair of parallel plates; a vacuum pump is connected to the bottom of the collection cavity; and an adjustable barrier plate is arranged on the lower side of the collection net inside the collection cavity. In the device, the growth time of nanometer crystal silicon can be controlled by adjusting air flow and/or adjusting the air pressure of the reaction cavity by the vacuum pump and the barrier plate, so that the sizes of nanometer crystal silicon granules can be controlled. The device is easy to operate and low in cost, and is an economic and practical device for producing the nanometer crystal silicon powder.

title: Hinge assembly and electronic apparatus
abstract: A hinge assembly includes a first frame, a shaft, a cam, a positioning member and a second frame. The first frame has a rotating hole and a positioning portion. The shaft has a rotating portion, a first stop portion, a second stop portion and a recess portion. The first stop portion is corresponding to the second stop portion, and the recess portion is between the first stop portion and the second stop portion. The rotating portion can rotate in the rotating hole. The first stop portion stops the positioning portion such that the first frame is located at a first position. The second stop portion stops the positioning portion such that the first frame is located at a second position. The positioning portion can rotate in the recess portion such that the first frame can rotate between the first position and the second position relative to the shaft.

title: A kind of phase demodulating system of phase sensitive OTDR
abstract: This utility model provides the phase demodulating system of a kind of phase sensitive OTDR, including the sensor-based system sensing extraneous vibration and the detecting system that signal is detected, described sensor-based system includes narrow linewidth laser, the first bonder, acousto-optic modulator, EDFA Erbium-Doped Fiber Amplifier, circulator and the tested optical fiber being sequentially connected with, described detecting system includes that the second bonder, a PD module and the 2nd PD module and signal processing module, described second bonder use 3*3 bonder.This utility model provides synchronized orthogonal signal to be mixed without circuit, it is possible to reduce the hardware circuit of system, makes signal processing become the simplest.The process of the whole signal of this utility model is all shift frequency to be carried out processing to the frequency after acousto-optic modulator, so can reduce low-frequency noise signal, namely the polarization state noise of tested optical fiber；Additionally, this utility model can not extract the frequency signal of acousto-optic modulator, greatly reduce the difficulty of phase demodulating.

title: Message authentication method and device
abstract: The invention discloses a message authentication method. A private key server receives an encryption parameter and an encrypted preset main key from a service server, the preset main key is subjected to decryption processing according to the private key corresponding to the preset main key, a main key is generated according to a decrypted preset main key and the encryption parameter, a symmetric encryption key is generated according to the main key, the main key is used to carry out integrity verification processing on the client, and an integrity response message is returned to the client through the service server, or the symmetric encryption key is sent to the service server. Thus under the premise of reducing the load of an existing server, the safety of a message authentication process is improved further.

title: Water-proof polyester composite casing cloth
abstract: Waterproof composite polyester casing cloth consists of hot rolled non-woven polyester fabric, polyethylene film and needle punched polyester wool superposed together. The superposed structure has needle punched polyester wool as bottom layer, polyethylene film as the middle layer and hot rolled non-woven polyester fabric as the upper layer. The waterproof composite polyester casing cloth has strong alkali resistance, high ultraviolet resistance, long service life, no pollution, and other advantages.

title: MONOLITHICALLY INTEGRATED SEMICONDUCTOR CIRCUIT
abstract: The monolithic integrated circuit forming a fast acting bipolar digital circuit, has a transistor (T) with its collector connected to the cathode of a diode (D) formed by a pn junction. The anode of the diode is connected by an ohmic resistance (R) to the base and collector of another transistor (T1) with its emitter collected in common with the emitter of the first transistor to the same potential (i.e. negative) of the power supply. The anode of the diode is connected also to the control connection (i.e. the emitter) of a third transistor (T2). The collector of the first transistor (T) which is interconnected with three further transistors (T3,T4,T5) is controlled by the other power supply connection, forming the drive.

The rotatable safety showcase can rotate under the driving of the turnplate, so that the showing efficiency can be improved; showing articles are conveniently stored; the image information around the showcase body can be collected.

title: Dynamic protection of personal information in audio recordings
abstract: In a general aspect, audio recordings are managed to protect personal identifiable information (PII) and or sensitive personal information (SPI). In an aspect, a first audio file associated with a voice call and a second audio file associated with the voice call are obtained. The first audio file is partitioned into one or more segments. Which of the one or more segments of the first audio file the number of spoken digits exceeds a certain number are identified. The second audio file is partitioned into segments corresponding in time to the identified segments of the first audio file. The voice call is tagged as containing PII or SPI in response to determining that trigger words are spoken in at least one of the segments of the second audio file.

title: High Connectivity Multiple Dimension Optical Network in Glass
abstract: An optical communications system includes a first plurality of optical components having optical ports, a second plurality of optical components having optical ports and an optical cross-connect. The optical cross-connect includes a block of a single continuous construction and material having a first side adjacent the first optical components and a second side adjacent the second optical components, and a plurality of non-intersecting, continuous waveguides formed within the block and extending from the first side of the block to the second side of the block. The refractive index of each waveguide is different than the surrounding material of the block, and each waveguide changes direction at least once within the block. The waveguides are optically aligned with the optical ports of the first optical components at the first side of the block and with the optical ports of the second optical components at the second side of the block.

title: Flexible display panel, manufacturing method thereof and flexible display device
abstract: The invention provides a flexible display panel, a manufacturing method thereof and a flexible display device. The flexible display panel comprises a first substrate, a second substrate, package resin and a liquid crystal layer, wherein the package resin is used for packaging the first substrate and the second substrate, and the liquid crystal layer is packaged between the first substrate and the second substrate. The Young's modulus of the package resin arranged along flexible edges of the flexible display panel is smaller than that of the package resin arranged along inflexible edges of the flexible display panel. The flexible display panel has the advantages that on one hand, the Young's modulus of the package resin arranged along the flexible edges is small, and acting force on the glass substrates when the flexible display panel is bent can be reduced, so that deformation of the glass substrates can be reduced, liquid crystal optical path difference caused by deformation is lowered and a mura phenomenon is improved; on the other hand, the Young's modulus of the package resin arranged along the inflexible edges is large, so that separation of the first substrate from the second substrate can be avoided effectively.

title: Method of simultaneously writing servo tracks on a hard disk drive
abstract: A method of writing servo tracks on the disk surfaces of a hard disk drive. The method involves simultaneously writing partial servo tracks, called servo wedges, until a complete first set of servo wedges is written on all the disk surfaces. Then the disks are rotated until the heads of the disk drive are correctly positioned to simultaneously write subsequent servo wedge sets. This process is repeated until enough servo wedge sets are written to complete a first servo track on all the disk surfaces. Then, the heads are pivoted to a new radial position to begin writing a new servo track just as before. Simultaneously writing servo wedges advantageously expedites the often costly servo writing process.

title: Double hooked utility hanger, with hanger suspension hole
abstract: A double hooked utility hanger having a top attachment hook and a bottom suspension hook, each opposite one another along a connecting shaft, said ends rotated to be perpendicular to each other, or nearly so. A suspension hole is located centrally along the connecting shaft, opening on a plane perpendicular to the top attachment hook of the present invention. This suspension hole is the suspension point for a second and subsequent double hooked utility hanger, providing the means whereby the user may suspend a series of double hooked utility hangers, said series being suspended from a single attachment point from which is suspended the top attachment hook of the first member of the series. Any item capable of being stored in a suspended manner may be thus suspended from the bottom suspension hook of the present invention, either singly or multiply by use of the aforementioned series of double hooked utility hangers. Alternate embodiments include a treble hooked utility hanger, comprising a single top attachment hook connected to a three pronged connecting shaft, the lower two prongs terminating in a bottom suspension hook which provides the means whereby items capable of being stored in a suspended manner may be attached. Along said connecting shafts are located suspension holes for suspending subsequent multiple double or treble hooked utility hangers. An additional alternate embodiment comprises the bottom suspension hook of both the present invention and the preferred embodiment being rotated perpendicularly to said connecting shaft, providing the means for suspended storage of cups and other containers in a horizontal manner.

title: Curing-accelerated automotive adherend and method for bonding the same
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide a technology for accelerating the curing of an automobile adherend that is very simple and versatile.   The object is characterized in that the adhesive surface 12 has a bonding surface 12 and a non-bonding surface 13, and a plurality of hardening accelerating holes 14 penetrating from the bonding surface 12 to the non-bonding surface 13 are provided in the bonding surface 12. This is solved by the automotive curing acceleration adherend 10.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Toothpaste seat
abstract: The utility model relates to a toothpaste seat which belongs to the class of articles of daily use and comprises a box seat. The utility model is characterized in that the upper part of the box seat is provided with a wedge groove, and both sides of the box seat are provided with round holes. A rotating rod is arranged on the two round holes, and the rotating rod is provided with a clamping groove. One end of the rotating rod is provided with a handle which causes the bottom part of a toothpaste tube to be inserted into the wedge groove of the box seat and be clamped into the clamping groove of the rotating rod. The rotating rod is rotated, and the handle squeezes the toothpaste tube to extrude the toothpaste tube. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, convenient use, elegance and beautiful appearance. The utility model not only can be used for placing the toothpaste seat, but also can directly extrude the toothpaste.

title: A kind of drilling engineering is with boring hole-drawing device and reaming method
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of drilling engineerings with brill hole-drawing device, including cylindrical body and spiral wing, the wing sets there are three and is uniformly fixed on cylindrical body, the wing includes that wing ontology, PDC composite sheets cutting tooth and gauge lie low tooth, 13 17 PDC composite sheets cutting tooths are laid on each wing body surface, being laid with the gauge in the gage portion of wing ontology lies low tooth.The configuration of the present invention is simple using the present invention with reaming is bored, can scrape the borehole wall clearly while piercing, and then correct the borehole wall, to improve reaming effect, eliminates undergauge and cleaning casting bed, ensure hole diameter size.Drilling fluid flow field in wellbore can be changed in hole-drawing device, is conducive to return on the eddy flow of drilling fluid and landwaste, improves drilling fluid prop-carrying capacity.

title: Cable wellhead pulley
abstract: The invention discloses a cable wellhead pulley. The cable wellhead pulley comprises more than one group of pulleys, wherein each pulley comprises a pulley wheel which is arranged between two connecting plates, and two supporting rods; adjacent pulley blocks are rotatablely connected with each other; and one end of each supporting rod is rotatablely connected with a connecting plate of each pulley block, and the other end of each supporting rod is a clamping end. The cable wellhead pulley is low in cost, convenient to use, and high in working efficiency; and more importantly, the cable wellhead pulley is safe and reliable.

title: Detector for turning angle of slewing base table of back- hoe working vehicle
abstract: PURPOSE:To detect the turning direction of a slewing base table by information from a rotary encoder by using two rotary encoders of a low frequency. CONSTITUTION:Two rotary encoders 10a and 10b to detect the turning angle of a slewing base 2 are set and connected to the slewing base 2 in an interlocking manner such that pulse signals sig.1 and sig.2 to be sent out with the turning operation are sent out with nearly equal pulse width W and a pulse repeating period T and also such that the phases of the signals sig.1 and sig.2 are differentiated from each other with a smaller width than the pulse width W. On the basis of the leading and trailing detection of the signals sig.1 and sig.2, the turning direction of the slewing base table 2 is judged and pulse signals of pulse repeating frequency (f=1/T) four times greater than pulse from the encoders 10a and 10b is sent out from a circuit 15. Since inexpensive rotary encoders of low frequency are used, the turning angle detector of high detection accuracy can be obtained at low cost.

title: Foldable etagere
abstract: A collapsible etagere which, when erected, is constituted by a tier of open shelves. The frame of the etagere comprises a pair of spaced vertical poles which are bridged by a series of structural rectangles whose ends are attached to the poles, the rectangles in the series being equispaced from each other and from the upper and lower extremities of the poles to define shelf areas which are occupied by two rows of rectangular wings. The wings in each row are hingedly connected at points displaced from their inner ends to a respective pole whereby the wings may be partially outstretched from the poles to support removable shelves, or folded inwardly to collapse the structure.

title: A kind of lines identification module, its driving method and display device
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of lines identification module, its driving method and display device, synchronous scanning part is increased above the sensitive surface of sensor devices array, the synchronous scanning part can each sensor devices carry out being divided into first lightproof area and the first transmission region of dynamic change when lines is recognized；Wherein, the first transmission region is carrying out lines and is recognizing that the sensor devices of scanning can smoothly receive the reflected light of finger by the first transmission region at least formed on the top of the sensor devices for carrying out lines identification scanning with guarantee.And the first lightproof area can cover the sensor devices that need not carry out lines identification scanning so that no illumination is incident upon these sensor devices, these sensor devices can be avoided from producing leakage current noise transmission to the data wire for connecting.As the scanning of sensor devices, the first lightproof area and the first transmission region in synchronous scanning part synchronously change, the signal to noise ratio that data wire reads out signal can be improved.

title: Consider the power information system control function reliability estimation method of component faults
abstract: The invention proposes a kind of power information system control function reliability estimation methods for considering component faults, comprising the following steps: analysis power information system control function is related to associated component and its logical relation；Based on component faults analysis of Influential Factors, component faults probabilistic model is established；In conjunction with the logical relation between control function component, whether analytic unit failure effect causes control function to fail；The influence that power information system control function fails to electric system is analyzed, power information system control function reliability index is chosen；By monte carlo method simulated assembly working condition, calculates evaluation index and power information system control function reliability is assessed.This method can be used for the reliability assessment of control function in power information system.

title: Wireless emergency calling device
abstract: The utility model is a radio emergency distress call apparatus, which is characterized in that a water level sensor is mounted on the inner wall of the house, a door magnetic sensor and a window magnetic sensor on the door and the window respectively, a temperature sensor and smog sensor on the roof, a gas and natural gas leakage sensor in the kitchen, a current leakage sensor and an overcurrent sensor in the distribution box; and at the meanwhile, a button panel comprised of a fire button, an electrocution button, a robbery button, a gas leakage button, a water overflow button and a sickness button is mounted on the inner wall, which is provided with an analogue digital converter and an intelligent collecting front terminal. In addition, an aid computer is arranged correspondingly in the community, district rescue subcenter and the national rescue center. Each button is correspondingly connected with the analogue digital converter by wires, and the analogue digital converter and each sensor are correspondingly connected with intelligent collecting front terminal by wires, and furthermore, the intelligent collecting front terminal is connected with the online circuit by wires, thereby forming an emergency warning rescue network to realize rescue.

title: Exercise apparatus
abstract: An exercise apparatus comprising a frame, and at least one elongated sheet of flexible material has a first end coupled to the frame and has a second free end positioned frontwardly relative to the frame. The sheet of flexible material has an upwardly facing support surface, and the sheet of flexible material has a predetermined stiffness for supporting substantially the entire weight of an exerciser of the apparatus. At least one support assembly is mounted to the frame and generally overhangs the support surface of the sheet of flexible material for further supporting the exerciser upon pushing downwardly against the sheet of flexible material and thereby moving the free end of the sheet of flexible material downwardly, and for supporting the exerciser upon pulling upwardly to release the downward force against the sheet of material and thereby permitting the free end of the sheet of flexible material to move upwardly.

title: Syringe
abstract: Provided is a syringe which includes an elongated syringe body, the syringe body having a first space and a second space which are disposed therein side by side in a direction orthogonal to the longitudinal direction and which are separated from each other; a nozzle disposed on a tip end side of the syringe body to communicate with the syringe body; a first gasket inserted into the first space to be slidable in the longitudinal direction of the syringe body; a second gasket inserted into the second space to be slidable in the longitudinal direction of the syringe body; a medicine stored in a portion closer to the tip end than to the first gasket in the first space; a liquid stored in a portion closer to the tip end than to the second gasket in the second space; and a switching means for switching among the communication patterns of the first space, the second space, and the nozzle.

title: Method for the treatment of nematodes in soil using furfural
abstract: A method for the treatment of nematodes includes applying to the nematodes in the soil a nematicidal amount of furfural. The furfural is preferably impregnated into the nematode-infested soil. The furfural may be applied neat or suspended in a variety of liquid or solid carrier systems, and is applied to the soil by methods including mixing, fumigation and injection. The furfural has excellent nematicidal effect at low concentrations, is cost effective, and is not phytotoxic.

title: High-voltage oil switch diagnostics system
abstract:
FIELD: electricity. 
     SUBSTANCE: high-voltage oil switch diagnostics system includes a high-voltage switch made up of three poles each of which contains an oil tank accommodating high-voltage contacts and an arc control device, a drive and an oil heater according to this invention, the outer surface of every oil tank accommodates a thermal transducer that, together with the oil tank and the oil heater, is provided with heat insulation. An additional controller incorporating power control outputs, data input and output, is connected via control outputs to the oil heater via data inputs it is connected to the thermal transducers and via the data output, to the dispatcher station. Heat insulator is provided with water, oil and fire resistant cover. 
     EFFECT: higher reliability of the switch and longer life. 
     2 cl, 1 dwg

title: Anti human osteosarcoma zinc-containing heteropoly compound and synthetic method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to an anti human osteosarcoma zinc-containing heteropoly compound and a synthetic method thereof, and relates to the anti human osteosarcoma zinc-containing heteropoly compound and the synthetic method thereof. The anti human osteosarcoma zinc-containing heteropoly compound has the molecular formula of (H2imi)2[Bi2W20O70Zn2(OH2)6Na4(OH2)14].15H2O. The method comprises the steps: 1, dissolving Na2WO4.2H2O in deionized water, and regulating pH to obtain a solution A; 2, dissolving Bi(NO3)3.5H2O in a dilute hydrochloric acid solution to obtain a solution B; 3, adding simultaneously Zn(Ac)2.2H2O, imidazole and the solution B into the solution A, heating with stirring and carrying out heat preservation, cooling, filtering, allowing to stand, and then finishing. The anti human osteosarcoma zinc-containing heteropoly compound can induce human osteosarcoma cells to generate apoptosis, morphology change and DNA damage thus inhibits the proliferation of the human osteosarcoma cells, and can be used as an anti human osteosarcoma chemotherapy drug.

title: Material continuous negative-pressure centrifugal separating and drying device
abstract: The utility model discloses a material continuous negative-pressure centrifugal separating and drying device which comprises a static separation basin, a dynamic separation basin, a dynamic sealing device and a negative-pressure liquid storage tank, wherein the dynamic separation basin is coaxially arranged in the static separation basin; the opening ends of the dynamic and static separation basins are hermetically matched with the dynamic sealing device and the feeding ends of the dynamic and static separation basins are matched with a delivery device; and the bottom of the rear end of the static separation basin is provided with a discharging pipe and communicated with the negative-pressure liquid storage tank. According to the utility model, under a negative-pressure working condition, a horizontal structure is adopted and a material dispersion device is matched, so that materials are centrifugally separated after being sufficiently dispersed, then the separated liquid and solid materials are discharged synchronously and continuous operation is realized. The material continuous negative-pressure centrifugal separating and drying device is compact in structure, stable and reliable in work and especially suitable for the online continuous centrifugal separation of thick slurry materials. The material continuous negative-pressure centrifugal separating and drying device is capable of continuously completing the separation and the drying once, so that the production cost is greatly reduced, benefit is brought to preserve the biological activities of the nutritional ingredients of the materials and the quality of biological products is improved.

title: Compound microbial fertilizer
abstract: The invention discloses a compound microbial fertilizer which is composed of the following materials in parts by weight: 42-50 parts of powdered rock phosphate, 16-22 parts of bran shell powder, 15-26 parts of rape seed cake powder, 6-12 parts of urea, 1-3 parts of Brevibacillus laterosporus and 2-4 parts of bacillus subtilis. By utilizing the compound microbial fertilizer, the formula composition is scientific and reasonable, rejected ore with the rock phosphate grade less than 18% is fully used, a current mature microbial technology is adopted, waste materials are recycled, environment pollution and atmospheric emission are reduced, and an ecological green living environment is created. The compound microbial fertilizer has significant phosphorus and potassium decomposition effect and good growth promotion and disease prevention effects and is comprehensive and balanced in nutrition, complementary in three effects, environmental friendly, harmless, and convenient for use.

title: Phase shift detector for printing press
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a phase shift detecting device whose structure is simplified, installation cost is inexpensive, and performance is sufficiently satisfied. An intermediate shaft rotatably supported on a fixed member of a printing press, a first detection gear fitted non-rotatably on the intermediate shaft, and relatively rotatable on the intermediate shaft. A second detection gear fitted therein, one of the first and second detection gears being provided on a first drive gear coaxially and integrally provided on the rear segment, and the other being provided on a reversing cylinder. In this connection state, the first and second detection gears are synchronously rotated at the same rotation speed in the same direction, and are separately connected to the second drive gear provided coaxially and integrally. Is characterized in that the phase shift caused by the phase shift is caused to appear as a phase shift between these detection gears.

title: Operation unit
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] When an operation panel is formed on multiple surfaces, only the operation panel formed on the surface facing upward is made the effective surface. [Structure] On a front surface 2 and a rear surface 4 of a remote controller, operation panels 2a and 4a in which a plurality of operation buttons are arranged are provided, respectively, and the front surface 2 faces upward as shown in FIG. At this time, when one of the operation buttons provided on the operation panel 2a is pressed, a control signal is transmitted from the light emitting surface 1, and when the back surface 4 faces upward as shown in FIG. A control signal is transmitted from the light emitting surface 1 when any one of the operation buttons provided on is pressed.

title: Self-adhesive thermosetting expanded adhesive tape and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a self-adhesive thermosetting expanded adhesive tape and a preparation method thereof. The expanded adhesive tape is prepared by the following steps: taking butadiene rubber and natural rubber as raw materials, then adding with a filling agent, a tackifier, a vulcanizing agent, an accelerating agent and a foaming agent, etc, mixing in an internal mixer by three mixing steps, then extruding with an extruder for obtaining rubber strips, then reeling with an automatic reeling device with isolation paper for forming disks for obtaining the adhesive tape. The tape uses a traditional method for tackifying physically, and also uses a chemical method for tackifying; by adding epoxy resin and curing agent with strong bonding ability to the product, the binding power of the product after being roasted is strong for the steel plate. The expanded adhesive tape of the invention is a molded adhesive tape, which is convenient to use and free in pollution, has bonding power for the steel plate and zinc-plated plate, and can resist the primary treating solution and electrophoretic solution; when roasting, the rubber is vulcanized and foamed, thus the steel plates on the two sides can be bonded, and the product can absorb sound and damp. The products can be widely applied to absorbing sound and damping for transports, such as automobile and plane, etc.

title: Synthetic lubricant additive
abstract: It is known by the inventor that a universal synthetic lubricant additive that can greatly enhance the performance standards of existing lubricants, petroleum based or synthetic, imparts a new and desirable property not originally present in the existing oil or it reinforces a desirable property already possessed in some degree can greatly benefit the consumer. Although additives of many diverse types have been developed to meet special lubrication needs, their principal functions are relatively few in number. This universal synthetic lubricant additive (invention) with micro lubrication technology, when used as directed will reduce the oxidative or thermal degradation of the host oil, substantially reduce the deposition of harmful deposits in lubricated parts, minimize rust and corrosion, control frictional properties, reduce wear, temperature, sludge, varnishes and prevent destructive metal-to-metal contact, reduce fuel consumption and harmful emissions while improving performance through increased horsepower and torque. Further this technology lends itself to further development of a host of energy/emission reduction products from conditioners for kerosene, diesel, bunker-C heave oils to gasoline, cutting oils, penetrating lubricants, electrical dielectric coatings, oxidation inhibitors and electrical terminal coatings.

title: Method of insulin producing
abstract: FIELD: medicine, endocrinology, chemical- pharmaceutical industry. SUBSTANCE: method involves grinding chicory roots by rolling to particles size 1 mm, not above, extraction with 70% ethyl alcohol in the ratio raw : extractant = 1: 6 and then with cold water in the ratio raw : extractant = 1: (2.5-3.5). The end product is extracted from grist with water at 90 C in the ratio raw : extractant = 1: (6- 8) followed by evaporation under vacuum to obtain the concentrate containing 25-30% of total substances to be extracted with water. Concentrate is cooled, treated with 96% ethyl alcohol in the ratio concentrate : ethanol = 1: 2, filtered, washed out and dried. EFFECT: increased yield and purity of end product. 3 tbl _

title: Workpiece conveying method
abstract:
PURPOSE: To eliminate a wasteful standby time by dividing a work process into two parts and a work region into three areas and executing a half work process in one of a pair of end part areas, except a central area, while executing pre-work and post-work processes in the other end part area.  
     CONSTITUTION: Three stations W1, W2, W3 are respectively division-set, and the first printed board Pb 1  is carried in the upstream side work station W1, with parts loaded in an about half region of the printed board Pb 1 , and conveyed, after work is performed after loading, to the standby station W2. Subsequently, the next printed board Pb 2  is carried in the work station W1 to execute work before loading. The printed board Pb 1  from the standby station W2 is carried in the downstream side work station W3 and left as executing work before loading while half loading of electronic parts is executed on the printed board Pb 2  in the work station W1, and then electronic parts are loaded in the rest of half region of the printed board Pb 1  in the work station W3. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1991,JPO&Japio

title: Corneal cell imaging device
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a corneal cell imaging apparatus capable of obtaining a clear image of epithelial cells by effectively and clearly detecting the position of the epithelium. SOLUTION: An illumination optical system 4 for illuminating an anterior eye portion of an eye E to be examined from diagonally forward with illumination light, and a photographing optical system for imaging the reflected illumination light reflected by the anterior eye portion. 5, a first focus detection means for irradiating the subject's eye with the illumination light for focusing from obliquely forward, receiving reflected light at the focus, and detecting a focus position by identifying an image of each layer of the cornea; An image detection sensor 23 that detects an image of a focused portion in the eye to be inspected,   A computing unit 30 that detects a focus position by performing frequency analysis of an output signal of the image detection sensor 23.

title: Filament mower with filament advancing mechanism
abstract: Disclosed herein is a filament mower comprising a wheel supported housing having an upper deck, a prime mover mounted on the upper deck and including an output shaft extending through the upper deck of the said housing, a string trimmer head fixed to the output shaft within the housing and including a spool carried on the output shaft for rotary movement relative thereto, a spool cover carried on the output shaft for common rotation therewith, one of the spool and the spool cover being movable axially of the output shaft between an upper position and a lower position, means for limiting movement outwardly of the output shaft of the other of the spool and the spool cover, means for biasing the spool and the spool cover away from each other, and interengaging lugs on spool and on the spool cover for interengaging the spool cover and the spool for common rotation when the one of the spool cover and the spool is in the upper position and in the lower position and for permitting relative rotation between the spool and the spool cover during movement of the one of the spool cover and the spool between the upper and lower positions, and means on the housing for displacing the one of the spool and the spool cover toward the other of the spool and the spool cover against the action of the biasing means.

title: Label shifting controller of label printer
abstract:
According to the present invention, the label movement amount adjusting device which allows the label to be temporarily stored and stopped when cutting scraps of continuously moving labels is operated by a servo motor capable of precise control, thereby simplifying the construction and reducing equipment costs, respectively. It is an object of the present invention to provide a label shifting amount adjusting device of a label printing apparatus which is capable of arbitrarily selectively selecting a label having a different cutting interval, and having an improved quality due to less possibility of defects. 
     Label moving amount adjusting device of the label printing apparatus according to the present invention for achieving the above object, the printing unit consisting of a rotationally driven printing roller; A cutting portion of the cutting knife formed of a crimping flat knife; A movement amount compensator for controlling a movement amount of a label in the cutting part, the cam including a cam; It is connected to the cam central axis of the movement amount compensation device, characterized in that it comprises a servo motor for interlocking, rotating the cam according to the rotation.

title: Beam current density distribution adjustment device and ion implanter
abstract: A beam current density distribution adjustment device is provided. The device includes member pairs in a long side direction of a ribbon beam, the member pairs adjusting a beam current density distribution in the long side direction of the ribbon beam by using an electric field or a magnetic field, members of each of the member pairs being disposed with the ribbon beam in-between the members. Opposing surfaces of the member pairs adjacent to each other in the long side direction of the ribbon beam are partially not parallel to a traveling direction of the ribbon beam.

title: Improvements in Safety Valves suitable for use with Hydraulic Machines, such as Cranes.
abstract: 8680. Berry, H. May 10. Cranes.-Relates to safety valves for hydraulic machinery such as cranes, to prevent the rams from moving back if the pressure falls in the mains owing to fracture &c. The valve 2 in the supply passage 7, 8 is connected by its spindle 1 to a ram 19, working in a chamber 2U connected to the main by the passage 21, so that if the pressure falls the valve is closed by the pressure through the passage 8 from the main cylinders, and by the spring 14 contained in the tubular extension 9 of the valve. The spring is adjusted by the screw 16 passing through the removable cap 11. An auxiliary valve, connected to the main beyond the main valves, controls the supply to the chamber 20, so that the valve 2 can be opened for exhaust of the actuating-fluid.

title: The structure of combination of metal casing and plastic member
abstract: The structure of combination of metal casing and plastic member comprises a metal casing, a plastic member and an adhesive tape bonded between the metal casing and the plastic member. The adhesive tape is prepared by applying a adhesive bonding agent to a narrow elongated absorptive substrate by means of coating, spray-painting or printing. By means of using the adhesive tape to bond the plastic member to the metal casing, the plastic member is firmly secured to the metal casing, simplifying rapid fabrication and reducing the product manufacturing cost.

title: Method of evaluating efficiency of intramural autoplasmochemical therapy of urine bladder cancer
abstract:
FIELD: medicine. 
     SUBSTANCE: invention relates to medicine, namely to morphological analysis in oncology. In order to evaluate efficiency of intramural aotoplasmochemical therapy of urine bladder cancer reactions with markers of proliferation and apoptosis factors are carried out. In case of decrease of proliferative activity Ki-67 14.3±3.41%, of p53 expression 10%, of apoptotic index 0.53±0.13, in case if AE1/AE3 cytokeratin expression in vessels of microcirculation stream is absent, if pronounced AE1/AE3 cytokeratin expression in urothelial epithelium is preserved, reduction of recurrences and metastases is predicted. 
     EFFECT: method increases evaluation of treatment efficiency, chemical prevention of local recurrences and progressing of superficial cancer of urinary bladder into muscular layer. 
     3 dwg, 1 ex, 2 tbl

title: Air conditioner fan motor drive
abstract: (57) [Summary] When a fan motor is started, if the compressor is in an operating state, the DC voltage is not constant as when the compressor is stopped. When the actual DC voltage is high when the case is set and the actual DC voltage is high, a problem such as a flow of a large current exceeding a specified value to the fan motor occurs. In the startup mode, the D supplied to the fan motor is adjusted according to the DC voltage supplied to the fan motor or by adjusting the ON time of the fan motor drive element.   Regardless of the level of the C voltage, it is possible to prevent a problem that a large current larger than a specified value flows to the fan motor or to prevent the fan motor from rotating due to insufficient torque, and to provide a reliable and smooth start of the fan motor.

title: Measurement and control device with network communication function
abstract: The utility model discloses a measurement and control device with a network communication function. The measurement and control device comprises an FPGA module; the FPGA module is connected with an input plug-in, an output plug-in, an alternating current measurement plug-in, a direct current measurement plug-in and a main CPU module respectively; the main CPU module is connected with a communication plug-in and a GOOSE/SV module respectively; and the communication plug-in is connected with an MMI, a GPS and a background respectively. According to the measurement and control device of the utility model, an information aggregate processing method is adopted, so that requirements for realization of digital access or traditional access of a process layer can be satisfied, and therefore, construction requirements of novel and old intelligent substations can be satisfied.

title: Payoff reel control method
abstract: (57) [Abstract] An object of the present invention is to provide a pay-off reel that minimizes the occurrence of coil scratches by controlling the torque of the air brake and properly controlling the tension of the coil between the pay-off reel and the processor. The purpose is to provide a control method. [Structure] The coil winding diameter on a pay-off reel is sequentially measured, and the measured value that changes momentarily is converted into a current and input to a computing device. Based on the input value and the width and plate thickness of the coil that have been input in advance. The coil tension is calculated, the appropriate set pressure of the payoff reel air brake is sequentially calculated, and the signal based on this set value is output to the regulator to adjust the braking of the air brake. It is characterized by controlling so as to be appropriate.

title: Manufacture of inorganic fiber-reinforced insulation material for building
abstract: PURPOSE:To uniformly disperse inorganic fibers for reinforcement in foamed resin by a method in which inorganic reinforcing fibers whose surfaces are fuzzed by spreading an adhesive are put in molds, and then expansible resin which can react at a temperature above the melting point of the adhesive used is cast into the molds, expanded, and cured. CONSTITUTION:Inorganic reinforcing fibers 1, e.g., glass fibers, etc., whose fluffy surface is fixed by the spreading of an adhesive, e.g., a hot melt type adhesive, etc., are supplied from inlet side onto a double conveyor 5, and then an expansible resin 2 is supplied from an expansible resin feeder 10 provided above the upper inlet of a lower caterpillar 6b and expanded between mobile molds 3a between the upper and lower caterpillars 6a and 6b. After the expansion reaction and curing of the expansible resin 2, the expanded and cured resin is taken out of the outlet side of the double conveyor 5 and cut into a certain size of pieces to obtain insulation materials for building. The preferred expansible resin 2 used includes urethane resin, etc., which can make exothermic reactions at 80-100 deg.C.

title: Porous filter, water purifier provided with the filter, and method for manufacturing the filter
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a porous filter having a relatively simple structure, a high separation performance, a high filtration performance, and a small decrease in filtration performance over time, a water purifier equipped with the filter, and a filter for the filter A manufacturing method is provided. SOLUTION: The porous filter 1 has a large number of flow passages 3 communicating from one end face 41 to another end face 43. A porous filter 1 characterized in that a predetermined continuous flow passage 3a which is linearly and continuously adjacent to one end face 41 is sealed, and the remaining flow passage 3b is sealed at another end face 43. It is. (A) a step of forming a raw material for a porous filter substrate, (B) a step of firing the formed raw material to form a porous filter substrate, and (C)   A method for producing a porous filter 1, comprising: a step of forming a film on a porous filter substrate; and (D) a step of sealing a flow passage at an end face of the porous filter.

title: Turbo compressor and turbocharger
abstract: (57) [Summary] To improve the compression efficiency of a turbo compressor. A turbo compressor (3) includes a diffuser (D).   And a seal plate 11 rotatably receiving a shaft 8 on which the impeller 9 is mounted, and a seal plate 11 fixed to the impeller 9 at the outer periphery of the shaft 8 relative to the bearing housing 7 by a fastening screw 21 in the diffuser D. And a compressor housing 6 which is attached to the seal plate 11 and accommodates the impeller 9 with the diffuser D. A counterbore 20 for supporting the fastening screw 21 is formed in the seal plate 11 on the outer periphery of the shaft 8. The diffuser D closed the open end of the counterbore 20 with a passage wall part of the pressure conversion passage 18 continuing from the impeller 9. The passage wall is a filler 24 buried in the counterbore 20. In addition, a cover provided with a lid body covering the open end of the counterbore 20 as a passage wall is provided.

title: A kind of poultry device with chicken manure drier
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of poultry device with chicken manure drier, chicken manure drying device includes excrement band, chicken coop and drier.Drier includes perforated tube and pipeline fan, and perforated tube is in the space between chicken coop and excrement band, and perforated tube both ends respectively connected pipeline fan, and the trend of perforated tube moves towards identical with excrement band, and length is more than the length of excrement band.The use of chicken manure drying device can realize the control to environment in hen house：Effectively reduce the harmful gas concentration such as ammonia, hydrogen sulfide in house；Temperature, humidity in regulation house in real time；Be advantageous to chicken well to grow, improve laying rate of laying hen.

title: Armature coiling group with slot wedge for DC motor
abstract: The utility model discloses an armature winding for slot-wedging a direct current motor with a belt and is provided with an active conducting region and an inactive conducting region which is connected with the active conducting region, wherein the inactive conducting region is bended downwards and the bended height of the inactive conducting region is 8 to 9 millimeters relatively to the active conducting region. The utility model is characterized in that the portion between the inactive conducting region and the active conducting region of the armature winding is concave and the enough room between the inactive region and a stator of the inactive region is provided, which is convenient for binding and allows the binding belt in a certain thickness accordant with the technical requirements for overcoming the centrifugal effect of the high speed motor.

title: Network type automobile character system and query method
abstract: The invention belongs to a net electronic information technique, specially a net automobile credit system and inquiring method. It characterized in that: system trader provides a main server, information demander is connected to the main server via net system to know the concrete information; thereinto, the automobile provider can be connected with the main server via a second end workstation, inputting the concrete information, at the same time, system manager collects relative information of automobile and connects to the main server via a first workstation to form automobile database, the information demander is connected with the main server via a third workstation to inquire the concrete information of automobile.

title: Base station signal matching device
abstract: A base station signal matching device is a base station signal matching device mounted in a distributed antenna system for amplifying a received base station signal and transmitting the amplified base station signal to a user terminal. The base station signal matching device includes a first unit for generating first and second branch base station signals by using a power division function based on the base station signal, and transmitting the second branch base station signal to a third unit, and a second unit for matching the first branch base station signal to be suitable for signal processing of the distributed antenna system.
