title: Light source arraying device
abstract: PURPOSE:To easily obtain a function equivalent to an arrayed light source by inserting an arrayed waveguide type device between the light source and an arraylike transmission line as an external modulation element. CONSTITUTION:A titled device leads continuous or pulselike modulated oscillation light from a light emitting source such as a single semiconductor laser into plural optical fibers. Waveguide light led from a semiconductor laser 1 into a main waveguide 3 formed on a substrate 2 such as photoelectric crystal is led into a main waveguide 3' and also branched into branch waveguides 40-43 successively and these branched light rays are moreover branched into the 2nd branch waveguides 400-430 respectively, modulated by photoelectric modulators 50-53 provided in the branch waveguides and transmitted to a fiber array 6. Since these modulated signal light is independent and noninterferential, respectively, the semiconductor laser 1 has an function of just like an arrayed one.

title: Four-wheel drive vehicle
abstract:
PURPOSE: To improve an antiskid brake effect by releasing a transmission from its connection to a propeller shaft while a between-wheel differential gear from its connection to an output shaft when an antiskid brake device is actuated.  
     CONSTITUTION: A transmission 2 meshes its output gear 3 with a gear 5 integrally formed with a casing 4a of a front differential gear 4 serving as the between- wheel differential gear, and the gear 5 meshes also with an intermediate gear 10 arranged through a 2-4 selector clutch 9 serving as the release means coaxially with one bevel gear 7 of the paired bevel gears 6, 7 for driving rear wheels. While the other bevel gear 6 is connected to a propeller shaft 11 arranged in a car body longitudinal direction and transmitting driving power. In case of an ABS control region when a 2-4 selector switch 51 is turned on, a control is performed by the 2-4 selector clutch 9 and a rear clutch comprising a clutch means 32.

title: The vehicle control system that connect with GPS and camera and computer or smartphone
abstract: The present invention relates to a signal detection and vehicle control system in which a GPS and a black box, such as a smartphone, are interlocked, and a vehicle that can receive a signal transmitted from the above device and a driving assist device that assists the driver in driving by installing a GPS and a map. The image pickup device to be installed inside and outside, the image analysis device to be computed and analyzed by receiving the image data from the image pickup device, and a signal for manipulating the vehicle driving based on the results analyzed by the image analysis device, based on this It is provided with a vehicle control device that is responsible for driving the vehicle.   The signal detection and vehicle control system in which a GPS and a black box, such as a smart phone, according to the present invention are interlocked, analyzes an image only when necessary, and analyzes the analysis data by minimizing the amount of analysis data. The advantage of minimizing the resource consumption of the device is that it minimizes errors in analysis results and reduces time.

abstract: PURPOSE:To simplify the assembly by providing a positioning means of a doctor blade and a guide plate as one body with a bearing member of a magnet roller. CONSTITUTION:On a bearing member 20 of a magnet roller 11, a part 20a for positioning the tip of a doctor blade 13, and a part 20b for positioning the tip of a guide plate 12 are provided as one body. Also, as for the doctor blade 13, its tip is controlled by the bearing members 20, 20a, and it is fixed to a side wall of a developing case 8 through screws 21, 22, and with regard to the guide plate 12, as well, in the same way, its tip is controlled by the bearing members 20, 20b, and it is fixed to the side wall of the developing case 8 through a screw 23. title: A camera capable of suitable close-up photography
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] To provide a camera capable of easily capturing an image of an object at a close range with good focus even in a simple camera such as a general popular type camera. [Structure] In a manual or automatic focus adjustment type or fixed focus type camera, for setting a smaller aperture than usual, setting the lens at a short distance, and selecting a close-up shooting mode in which a flash is emitted. Provide a manual switch. When the camera is an automatic focus adjustment type camera equipped with a distance measuring sensor that measures the distance to the subject, the close-up shooting mode is automatically set when the measured output value of the distance measuring sensor falls within a predetermined value. It can also be set.

title: Three-dimensional conductive electrode for solar cell
abstract: A photovoltaic device and method include forming a plurality of pillar structures in a substrate, forming a first electrode layer on the pillar structures and forming a continuous photovoltaic stack including an N-type layer, a P-type layer and an intrinsic layer on the first electrode. A second electrode layer is deposited over the photovoltaic stack such that gaps or fissures occur in the second electrode layer between the pillar structures. The second electrode layer is wet etched to open up the gaps or fissures and reduce the second electrode layer to form a three-dimensional electrode of substantially uniform thickness over the photovoltaic stack.

title: Odorless aeration oxidation pond sewage treatment method
abstract: The invention relates to a method for treating sewage in an aeration lagoon without stink, which is a treatment method of activated sludge. The inside of the lagoon has an aeration device, wherein, the aeration lagoon is internally provided with a suspended or floating medium, on which plants are planted; the plants at least cover a part of surface of the aeration lagoon; the inside of the aeration lagoon is provided with matrix suspended under the medium and/or arranged at a bottom of the lagoon, wherein, the matrix is one or the combined matter of furnace slag, coal ashes, and mineral containing alkali oxides. The treatment method has the advantages that the aeration lagoon has the medium forming a floating island; the plants planted on the floating island have biomembranes; the total removing ability of phosphate and ammonia nitrogen is increased; the stink during the operation course of the lagoon is absorbed; the matrix is set; the phosphate removal ability of the aeration lagoon is increased; the investment of other mechanical equipments or treatment technologies is not required; the construction is convenient; the cost is low; the operation and management are quite simple; the environment is beautified; the medium can be made of waste materials; the matrix is industrial waste residues; and the environmental protection concept is reached.

title: Perspective detection system and perspective detection method
abstract: The invention discloses a perspective detection system and a perspective detection method which are applied to the perspective detection of electronic components. The perspective detection method includes the following procedures: generating X-ray light source and/or visible light source and irradiating an electronic components without moving the electronic component; converting the X-ray into faint fluorescence and strengthening an image after the light penetrates the electronic component; superposing an outline image formed by the visible light irradiating the electronic component upon an inner perspective image formed by the X-ray irradiating the electronic component; and judging and detecting the electronic component through the superposed image of the electronic components. The perspective detection system comprises a light source module, a carrying module, an imaging module, a lens and a CCD camera.

title: WING BLADES FOR PROPELLER
abstract: The leading edges of the fan blades of the ducted impeller are curved away from the radial axis so that the air-stream is broken up into smaller turbulence areas with the resulting noise generation split into small sources which are not added. The noise reduction is considerably without lowering the effectiveness of the thrust. The design enables the noise to be reduced without having to reduce the tip speed of the blades and hence compromising between noise and effectiveness.

title: A kind of biochemical immunity analyzer and biochemical immunity detection method
abstract: The present invention relates to medical detection field, in particular to a kind of biochemical immunity analyzer and biochemical immunity detection method.The biochemical immunity analyzer, including：Test board, support base, fluorescent scanning optical path component and display module.Dry-type biochemical analysis is carried out to the reagent card for being fixedly inserted in supporting part, and fluorescent scanning optical path component can drive moving parts to be slided along groove length direction so as to carry out fluorescent scanning analysis to fixed reagent card under the drive of drive mechanism, and testing result is exported by display module.So that the biochemical immunity analyzer has had the function that fluorescence immunoassay is quantified and Dry-type biochemical is analyzed concurrently simultaneously, detection project scope is increased, saves detection time.This method, detected using above-mentioned biochemical immunity analyzer, realize fluorescence immunoassay quantitative analysis and Dry-type biochemical quantitative analysis while measure, and two kinds of detections are not interfere with each other, independently of each other.

title: System and method for managing customer queuing
abstract: A system and method for managing customer queuing is provided. A new request is received from a user. The new request is assigned to a queue. Placed requests waiting in the queue ahead of the new request are counted. The placed requests are compared to a request threshold. An upsell is provided to the user when the placed requests exceed the request threshold. The new request is released from the queue. The new request is satisfied by providing a response to the user.

title: Large scale soil processing tool for use with a preformed sacrificial guide
abstract: A method is provided for centering and guiding a large diameter soil processing tool. A sacrificial guide is formed by using a small diameter soil processing tool to form a soil-cement column having a relatively hard outer section and a relatively soft center section. The relatively hard outer section is utilized to guide the large diameter soil processing tool. In one embodiment, the soft central region of the sacrificial guide is left in place and the pilot of the large tool carries an auger that simply drills through the central portion of the sacrificial guide. In a second embodiment, the sacrificial guide is hollow and the large tool need not have an auger at the tip of its pilot. The large tool advances downwardly through the sacrificial guide and, as it advances downwardly, the large tool breaks up the sacrificial guide and the sacrificial guide particles ultimately form a portion of the soil-cement column formed by the large soil processing tool. The method facilitates the use of soil processing tools having diameters of 8 to 20 feet, for example. Large volumes of subterranean material may be hardened or solidified by using an array of the sacrificial guides to precisely control and center the large processing tool so that the large quantities of subterranean material such as utilized to support an airport runway may be processed efficiently with the invention. The method is also usable with soil processing tools of any diameter.

title: Continuous wave (CW) - fixed multiple frequency triggered, radio frequency identification (RFID) tag and system and method employing same
abstract: A far field radio frequency identification (RFID) tagging and tracking system employing a plurality of continuous wave (CW), unmodulated signals selected from frequencies including a predetermined frequency band, includes a RFID interrogator generating a group of CW unmodulated signals corresponding to a RFID tag and receiving a tag identification (ID) signal sequence uniquely identifying the RFID tag, while the RFID tag includes a power source supplying power to the RFID tag but not including a microprocessor. A corresponding RFID tag and method for operating both the tag and the system are also described.

title: Motor drive device having function of varying DC link low-voltage alarm detection level
abstract: A motor drive device ( 1 ) of the present invention includes a converter unit ( 10 ) and an inverter unit ( 30 ). The converter unit ( 10 ) includes: power supply voltage monitoring unit ( 3 ) for detecting a power failure; DC link voltage detecting means ( 4 ); capacitor total capacity calculating means ( 6 ) which calculates total capacity of DC link smoothing capacitors ( 17, 18 ) and calculates a DC link low-voltage alarm detection level for an instantaneous power failure; DC link low-voltage alarm detection level setting means ( 8 ) which varies the DC link low-voltage alarm detection level for an instantaneous power failure as necessary; and alarm generating means ( 7 ) which monitors the DC link voltage and generates an alarm to protect the converter unit. In the case where a power failure is detected, the DC link low-voltage alarm detection level is increased in accordance with the total capacity of the DC link smoothing capacitors ( 17, 18 ).

title: Controlling apparatus for burner
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve safety by a method wherein in the title apparatus provided with an electronic timer and a rotation detector for a blower, a detecting circuit adopted to detect whether or not a timer operating pulse and a blower rotating pulse are normal is provided and the combustion of the titled burner is stopped when any of the above pulses is found abnormal. CONSTITUTION:A gas hot water feeder is prepurged by the operation of a blower 15 when an operation switch is turned ON. After that, a pilot burner 8 is ignited by opening a gas stop valve 5 and turning an ignition device 13 ON and when a combustion flame is detected through a thermocouple 10 within a predetermined period of time, a proportional control valve 6 is opened to thereby enable a burner 7 to burn. The above operation of the gas hot water feeder is controlled by a control circuit 4 which is provided with the electronic timer 22 and the rotation detector 25 for the blower 15. In this case, the detecting circuit 23 and an r.p.m. detecting circuit 27 are additionally provided in the control circuit 4 so that the operation conditions of the electronic timer 22 and the rotation detector 25 are detected. Thus, when any of the detecting circuits 23 and 27 detects abnormality, the combustion operation of the burner 7 is stopped by a control circuit 24 through an input and output circuit 28.

title: Multi-functional, intelligent and eco-friendly tape
abstract: A multi-functional, intelligent and eco-friendly tape comprising a base layer, a tag having a RFID function, a two-dimensional code printing layer and a barcode printing layer; the tag having a RFID function is composited with the base layer, and the two-dimensional code printing layer and the barcode printing layer are printed on the front surface of the base layer; through the tag having a RFID function, the two-dimensional code printing layer and the barcode printing layer, the anti-counterfeiting information of the present invention can be read by RFID readers, two-dimensional code readers or barcode readers, resulting in an intelligent anti-counterfeiting function, which is convenient, cost-effective and multi-functional.

abstract: Lamp lampshade outer surface burnishing device is worn the invention discloses one kind, including fixed seat, motor is fixed with the upside of the fixed seat, the output end of the motor is connected with polishing roll by first rotating shaft, the polishing roll is respectively provided on two sides with retainer ring and retaining ring, the retainer ring is fixedly sleeved in first rotating shaft, the retaining ring screw thread is socketed in first rotating shaft, the motor is provided with the support bar being fixedly connected with fixed seat away from the side of polishing roll, the upper end of the support bar is fixed with installing plate, the installing plate is provided with horizontally disposed impenetrating mouth, plate is inserted with the impenetrating mouth, the both sides of the plate are equipped with sliding block, the madial wall of the impenetrating mouth is provided with chute corresponding with sliding block.Simple structure of the present invention, it is easy to use, can to it is various sizes of wear lamp lampshade and carry out stabilization be fixedly clamped, so as to facilitate the polishing of lampshade outer surface, applicability is high.

title: Encoded data slice caching in a distributed storage network
abstract: A method begins by receiving a request to retrieve a data segment stored as encoded data slices in a distributed storage network (DSN). The method continues by determining whether at least the threshold number of encoded data slices is cached in temporary storage associated with a distributed storage processing module. When the at least the threshold number of encoded data slices are cached in the temporary storage, the method continues by retrieving the at least the threshold number of encoded data slices from the temporary storage. When the at least the threshold number of encoded data slices is not cached in the temporary storage, the method continues by retrieving one or more of the encoded data slices from the DSN to obtain the at least the threshold number of encoded data slices.

title: Adjustment of radar parameters to maintain accelerating target in track
abstract: A radar system tracks targets, and for each target determines the maximum acceleration of the target which can be tracked. The target acceleration is compared with the maximum acceleration that the radar can maintain in track, and if the decision is that the radar cannot maintain track, the radar data rate is increased, at least for that target. In at least some cases in which the target acceleration is such that the target can be maintained in track, the data rate for that target is decreased.

title: Clothes horse
abstract: The present invention relates to a foldable laundry hanger,   Two spaced apart connectors; Two hanger frames rotatably coupled between the two connectors and folded or folded like mutual wings; A plurality of hooks spaced apart from each other inside each of the hanger frames; Two support frames rotatably coupled between the two connection ports and extending in a mutual shape so as to be placed on the ground; A cross bar disposed on the inner side of each of the support frames; And a support disposed between the adjacent hanger frames and the support frame to support the hanger frame,   The support   A bar shaped body; A mounting portion formed on an upper end of the body so as to fit into the hanger; A sliding portion formed along the longitudinal direction of the body to be fitted to the cross bar; And an engaging portion formed on the inner wall of the sliding portion so as to be caught by the cross bar.   According to the present invention, since the hanger frame is unfolded or folded by the operation of being displaced by the cross bar in a state where the support frame is coupled to the hanger and the cross bar, the hanger frame can be easily expanded or collapsed.

title: Fluorine-resin sealing ring
abstract: A PTFE resin sealing ring in which at least one surface of an abutting part that forms a discontinuity in the sealing ring has been subjected to a plasma-modification treatment using a non-polymerizable gas and a pressure during plasma exposure of 10 to 500 Pa. Since the abutting surface(s) of this PTFE resin sealing ring has/have been subjected to a low-pressure plasma treatment, changing the states of the C-F bonds in the surface region(s), the abutting part does not stick even after a steady load has been applied at a high temperature, producing the prominent effect of ensuring both sealing performance under pressure and the ability to slide when not under pressure. This sealing ring is effective as a sealing material used with rotation or reciprocal motion, including a hydraulic circuit in a continuously variable transmission (CVT) or an automatic transmission (A/T) in an automobile, for example.

title: Preparation method and application of load-type metal phthalocyanine catalyst
abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method of load-type metal phthalocyanine catalyst, comprising: directly dipping a molecular sieve into phthalocyanine aqueous solution of which the molar volume density is 10-500 mu mol/L; adjusting the pH value to be 10-12; dipping at room temperature; stirring at interval; and centrifuging and drying to prepare the load-type metal phthalocyanine catalyst. The invention discloses an application of the catalyst in removing organic pollutants in water. The load-type metal phthalocyanine catalyst prepared with the invention has simple method, environment protection and low cost, the catalytic activity thereof is far higher than that of unloaded phthalocyanine catalyst, and the reaction condition is moderate and is not limited by waste water pH value. The load-type metal phthalocyanine catalyst does not generate secondary pollution, can be used for oxidation treatment of organic waste water systems and has industrial application prospect.

title: Rolling-riveted wheel bearing arrangement with a stepped inner ring
abstract: The invention relates to a wheel bearing arrangement (21a) of a vehicle axle, comprising a wheel bearing (22), which contains at least two rolling element rows, for bearing a wheel hub (30) which can be driven by a drive element. The rolling elements (23) of the wheel bearing (22) are guided in tracks (24, 26) of a stationary outer ring (25), the rotating wheel hub (30), and a separate inner ring (27a) which is paired with the wheel hub (30). In the assembled state, the wheel hub (30) of the wheel bearing arrangement (21a) and the drive element are operatively connected via a toothing. A radially stepped inner contour (28) of the inner ring (27a), said inner contour having two diameters (D 1 , D 2 ) which differ from one another, is adapted to a complementarily designed receiving area (29) of the wheel hub (30). The position of the inner ring (27a) is fixed on the end face by means of a rolling rivet connection (31) of the wheel hub (30).

title: Link-type sliding door mechanism
abstract: A vehicle sliding door mechanism is arranged to move a door from a door opening provided in a vehicle side body structure from a closed position to an open position. The sliding door mechanism comprises an upper slide rail and a lower slide rail fixed to the vehicle side body structure. An upper slider is associated with the upper rail and is movable along the upper rail, and a lower slider is associated with the lower rail and is movable along the lower rail. An upper link assembly operatively connected to the vehicle door and the upper slider, and a lower link assembly is operatively connected to the vehicle door and the lower slider. At least one link assembly of the upper link assembly and lower link assembly is configured to control a moment of force about a pivot axis while moving the vehicle door between the closed position and the open position. The moment of force is one of an opening moment and a closing moment and is dependent on a position of the vehicle door relative to the vehicle side body structure. The at least one link assembly is configured such that the moment of force is substantially zero between when the vehicle door moves between the closed position and the open position.

[Configuration] Terminal management unit 12 of the front-end processor,   13 notifies the host computers 1 to 3 of the terminal information about the terminal devices 14 to 17 that have logged in to itself and its own front end processor machine number, and the subordinate management unit 4 to 4 of the host computer.   6 holds these in the subordinate information tables 7 to 9 and refers to the held contents when communicating with the terminal device. title: Silicon aluminum based mesoporous-microporous composite molecular sieve and synthetic method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a novel silicon aluminum based mesoporous-microporous composite molecular sieve and a synthetic method thereof. The composite molecular sieve is obtained by adopting a silicon source and an aluminum source to stir for appropriate time under the action of a template agent to realize the crystallization and performing a one-step rapid synthetic method, and has regular mesoporeand micropore structures at the same time. Methods such as XRD are utilized to characterize a synthetic molecular sieve structure, and can display that the synthetic molecular sieve has the regular mesopore and micropore structures. The mesoporous-microporous composite molecular sieve can be taken as a catalytic material, and is suitable for catalytic reactions in which macromolecules is involved.

title: Groove working method by laser
abstract: PURPOSE:To easily execute the groove working to an optical integrated circuit board being a brittle member by shaping a high energy beam to a groove shape by an optical system and radiating it to a substrate of an optical integrated circuit, and executing necessary groove working to the substrate. CONSTITUTION:The substrate concerned 10 can be moved in the X direction and the Y direction in a plane coordinate. Also, in the upper part of a moving area of an XY table, a working head 55 of an excimer laser beam machine is positioned, and between the head and the substrate 10, a cylindrical lens 60 consisting of calcium fluoride, etc. is installed. After executing an alignment with an optical waveguide 50 on the substrate 10, an excimer laser beam is emitted to the lower part in the vertical direction from the working head 55. Subsequently, a laser light emitted from the working head 55 is focused only in one direction by the cylindrical lens 60, emitted to the substrate and a groove being suitable for coupling an optical fiber is obtained. In such a way, necessary groove working to the substrate is executed easily and at a high speed.

title: Sliding pressing mechanism for sliding water port
abstract: The utility model provides a sliding pressing mechanism for a sliding water port. The sliding pressing mechanism comprises a track and a track wheel matched with the track. The track is formed by a slope and a plane connected with the slope, the slope is located at one end of the track, the track wheel is installed at the end of a wheel shaft, the wheel shaft is connected with a support, and the cross section of the track wheel is in a regular polygon shape. By means of the structural style, on one hand, the track wheel and the track form surface contact so that pressure between the track wheel and the track is stable and is not subjected to influence of mixed sundries easily; on the other hand, after the sliding pressing mechanism is used for a certain times, abrasion conditions of the working surface of the track wheel can be detected through a detection device, the contact surface between the track wheel and the track is replaced when the track wheel is at a low position, so that the service life of the track wheel is effectively prolonged, and the steel-making cost is reduced.

title: Power generation device and hydroelectric power generation device
abstract: A power generation apparatus and a hydroelectric power generation apparatus that eliminate the need for a shaft seal structure that directly connects a runner unit and a power generation unit.   A runner unit 10 having a runner 15 having a magnet driven by running water, a power generation unit 50 having a generator 53 disposed opposite the runner unit, and a generator magnet 64 connected to the generator. The hydroelectric generator is constituted by the generator magnet in a non-contact state with the partition 30 and the runner magnet 18 provided between the runner unit and the power generation unit, which prohibit the movement of flowing water from the connector, the runner unit to the power generation unit. title: Process and apparatus for the continuous production of a coarse, crystalline ammonium sulphate product
abstract: The invention proposes a process and an apparatus for the production of coarse ammonium sulphate, which comprises a DTB crystallizer (1) which has a line (7) for an external dissolution circuit. The ammonium sulphate to be used is provided in the form of concentrated sulphuric acid (9) and ammonium (10) which are separately fed directly into the line (7). The process heat required for the process is obtained from the heat liberated on introduction of the sulphuric acid and in the reaction of sulphuric acid and ammonia to form ammonium sulphate.

title: Apparatus and methods for generalized state-dependent learning in spiking neuron networks
abstract: Generalized state-dependent learning framework in artificial neuron networks may be implemented. A framework may be used to describe plasticity updates of neuron connections based on connection state term and neuron state term. The state connections within the network may be updated based on inputs and outputs to/from neurons. The input connections of a neuron may be updated using connection traces comprising a time-history of inputs provided via the connections. Weights of the connections may be updated and connection state may be time varying. The updated weights may be determined using a rate of change of the trace and a term comprising a product of a per-neuron contribution and a per-connection contribution configured to account for the state time-dependency. Using event-dependent connection change components, connection updates may be executed on per neuron basis, as opposed to per-connection basis.

title: Method and apparatus for collaborative web resource delivery
abstract: An approach is provided for collaborative web resource delivery. A transaction request platform determines at least one data transaction request from one or more client devices located in a first area with limited or no data coverage. The contextually relevant location platform causes, at least in part, a transmission of the at least one data transaction request to one or more courier devices, wherein the one or more courier devices fulfill the at least one data transaction request when in a second area with data coverage.

title: Method for preparing cefonicid dibenzylethylenediamine salt
abstract: The invention discloses a method for preparing a cefonicid dibenzylethylenediamine salt. The method comprises the following steps of: (1) adding an alkali into 7-ACA-3-SMT in water for dissolving, and reacting with D-(-)-formyl phenylacetyl chloride; (2) cooling a reaction liquid below 20 DEG C below zero, and adding an alkali for reacting; and (3) cooling the reaction liquid treated in the step (2), adding hydrochloric acid for adjusting the pH value, and reacting with N, N'-dibenzyl ethylenediamine diacetate to obtain a cefonicid dibenzylethylenediamine salt. The invention provides a method for preparing a cefonicid dibenzylethylenediamine salt, which has the advantages of low-temperature reaction, short reaction time, simple post-treatment and high product quality.

title: Pouring starting method of continuous casting
abstract:
PURPOSE: To make possible casting of a continuously cast ingot free from any surface blow hole defects by using a deoxidative front flux mixed with the specific amount of fine powdery Al at the time of charging the front flux at the starting of continuous casting.  
     CONSTITUTION: At the time of producing a continuously cast ingot by pouring molten steel to a continuously casting mold, a deoxidative front flux mixed with 3W 15% fine powdery Al is beforehand added in the mold prior to casting, and molten steel is poured thereon through a tundish. A large amount of O 2  is contained in the first molten steel to be poured from the tundish and since the evolution of this as blow holes in the ingot is considerably decreased by the oxidation of Al, the production of rejects owing to the evolution of blow holes and the decrease in the yield of the ingot are prevented.

title: Air extracting device for ceramic inkjet printing
abstract: The invention relates to an air extracting device for ceramic inkjet printing, which comprises a box body and a partition plate installed in the box body, wherein at least one row of meshes are arranged in the partition plate, at least two air inlets and at least one air outlet are arranged on the bottom surface and the top surface of the box body, respectively, the air outlet is connected with an air outlet pipe on which an air measuring device and a switch valve are arranged, and a nozzle of the air outlet pipe is connected with an exhaust fan. By use of the partition plate with many rows of meshes, the air extracting device for ceramic inkjet printing can uniformly disperse extracting force so that the air extracting effect is improved. The air extracting device for ceramic inkjet printing has a simple structure and avoids the phenomenon that ink drips drop, so that production efficiency is improved and manual work is reduced.

title: Production process of water-absorbent materials
abstract: The technological scheme of the present invention is that the water absorbing material is produced through the steps of: compounding bentonite into 10-50 % concentration water solution and mixing with 30 % concentration acrylamide aquan in the bentonite/acrylamide weight ratio of 0.25-4; adding into the mixture aqua NaOHO of 0.1-4 wt%, N, N-methylene bis(propenyl amine) 0.006-0.015 wt%, (NH4)2S2O8 0.01-1 wt% and Na2SO3.5H2O 0.7-1.5 wt% and oxidation-reduction and polymerization at room temperature for 20 min to obtain gel polymer; and pelletizing, stoving and crushing. The said process has cheap bentonite used and no 'three wastes' produced, and has the prepared water absorbing material has high and controllable water absorption.

title: Semiconductor device and its manufacturing method
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To improve an operating breakdown voltage of a high breakdown voltage MOS transistor by suppressing the action of a parasitic bipolar transistor.  <P>SOLUTION: A region p+-type buried layer 7 is disposed under an n+-type source layer 13. This buried layer 7 lowers the resistance of a region under an n+-type source layer 12. Thus, holes formed in the end of an n-type first drain layer 4 are rapidly absorbed by the layer 12 formed on the surface of a body layer 3 adjacent to the layer 7 and an n+-type source layer, and radiated out of the high breakdown transistor through a source electrode 16. Then, since a rise in the potential of the layer 3 is suppressed, the parasitic npn-type bipolar transistor is hardly turned on.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2004,JPO

title: Preventing driver distraction from incoming notifications
abstract: Driving condition data is determined. The driving condition data identifies one or more driving actions that require more driver attention and one or more driving actions that require less driver attention. An indication is received that a user has a mobile device and is driving a vehicle. The surrounding environment of the vehicle is monitored. An incoming notification on the mobile device is received. A distraction value is determined. The distraction value is based on the one or more driving actions and the surrounding environment. The incoming notification is modified based on the distraction value.

title: Vehicle-based obstacle recognition system
abstract:
In an obstacle detection system in a motor vehicle with a
electronic control unit and with sensors for detecting the distance
the control unit determines an obstacle in a predetermined range
in a defined section of a possibly attached to the vehicle
Attachment that is recognized as an obstacle by a sensor
could, in the event of an actual obstacle detection in this sub-area
in a first step the distance of the obstacle. In a second
Step, the control unit checks whether this distance changes. 
     The alarm, which is usually triggered as a function of the distance of the obstacle, is suppressed if the distance of the obstacle detected in the defined partial area does not change.

title: Monitoring device and monitoring method, control device and control method, and program
abstract: The present invention relates to a monitoring device and a monitoring method, a control device and a control method, which allow an apparatus to perform processing corresponding to a person's action or state using information on a person's face orientation and line-of-sight direction, and Regarding the program. The object detection unit 251 detects an object. The face direction gaze direction detection unit 252 detects a person's face direction and gaze direction, determines a person's action or state based on the relationship between the detected object and the person's face direction or gaze direction, The determination result is notified to the face-to-face line-of-sight direction information utilization units 253-1 to 253-3. Face-to-face line-of-sight direction information utilization units 253-1 to 253-3 cause the apparatus to execute predetermined processing based on the determination result. The present invention can be applied to, for example, an in-vehicle system.

title: A kind of novel construction material and its application method for preventing road frost boiling
abstract: It include: that road lower part excavates roadbed, and tamps bottom the invention discloses a kind of novel construction material for preventing road frost boiling and its application method；300 grams/m of geotextiles are laid in the bottom and side of foundation pit；Geomembrane is laid with honeycomb core after laying, be laid with the drainpipe for connecting section up and down；Adrainage material sand gravel is inserted between drainpipe and honeycomb core, top honeycomb core is installed, and ventilation hole is installed on honeycomb core top, is laid with 300 grams/m of geotextiles, carries out foundation pit closing；Using backfill object, foundation pit backfill is carried out；Surface layer backfill: being laid with first layer compacting backfill object, continues backfill and compacting operation after being laid with first layer compacting backfill object, backfills above basin step by step, this method construction is simple can effectively prevent road frost boiling.

title: Wireless device location for emergency calls
abstract: A wireless device identifier and an access point identifier are associated with location information that identifies a location associated with a network access point that is associated with the access point identifier. Call signaling information requesting a call to an emergency service is received from a wireless device connected wirelessly to the network access point via a wireless network connection. The access point identifier is received from the wireless device. Based on the access point identifier, and the wireless device identifier, the location information is retrieved. The location information is transferred to an emergency service system. The call for the emergency service is established to the emergency service system.

title: Method and apparatus for generating face critical point detection model
abstract: The embodiment of the present application discloses the method and apparatus for generating face critical point detection model.One specific embodiment of this method includes: acquisition sample set；Facial image in the sample set is input to the first face critical point detection model of training in advance, obtains the face critical point detection result of inputted facial image；Using machine learning method, using the facial image in sample set as input, using the face critical point detection result of the facial image inputted as output, training obtains the second face critical point detection model.The embodiment can obtain a kind of for detecting the model of face key point, and this method enriches the generating mode of model.

title: A kind of Intelligent campus processing system for video
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of Intelligent campus processing system for video, including camera shooting terminal, the bottom of the camera shooting terminal is provided with image processing module, the bottom of described image processing module is provided with face area confirmation module, the bottom of the face area confirmation module is provided with signal processing module, the bottom of the signal processing module is provided with network protocol module, the bottom of the network protocol module is provided with data transmission module, the bottom of the data transmission module is provided with the data resolution module, the bottom of the data resolution module is provided with face data acquisition module, the bottom of the face data acquisition module is provided with data exchange module, the bottom of the data exchange module is provided with retrieval matching module, the bottom of the retrieval matching module is provided with control module.Advantageous effect：It effectively prevent malice to usurp or steal information, ensures the safety and stabilization of Intelligent campus.

title: Vehicle safety distance securing device
abstract:
The present invention is to secure the safety distance between the vehicle and the vehicle to prevent the car accident accident is a device that generates a warning light (8) or the brake light (7) is lighted using a simple distance measuring sensor is mounted on the rear of the vehicle It is a device for securing a safety distance between a car and a car. 
     Cars that are currently in the street do not have such a device, and drivers who are driving at low or high speed approach a distance of several centimeters from the car in front of them, and the driver detects a danger, causes an accident or generates a horn, causing or receiving mental damage between the drivers. Is generated. However, when the distance measuring sensor, which is a key part of the device, approaches the dangerous distance range with the vehicle behind, the brake light 7 lights up or generates a warning sound 8 and at the same time generates a brake light 7 and a warning sound 8. The driver's safety and mutual accident prevention. In particular, when connected in parallel to the acceleration pedal of the vehicle or in parallel with the amount of voltage or current generated in the speedometer circuit (6) is characterized in securing a safety distance according to the running speed. 
     The distance measuring sensor 2 used here uses a light source, a sound wave, etc., which converts and radiates a light source or sound wave into an electric quantity and reflects, absorbs, and transmits the light according to an object (vehicle, person, building, etc.) within the detection range of the sensor. To change the amount of electricity. The changed amount of electricity (voltage, current) serves to switch ON / OFF the electronic circuit 5 through an amplifier, a modulator, and the like. In particular, as a detection method for securing a safety distance between vehicles, it is manufactured in a direct reflection type structure, and the circuit is also mounted inside the vehicle to protect it from external shocks, thereby ensuring safe driving.

title: Algorithm for feedback type object detection
abstract: An algorithm for feedback type object detection includes the steps of performing a object segmentation process for determining foreground objects and segmentation data via first image data and a target position, performing a object acquisition process for making every foreground objects having corresponding first characteristic data, performing a object tracking process for acquiring second characteristic data, performing a object projection process for predicting target positions corresponding to foreground objects via second characteristic data and second image data, outputting target positions to the object segmentation process so as to segment a third image.

title: Generation and Update of HD Maps Using Data from Heterogeneous Sources
abstract: In one embodiment, a method includes a computing system accessing a training sample that includes first sensor data obtained using a first sensor at a first geographic location, and first metadata comprising information relating to the first sensor. The system may train a machine-learning model by, e.g., generating first map data by processing the training sample using the model and updating the model based on the generated first map data and target map data associated with the first geographic location. The system may then access second sensor data and second metadata, where the second sensor data is obtained using a second sensor that is of the same type as the first sensor. The system may generate second map data associated with a second geographic location by processing the second sensor data and the second metadata using the trained model. A high-definition map may be generated using the second map data.

title: Resource configurations and scheduling in multi-network environments
abstract: In some examples, a first network node of a first network sends, in response to a request from a user equipment (UE) served by a second network, a transmission configuration to a second network node of the second network, the transmission configuration relating to a configuration used for a direct wireless transmission between the UE and a wireless device. The first network node sends scheduling information granting a resource for use by the UE in the direct wireless transmission.

title: Transportation system and automated storage and retrieval system with integral secured personnel access zones and remote rover shutdown
abstract: A transport system having a transport space containing destinations distributed in the transport space; a plurality of independent automated vehicles constructed to pass the transport space to the destination and to be free between the destinations Roaming so that the vehicle is dynamically distributed through the transport space; and a control system communicatively coupled to each of the vehicles via a remote communication link and having system control for each vehicle to a different destination And the control system has a vehicle inspector controller separate and distinct from the system controller, and configured to independently register a dynamic location of at least one of the vehicles, and if the registered location corresponds to a predetermined The location, via the remote communication link command, shuts down only the selected at least one vehicle at the registered location, the vehicle being selected from a majority of the vehicles in the shipping space.

title: Method and apparatus for initiating a feature based at least in part on the tracked movement
abstract: In accordance with an example embodiment of the present invention, an apparatus comprising a camera configured to capture one or more media frames. Further, the apparatus comprises at least one processor and at least one memory including computer program code. The at least one memory and the computer program code is configured to, with the at least one processor, cause the apparatus to perform at least the following: filter the one or more media frames using one or more shaped filter banks; determine a gesture related to the one or more media frames; track movement of the gesture; and initiate a feature based at least in part on the tracked movement.

title: Face tracking method and device
abstract: The disclosure is directed to a kind of face tracking method and device, belong to field of image recognition, the method includes: obtain the current frame image comprising facial image in video data；When this current frame image is not the first two field picture, the position of the multiple face key points in previous frame image adjacent with this current frame image in this video data is estimated；When the position of the multiple face key points in previous frame image is evaluated as correct, discrimination model is specified in positions based on the multiple face key points in this previous frame image and first, determines the position of multiple face key points in this current frame image；When the position of the multiple face key points in this previous frame image is evaluated as incorrect, this current frame image is carried out Face datection, obtains the face location in this current frame image；Specify discrimination model based on multiple designated key point positions and second, determine the position of multiple face key points in this current frame image, to realize the face in this video data is tracked.

title: Image processing apparatus, image processing method, and program
abstract: The present disclosure relates to an image processing apparatus, an image processing method, and a program that can determine whether or not image calibration is necessary. The determination unit determines whether or not the calibration of the image captured by the camera is necessary using the current image captured by the camera and the past image captured by the camera. The present disclosure can be applied to, for example, a vehicle of an automobile and an in-vehicle camera system including two cameras and an image processing device that are mounted so that imaging areas overlap with a roof in front of the vehicle.

title: Image forming device
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide an image forming apparatus capable of significantly improving a man-machine interface for a user. The image forming apparatus 1 is a copying machine or a facsimile, and includes a target object detection unit 2 that detects a predetermined target object, and a predetermined voice message based on information detected by the target object detection unit 2. The object detection means 2 is capable of detecting an operation / setting mistake on the user side by detecting a predetermined object. title: Road profile along a predicted path
abstract: Systems and methods are provided for determining a road profile along a predicted path. In one implementation, a system includes at least one image capture device configured to acquire a plurality of images of an area in a vicinity of a user vehicle; a data interface; and at least one processing device configured to receive the plurality of images captured by the image capture device through the data interface; and compute a profile of a road along one or more predicted paths of the user vehicle. At least one of the one or more predicted paths is predicted based on image data.

title: Apparatus and method for monitoring images using rader and camera
abstract: The present invention relates to an image control device using a radar and a camera, and a method thereof. According to an aspect of the present invention, the image control device using a radar and a camera, comprises: a radar for radiating electromagnetic waves in a predetermined frequency band in accordance with an internal clock, receiving reflected waves by reflecting the radiated electromagnetic waves to an object, and generating and outputting a radar image on the basis of the received reflected waves; a control camera for acquiring a control image by photographing a present monitoring area, and outputting the time at which the control image is obtained in accordance with the internal clock; a radar control unit for rotating a radar; an object detection module for detecting a plurality of movable objects detectable in accordance with a preset image processing method in the control image or the radar image; and a reference line setting module for separately setting a reference line in accordance with a combination of pixel coordinates on a screen in the radar image and the control image on the basis of an image pattern included in the movable objects detected by the object detection module and the pixel coordinates on the screen corresponding to each of the movable objects. According to the present invention, an image can be efficiently controlled.

title: Blind road obstacle detection method for smart phone platform
abstract: The invention discloses a blind road obstacle detection method for a smart phone platform. The method firstly segments the blind road image to obtain a blind road area, and then detects the obstacles in the blind road area. Firstly, preprocessing a blind road video image, then carrying out Canny edge detection, carrying out operator corrosion on a Canny edge detection result, then determining an initial edge straight line by adopting Hough transform on the corroded image, and then tracking by adopting Kalman filtering to obtain a blind road edge acquisition blind road area. And performing K-means clustering on the blind road area, wherein K is 2, dividing the blind road area into a suspected obstacle area and a non-obstacle area, and judging the area as an obstacle when the number of pixels of the suspected obstacle area exceeds a threshold value. The method is simple in calculation, is suitable for being realized and operated on a smart phone platform, can efficiently detect the boundary of the blind road and the position of the obstacle in real time, and has high adaptability and robustness to the blind roads with different colors.

title: Obstacle detection device
abstract: PURPOSE:To decide the distance to the obstacle, hearing a sound of alarm in the car, and drive a car in case when a driver moves it backward, by emitting an ultrasonic wave from an obstacle detection part installed in the rear body of the car, and receiving a reflected wave from the objective obstacle. CONSTITUTION:The obstacle detection part 2 is provided in the rear body of a car, an ultrasonic wave is generated by its ultrasonic transmission part 5, and the ultrasonic wave modulated by a pulse signal from the distance detection part 7 is radiated against the obstacle 4 through the transmission antenna 8. The ultrasonic wave reflected from the obstacle 4 is input to the receiving sensor 9, then it is differentiated by the ultrasonic wave receiving part 6, and a rise pulse is obtained. On the other hand, a rise synchronizing pulse is obtained at the distance detection part 7, from a pulse signal fed to the transmission part 5, an alarm signal is input to the alarm part 3 provided near a dashboard when the time difference between said pulse and a rise pulse which is an output from the receiving part 6 has exceeded the set point, then the alarm is send out.

title: Electronic device and method for measuring heart rate based on infrared rays sensor using the same
abstract: A method for determining a heart rate (HR) using an infrared rays (IR) sensor and an electronic device is provided. An image is received using an IR sensor, at least one region of interest (ROI) for measuring the HR is determined in the received image, and the HR is determined based on the at least one determined ROI.

title: Parking assistance method for a motor vehicle
abstract: The invention relates to a method for assisting in the parking of a motor vehicle and in particular for selecting a type of parking space, comprising the following steps: - determining features of the surroundings of the motor vehicle by way of surroundings sensors of the motor vehicle, - characterizing at least one type of parking space using at least two different determination modes (Mode1, Mode2), characterized in that said method also includes a step of: - evaluating at least one confidence index (Cf1/type, Cf2/type) linked to each of the determination modes, - automatically selecting (Sel) a type of parking space (Pl1, Pl2) on the basis of said at least one confidence index (Cf1/type, Cf2/type).

title: Automated multi-indicator controller for overloading control using portable road weight
abstract:
The present invention is a keypad consisting of keys for setting the environment for measuring the vehicle overload including the number of the axis of the vehicle, and measuring the weight of each axis of the vehicle, the information on the weighing state and measured weight And the weight of the last axle of the vehicle are entered after the stable weight data of the first axle of the vehicle is transferred from the mobile axle and the number of the axle of the vehicle. Repeating the operation of storing the weight data transmitted from the mobile axle weight in the memory and calculating the weight data of all the axes to determine whether the vehicle is overloaded, the number of axes of the vehicle and each axis of the vehicle By configuring a memory for storing the weighing process for the weight and display means for displaying the number of axes of the vehicle and the weighing process for each axis of the vehicle It is possible to prevent illegal overload measurement by the operator, and to check whether the vehicle is overloaded and the measurement process in real time. 
       
     Fixed scale, multiple display, LCD, PC, data backup battery.

title: Track production device, track production method and track production program
abstract: An object of the present invention is to make it possible to generate a numerical value of six orbital elements for creating a desired ground trace even if the user does not have knowledge of the six orbital elements.   A trajectory generation apparatus includes a trajectory display unit that displays a satellite trajectory on a display device, a trajectory change unit that changes a trajectory displayed by the trajectory display unit by an input device, and a trajectory change unit. A track six element calculation unit 124 that calculates a value of each element of the six track elements based on the changed track 114 and stores the value in the storage device 980;   [Selection] Figure 5

title: Customization of a vehicle
abstract: Devices, systems, and techniques are provided for customization a vehicle and the interior thereof. The customization can be based at least on customization themes associated with an occupant of the vehicle and/or the vehicle. In addition or in the alternative, the customization can be based at least on vehicular context of the occupants and the vehicle. A specific customization can be effected in response to a change in context of vehicle, and thus the vehicle can be dynamically customized in response to a specific vehicular context as the context is realized. The customization themes can integrate with an in-vehicle infotainment (IVI) system and/or one or more of in-cabin lighting, projection or other rendering features, or data streams. Customization can be accomplished via configuration of one or more customization components comprising sensors, rendering units, lighting fixtures, or control components.

title: A kind of Chinese herbaceous peony pedestrian detection based on binocular vision and people's vehicle are apart from acquisition methods

title: Reflective photoelectric sensor for confined area
abstract: [assignment]   Provided is a limited area reflection type photoelectric sensor which can accurately detect an object whose distance to the surface to be measured changes by widening the detection range and which is simple in construction.   [Solution]   The confinement region type photoelectric sensor 1A includes a light projecting portion 10 having a laser diode 11 and a light receiving portion 20 having a photodiode 21. The light projecting unit 10 and the light receiving unit 20 irradiate the light projected from the light projecting unit 10 toward the object detection limiting areas S1 to S3 and the object M is set so that the light receiving beam can be received by the light receiving portion 20, and the intersection angle between the optical axis of the light transmitting beam and the optical axis of the light receiving beam is set. The presence or absence of the object M is discriminated on the basis of the light receiving level in the photodiode 21. A diffraction grating 13 for dividing the light-projected beam into beams in a plurality of directions is provided in the optical path of the light-projected beam from the laser diode 11. [

title: Object detection method after Multichannel radar elder generation AF panel when clutter and interference co-existence
abstract: The invention discloses object detection methods after Multichannel radar elder generation AF panel when clutter and interference co-existence.This method is based on multi-channel adaptive and detects thought, realizes AF panel, clutter recognition and target constant false alarm (CFAR) detection.The present invention obtains interference number and direction using pulse is scouted in radar stand-down first, by carrying out singular value decomposition to interference guiding matrix, constructs AF panel matrix；AF panel is carried out to data to be tested and training sample with AF panel matrix again, while reducing the dimension of data, mitigates subsequent self-adapting detecting to number of training purpose demand；According to Generalized Likelihood Ratio criterion, the data to be tested and the design of training sample data joint-detection detector after AF panel are utilized；Detection threshold is finally determined according to the false-alarm probability of the statistical property of detector and default, and is compared with the detection statistic of detector, if detection statistic is higher than thresholding, adjudicates target presence, there is no targets on the contrary then judgement.This method can realize AF panel, clutter recognition and target CFAR detection simultaneously, and when number of training is less than system channel number, can still work normally.

title: Insulator self-explosion identification method based on AlexNet network
abstract: The invention provides an insulator auto-explosion unmanned aerial vehicle inspection technical method based on an AlexNet network, which comprises the following steps: collecting image and video information collected by a patrol robot and a barrier crossing robot and an unmanned aerial vehicle on a wire; carrying out rapid data expansion on the acquired image information on an existing training data set, and splitting the data set into two parts, namely a training set and a test set; extracting image features and class labels from the training data set and the test data set for classification; acquiring an SVM detection model capable of identifying the insulator spontaneous explosion based on an AlexNet network by using the obtained training set and the training of the test set; the detection model can identify the acquired image information and determine whether the self-explosion insulator exists in the insulator image information. The method provided by the invention solves the problem that a large amount of manpower and material resources are consumed in the past, and greatly improves the rapidity and the accuracy of detection.

title: Systems and methods for surveillance of a vehicle using camera images
abstract: System, methods, and other embodiments described herein relate to surveillance of a vehicle. In one embodiment, a method includes, in response to detecting a surveillance event associated with the vehicle, collecting information from one or more sensors of the vehicle about the surveillance event. The method includes classifying the information according to a security profile to identify a threat type and a threat level of the surveillance event. The method includes controlling the vehicle to provide a response to the surveillance event according to the threat type and the threat level.

title: Sampling position display device and sampling method.
abstract: In a sampling method according to the present invention, the coordinates (position information) of a sampling position of a sampling specimen (G) are generated randomly by a PC or other control unit (12) for a sampling position display device (10), and on the basis of the position information, laser light is used to display the sampling position on the sampling specimen (G), which constitutes a portion of material to be recycled. As a result, in increment sampling for determining the average quality, for example, the average valuable metal content, of a sampling specimen (G), it is possible to reliably eliminate arbitrariness resulting from the selection of a sampling position manually by an operator.

title: A kind of road activity isolated column structure
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of road activity isolated column structure, including some rail posts being arranged in order, the side of rail post towards adjacent handrails post is equipped with accommodating chamber, accommodating chamber interior folding is placed with balustrade assemblies, balustrade assemblies include some rod members, by setting articulated elements to be hinged successively between some rod members so that some rod members can fold from beginning to end successively；When adjacent rod member is in straight condition, it may be such that locating slot is mutually inserted with locating dowel by adjusting axial distance adjusting mechanism；The opening of accommodating chamber is provided with cover plate, and cover plate is provided with the through hole passed for rod member；The lower section of rail post is provided with the sleeve being embedded in below road surface, and sleeve is provided with the cavity accommodated for rail post, and sleeve is provided with the fixed structure in the upward bleed-off taxiway road surfaces of rail post for fixes sleeve with rail post；When rail post is slipped into sleeve, the upper end of rail post is concordant with road surface.The present invention has simple in construction, and cost is low, the characteristics of being easily installed.

title: Navigational-based speed limit recording and warning system
abstract: A motor-vehicle navigation-based speed limit recording and warning system designed to automatically inform drivers when they are exceeding the posted speed limit on a particular roadway. The system includes a navigational system that displays a plurality of roadways on a map and the motor vehicle's location thereon. The navigational system also includes a “mark” point feature or function that enables a driver to manually enter “mark” points and assign a speed limit to each “mark” point. The “mark” point feature or function may be directly coupled to the motor vehicle's speedometer so that the driver may simultaneously input both the motor vehicle's current speed and the “mark” point on the roadway.

title: 3d video conversion device, depth information adjustment method of the same and storage medium of adjustment method
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a 3D video conversion device, a depth information adjusting method thereof, and a storage medium thereof capable of minimizing viewer's viewing fatigue when converting 2D video to 3D video.   More specifically, a 3D image conversion apparatus according to the present invention includes a depth information generation unit that generates depth information for an input image; and supports the input image based on the generated depth information. An object detection unit for detecting an object having a parallax exceeding a preset range from the left-eye video and the right-eye video; and adjusting the parallax of the detected object within a preset range. A depth information adjusting unit that adjusts depth information; and a rendering unit that renders the input image according to the adjusted depth information.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Object detection system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an object detection system which can easily secure a constant detection range regardless of changes in environment. An object detection system 100 includes a detection device 1 including an ultrasonic sensor 11, an acquisition unit 2, a communication unit 3, and a processing unit 5. The ultrasonic sensor 11 transmits an ultrasonic wave toward a space to be detected and receives a reflected wave of the ultrasonic wave from the object B1. The acquisition unit 2 acquires position information D1 that represents the position of the vehicle. The communication unit 3 transmits the position information D1 to the communication target C1 via the network N1, and receives the humidity information D2 transmitted from the communication target C1 via the network N1. The processing unit 5 executes a correction process for correcting at least one of the transmission output, the reception sensitivity, and the detection period of the detection device 1 based on the humidity information D2. [Selection diagram] Figure 1

title: Infrared obstacle detection in the presence of sunlight
abstract: An infrared obstruction detection system apparatus (100) is used to detect the presence of ambient light and initiate compensation to minimize the effects of the ambient light on the performance of the system in detetecting an obstacle (101). The magnitude of the ambient light is measured and an offset (112) proportional to that magnitude is fed to the obstruction detection system such that the data indicative of an obstacle from an evaluating detector (116) are not obscured. The apparatus continually monitors the effect of ambient light and adjusts the obstacle detection information during the changing state of the ambient light detected.

title: Track method, apparatus, computer equipment and the storage medium of target detection
abstract: The present invention relates to method, apparatus, computer equipment and the storage mediums of tracking target detection, are applied to unmanned technical field.The method includes：Obtain the current frame image of tracking target；It determines the background model for tracking target in current frame image, tracking target is extracted from current frame image according to the background model, as first object testing result；The edge pixel point in the current frame image is obtained, the tracking target in current frame image is determined according to the edge pixel point, as the second object detection results；According to the comparing result of the first object testing result and the second object detection results, the testing result of tracking target is obtained.The embodiment of the present invention solves the problems, such as that existing tracking target detection complexity is high, and improves the accuracy of tracking target detection.

title: Anti-collision and anti-rolling parking spot lock
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of parking spot locks, and particularly relates to an anti-collision and anti-rolling parking spot lock which comprises a touch panel, a hydraulic column, a linkage mechanism, a photosensitive element, a motor, a microcontroller and a telescopic rack, wherein the hydraulic column is arranged in an inverted mode and used for supporting the touch panel, the hydraulic column is connected with the telescopic rack through the linkage mechanism, specifically, a series of gears are used for transmission, finally, the telescopic rack is meshed with the telescopic rack through a fourth gear, the telescopic rack can be stretched and retracted in a reciprocating mode, the photosensitive element is used for receiving light emitted by an LED lamp right above and transmitting the light to the microcontroller, and the microcontroller receives signals and sends instructions to an electric telescopic rod, so that the electric telescopic rod drives the fourth gear. The parking spot lock disclosed by the invention can solve the technical problem that the parking spot lock is crushed.

title: Motor vehicle tail number driving prohibition prompting alerter
abstract: The invention provides a motor vehicle tail number driving prohibition prompting alerter, and relates to a concrete application of a single-chip microcomputer. In cities with implementation of driving prohibition of motor vehicles according to license plate tail numbers, if a driver drives during time of driving prohibition of the license plate tail number, the motor vehicle tail number driving prohibition prompting alerter can alarm via sound generation so that tail number driving prohibition is prompted for the driver. The concrete implementation mode part of the motor vehicle tail number driving prohibition prompting alerter discloses two embodiments of the alerter, one is a portable alerter with the single-chip microcomputer and a real-time clock acting as main bodies, and the other is a vehicle-mounted alerter with the single-chip microcomputer and a GPS module acting as the main bodies. With application of the alerter disclosed by the embodiment of the invention, a vehicle owner can be effectively prevented from being punished due to violation of regulation of driving prohibition, and city traffic and air quality can also be improved by reduction of vehicles violating regulation of driving prohibition.

title: Optimizing performance of a graphics processing unit for efficient execution of general matrix operations
abstract: A system and method for optimizing the performance of a graphics processing unit (GPU) for processing and execution of general matrix operations such that the operations are accelerated and optimized. The system and method describes the layouts of operands and results in graphics memory, as well as partitioning the processes into a sequence of passes through a macro step. Specifically, operands are placed in memory in a pattern, results are written into memory in a pattern appropriate for use as operands in a later pass, data sets are partitioned to insure that each pass fits into fixed sized memory, and the execution model incorporates generally reusable macro steps for use in multiple passes. These features enable greater efficiency and speed in processing and executing general matrix operations.

title: Collapsible, breakaway highway delineator
abstract: A breakaway highway delineator including a base member for resting on a roadway or other generally horizontal surface and a base member which is connected to the panel member. In a preferred embodiment, the panel member is moveable between a first, generally horizontal orientation and a second, generally vertical orientation. The base member has a cavity/receiving slot configured to hold part of the panel member when the panel member is disposed generally horizontally. The base member also interacts to hold the panel member generally vertical when the panel member is properly positioned within the base member so as (i) to prevent the panel member from being tipped over by gusts of wind and drafts created by trucks and other vehicles passing by the delineator, and (ii) to release the panel member when forcefully impacted, allowing the panel member to be pulled from the base member to minimize damage to vehicles.

title: A kind of gesture identification method based on camera visual information
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of gesture identification methods based on camera visual information.The gesture identification method by big video frame picture by being divided into several small sprites, then the judgement of skin pixel point is carried out using skin color characteristic function to each sprite, it is less than or equal to the sprite of predetermined threshold for the ratio of skin pixel point number and whole pixel numbers, the color of its all pixels point is revised as a certain non-colour of skin, entire video frame picture is set to only exist the colour of skin and a certain non-colour of skin, in the binary image after carrying out binary conversion treatment to video frame picture, the identification that finger number is carried out using this feature of the gap between finger is calculated, so as to reach the quick of gesture at lower cost, it accurately identifies, with recognition efficiency height, accuracy is high, the features such as real-time is good.

title: On-vehicle display, display method, and display program
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an "in-vehicle display device, display method and display program" capable of easily recognizing an object in imaging data.   An in-vehicle display device 10 according to the present invention includes an imaging unit 20 that captures an image of the periphery of the vehicle and outputs the captured data, an object detection unit 30 that detects an object around the vehicle, and at least imaging data. title: HIGH-INTEGRITY DIGITAL PROCESSING ARCHITECTURE WITH MULTIPLE SUPERVISED RESOURCES
abstract: The present invention relates to computers whose undetected errors must have a very low rate of occurrence (10 <-9> per unit of time). This concerns in particular the onboard computers on aircraft running critical applications such as autopilot, flight management, fuel management or anti-collision terrain. Two or more calculation channels are planned and the exchanges are authorized either at the production or at the consumption of the data by each way. It is also possible to provide a predefined authorization cycle. The transfer authorization of the data is given according to a binary comparison logic in the case of two channels. In the case of more than two channels, the authorization can be given either by a logic of comparison binary or by a majority logic according to which one privileges the integrity or the availability of the system of computation.

title: Method and device for resource allocation
abstract: A method and device for resource allocation. The method comprises: transmitting to a user equipment (UE) resource allocation information used for transmitting specific service data, where the resource allocation information comprises at least one among the following pieces of information: semi-persistent scheduling resource information, preconfigured resource information, and transmission resource pool information. The described technical solution allows the UE to rapidly acquire a radio resource for transmitting the specific service data and, compared with the prior art, greatly reduces communication latency.

abstract: The monitoring method and system of cab-getter's number, including：When the speed of taxi rises to pre-set velocity value from 0, the first interior image of control video camera shooting；The current operation state of taxi is obtained by meter, the operation state includes complete vehicle curb condition or loaded vehicle state；In conjunction with the patronage and the current operation state of the taxi in the described first interior image, corresponding monitoring strategies are executed.In the present invention, interior image is acquired by interior video camera, to parse interior passengers quantity, the current operation state of variation and taxi in conjunction with passenger inside the vehicle's quantity, judge whether taxi is accused of runing in violation of rules and regulations, and monitoring alarm information is uploaded to server, monitored results are accurate.
