title: A kind of alarm method and system that prevent non-new energy vehicle from occupying new energy charging parking stall
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of alarm methods for preventing non-new energy vehicle from occupying new energy charging parking stall, include the following steps:Step S110 obtains the vehicle-related information on new energy charging parking stall；Step S120 determines whether new energy vehicle according to vehicle-related information, if then carrying out step S130, if otherwise carrying out step S150；Step S130, data obtaining module start work according to predetermined interval；Step S140, the information obtained according to data obtaining module judges whether parking stall has vehicle, if then returning to step S130, if otherwise terminating；Step S150, alarm system alarm.The present invention relates to a kind of alarm methods for preventing non-new energy vehicle from occupying new energy charging parking stall to prevent new energy parking stall from being occupied by non-new energy vehicle by type of alarm by identifying and distinguishing among new energy and non-new energy vehicle.

title: Antenna subsystem with analog beam-steering transmit array and digital beam-forming receive array
abstract: In an embodiment, an antenna subsystem includes a sparse receive antenna and an electronically steerable transmit antenna. The sparse receive antenna includes an array of receive elements each configured to receive a respective signal having a wavelength and each spaced apart from each adjacent one of the receive elements by a respective first distance that is more than one half of the wavelength. And the electronically steerable transmit antenna includes an array of transmit elements each configured to radiate a respective signal having the wavelength and each spaced apart from each adjacent one of the transmit elements by a respective second distance that is less than one half of the wavelength. To reduce aliasing, such an antenna subsystem can be operated to filter, spatially, a receive beam pattern generated by the receive antenna with a transmit beam pattern generated by the transmit antenna.

title: Electromagnetic induction sensor for searching metallic object
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To prevent the metallic object detection of an electromagnetic induction sensor from being affected when the advancing direction of a propeller is corrected. SOLUTION: A transmission coil 1 transmits an AC magnetic field in the direction perpendicular to the searching direction of an electromagnetic induction sensor. Reception coils 2a and 2b are arranged so that the mid point of the coils 2a and 2b can be aligned with the center of a core. When no metallic object exists, the voltages excited in the coils 2a and 2b become zero and, when a metallic object exists in the searching direction, voltages are excited in the coils 2a and 2b. When a magnetic body 14 is positioned immediately after the coil 1, the AC magnetic field transmitted to the rear side of the magnetic body 14 becomes weaker.  Therefore, even when the positional relation between the coils 1, 2a, and 2b and the succeeding section 13 of the head 11 of a propeller changes when the advancing direction of the head 11 is controlled, the variation of the difference between the peak values of AC voltages excited in the coils 2a and 2b becomes smaller than the conventional value.

title: Safety confirmation support system for vehicle driver and method for supporting safety confirmation of vehicle driver
abstract: In a driver's safety confirmation support system, a moving object detection section detects a moving object approaching to a vehicle in any of detection areas around a vehicle. When the moving object detection section detects the moving object in the detection area on a left side of the vehicle, a display control section controls a right display section provided in a right area relative to a driver's seat to display information regarding the moving object detected. When the moving object detection section detects the moving object in the detection area on a right side of the vehicle, the display control section controls a left display section provided in a left area relative to the driver's seat to display information regarding the moving object.

title: Flexible capacitive strip for use in a non-contact obstacle detection system
abstract: A flexible, capacitive strip (12) for use in a non-contact obstacle detection system is disclosed. In an exemplary embodiment, the strip (12) includes an elongated body (14) for flexible mounting to a panel (20) along a bottom surface (18) of the elongated body (14). A first elongated planar conductor (22) is contained within an upper section (24) of the elongated body (14), and a longitudinal cavity (26) is formed through a central portion of the elongated body (14), the elongated cavity (26) being disposed between the planar conductor (22) and the bottom surface (18). The first elongated planar conductor (22) forms a first electrode of a sensing capacitor and the longitudinal cavity (26) defines a portion of a dielectric material of the sensing capacitor.

title: A kind of active reactive control system and two-node cluster hot backup implementation method
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of active reactive control system and two-node cluster hot backup implementation method, including two active reactive control systems, every active reactive control system includes virtual address and own address, and the virtual address of two active reactive control systems is identical, has address by oneself different；When active reactive control system is as main frame access network, using virtual address, during as standby host access network, using own address.The present invention is actively drifted about using shared virtual address between the own address of two active reactive control systems, it is achieved thereby that telemechanical apparatus can access two active reactive control systems simultaneously, the seamless redundancy switching of network communication in photovoltaic electric station grid connection scheduling support system is realized.

title: Electric shutter operation detector
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] When a detection unit for detecting the movement amount and movement direction of an electric shutter and obstacle detection is attached to a movable part,   Maintenance-free by eliminating wiring for power supply and transmission of detection signals. [Structure] Attach the ribbon 5 parallel to the guide rail 4,   Conductive wires 51 are bent and formed on the ribbon 5 at a constant pitch, and a high-frequency current is supplied to the conductive wires 51. In the detection unit 6, a high frequency current is taken out by the ferrite core 64 and the coil 65 to make a power source for signal detection. In addition, the magnetic heads 66 and 67 detect changes in the electromagnetic pattern due to the high frequency current, and the movement amount and direction of the shutter are detected to detect the safety tape switch 8 and the lower limit switch 6.   It is transmitted to the outside by radio 9 together with the detection signal of 8.

title: SAR image segmentation method based on high-dimensional triple Markov field
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of SAR image segmentation method based on high-dimensional triple Markov field, mainly solve the problem that in prior art, cut zone concordance is not enough, implementation step is: (1) input SAR image, and it is initialized segmentation acquisition dividing mark field；(2) by auto-covariance computing, additional marking field is set up；(3) pixel dividing mark dependability parameter is calculated；(4) pixel and the fluctuating Similarity Parameter of pixel in its higher-dimension neighborhood are calculated；(5) dividing mark field, additional marking field and the Joint Distribution probability of SAR image three under higher-dimension neighborhood is built；(6) based on Joint Distribution probability, posterior marginal probability parted pattern is built；(7) maximize posterior marginal probability and update dividing mark field and additional marking field, it is thus achieved that final segmentation result.The present invention improves segmentation concordance and the segmentation precision of heterogeneous areas of homogeneous region, can be used for SAR image object detection and recognition.

title: Detecting available parking spaces.
abstract: The present invention extends to methods, systems, and computer program products for detecting available parking spaces in a parking environment. Radar systems are utilized to gather data about a parking lot environment. The radar data is provided to a neural network model as an input. Algorithms employing neural networks can be trained to recognize parked vehicles and conflicting data regarding debris, shopping carts, street lamps, traffic signs, pedestrians, etc. The neural network model processes the radar data to estimate parking space boundaries and to approximate the parking space boundaries as splines. The neural network model outputs spline estimations to a vehicle computer system. The vehicle computer system utilizes the spline estimates to detect available parking spaces. The spline estimates are updated as the vehicle navigates the parking environment.

title: Object recognition device intended to detect dirt adhering to a radar
abstract: There is provided an object recognition apparatus for vehicles equipped with a radar. The apparatus is adapted to detect adhesion of any debris to the radar that will interfere with emission of radar waves to a measurement object and reception of radar returns from a measurement object. When the number of radar waves that cause the times required by the radar waves to travel to a measurement object and return from a measurement object to be measured to be shorter than a predetermined period of time, and that the intensities of the Radar backscatter greater than a predetermined value are high, it is determined that the dirt adheres to the radar, thereby improving the accuracy of detecting the attachment of dirt to the radar.

title: Palette coding for color compression of point clouds
abstract: A method of compression of the color data of point clouds is described herein. A palette of colors that best represent the colors existing in the cloud is generated. Clustering is utilized for generating the palette. Once the palette is generated, an index to the palette is found for each point in the cloud. The indexes are coded using an entropy coder afterwards. A decoding process is then able to be used to reconstruct the point clouds.

title: A kind of terminal and its fingerprint identification method with camera module
abstract: The present invention relates to electronic technology field, a kind of terminal with camera module and its fingerprint identification method are disclosed.In embodiments of the present invention, the terminal with camera module includes：Cover plate and main controller；There is inductive layer, cover plate is arranged on the position of correspondence camera module on cover plate；Inductive layer, for detecting with the presence or absence of human body on cover plate, and when human body is detected the presence of, triggering camera module is shot；The image that camera module will be photographed is sent to main controller.Embodiments of the present invention also disclose a kind of fingerprint identification method.By embodiments of the present invention, simplify the layout of terminal, improve terminal globality.

title: Validating road intersections
abstract: Methods, systems, and techniques for validating road intersections are presented. The method includes receiving annotated intersection data that, for each lane of a particular candidate intersection, indicates one or more attributes of the lane; processing the annotated intersection data to generate an intersection fingerprint for the particular candidate intersection that is sensitive to a topological structure of the lanes of the particular candidate intersection and is invariant to a geometry of the lanes of the particular candidate intersection; designating the particular candidate intersection as validated without performing the one or more quality control processes based at least on the intersection fingerprint; and storing a representation of the particular candidate intersection in the roadgraph.

title: Bicycle Eddy Current Brake
abstract: The present invention relates to an eddy current brake of a bicycle, generating a cruise control effect by a non-contact brake, thereby solving a problem of maintenance costs due to noises and wear of a brake pad in case of pulling a brake lever for speed reduction in the conventional bicycle brake. According to the present invention, a bicycle brake is configured by removing a brake pad of a front wheel in a conventional bicycle, attaching a neodymium magnet at the removed position and adjusting a set distance from the wheel to reduce speed of the bicycle in a non-contact manner. Therefore, the present invention generates a cruise function effect, thereby solving a problem of maintenance costs due to the noise and wear of the brake pad in case of pulling the brake lever for speed reduction in the conventional bicycle brake.

title: Ship meeting system based on AIS and AP radar perception information
abstract: The utility model discloses a boats and ships meet system based on AIS and AP radar perception information, mainly by information acquisition interface unit, the main control unit, show the accuse unit, VHF communication unit, alarm control unit, solenoid valve control module and system command control unit constitute, the main control unit shows the two-way electricity of accuse unit with the aforesaid and is connected, information acquisition interface unit's input is provided with nine routes input ports, information acquisition interface unit is connected with main control unit data transfer, VHF communication unit is connected with the two-way data transfer of main control unit, main control unit's control end respectively with alarm control unit, solenoid valve control module and data processing unit control connection. Compared with the prior art, the meeting phenomenon can be prompted when two ships meet, the two ships can be guaranteed to avoid in time through the automatic operation steering engine, safe driving is achieved, the ship collision hidden danger caused by untimely observation on duty during ship driving caused by autopilot navigation is eliminated, and development of intelligent ship navigation is promoted.

title: Method and apparatus for transmitting SPS assistance information in wireless communication system
abstract: Provided is a method and an apparatus for transmitting user equipment (UE) assistance information for a semi-persistent scheduling (SPS) to a target evolved NodeB (eNB) in a wireless communication system. A source eNB in a handover, receives the UE assistance information for the SPS from a UE, and transmits the UE assistance information for the SPS to the target eNB. The UE assistance information for the SPS may include a SPS period and a time offset.

title: Trailer parking assist system for vehicle
abstract: A driver assist system for a vehicle includes a plurality of vehicle cameras and at least one trailer camera, with the vehicle cameras configured to be disposed at a vehicle and having respective fields of view exterior of the vehicle and the trailer camera configured to be disposed at a trailer towed by the vehicle. An image processor is operable to process image data captured by the vehicle cameras and the trailer camera. Responsive to processing of captured image data during forward or rearward motion of the vehicle and trailer, the image processor is operable to calibrate the trailer camera with the vehicle cameras. Responsive to processing of captured image data during forward or rearward motion of the vehicle and trailer, the image processor is operable to determine objects rearward of the trailer that are not in the fields of view of the vehicle cameras.

title: Get-off assisting device
abstract: The invention provides an auxiliary device for getting off a vehicle, which can more reliably improve the safety of passengers when getting off the vehicle even if a shielding object which is used as a barrier for detecting an approaching object exists behind the vehicle. In an alighting assistance device that performs warning and/or door opening restriction when an approaching object approaching a host vehicle is detected when an alighting operation of an occupant of the host vehicle is detected, a plurality of approaching object detection units are provided, and the approaching object detection units are used separately depending on whether or not a blocking object is present behind the host vehicle when the host vehicle is parked or stopped. Specifically, the approaching object detecting unit capable of detecting an approaching object existing at a further distance is selected according to the presence or absence of the blocking object. Typically, an electronic exterior rear view mirror is used when an obstruction is present and a rear side radar is used when no obstruction is present. The proximity object detection unit may be used separately according to the parking assist mode of the parking assist system, or a spatial recognition system that recognizes an object by semantic division may be used.

title: Pot Hole Identifying System using Artificial Intelligence
abstract: The present invention relates to a porthole detection system using artificial intelligence, a data acquisition unit (100) for acquiring image data on a road surface; An object detection unit 200 that detects an object from the acquired image data (object detection) and maps information related to the object; A porthole detector 300 for determining whether the detected object is a porthole based on information on the detected object; And a machine learning unit 500 for improving the detection capability of the porthole detection unit 300 through learning.

title: Method and system for generating multidimensional maps of a scene using a plurality of sensors of various types
abstract: A system and method for generating a high-density three-dimensional (3D) map are disclosed. The system comprises acquiring at least one high density image of a scene using at least one passive sensor; acquiring at least one new set of distance measurements of the scene using at least one active sensor; acquiring a previously generated 3D map of the scene comprising a previous set of distance measurements; merging the at least one new set of distance measurements with the previous set of upsampled distance measurements, wherein merging the at least one new set of distance measurements further includes accounting for a motion transformation between a previous high-density image frame and the acquired high density image and the acquired distance measurements; and overlaying the new set of distance measurements on the high-density image via an upsampling interpolation, creating an output 3D map.

title: Presence-detecting gaming systems for  maintaining gaming sessions
abstract: A gaming system includes a gaming machine for conducting a casino wagering game and logic circuitry. The logic circuitry establishes a gaming session of the casino wagering game for a player, during the gaming session, detects an object at a detected distance via a presence sensor of the gaming machine, determines whether or not the detected object is the player based on one or more object detection criteria including the detected distance, in response to the detected object being determined to be the player, maintains the gaming session, and in response to the detected object being determined to be an object other than the player, initiates an end-session counter to terminate the gaming session. A duration of the end-session counter varies at least partially as a function of the one or more object detection criteria.

title: Guide users to available parking spaces
abstract: In order to reduce road congestion and improve the experience of a driver who wants to park, the user is more efficiently directed to an available road parking spot.   The availability of a plurality of parking spaces is determined. Determine the street location of the dynamic parking sign that contains the identifier. For each of the available parking spaces, the direction as viewed from the street position is determined, and the available parking spaces are grouped according to the direction. Apply parking factors to the grouped available parking spaces and select at least one of the groups of parking spaces that satisfy the parking factors. The direction of the selected group of parking spaces is displayed on a dynamic road sign.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Automotive radar
abstract: The vehicle radar of the present invention includes one transmission antenna for radiating a frequency-modulated transmission signal; A plurality of reception antennas for detecting the transmission signals reflected on an object and outputting detection signals, respectively; A plurality of low-noise amplifiers including a low-noise amplifier having at least two stages and low-noise amplifying the detection signals; A power divider for transmitting the transmission signal through the first microstrip line to the transmission antenna and a plurality of frequency downconverters; And a plurality of frequency down converters for combining and processing the transmission signal and the low noise amplified detection signals through a second microstrip line and outputting a beat frequency signal, Wherein the transmitting antenna and the plurality of receiving antennas are formed to have a long longitudinal axis in the form of a microstrip patch, and the plurality of receiving antennas Wherein the plurality of reception antennas and the transmission antennas are spaced apart from each other in the longitudinal direction and are spaced apart from each other by an interval between the array of the plurality of reception antennas and the transmission antennas, Electrode is interposed.

title: Light receiving apparatus, object detecting device, and information acquisition device
abstract: Provided are a light receiving device, an object detection device, and an information acquisition device capable of narrowing the wavelength band of light incident on a photodetector to a narrow band, thereby improving the accuracy of distance detection.   A light receiving optical system of an information acquisition apparatus removes light in a first wavelength band other than the wavelength band of laser light from light condensed on a CMOS image sensor via an imaging lens. And a band-pass filter 121b that removes light in the second wavelength band other than the wavelength band of the laser light. In combination with the bandpass filter 121a, the bandpass filter 121b limits the wavelength band of the light collected by the CMOS image sensor 124 to a range including the wavelength band of the laser light.   [Selection] Figure 5

title: Autonomous mobile bin storage and retrieval system
abstract: A method and system for piece-picking or piece put-away within a logistics facility. The system includes a central server and at least one mobile manipulation robot. The central server is configured to communicate with the robots to send and receive piece-picking data which includes a unique identification for each piece to be picked, a location within the logistics facility of the pieces to be picked, and a route for the robot to take within the logistics facility. The robots can then autonomously navigate and position themselves within the logistics facility by recognition of landmarks by at least one of a plurality of sensors. The sensors also provide signals related to detection, identification, and location of a piece to be picked or put-away, and processors on the robots analyze the sensor information to generate movements of a unique articulated arm and end effector on the robot to pick or put-away the piece.

title: Method and device for detecting abnormal behavior of underground personnel crossing belt
abstract: The invention discloses a method and a device for detecting abnormal behavior of underground personnel crossing a belt, wherein a high-definition camera head is arranged in an area near the belt to monitor the behavior of the personnel near the belt in real time; the method comprises the following steps: preprocessing a monitoring video image at the belt, including low-light enhancement and noise reduction processing of the image; the preprocessed image is subjected to a bottom-up posture estimation method to obtain human body joint point information, and posture estimation can be more accurately carried out under the condition that a small part of the human body is shielded; calculating the relative distance lambda between the ankle joint point and the knee joint point between different legs a And the same leg-leg bending angle theta a When lambda is a Not less than threshold value lambda and theta a And when the value is less than or equal to the threshold value theta, determining that the abnormal behavior of the person crossing the belt exists in the image, and sending out an alarm signal. The method can detect the action of personnel crossing the belt under the condition of a plurality of people in the underground with weak light, and has the advantages of high real-time performance, small error and high running speed.

title: Mobile object detection device
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a simply structured mobile object detection device capable of easily detecting a stable mobile object.  <P>SOLUTION: The mobile object detection device detects the mobile object M by shielding (masking) an electric wave of a GPS satellite having a physically low elevation angle with a shield body 13 having an opening 16 when the mobile object M masks only the electric wave of the GPS satellite near a zenith. title: On-vehicle camera
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To reduce the degree to which an occupant feels uncomfortable due to operating noise of a cooling device. An in-vehicle camera is installed inside a windshield of a vehicle and includes a cooling device and a control device. The cooling device cools the vehicle-mounted camera. In S101, S105, and S110, the control device determines whether or not the vehicle-mounted camera is in a high temperature state. In S102, S106, and S111, the control device operates the cooling device when it is determined that the temperature is high. In S104, S108, and S113, the control device operates the air conditioner of the vehicle as a sound generation process for generating a sound for scraping off the operation sound generated by the operation of the cooling device while the cooling device is operating. abstract: The invention discloses a kind of object detection method converted based on Local standard deviation and La Dong Radon.Its step is：(1) coloured image to be detected is inputted；(2) image preprocessing；(3) different gray scale background profile images are obtained；(4) calculus of differences；(5) eastern Radon conversion is drawn；(6) maximum curve is corrected；(7) eastern Radon inverse transformations are drawn；(8) object detection results are exported.It is too high that the present invention can be good at solving algorithm complex present in prior art, and when point target is relatively small and weak, the defects of false-alarm point is easily produced around target, the present invention improves the efficiency and accuracy of image object detection.

title: Pedestrian information system
abstract: A pedestrian information system that can provide alerts to a distracted pedestrian related to hazards in the pedestrian's path. The system can detect objects, and determine if the objects are hazardous and if the pedestrian is likely to collide with the objects. The system can then determine from the pedestrian's activity whether the pedestrian is aware of identified hazards. If the system determines that the pedestrian is not aware of the identified hazards, then the system can output audio, visual, and/or haptic alerts to the pedestrian.

title: Systems and methods for using piezoelectric sensors to ensure securement of enclosures
abstract: Systems and methods are provided for securing an enclosure to an autonomous vehicle. The enclosure can be translated to a final alignment location on a fixture of the autonomous vehicle. The enclosure can include one or more piezoelectric sensors disposed underneath one or more mounting points of the enclosure. The one or more piezoelectric sensors can be initialized to an initial value. Changes in values from the one or more piezoelectric sensors can be measured as the enclosure is being secured to the fixture by one or more mechanical coupling devices through the one or more mounting points.

title: Object sensing apparatus and object sensing method
abstract: An object sensing apparatus includes an object sensing unit to sense an object using a direct wave, being a reflected wave received by a sensor having transmitted a probing wave among a plurality of ultrasonic sensors, and an indirect wave, being a reflected wave received by a sensor different from the sensor having transmitted the probing wave among the ultrasonic sensors, and a temperature change detection unit to detect a predetermined temperature change state where temperature change of a predetermined value or more has occurred or a possibility of the temperature change occurs in an ambient temperature of the moving object. When the predetermined temperature change state is detected by the temperature change detection unit, the object sensing unit performs sensing suppression control not to sense the object using the indirect wave or to make it difficult to sense the object using the indirect wave.

title: Method for providing location-based service and electronic device therefor
abstract: Disclosed is a location-based service based on a user point of interest (POI). An electronic device comprises: a processor for generating a database related to a user POI; detecting the user request for information; and an output unit for outputting information based on the user POI database. The user POI can indicate at least one place extracted from the information inputted to the electronic device.

title: Uneven type road structure for deceleration of driving vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to an uneven road structure for inducing deceleration of a driving vehicle. More specifically, the present invention relates to the uneven road structure, preventing acceleration of a vehicle to induce safe driving and enabling smooth ascending and descending of a protruding member as the vehicle passes through the protruding member.

title: Method for determining the wheel contact force of a motor vehicle
abstract: The invention relates to a method for determining the wheel contact force of a motor vehicle wheel on a motor vehicle, comprising a level control unit, whereby the level control unit comprises a controller, a pressure source, a pressure sink and at least one pressure sensor. The motor vehicle wheel is provided with a spring element by means of which the vehicle chassis is suspended relative to the vehicle wheel, the level adjustment speed for the vehicle level of the vehicle chassis relative to the vehicle wheel during a level control process is determined and from the determined value for the level adjustment speed a first value for the wheel contact force is determined.

title: Shape measuring system and shape measuring method
abstract: A shape measuring system includes an object detection unit attached to a work machine and configured to detect an object and output information of the object, a shape detection unit configured to output shape information representing a three-dimensional shape of the object by using the information of the object detected by the object detection unit, and an information providing unit configured to attach time information for specifying the shape information to the shape information and output the shape information.

title: Method and device for controlling automatic running of track inspection vehicle
abstract: The application provides a method and a device for controlling automatic running of a track inspection vehicle, firstly, track path information to be inspected is obtained, then, environmental detection data acquired when a plurality of sensors installed on the inspection vehicle perform environmental detection on a space to be inspected is obtained in real time, data fusion is performed to generate an obstacle detection result, and the running state of the inspection vehicle at the current time is controlled based on the obstacle detection result when the inspection vehicle automatically runs on the track path to be inspected corresponding to the track path information to be inspected, so that the efficiency of detecting obstacles in the track path is improved, and the running state of the inspection vehicle is controlled in time.

title: Moldable composite material
abstract: A moldable heterogeneous composite material has a continuous plastic phase ( 30 ) and a discrete phase of unground rubber ( 20 ) dispersed in the continuous phase. The composite material can be formed from thermoplastic or thermosetting materials and pieces of rubber from used tires. The composite material of the present invention can be molded in a process having the steps of providing a flowable melt of plastic material ( 50 ), providing unground rubber pieces ( 70 ), mixing the plastic material with the rubber pieces to form a composite material, and molding the composite material into an article ( 10 ) having a desired shape. Molded articles formed from the composite of the present invention have high rigidity and good durability.

title: Color fusion image quality evaluation method based on vision task.
abstract: The invention relates to a typical scene color fusion image quality evaluation method based on a vision task and belongs to the image fusion technology field in image processing. According to the invention, through a subjective evaluation experiment, a regression analysis method is used to establish a fusion image integration quality prediction model based on the vision task. Object background perception contrast and image definition can be used to effectively predict an image perception quality based on object detection. Color compatibility and the definition are used to effectively predict the image perception quality based on scene understanding. Compared to the traditional image quality evaluation method, an image quality evaluation index based on the vision task can carry out comprehensive evaluation of the image quality aiming at an application purpose of the color fusion image. Although it is difficult to perform objective quantification, three basic indexes of the object background contrast, definition and the compatibility comprised in a prediction model are easy to carry out quantification calculating. An effective solution is provided for a problem of the fusion image integration quality objectivity evaluation.

title: Social robot
abstract: Social robot formed by an artificial vision system made up of cameras (3) webcam, a voice recognition system made up of three microphones (4) arranged in a triangular configuration, an expression system made up of a matrix of LEDs, made up of a plurality of LEDs and a status LED, and eyelids (6) formed by a half moon associated with a gear wheel that meshes with respective servomotors through a transmission wheel, a speech synthesis system composed of speakers (7 ), an obstacle detection system made up of ultrasound sensors (8), and a displacement system made up of two driving wheels (9).

title: method and apparatus for prioritizing buffer status reports in a wireless communication system
abstract: a method and apparatus for determining a priority of a Buffer Status Report (BSR) in a wireless communication system are provided. A User Equipment (UE) generates a BSR for uplink transmissions to a network and a proximity-based services (ProSe) BSR for device-to-device (D2D) transmissions between UEs, and prioritizes the BSR for uplink transmissions over the ProSe BSR.

title: Method and apparatus for updating information for vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to a vehicle information updating method and an apparatus and a system using the same. The vehicle information update method in a mobile device having an NFC (Near Field Communication) function according to an embodiment of the present invention includes receiving software version information from a vehicle device through tagging of the NFC, Transmitting a predetermined control message including information to the update server using the first wireless connection means and receiving the latest software corresponding to the software version information from the update server using the second wireless connection means; And transmitting the received latest software to the on-vehicle apparatus using the in-vehicle third wireless connection means. Therefore, the present invention can update vehicle information more effectively.

title: Vision system and method for displaying a field of view dependent upon detecting an object
abstract: A vision system in a vehicle (10) and a method (600) for operating the system. The system displays a field of view that is a portion of an image (200) of an area (24) proximate to the vehicle (10). The system includes an object detection means that provides an indication of an object being present in the area (24) proximate to the vehicle (10). The field of view is selected at least in part based on the detection of the object, such as directing the field of view toward the object so the vehicle (10) driver (12) can more easily discern the presence of the object in a display (14).

title: A kind of tunnel face Piston Action Wind Dust Improvement device
abstract: The present invention provides a kind of tunnel face Piston Action Wind Dust Improvement devices, are extended outwardly by tunnel face, are arranged in track two sides, are mainly made of concrete foundation, main supporting structure, suppression stratification of wind, dust-break layer.Whole equipment divides upper layer and lower layer, and dust-break layer, lower layer's installation suppression stratification of wind are installed in upper layer, and dust-break layer, the setting for pressing down stratification of wind are arranged from the near to the distant by close to thin subsection gradual in tunnel face.It is acted on using the control wind of suppression stratification of wind Windbreak barrier strip, the depositing dust of the ventilation unit of the anti-fugitive dust of dust-break layer acts on, a buffer area is established at tunnel face, so that Piston Action Wind is buffer area is broken, consumption declines low-flow pressure, it is set gradually to tend to be steady, it combines together with atmosphere, reduces gas and take dirt ability, prevent internal diffussion of dust to outside.When can effectively solve the bulk shippings train such as coal, ore and passing through tunnel, the problem that the Piston Action Wind of generation causes the dust pollution of loose unpacked material serious, and cost is low with running cost, can also save a large amount of costs of labor.

title: Secure corridor cassette tracking
abstract: A system and method for tracking the location of an item during transport of that item from a mobile location to a fixed location. Wireless links established between the mobile location, the fixed location, and the item to be transported, are utilized to calculate a location parameter of the item to be transported. The calculated location parameter of the item is compared to a secure corridor and security features of the item to be transported may be activated dependent upon the result of that calculation.

title: Method and system for door status detection and alert generation
abstract: Disclosed are methods and systems such as an imaging assembly that may include a variety of components, such as, but not limited to, a two-dimensional (2D) camera configured to capture 2D image data, a three-dimensional camera configured to capture three-dimensional (3D) image data, and an evaluation module executing on one or more processors. The 2D camera may be oriented in a direction to capture 2D image data of a first field of view of a container loading area, and the 3D camera may be oriented in a direction to capture 3D image data of a second field of view of the container loading area at least partially overlapping with the first field of view. The evaluation module may be configured to detect a status event in the container loading area based on 2D image data.

title: Method and device for removing optical fingerprint image background
abstract: The application provides a method and a device for removing an optical fingerprint image background, wherein the method comprises the following steps: collecting an optical fingerprint image to be processed; acquiring a basic image; removing the background of the optical fingerprint image to be processed according to the basic image to obtain the optical fingerprint image with the removed background; calculating a correlation coefficient between the optical fingerprint image to be processed and the basic image; calculating a correlation coefficient between the optical fingerprint image to be processed and the basic image; and under the condition that the correlation coefficient is larger than a preset threshold value, updating the basic image according to the optical fingerprint image to be processed. The basic image is updated according to the currently acquired optical fingerprint image to be processed, so that the updated basic image contains the background information of the currently acquired optical fingerprint image to be processed, and the updated basic image achieves the effect of self-adapting to the change of the background environment. Therefore, the background of the optical fingerprint image to be processed can be effectively removed under the condition that the background environment is greatly changed.

title: Multirotor unmanned aerial vehicle
abstract: A utility model of a multi-rotor unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) relates to aviation technology, more specifically, to remotely controlled small-sized unmanned aerial vehicles of vertical take-off and landing, which are highly maneuverable and can be used to monitor the surface of the earth, as well as to collect, accumulate and transmit data and / or communication. The proposed design allows UAVs to be controlled in six degrees of freedom, which is ensured by an independent change in the angle of rotation of each of the four holders with a propeller within ± 60 °. Electronic avionics allow UAVs to fly in the city or in the presence of obstacles, as well as to make a group flight, as per a given the program in autopilot mode, and with manual control. The presence of a multi-channel switch of electronic equipment allows you to adjust its energy supply during the flight mission to reduce energy consumption. 4 s.p. f-ly, 3 ill.

title: Information acquisition device and object detection device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an information acquisition device capable of smoothly acquiring information on a distance with respect to a target area with a simple configuration and suppressing the influence of light projected onto the target area, for acquiring the information on an imaging camera and to provide an object detection device including the information acquisition device.SOLUTION: An information acquisition device 2 includes a projection part 100 which projects infrared light, an infrared imaging part 200, a distance acquisition part 21b which acquires the distance information of each position on the target area on the basis of a luminance value acquired by the infrared imaging part 200, and a visible light imaging part 300. The infrared imaging part 200 includes a visible light removal filter 230 which removes visible light. The visible light imaging part 300 includes an infrared light removable filter 330 which removes the infrared light. The projection part 100, the infrared imaging part 200 and the visible light imaging part 300 are arranged so that the visible light imaging part 300 is never interposed between the projection part 100 and the infrared imaging part 200.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

title: A kind of humanoid anti-collision alarm system of harbour equipment based on monocular vision
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of, and humanoid anti-collision alarm system is equipped at the harbour based on monocular vision, and pedestrian detection video camera is mounted on the surrounding of harbour facilities, and a pedestrian detection video camera is respectively installed in each direction；The video flowing and laser radar scanning data of the surrounding of pedestrian detection video camera captured in real-time harbour facilities are unified to be transferred to embedded board via data switching exchane；Humanoid in detection zone is identified by embedded board detection and calculates distance, the signal of detection is electrically connected alarm and display screen by embedded board output end；The utility model has changed personnel's anticollision pattern of traditional video artefacts' detection, can it is accurate, timely positioning be identified and export alarm to humanoid in detection zone, and high degree avoids the collision accident caused by artificial fatigue, carelessness, significantly put forward the efficiency of loading and unloading of harbour equipment, harbour equipment automation is furthermore achieved, saves a large amount of human cost.

title: Generating a front end graphical user interface for a plurality of text based commands
abstract: A method, computer program product, and system are disclosed for generating a graphical user interface (GUI) for a plurality of text based commands, in which environment mapping definitions may link generic GUI components with predefined command structures. The plurality of text based commands may be command-line interface (CLI) commands. The environment mapping definitions may be applied to a command specification defining characteristics of the plurality of text based commands in a standard format in order to build a GUI from generic GUI components. The command specification may be generated by providing an interpretation reference defining CLI conventions and parsing a command description to extract the command specification with reference to the interpretation reference.

title: Switching an inverter with stored signal sequences
abstract: A method and apparatus is disclosed for generating thyristor gating signals for a force commutated inverter in order to produce variable frequency pulse-width modulated output waveforms with the appropriate percent fundamental voltage content for reactive power control and with the correct phase relationship to the utility line for real power control. A signal processor in conjunction with a memory is used to store individual patterns for generating a wide variety of PWM waveforms at different frequencies over the entire modulation range so as to provide the designer with the flexibility to select the most advantageous harmonic cancellation for each operating point. An embodiment of the invention .disclosed uses three microprocessors to generate the PWM waveforms and a fourth microprocessor to synhcronize the other three and produce the required phase shift. The principles disclosed apply to inverters used and controlled in parallel with a grid of real and reactive control signal commands and also those used independently by means of voltage magnitude commands.

title: Modular rearview mirror assembly
abstract: A modular rearview mirror assembly for vehicles incorporates one or more integrated subassembly modules or carrier members to which are connected separate electrical components such as lamps, reflectors, switches, plug receptacles and the like to simplify mirror assembly and provide integral support, electrical connections, and an electrical distribution network for the mirror assembly having added, electrically operated features. The carrier member includes a circuit member secured to and/or at least partially encased or encapsulated within a support body such that electrical connections extend therefrom. Preferably, the carrier member may include recesses at opposite ends for receiving and supporting reflectors thereon to prevent vibration while allowing interchangeability for different vehicle types. The carrier member may form a stop for a toggle actuator to limit the movement of the mirror housing between day and night positions in the event a prismatic mirror element is included. The mirror case includes a plurality of internal wall members including slots for snap-in reception of the carrier member during assembly. In addition, the plug connection includes a latch for retaining a plug in the plug connection when the assembly is connected to a vehicle electrical system. The electrically operated features may include video cameras, rain and other detectors, electro-optic reflective elements, blind spot detection systems, information displays, headlamp controllers, cellular phones, transmitters, receivers, compasses, computers, printers, and the like.

title: Object Detection Techniques
abstract: Object detection techniques are described. In one or more implementations, a plurality of images are received by a computing device. The plurality of images are analyzed by the computing device to detect whether the images include, respectively, a depiction of an object. If an object is found in a first image, the locations, angles and scales for object detection can be further restricted in a second one. If an object is not found in a first one of the image, different portions of a second one of the images are analyzed for object detection.

title: Method for Handing Over a User Equipment Connected to a Base Station from the Base Station to a femto Access Point
abstract: A method is described for handing over a user equipment connected to a base station from the base station to a femto access point. The method includes initializing a handover from the base station to the femto access point, sending parameters indicating the femto access point from the user equipment to the base station, wherein the parameters include a physical ID parameter and a further parameter based on time measurements, identifying the femto access point by comparing the parameters sent from the user equipment to the base station with a list stored in the base station, wherein the list includes a physical ID parameter, a further parameter based on time measurements and a global ID for a plurality of femto access points, and handing over the user equipment to the identified femto access point. Also described is a base station, a user equipment and a system.

title: Ultrasonic object detector
abstract:
PURPOSE: To inhibit the erroneous operation the due to noise.  
     CONSTITUTION: A plurality of sensor parts A for transmitting and inputting an ultrasonic pulse are provided. Ultrasonic wave are continuously transmitted from the sensor part A by a main body part B. An object detection process for detecting the existence of the object from the receiving wave output of the reflecting wave caused by the object of each sensor part A is carried out in time series for each sensor part A by the main body part B. A noise surveillance period is provided before a point where and ultrasonic pulse is transmitted by each sensor part A. It is detected by a control circuit 4 whether there is a noise in the noise surveillance period. When there is a noise in a certain sensor part A, the object detection is not carried out for the sensor part A. Without carrying out the object detection for a sensor part A where the noise condition is bad, the probility of erronous operation due to the noise is reduced.

title: Electric vehicle area sharing management method
abstract: The invention is an electric vehicle area sharing management method, which mainly provides users to connect to a remote system management server by using an electric vehicle rental program installed on a mobile device or a computer device, so as to perform data input and related to electric vehicle rental Settings, which will greatly improve the convenience and utilization rate of electric vehicle rental, with low construction costs, easy maintenance and management, fast and convenient regional mass transportation methods. Among them, by providing users with free or low-cost rental discounts for time-limited, limited cross-regional electric vehicle number adjustment and dispatch, without the need to send additional manpower and vehicles to assist in the allocation or scheduling of electric vehicles between regions .

title: Method and apparatus for discriminating dangerous object in dead zone by using image processing
abstract: PURPOSE: A method and an apparatus for discriminating dangerous objects in a blind spot by image processing are provided to obtain images for a blind spot of a vehicle and determine whether objects in the images are dangerous. CONSTITUTION: A preprocess unit(120) processes an image inputted to an imaging apparatus so that dangerous factors are emphasized. A candidate determining unit(140) creates projection points with prominent feature from the processed image, and extracts dangerous object candidates by analyzing the dynamic information of the projection points. A dangerous object detection unit(150) applies feature point/vector extraction algorithm to the candidates and determines whether the candidates are dangerous objects.

title: Neuromorphic system for real-time visual activity recognition
abstract: A system for visual activity recognition is described, the system comprising one or more processors and a memory, the memory being a non-transitory computer-readable medium encoded with executable instructions such that, when executed, the one or more processors perform operations comprising: a set of objects of interest in video data is detected and an object classification for each object in the set of objects of interest is determined, the set comprising at least one object of interest. The one or more processors further perform operations comprising: forming a corresponding activity trace for each object by tracking each object in the set of objects of interest across a plurality of frames. The one or more processors further perform operations comprising: for each object of interest and using a feature extractor, a corresponding feature in the video data is determined. The system may provide reports to the user's cell phone or central monitoring facility.

title: Method and system for inserting special effects during conversation by visual telephone
abstract: The present invention is provided by automatically synthesizing the user's face and the decorating effect image according to the user's expression of the digital device with reference to the facial expression decoration template DB stored so that the template and the decorating effect image correspond to each facial expression of the model. Specifically, (a) detecting a face of a user photographed through a lens of the digital device using a face detection technology, (b) the same or similar to the expression of the detected face in the template Searching for a specific template including a facial expression, and (c) compositing the decorating effect image corresponding to the specific template with the detected face image. According to this, the video call can be made while expressing the emotional state of the user more richly and humorously.

title: Image search system and image search method
abstract: The present invention relates to a receiving unit that receives alarm information transmitted from a detection device through detection of a dangerous substance via a network, and an alarm notification time based on alarm notification time information included in the alarm information received by the receiving unit. Target person extraction that performs face image search for image data from imaging devices installed in the vicinity of the detection device and extracts subjects suspected of possessing dangerous goods, using a predetermined time before the alarm issuance time as a search condition And a greylist registration means for registering a person who is suspected of possessing a dangerous substance extracted by the means for extracting a target person in a greylist, and a person who is suspected of possessing a dangerous goods registered in the greylist by a greylist registration means. And a target person search means for periodically performing similar face image search on the image data recorded in the recording device. Fast it is possible to find a precisely explosives holders.

title: Appliance control apparatus, method thereof and program therefor
abstract: An appliance control apparatus recognizes image features of an target appliance from an obtained image, calculates a degree of similarity between the image features of the target appliance and image features of a registered appliance, specifies the registered appliance corresponding to the image features in the case where the degree of similarity indicates a high similarity as the target appliance; calls up control information of the specified target appliance, and controls the target appliance.

title: Interacting toys
abstract: (57) Abstract: Of the plurality of toys, at least one first toy generates an audio signal, and at least one second toy receives the audio signal. When the second toy receives an acoustic signal from the first toy, it responds, for example, by generating sound and / or controlling its operation. In a preferred embodiment of the present invention, the toys are swarmed and / or form a matrix of toys to attach to the leader toy, for example, following a mother goose, preferably with a squeal, followed by a plurality of geese. To go.

title: Portable plant cutter
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] To cut the foliage of plants easily and efficiently by power so that the hands will not get tired even during continuous work. [Structure] A drive motor, a frame attached to a motor casing, a fixed blade 8 and a movable blade 9 attached to the frame, a movable blade drive member attached to a motor output shaft, and motor stop control means are provided in cases 5A and 5B. A grip 2 having a built-in object detection sensor 12 and a motor starting switch 27, which is swingably positioned on the front surface of the upper case 5A and is provided above the fixed blade 8, and a power supply including a storage battery. It consists of part 3 and switch box 4,   When an object to be cut touches the detection unit 12A of the sensor 12, the sensor 12 swings and the switch operation unit 12C actuates the switch 27, whereby the movable blade 9 rotates to the fixed blade 8 side. The object to be cut is automatically cut, returned to the fully open position and stopped.

title: Expanded reactive following for distributed generation and loads of other reactive controller(s)
abstract: Systems and methods for providing generated power to a power grid subject to active power, reactive power and voltage requirements during varying conditions. An expanded reactive follower for distributed generation including but not limited to wind power plant and solar power plants and loads of other reactive controllers; that includes at least one reactive power generator coupled to an electric power system with a distributed power plant. The reactive power generator (e.g. a rapidly switched capacitor bank with fast reinsertion resistors, or inverter based reactive power generator) is located on either side of the point of interconnection of the power plant. A reactive follower controller controls the reactive power generator on the basis of an estimated reactive power commanded by a reactive power management system for distributed generation plant (e.g. Solar, Wind, Battery, etc. . . . ).

title: Vehicle camera system for measuring distance and method for providing the distance information
abstract: The present invention relates to a distance measuring vehicle camera system and a method for providing distance information of the system. According to the present invention, a time of flight (TOF) camera is integrally implemented in a viewing camera for the front or rear view of the vehicle for general shooting, and the image obtained by the viewing camera is acquired by the TOF camera. Distance information with the subject is overlaid and output. Therefore, the actual distance between the vehicle and external objects can be quantitatively shown through numerical values, further reducing the risk of collision or contact.

title: Airbag assembly including airbag and panel having depressed region
abstract: An airbag assembly 10 includes an airbag 14 and a panel 16. The panel extends from a first apex 18 to a second apex 20 each spaced from the airbag. The panel includes a depressed region 22 between the first apex and the second apex. The depressed region is attached to the airbag. The airbag may absorb energy from the occupant during vehicle impact, and the apexes encourage the occupant to be retained in the depressed region. Also disclosed is a vehicle interior with the abovementioned airbag assembly with the airbag supported by the vehicle roof. The depressed region may have a concave shape and the apexes may be attached to the vehicle roof. The airbag may be elongated from the roof along an axis transverse to the roof and the depressed region may be curved about an axis parallel to this transverse axis. A seat 38 may be disposed in the depressed region and may rotate about a seat axis parallel to the transverse axis. The panel may further include a third apex 64 and a second depressed region 56. The invention is particularly relevant to autonomous vehicles (AV) with seats facing each other so that passengers can interact.

title: Intelligent city environment purification method and system based on unmanned aerial vehicle
abstract: An intelligent city environment purification method based on unmanned aerial vehicle and a system thereof comprise: if a city purification instruction is received, the unmanned aerial vehicle is controlled to start and the unmanned aerial vehicle camera is controlled to shoot an image of the unmanned aerial vehicle in real time, the unmanned aerial vehicle is controlled to fly to a bound route to be purified and patrolled and whether a cigarette end exists on the ground of a patrol area is analyzed in real time, if so, the unmanned aerial vehicle is controlled to fly and suspend above the cigarette end and the laser ranging sensor is controlled to start and acquire distance information in real time, the descending distance of the unmanned aerial vehicle is calculated and purified and the unmanned aerial vehicle is controlled to descend, the collision block connected with the ejection mechanism is controlled to eject and press out the cigarette end and control the temperature sensor to acquire temperature information in real time, whether the temperature of the lower end of the collision block is at normal temperature is analyzed, if so, the ejection mechanism is controlled to drive the collision block to withdraw and control the electric cigarette end clamp to stretch out to clamp the cigarette end.

title: Anti-crushing device for sliding door of motor vehicle.
abstract: Anti-crushing device for sliding door (1) of a motor vehicle, the opening and / or closing of the sliding door being assisted by motorized means, which can be inhibited by means of obstacle detection during door maneuvering (1 ), said obstacle detection means being inhibited, in turn, by switching means once the sliding door (1) has exceeded at least one closing catch, characterized in that the anti-crushing device comprises at least , a profile (3) arranged in the door and / or in at least one adjacent element (4; 5), shaped so as to obstruct the substantially vertical space between the sliding door (1) and the adjacent element (4; 5) in at least part of the height of the opening (6), when the sliding door (1) has exceeded, at least, said closing latch, so that the profile (3) prevents or limits the imprisonment of a foreign body, such as a finger, or Once the closing catch has been exceeded.

title: Object detection sensor
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a transmissive object detection sensor having high resistance to noise light such as disturbance light and accurately detecting an object such as a person or an automobile at a long or middle distance.  <P>SOLUTION: This object detection sensor equipped with a determination part 2 for determining the existence of an object 4 depending on whether or not irradiated infrared light L1 is intercepted, comprises a transmission part 3 for irradiating the infrared light L1 as a carrier wave of a prescribed frequency, and a reception part 1 using an infrared remote-control reception element 1A for photoelectrically converting the received infrared light L2 into an electrical signal S1.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2005,JPO&NCIPI

title: High dynamic range imaging method for removing ghosts through moving object detection and extension
abstract: The invention provides a high dynamic range imaging method for removing ghosts through moving object detection and extension. The important thought of the method of the invention is to extend a moving area under edge constraints to enhance a moving area detection result. A Markov random field-based method is used for detecting the moving area, an image segmentation-based method is used for extending the moving area, the weight of each pixel is adjusted according to a mask image of the moving area after extended, the weight of each pixel is applied to final exposure fusion, and the problem of ghosts appearing in the high dynamic range imaging can be effectively solved.

title: Shared vehicle management device
abstract: A shared vehicle management device for managing shared vehicles used by users, including a rental request acquisition unit configured to acquire a rental request by the user, a vehicle state acquisition unit configured to acquire state information of the shared vehicle, a rental determination unit configured to determine a necessity level of maintenance of the shared vehicle on a basis of the state information of the shared vehicle, and determine whether to prohibit or permit a rental of the shared vehicle with the state information of the shared vehicle and the rental request by the user, and a recommended destination selection unit configured to determine that the shared vehicle needs maintenance upon a determination that the necessity level of maintenance of the shared vehicle is higher than a predetermined reference value when the rental determination unit determines whether to prohibit or permit the rental of the shared vehicle.

title: Object detection method and device based on CNN and strong fluctuation resistance
abstract: The present invention provides a method and apparatus for learning a CNN-based object detector having strong fluctuation resistance, which can adaptively utilize a target object prediction network according to user's requirements such as KPI. If the resolution or focus determined by the KPI is changed, the size of the object is also changed. With the method of user-oriented optimization design, an incorrect object, such as an object being dropped or having been dropped, can be detected more accurately, and fluctuations in the object can be perceived. Thus, the method is very useful for military purposes or for object detection located at remote locations. The method comprises the following steps: while increasing k from 1 to n, the learning device causes the RPN to output a kth object candidate on a kth processed image corresponding to a (k-1) th target region on the image, causes the FC layer to output object detection information corresponding to the kth object, and causes the FC loss layer to obtain an FC loss.

title: Vehicle alarm system and the method for protecting pedestrians
abstract: The present invention relates to a vehicle notification system and method for protecting pedestrians capable of communicating a pedestrian approach and a crossing situation to a vehicle to prevent an accident between an unprotected right turn or a left turn vehicle and a pedestrian in an intersection section, The vehicle notification system includes a motion detection sensor connected to a driver signal lamp or a pedestrian signal lamp to detect whether a pedestrian is approaching or moving, a transmission device that receives a pedestrian detection signal transmitted from the motion detection sensor and transmits the signal to a vehicle approaching an intersection And a receiving device located at a lower portion of the vehicle for receiving the pedestrian sensing signal transmitted from the transmitting device and transmitting the pedestrian sensing signal to a vehicle driver, wherein the transmitting device comprises at least two Technical features that can be purchased underground It shall be.

abstract: The invention discloses a video file analysis method, which relates to the technical field of data analysis, and establishes an incidence relation between different video files by acquiring image identifiers and location identifiers of a plurality of video files, thereby realizing the purpose of rapidly mining useful information from the plurality of video files.

title: New energy power generation unidirectional deceleration strip with adjustable orientation and power generation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a new energy power generation unidirectional deceleration strip with adjustable orientation and a power generation method thereof. The deceleration strip is used for generating electricity, and the method is a new energy form with great prospect; the existing power generation deceleration strip has the defect of low efficiency. The invention relates to a new energy power generation unidirectional deceleration strip with adjustable orientation. The basic box body comprises a U-shaped box and a top limiting plate. The deceleration strip power generation device comprises a main body deceleration mechanism and a power generation mechanism. The one-way speed reduction assembly comprises a one-way speed reduction piece, a guide post, a one-way return spring, a rotary locking assembly and a thrust permanent magnet. The power generation mechanism comprises a limiting cylinder, a power generation permanent magnet, a power generation oscillation spring and a power generation coil. According to the invention, the thrust permanent magnet and the power generation oscillation spring are respectively arranged above and below the power generation permanent magnet, so that the power generation permanent magnet can continuously oscillate, and the power generation efficiency is greatly improved.

title: System for monitoring automobile passing in hi-pass section and method thereof
abstract: A system and method for monitoring vehicle traffic in a high pass section according to the present invention are disclosed.   The system for monitoring vehicle traffic in a high pass section according to the present invention includes a probe means for outputting a probe signal for detecting a high pass terminal provided in a vehicle entering the high pass section; Photographing means for outputting the probe signal and photographing the license plate of the vehicle and generating a photographed image as a result of the photographing; And control means for recognizing the generated photographed image and generating vehicle information including a vehicle number as a result of the recognition.

title: Microwave energy implemented aircraft landing system
abstract: A microwave RF landing system having an airborne transmitter/receiver unit which transmits a pulsed interrogation signal toward a ground based transponder unit which receives the pulsed signal through its non-rotating luneberg lens antenna (350, 351) and then transmits a continuous wave (CW) return signal to the aircraft using a transponder module or modules (fig. 7A) irradiated by the interrogation signal. The CW signal transmitted by each module in the array conveys three discrete audio frequency tones: a phase-shifted azimuth tone, a phase-shifted elevation (glide slope) tone, and a reference tone and further conveys a phase-inversion corresponding to the interrogation signal. The three tones produce a complex audio frequency waveform that encodes the azimuth and glide slope of the flight path toward the module or modules that transmitted the signal. The CW signal receiver in the airborne unit decodes the information contained in the complex waveform and determines the aircraft's azimuth, glide slope, distance, velocity and acceleration relative to the ground unit.

title: The small and weak defect object detection method in flat glass parts ink area
abstract: The invention proposes a kind of small and weak defect object detection methods in flat glass parts ink area, and recognition speed is fast, accuracy is high.This method comprises: firstly, cut for the first time to large-size images, and identification positioning is carried out to the character information of ink area using auto-correlation template matching algorithm, it is cut according to character and Log information of the positioning result to ink area；Secondly, to treated, image carries out secondary cutting, and after carrying out binaryzation using varimax between class, using the maximum white area of BLOB choice of technology area, corresponding region is ink area in secondary cutting image；Then, it is detected using edge of the Sobel operator to ink area image, cuts the transitional region that width on edge is 100 pixels, generated the ink area only comprising effective small and weak defect target and cut image；Finally, separating using One-Dimensional Maximum-Entropy algorithm to ink area image, and the identification and detection of each small and weak defect target are completed using BLOB technology.

abstract: In a model-based three-dimensional object detection, even when 3D data of an object obtained by sensing is insufficient, the possibility of object detection by matching with reference data is improved. title: Vehicular safety system for controlling a safety feature
abstract: A vehicular safety system includes a rearward-viewing camera disposed at a vehicle so as to have an exterior field of view at least rearward of the equipped vehicle. A control includes an image processor for processing image data captured by the camera to detect a vehicle exterior and rearward of the equipped vehicle and to determine if a collision between the detected vehicle and the equipped vehicle is pending. When reverse gear is engaged, and responsive to determination of the pending collision, a safety feature of the equipped vehicle, such as a reversible feature of a driver seat of the equipped vehicle, is triggered before impact occurs. If actual impact does not occur, the triggered safety feature returns to its condition that existed prior to the determination of the pending collision between the detected vehicle and the equipped vehicle.

title: Acceleration of data processing for object detection
abstract: Spatial data may be divided along an axis of the second dimension into a first data segment and a second data segment, such that the first data segment is limited to data points of the spatial data with second dimension coordinates within a first range and the second data segment is limited to data points of the spatial data with second dimension coordinates within a second range. A first processing element may execute an object detection process on the first data segment to generate a first list of objects within the first data segment. A second processing element may execute the object detection process on the second data segment to generate a second list of objects within the second data segment. A first set of objects detected in the first data segment may be combined with a second set of objects detected in the second data segment.

title: material handling vehicle
abstract: A material handling vehicle comprises an operator's compartment, a compartment tower, a multi-field scanning tool, and mechanisms that facilitate movement along a moving plane in a warehouse. The tool establishes a sweep field and, within the bounds of the sweep field, an occupancy detection field and an obstacle detection field. The tool scan hardware is configured to generate the scan field from a point of origin that is elevated relative to the operator's compartment and expand the scan field so that it crosses the operator's compartment and extends laterally beyond operator's side edges so that the occupancy detection field is inside the operator's compartment, the obstacle detection field is outside the operator's compartment, and the multi-field scanning tool is configured to indicate the presence of an occupant in the occupancy and obstacle detection field in the obstacle detection field.

abstract: The present invention can provide a vessel equipment monitoring device using a drone, but is connected to a network network based on a plurality of access points in a ship, and ship motion information received from an autopilot device of a ship and movement of the autopilot device A control server having a drone patrol control unit applying a characteristic value of a ship's unique maneuvering motion calculated by the equation to the drone operation; A drone that is controlled by the drone patrol control unit of the control server to photograph and investigate a target, which is a ship facility provided in the ship, and transmits data according to the investigation of the target to the control server by communicating with the control server; And a docking station that secures the drone, charges a battery of the drone according to a connection with the drone, and checks a state of the drone.
