title: Real-time obstacle detection method based on image feature calibration
abstract: The invention discloses a real-time obstacle detection method based on image characteristic calibration, which comprises the following steps: the method comprises the following steps: collecting and preprocessing an image; step two: extracting image features of the gray level image through an improved LOG algorithm to obtain feature images of continuous two frames of gray level images; step three: carrying out feature matching on the feature maps by an improved FLANN algorithm to obtain a matching relation map between the feature maps of two continuous frames; step four: filtering the feature points in the matching relationship graph through an A-D matching filtering algorithm, and obtaining a new matching relationship graph after filtering the feature points; step five: and calibrating the obstacle to obtain the movement direction and distance of the obstacle. According to the invention, the characteristic points and the corresponding relation of the obstacles are obtained by improving the LOG algorithm, the FLANN algorithm and the A-D filtering algorithm, so that the calibration of the obstacles is realized, and the method can be applied to auxiliary equipment for the blind.

title: Gesture recognition fusion-based aphasia patient auxiliary rehabilitation training system and method
abstract: The invention provides a gesture recognition fusion-based auxiliary rehabilitation training system for aphasia patients, which comprises: an embedded computing platform: the device comprises an object detection and gesture recognition unit, a rehabilitation training and user interaction unit and a training result evaluation unit; a scene camera; a user monitoring camera; a display screen: the front-end interaction interface is used for displaying and interacting with a user; a voice module: used for synthesizing and playing training instruction voice; external power supply: power supply for the whole set of training system; the embedded computing platform is respectively connected with the scene camera, the user monitoring camera, the voice module, the display and the external power supply. The training system and the method have good capability of being close to the real life of the patient and convenience in deployment, greatly meet the increasing requirement of aphasia rehabilitation training, and improve the rehabilitation training effect of aphasia patient groups.

title: Accident alarming service server, and method thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a traffic accident alert service server and a method thereof, and the traffic accident alert service server according to an embodiment of the present invention includes an information collector configured to collect information about a plurality of objects on an intersection, and the plurality of objects. A visibility determination unit for determining whether a critical visibility for safety braking between entry objects entering a path crossing each other at the intersection is blocked by an obstacle, and when the critical visibility is blocked by the obstacle, And a collision possibility determination unit determining a collision possibility between the entry objects, and a collision warning unit configured to give a collision warning to the entry objects when the collision time between the entry objects is out of a preset range.   Accordingly, it is possible to reduce the occurrence of traffic accidents by determining whether the objects collide with each other according to whether the visible distance between the objects entering the intersection is blocked by the obstacle, and alerting the objects when the collision probability is high.

abstract: 1,230,221. Cathode-ray tube displays; echo sounding. FRIED. KRUPP G.m.b.H. 23 Aug., 1968 [26 Aug., 1967], No. 40494/68. Headings H4D and H4T. Identification of the different traces, indicative of functions of a plurality of variables, produced on a cathode-ray display tube, is enhanced by producing the different traces with different brightness levels. As applied to an ultrasonic fish detector in which echo pulses from a receiver 1 (Fig. 1) in the form of an amplitude modulation of a high-frequency carrier wave are supplied via an amplifier 7 to the horizontal deflection plates of the display tube 3 to deflection modulate a time-base trace 6 produced by a sawtooth generator 5 controlled by a pulse generator 4 which drives a transmitter 2 (producing bursts of the high-frequency carrier wave), distinction between the various traces, i.e. the bottom echo a, the bottom rope of the trawl net b and fish inside the net c, is enhanced by producing such traces with different brightness levels. In the present embodiment, because it is necessary to set the gain of amplifier 7 at a high level in order that the low level echoes c from the fish be displayed with sufficient amplitude, the high level echoes a are of much greater amplitude than the echoes b and c. The amplitude of the echoes is more than sufficient to fill the display screen so that it is difficult to distinguish between this echo and echo b due to the trawl rope B which nearly fills the screen and the present embodiment operates to enhance distinction by causing echo a to be reproduced with a lower brightness than echoes b and c. This is achieved by rectifying the echoes from receiver 7 in rectifier 9 and applying a selected amplitude level, determined by potentiometer 11, to trip a Schmitt trigger 14 to the state in which stage 13 is cut-off so that transistor 18 conducts and by virtue of the potentiometer R16, R17 reduces the potential, derived from terminal 21, which is supplied to the brightness control electrodes of the tube. Thus by setting potentiometer 11 so that trigger 14 is tripped by the high amplitudes echo a the latter is reproduced at a much lower brighteness level than the echoes b and c distinction between which is easily made because of the marked difference in amplitude. The arrangement may, however, be extended to allow the latter echoes to be displayed with still different brightness levels. Fig. 2 shows a second embodiment in which echoes received from a target are reproduced with different brightness levels to indicate relative motion and the direction of such motion of the target with respect to the sounding apparatus (e.g. a vessel). In this embodiment a beat frequency of 1KH is produced by mixing in 40 the output of the pulse generator 4 (30 KH) with the output of an oscillator 41 (29 KH) and supplied to a L.P.F. 43 precisely adjusted to the frequency 1 KH. When relative motions occur the latter frequency changes + or - due to the Doppler effect and the phase of, the output of filter 43 changes. This phase change is sensed by a phase discriminator 49 the output of which controls a pair of transistors 34, 35 operating as D.C. differential amplifiers such that, depending on the direction of the Doppler change, either one or the other of the transistors is rendered non-conducting and a reverse bias voltage is therefore applied over conductor 25 or 26 to diodes 23 or 22, respectively. These diodes, when conducting, rectify an A.C. waveform having the same frequency as the received echo signals (produced in transformer 22 under the control of receiver 7) so that, depending on which is conducting, the Schmitt trigger is controlled to produce a brightness change either during the tracing of echoes above the horizontal time base, d, or below such trace, a. Thus the direction of relative motion is indicated by the side of the horizontal time axis on which the brightness change is produced. When there is no relative motion the display is produced with the same brightness, high or low, depending on the adjustment of potentiometer 11, on both sides of the time axis as shown at f. The invention may be employed to indicate the deviation and sign of the deviation of a target from a reference direction by utilizing the phase difference produced by two spaced receivers or groups of receivers and velocities may be measured by varying the frequency of oscillator 41 until uniformity between the received frequency and a comparison frequency is indicated by disappearance of the Doppler indication on the display tube. With this latter method the travel and drift velocities and the lift which a ship experiences through swell may be measured by varying the direction in which the transmitter radiates appropriately. The brightness control, in addition to the form described above, may be effected in a distinctive line pattern or area pattern which may indicate a further variable such as bearing.

title: Display screen
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of display screen.The display screen includes：Display panel, glass partition and fingerprint sensing module；The glass partition is connected with the display panel；The display panel includes the multiple external compensation pixel cells and multiple internal compensation pixel cells of mixing arrangement, and each external compensation pixel cell is provided with white space；Projection projection with one described in white space on the surface of the glass partition of the fingerprint sensing module on the surface of the glass partition is overlapping.The display screen sensing area is larger, and more can easily realize fingerprint recognition.

title: Image processing apparatus, image processing method, and storage medium
abstract: An image processing apparatus accepts a designated virtual viewpoint, and acquires a result of specific-object detection processing performed for a virtual viewpoint image corresponding to the accepted virtual viewpoint. The image processing apparatus then executes addition processing for displaying, together with the virtual viewpoint image corresponding to the designated virtual viewpoint, information about a specific object detected from another viewpoint image corresponding to another viewpoint different from the designated virtual viewpoint. The addition processing is executed according to the result of the specific-object detection processing.

title: Efficient and periodic scheduling for wireless communication
abstract: In one aspect, the wireless device is two or more semi-fixed scheduling (SPS) settings that each define a plurality of periodic transmission opportunities for the wireless device from the wireless network node, the two or more SPSs. At least two of the settings receive SPS settings with different periods for periodic transmission opportunities. The wireless device transmits data corresponding to the first traffic type or the first radio bearer according to the first one of the two or more SPS settings, and the second of the two or more SPS settings. title: Vehicle collision avoidance system with enhanced pedestrian avoidance
abstract: A collision avoidance system of a vehicle includes a sensor configured to be disposed at a vehicle for sensing exterior and forwardly of the vehicle. A processor is operable to process sensor data captured by the sensor to determine the presence of a pedestrian ahead of the vehicle and at or moving towards a path of travel of the vehicle. The processor determines a time to collision based on a determined distance to the pedestrian and determined speed of the pedestrian and speed of the vehicle. The collision avoidance system is operable to generate an alert to the driver of the vehicle at a threshold time before the determined collision with the pedestrian. Responsive to a parameter, the collision avoidance system adjusts the threshold time to generate the alert at an earlier time.

title: Obstacle detection method and device for aircraft
abstract: The invention discloses an obstacle detection method and device of an aircraft, which are used for reducing obstacle detection errors of the aircraft and improving obstacle detection precision of the aircraft. The embodiment of the invention provides an obstacle detection method of an aircraft, which comprises the following steps: acquiring images of a target obstacle in real time through a binocular camera configured by an aircraft to obtain a first image and a second image, wherein the first image is obtained by shooting through a left eye in the binocular camera, and the second image is obtained by shooting through a right eye in the binocular camera; determining a first pixel position of the target obstacle projected in the first image and a second pixel position of the target obstacle projected in the second image, and calculating a disparity value between the first pixel position and the second pixel position according to the first pixel position and the second pixel position; and calculating the depth value of the binocular camera from the target obstacle according to the parallax value between the first pixel position and the second pixel position and a preset parallax depth mapping matrix.

title: Travel assistance method and travel assistance device.
abstract: This travel assistance method: detects a vehicle (52) and objects around a host vehicle (51); sets a blind spot area (55) for the detected vehicle (52); identifies, from among the detected objects, objects (53, 54) located within the blind spot area; and predicts movement of the detected vehicle (52) on the basis of the identified objects (53, 54).

title: System and method for generating real-time alert notifications in an asset tracking system.
abstract: A system and method for generating real-time alert notifications includes a database for receiving in real-time at least one event, a processing engine for analyzing the at least one event with respect to a plurality of stored events, the processing engine also for determining whether the at least one event meets a defined condition, if the at least one event meets the defined condition, determining a prescriptive action and forwarding the prescriptive action to a user.

title: Electronic controlled suspension unit
abstract: PURPOSE:To make spring force adjustment performable so excellent reliability, by installing a spring force adjusting device so as to cause a spring member to act on a direction to be opposed to the attitude variation of a car body detected by a differential transformer type G sensor sensing the body attitude variation. CONSTITUTION:At the time of attitude control at car driving, for example, antinose dive control in time of braking, that whether a time differentiation value of output voltage in response to acceleration in a longitudinal direction outputted from a differential transformer type G sensor 36 detecting acceleration in all directions of a car body is more than the specified value or not is judged by a control unit 34. And, when ''YES'' judgement is the case, a charging solenoid valve 19 and solenoid valves 25 and 26 are all turned to ON for the specified time long, an compressed air out of a reserve tank 15a is fed to a main air spring chamber 3 of each of suspension unit FS1 and FS2 in the front. With this constitution, a front level is made to go up, thus a nose dive phenomenon is prevented from occurring.

title: Area analysis-based mobile terminal authorized access device
abstract: The invention relates to an authorized access device based on area analysis, comprising: the feature extraction device is used for extracting and identifying facial features of the facial imaging area with the largest area in the statistical sorting filtering image so as to obtain a corresponding user number; when the user corresponding to the face imaging area with the largest area in the statistical sorting filtering image is an unauthorized user, setting the corresponding user number as zero; and the display driving device is connected with the touch display screen of the tablet computer and is used for setting the display content of the touch display screen of the tablet computer to be a black screen when the received user number is zero. The authorized access device based on the area analysis has clear logic, and is safe and reliable. The user face with the largest imaging area in front of the tablet computer is identified, so that the black screen display is executed when the user face is identified as an unauthorized user, and the dynamic user management of the tablet computer is realized.

title: A kind of new-energy automobile charging anti-occupy-place system in parking stall

title: Obstacle detection system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an obstacle detection system capable of accurate detection of an obstacle.SOLUTION: The obstacle detection system includes a pattern light projection device that projects pattern light and an obstacle detection device that receives the pattern light to detect an obstacle on the basis of the light. The pattern light projection device includes a line illuminator that projects linear illumination light whose luminance distribution has periodicity in a longitudinal direction. The obstacle detection device is configured to comprise: pattern light reception means that photographs a two-dimensional image containing a two-dimensional picture of the linear illumination light to output two-dimensional image data; light reception pattern extraction means that accepts input of the two-dimensional image data to generate a data row obtainable by projecting the two-dimensional picture of the linear illumination light in a direction different from its longitudinal direction as first-dimensional projection data; light reception pattern analysis means that extracts a characteristic amount representing periodicity of a change in a value of the first-dimensional projection data; and obstacle presence detection means that determines a degree of a break of the periodicity of the received linear illumination light and detects the obstacle on the basis of the characteristic amount.

title: Ultrasonic wave transceiver
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To improve reliability by preventing a liquid from entering an ultrasonic wave transceiver and improving the echo characteristics.  <P>SOLUTION: In an ultrasonic wave transceiver, a terminal member constituted of a resin and a metallic terminal is used as a cap; a back opening of a cylindrical case with a bottom is covered from the outside of the case via a spacer constituted of an elastic material; and the inside of the case is filled with filling by an elastic member to an end face of the back opening of the cap. By fixing the cap and the spacer, liquid is prevented from entering the ultrasonic wave transceiver; and since unwanted vibration transfer to the terminal is also suppressed, object detection can be performed stably, up to a close range.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2010,JPO&INPIT

title: Monitoring device
abstract: To continuously capture an object within an imaging range regardless of the moving speed of the object in automatic tracking photographing by a camera.SOLUTION: A monitoring device 2 that tracks and photographs an object that has entered a monitoring area includes an object detection unit 5 that detects the position of the object, an imaging unit 6 capable of changing the photographing direction, and a control unit 7 including mode switching means 71 and camera control means 73. The camera control means 73 includes at least two control modes corresponding to the moving speed of an object and controls the photographing direction of the imaging unit 6 on the basis of any of the control modes. The mode switching means 71 switches the control modes according to the moving speed obtained from the detection result of the object detection unit 5 by using a first reference from the low speed control mode to the high speed control mode and a second reference from the high speed control mode to the low speed control mode used as switching references. The first reference is set to be easier to switch the control modes than the second reference.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 3

title: Obstacle detection device and vehicle using the same
abstract: An obstacle detection apparatus and a vehicle using the obstacle detection apparatus are provided that can determine whether an obstacle is present on a road or outside a road.   [Solution]   An image sensor 3 that captures a front image, an obstacle detection unit 15 that detects an obstacle in the image, an obstacle ground region setting unit 17 that sets a ground region of the obstacle in the image, and an obstacle in the image The obstacle detection device 5 includes a similarity calculation unit 25 that calculates the similarity between the ground area of an object and the ground area of the image sensor 3. Based on the calculated similarity, it can be determined whether or not the detected obstacle exists on the road.   [Selection] Figure 3

title: Obstacle detection apparatus and obstacle detection method
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an obstacle detection device capable of preventing overflow at the time of coordinate calculation even when an absolute coordinate system is used.   An obstacle detection apparatus includes an obstacle detection ECU that controls the entire apparatus. The obstacle detection ECU 20 is connected to a millimeter wave radar 10, a steering angle sensor 11, a wheel speed sensor 12, and the like. Inside the obstacle detection ECU 20, a host vehicle coordinate acquisition unit 21 that acquires the position coordinates of the host vehicle in the absolute coordinate system, and a fault that acquires the position coordinates of obstacles existing around the host vehicle in the absolute coordinate system. The object coordinate acquisition unit 22, the storage unit 23 for storing the position coordinates of the own vehicle and the position coordinates of the obstacle, and at the predetermined timing, the position coordinate of the own vehicle at the timing is set as the origin of the absolute coordinate system, and the origin is reset. Correspondingly, an origin reset unit 24 that translates the position coordinates of the obstacle stored in the storage unit 23 is constructed.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Moving target detection method under low-illumination condition of radio and television transmission machine room
abstract: The invention discloses a moving target detection method under a low-illumination condition of a radio and television transmission machine room, which comprises the following steps: s1, predicting image illumination based on the deep neural network; s2, denoising the image based on the illumination model prediction; and S3, detecting the moving object based on the dual-scale background model. The method learns the illumination model extraction and the image quality enhancement of the low-illumination image through a deep neural network, and finally carries out background modeling and moving object detection based on double-scale approximate median filtering.

title: Object detection device and objection detection system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To obtain an object detection device which continues to detect an object once detected without losing it. An object detection device transmits and receives a plurality of transmission signals at different timings, and receives and transmits a plurality of transmission signals reflected by an object existing in the surroundings and returned as reception signals. The first distance, which is the distance to the object, is acquired based on the time difference between the transmission timing of the first transmission signal and the reception timing of the first reception signal that is the first transmission signal that is reflected back by the object. An acquisition unit 134 that acquires the relative speed of the object based on the frequency difference between the first transmission signal and the first reception signal, and a second transmission signal that is transmitted next to the first transmission signal based on the first distance and the relative speed. An estimation unit 135 that estimates a second distance that is a distance to the object at the transmission timing of the transmission signal, and an adjustment unit 136 that adjusts the number of waves or the transmission time of the second transmission signal based on the second distance, Provided. title: Method and System For Laser Phase Tracking for Internal Reflection Subtraction in Phase-Encoded Lidar
abstract: A LIDAR system including one or more processors configured to receive a plurality of electrical signals that are respectively associated with (i) a plurality of optical signals provided by a laser and (ii) a plurality of returned optical signals that are responsive to the plurality of optical signals provided by the laser; determine an internal reflection signal; determine a range to an object by adjusting a third electrical signal of the plurality of electrical signals using the internal reflection signal; and operate a vehicle based on the determined range to the object.

title: Methods and apparatus for deep learning network execution pipeline on multi-processor platform
abstract: Methods and systems are disclosed using an execution pipeline on a multi-processor platform for deep learning network execution. In one example, a network workload analyzer receives a workload, analyzes a computation distribution of the workload, and groups the network nodes into groups. A network executor assigns each group to a processing core of the multi-core platform so that the respective processing core handle computation tasks of the received workload for the respective group.

title: Improvements in and relating to radar apparatus
abstract: 1,081,971. Radar. ASSOCIATED ELECTRICAL INDUSTRIES Ltd. May 6, 1957 [May 9, 1966], No. 14412/56. Heading H4D. To reduce the effect of a jamming signal on a radar receiver, the form of the jamming signal is determined, at the receiver, and the receiving circuit parameters are correspondingly adjusted, automatically, to reject the jamming signal. To prevent the simultaneous rejection of the target echo signal, the jamming rejection circuit is provided with a further control, the character of which depends on whether the radar is of the pulse or C.W. type. For a pulse system, the adjustment of the continuously adjustable jamming rejection circuit is discontinued by blanking signals from the receiver, during the time interval when the reflected pulse is expected. Thus, if the jamming signal changes slightly during this interval, only a small jamming signal will pass into the receiver. The required echo, on the other hand, passes freely into the receiver as the jamming rejector circuit is not now following changes in the antenna signals and is adjusted to reject only those existing on the antenna prior to the reception of the echo. For C.W. systems, the rejection circuit may be rendered insensitive to the required reflection frequency by the insertion of a band rejection filter tuned to the required echo frequency. The receiving aerial accepts, separately and simultaneously, two orthogonally polarized signals V and H and the adjustable phase shifters, I and II in the input channels A, B are adjusted by the automatic control signals from phase sensitive detectors I and II and effect the jamming signal rejection. The phase shifters may be reactance valves or goniometers.

title: Feature-based video annotation
abstract: A system and methodology provide for annotating videos with entities and associated probabilities of existence of the entities within video frames. A computer-implemented method identifies an entity from a plurality of entities identifying characteristics of video items. The computer-implemented method selects a set of features correlated with the entity based on a value of a feature of a plurality of features, determines a classifier for the entity using the set of features, and determines an aggregation calibration function for the entity based on the set of features. The computer-implemented method selects a video frame from a video item, where the video frame having associated features, and determines a probability of existence of the entity based on the associated features using the classifier and the aggregation calibration function.

title: Weak and small moving object detection method based on block characterization and variable neighborhood clustering
abstract: The invention discloses a weak and small moving object detection method based on block characterization and variable neighborhood clustering, which is used for solving the technical problem of low detection precision of the existing weak and small moving object detection method. The technical scheme is that on the basis of applying image blocking processing, Haar-like feature vectors of all blocks and moving directions of all blocks of front and rear frames are obtained, and potential motion blocks are extracted. And taking the pixels of the potential motion block centers as clustering centers, calculating the characteristic distance between each pixel in the variable neighborhood and the clustering centers, adaptively determining a distance threshold value by combining with a RANSAC algorithm, and clustering the pixels with the characteristic distance lower than the threshold value to obtain a complete motion target, thereby finally realizing the accurate detection of the weak and small motion targets in the sequence images. According to the method, the moving direction of the blocks of the front frame and the back frame is judged, the variable neighborhood characteristics are applied to the residual blocks for clustering, the complete target form representation of the blocks is obtained, the background noise is suppressed, and the detection precision of accurately capturing the weak and small moving targets is improved.

title: Method and apparatus for attaching a tag to a packet for transmission
abstract: According to certain embodiments, a method by a wireless device is provided for mapping of application data packets onto bearers. The method includes associating at least one tag value with a bearer upon establishment of the bearer. A tag is attached to a packet when passing the packet to a lower layer. The packet is mapped onto the bearer, and a path to transmit the packet is selected.

title: Obstacle Detecting system using of laser, and method thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to an obstacle detecting apparatus and method using a laser, comprising: a laser light source for generating laser light; A camera for irradiating an image in front of the laser light generated by the laser light source and photographing the laser light irradiation image in front of the camera; And an image processing apparatus for processing an image photographed by the camera, wherein the image processing apparatus subtracts another image from any one of the front image and the laser light irradiation image, and the laser light is extracted from the subtracted image. When there is a light spot reflected on the subject, it is determined that there is an obstacle.   When providing the system and method of the present invention as described above, unlike the conventional obstacle detection system, the simple configuration and method, it is possible to detect the obstacle with a high detection rate, lowering the unit cost of the device, in various environments It is possible to provide an apparatus or method for accurately detecting an obstacle.

title: Object-sensing system for vehicle and object-sensing method for vehicle
abstract: Disclosed is an object-sensing system for a vehicle including: a transmitter configured to transmit a transmission beam in a radiation direction according to a control signal; a receiver configured to receive a reception beam in the radiation direction and output a sensing signal; an object sensor configured to sense an object by analyzing the sensing signal; a lane change sensor configured to sense whether a driving lane is changed; and a controller configured to output a control signal for changing the radiation direction to a first direction associated with the sensed object based on the analysis of the sensing signal, and, when a change in the driving lane is sensed, output the control signal for changing the radiation direction to a preset initial direction.

title: Crossing gate for Car
abstract:
The present invention relates to a breaker bar of a breaker installed at the vehicle entrance to control the entry and exit of the vehicle, and a vehicle breaker that can ensure the safety of the vehicle without damaging or destroying the breaker as well as the vehicle in the event of a collision. The body 100 and the rotation shaft 210 installed at one side of the entrance of the drive shaft 200 is built in the body 100 to protrude to the outside of the body 100, and the rotation shaft 210 to selectively block the entrance It is operated by an external force transmitted to the blocking bar 400, the auxiliary arm 600 installed below the blocking bar 400, and the auxiliary arm 600 at the end of the connecting member 300 via a medium. In the vehicle circuit breaker comprising a detection means 500, the detection means 500 is a support bracket 510 installed on the connecting member 300, a wire 520 connected to the end of the auxiliary arm 600, Touch plate 5 connected to the end of wire 520 30, an auxiliary arm elastic member 540 for elastically supporting the touch plate 530, a tension adjusting screw 550 connected to the auxiliary arm elastic member 540 and coupled to the support bracket 510, and a touch plate A limit switch 560 installed in the support bracket 510 to be operated by the 530, a switch adjustment screw 570 for adjusting the position of the limit switch 560, and elastic support for the limit switch 560 It characterized in that the switch made of an elastic member (580).

abstract: The present invention relates to a fixing device for the rockfall prevention wire, a plurality of reinforcing protrusions formed in the upper cover and the lower cover reinforces the rigidity of the cover, the wires are guided by a plurality of induction holes, fixed through the fixing holes Since the bolt and the fixing nut are combined to fold and crimp the wire, it can double the fixing force and the supporting force compared to the method of fixing the wire by the conventional frictional force, and can produce a large amount of products, thereby improving productivity and economically profiting a lot. title: Bridge structure
abstract: The present invention is a main bridge having a first upper plate portion arranged in a circular shape on a plane; Including; a connection bridge disposed in a circular shape on a plane and having a second upper plate portion forming an arc-shaped connection section with the first upper plate portion, wherein the first upper plate portion and the second upper plate portion include at least the connection section It provides a bridge structure in which the displacement between the main bridge and the connecting bridge is absorbed while the relative displacement occurs.

title: Remote control articulated wheel type mountain agricultural robot
abstract: A remote control articulated wheel type mountain agricultural robot is characterized in that a front driving motor bridge and a rear driving motor bridge are respectively provided with respective driving motors and are connected into a whole through a steering waist twisting device, and a visual identification device, an ultrasonic sensing device, a hydraulic pump station, an electronic controller and a front battery are arranged on the front driving motor bridge; the rear driving motor bridge is provided with a rear battery and a hydraulic suspension PTO module; the hydraulic oil cylinder drives the steering waist-twisting device to realize waist-bending steering; and the electronic controller is used for controlling the front driving motor bridge, the rear driving motor bridge and the hydraulic suspension PTO module to work. The robot has the advantages that the robot adopts four-wheel drive, can travel and operate along a preset track according to instructions, realizes steering and all-wheel landing, can transmit road conditions, surrounding images, postures and position information to a main control computer through a remote control device through WIFI (wireless fidelity), is controlled by an operator through the remote control device, is convenient to install and maintain, runs reliably, and is suitable for automatic operation of hilly mountain farmland.

title: Sensor installation device
abstract: The application discloses sensor installation device relates to the autopilot field. title: Foreign matter detection method, security inspection equipment and device with storage function
abstract: The application discloses foreign matter detection method, security check equipment and device with storage function, the method includes: acquiring a millimeter wave signal reflected by a detected object; inputting the reflected millimeter wave signal into a three-dimensional foreign matter recognition network, and acquiring a recognition result of the three-dimensional foreign matter recognition network so as to detect whether the detected object carries foreign matters or not; the three-dimensional foreign matter identification network is a pre-trained three-dimensional convolution neural network. Through the mode, the foreign matter detection method and the foreign matter detection device can achieve fast and accurate foreign matter detection.

title: Determining a driver alert level for a vehicle alert system and method of use
abstract: A driver alert system for a vehicle and a method for operating the driver alert system are disclosed. The driver alert system for the vehicle includes an alert system triggering event detection module for detecting a driver alert system triggering event. The alert system triggering event detection module includes at least one of a steering event detection module for detecting a steering event, a blind spot detection module for detecting a blind spot event, and a front collision warning event detection module for detecting a front collision warning event. The driver alert system for the vehicle includes a driver alert level determination module for determining a driver alert level for the driver alert system triggering event. The driver alert system also includes a driver alert module for alerting the driver of the vehicle using a driver alert device based on the driver alert.

title: Pedestrian red light alarm warning system and corresponding control method
abstract: The invention relates to a pedestrian red light alarm warning system and a corresponding control method. The system includes a video detection device, traffic signal control equipment and alarm warning equipment; the method comprises the following steps: the traffic signal control equipment receives a pedestrian red light signal and pedestrian detection data; the traffic signal control equipment acquires the pedestrian detection data; the traffic signal control equipment transmits an alarm warning signal to the alarm warning equipment; a motor vehicle warning signal lamp displays the warning signal; a pedestrian alarm performs voice alarm. With adoption of the pedestrian red light alarm warning system and the corresponding control method, when the pedestrian runs the red light, the pedestrian alarm performs voice alarm to remind the pedestrian not to run the red light, at the same time, the related motor vehicle is warned by the motor vehicle warning signal lamp to avoid hitting the pedestrian, so that the traffic accidents can be reduced effectively by warning the pedestrians and the motor vehicles, and the smooth flow of the road can be ensured.

title: Charging pile, method and device for recognizing the charging pile
abstract: A charging pile, a method and device for recognizing the charging pile are provided. The charging pile may include: a pile body having a side surface; a power interface provided on the side surface of the pile body to supply power for the autonomous cleaning device; an identification structure arranged on the side surface of the pile body to enable the autonomous cleaning device to recognize a position of the power interface and comprising a plurality of identification elements, each of the plurality of identification elements comprising at least one convex and at least one concave; wherein a retroreflection coefficient of any one of the at least one convex and the at least one concave is smaller than that of the other one of the at least one convex and the at least one concave and sufficient to form a retroreflected light recognizable by the autonomous cleaning device; and wherein at least one of the plurality of identification elements comprises a convex and a concave having mismatched specifications.

title: Image Analysis of Processor Device Features
abstract: A method includes receiving an image of a scan area that includes a feature of interest, receiving and analyzing a design specification for features in the scan area, generating an intensity graph corresponding to a portion of the image, calculating with a processor, slopes of portions of the intensity graph to identify the feature of interest, applying portions of the design specification to the intensity graph to identify peaks that correspond to edges of the feature of interest, applying a logical function to the identified peaks to calculate a distance between the identified peaks, determining whether the calculated distance is within tolerances of the design specification, and outputting an error indication to a display responsive to determining that the calculated distance is not within tolerances of the design specification.

title: Point object detection method based on multiple-linear time difference scanning and expansion sampling
abstract: Provided is a point object detection method based on multiple-linear time difference scanning and expansion sampling. The point object detection method comprises the steps of (1) constructing a double-linear-detector imaging device; (2) performing point object detection through each linear detector in an expansion sampling method; (3) respectively processing Nt groups of image data collected by each the linear detectors to obtain sub-pixel images, performing heterogeneity correction on two sub-pixels processed by the two linear detectors, performing sub pixel matching, and performing calculus of differences to complete background removal; (4) performing threshold filtering on residual images obtained through difference in the step (3), extracting positive and negative point pairs in the residual images through a neighborhood constraint criterion to complete detection and extraction of a moving point object in a scanning process, and forming neighborhood constraint criterion (as specified in the specification) according to imaging time differences of different linear detectors and the target movement speed, wherein delta D represents a distance between a positive area and a negative area, vmin represents the minimum movement speed of the detected object, vmax represents the maximum movement speed of the detected object, and GDS represents ground sampling distances of the linear detectors.

title: Apparatus, method and computer program product for calibrating image transform parameter, and obstacle detection apparatus
abstract: A calibration apparatus includes an obstacle detection unit that detects an obstacle on an arbitrary surface in a three-dimensional space in one of a plurality of images obtained by taking an image pickup subject from a plurality of directions, by using a transform parameter transforming a point on the surface into a point on the surface of other image, and computes position coordinates of the obstacle on each of the images; and a transform parameter adjustment unit that receives a distance data between an image pickup position and the obstacle, and adjusts the transform parameter with the received distance data and position coordinates of the detected obstacle. The obstacle detection unit detects the obstacle by using the transform parameter adjusted by the transform parameter adjustment unit, and computes the position coordinates of the detected obstacle.

title: Coordinate measuring device with automatic target detection
abstract: The present invention relates to a coordinate measuring device comprising a carrier (6) that can automatically rotate about two axes and can be oriented in the direction of a measuring aid (5). On the carrier (6), an optical distance measuring device (4) for measuring the distance to the measuring aid (5), which can be moved together, directly or with optical elements (28, 29, 41, 63) and a light source (23, 33) for irradiating light is arranged, and the light is reflected as a target point (25, 35) when reflected by the measurement assistant (5). And a target detection unit (2, 3) for determining the position (22, 32) as the position of the image of the target point (25, 35) on the position detection sensor (21, 31). The control device (7) rotates the carrier (6) to the measuring aid (5) by rotating around at least two axes (61, 62) of the carrier in response to the fine position (22) and the coarse position (32). ) And the light sources (23, 33) are high intensity light emitting diodes (SLEDs).

title: Generating compressed representation neural networks having high degree of accuracy
abstract: Machine learning based models, for example, neural network models employ large numbers of parameters, from a few million to hundreds of millions or more. A machine learning based model is trained using fewer parameters than specified. An initial parameter vector is initialized, for example, using random number generation based on a seed. During training phase, the parameter vectors are modified in a subspace around the initial vector. The trained model can be stored or transmitted using seed values and the trained parameter vector in the subspace. The neural network model can be uncompressed using the seed values and the trained parameter vector in the subspace. The compressed representation of neural networks may be used for various applications such as generating maps, object recognition in images, processing of sensor data, natural language processing, and others.

title: Method and apparatus for removing shadow from aerial or satellite photograph
abstract: A method for removing a shadow from an aerial or satellite photograph, includes collecting aerial or satellite photographs, by the photographing information collecting unit; extracting buildings at each of the collected aerial or satellite photographs, by the building information extracting unit; and estimating a shadow area cast by the extracted buildings, by the shadow area estimating unit. Further, the method includes restoring a shaded image in the aerial or satellite photograph, which corresponds to the estimated shadow area, by the image restoration unit; and composing the restored image and a residual image of the aerial or satellite photograph except the shadow area, by the image composition unit.

title: Obstacle detection system for vehicle
abstract: (57) [Object] To provide an obstacle detection system for a vehicle capable of recognizing a positional relationship between a vehicle and an obstacle without giving a driver of the vehicle an annoyance. An arithmetic control unit (1) intermittently outputs a transmission signal and causes an ultrasonic vibrator (4) to transmit an ultrasonic pulse signal intermittently. The reflected wave at the obstacle is received by the ultrasonic transducer 4. The arithmetic control unit 1 determines the relative positional relationship between the vehicle and the obstacle based on the relationship between the transmission signal and the output signal of the waveform shaping circuit 6, and outputs the information from the notification unit 7 based on the determining unit. Control means for controlling a warning sound to be issued. The control means causes the notification unit 7 to output a first warning sound for notifying the approach of the obstacle when the obstacle is detected by the determination means, and further, when the obstacle is continuously detected by the determination means for a certain period of time. A second voice message having a content indicating the direction in which the obstacle exists.   Is output from the notification unit 7.

title: System and method for object detection
abstract: The present invention relates to an object detection system and method capable of improving object detection speed in detecting objects of various sizes and positions in an input image.   The object detection system according to the present invention includes: a region of interest extraction and normalization portion for extracting a region of interest of an object detected by using the preliminary information in an input image and normalizing the size of the region of interest; And a pyramid-based object detecting unit for detecting an object by performing size adjustment on the normalized ROI.

title: Do impact absorption chapter
abstract:
The present invention relates to a shock absorbing device installed in the junction of the pedestrian crossing of the motorway, the entrance of the tunnel or underground roadway, the pier, the bridge column, as well as the highway junction. 
     The present invention constitutes a shock absorber having multiple shock absorbing functions and a driving return function. When a collision of a vehicle occurs in front of the shock absorbing device, the impact energy according to the collision is determined by shear stress and frictional force. By absorbing air quickly, the vehicle stops quickly and prevents secondary traffic accidents. It also minimizes the impact to the driver and passengers at the same time as the collision. The present invention provides a shock absorbing device for quickly returning the vehicle to the original driving lane to prevent secondary traffic accidents due to lane departure.

title: Adaptive nulling in monopulse difference antenna diagram to improve the angular resolution at object locations
abstract: The invention relates to an evaluation method, in particular for a driver assistance system of a motor vehicle, for object detection by means of a radar sensor which transmits at least two separate radar beam lobes (Beam1 to Beam4), which cover an angular range to be scanned, synchronously in time and receives their respective target responses as measured values. At least two target responses of the at least two separate radar beam lobes (Beam2, Beam3) of the radar sensor are computationally superimposed in such a way that a synthetic radar beam lobe (BeamS1) with at least one predetermined zero point (N1) arises in the scanned angular range.

title: Dust cleaning apparatus and managing sanitation system using therof
abstract: A dust removal device is disclosed. The dust removal device according to the present invention comprises: a hanger portion, one end of which is fixed to the lower side of the front surface of a housing; a dust removal roller on which a dust attachment tape is wound and which is connected to the housing through a connection line, and is seated and stored in the hanger portion; a roller seating determination means which is configured to determine whether the dust removal roller is seated in the hanger portion, and is provided in the housing; a display unit which displays a usage time of the dust removal roller, is provided with an adjustment button for adjusting a usage time, and is installed on the front surface of the housing; a lamp display unit which includes a proceeding lamp, an abnormality lamp, and a completion lamp, and is installed on the front surface of the housing; a warning sound generating buzzer which is installed in the housing, and outputs warning sound; and a control unit which is provided in the housing, controls the display unit to display a time counted by a timer, and is configured to operate the warning sound generating buzzer.

title: Planning method and system for shortest path
abstract: The application discloses a planning method and a system for shortest path. Establishing an initial grid map according to the environment information, and respectively marking grid points of the grid map as starting points, candidate points and obstacle points; traversing the candidate points to calculate the minimum step from the candidate points to the starting point, thereby forming a minimum step matrix diagram; and selecting one of the candidate points as an end point, and performing recursive traversal through a reverse depth-first algorithm to obtain the shortest path planning from the end point to the starting point. The scheme is based on a grid map global expansion algorithm, not only is the problem that the final path is the shortest distance path solved, but also the time complexity and the space complexity of the operation are greatly reduced.

title: Four-quadrant laser detection automatic gain control circuit
abstract: The invention discloses a four-quadrant laser detection automatic gain control circuit, wherein the output end of a four-quadrant laser detector is connected to the input ends of four gain amplifying circuits, the output ends of the four gain amplifying circuits are connected to the input end of a four-channel high-speed A/D conversion circuit, the output end of the four-channel high-speed A/D conversion circuit is connected to a DDR _ LVDS receiving end of an FPGA circuit, an SPI output interface of the FPGA circuit is connected to an SPI input interface of the four-channel high-precision D/A conversion circuit, the output end of the four-channel high-precision D/A conversion circuit is connected to the input end of a four-channel voltage following circuit, a first channel output end, a second channel output end, a third channel output end and a fourth channel output end of the four-channel voltage following circuit are correspondingly connected to the gain control ends, a first gain reference end, a second gain reference end and, the input end of the bias module is connected to the bias input end of the four-quadrant laser detector, so that the optimal processing of the four-quadrant laser detection signals is realized.

title: Maintaining second link in aggregation operations during primary link rlf
abstract: In accordance with the example embodiments of the invention there is at least a method and apparatus to perform establishing a connection to a network node of a communication network, wherein the connection comprises a primary link connection to a first network node and one or more secondary link connections to nodes of a same or different network; detecting a radio link failure on the primary link connection (420); and based on determining that one or more further conditions are not present (435), maintaining at least one of the one or more secondary link connections. Further, there is performing communicating over a connection with a user equipment, wherein the connection comprises a primary link connection to the user equipment and one or more secondary link connections to nodes of a same or different network; detecting a radio link failure on the primary link connection; and based on determining that one or more further conditions are not present, maintaining at least one of the one or more secondary link connections.

abstract: This application provides a kind of image detecting method, device, electronic equipment and computer readable storage mediums.This method comprises: carrying out object detection process to image to be detected, at least one couple candidate detection result that target object is directed in image to be detected is obtained；Semantic segmentation processing is carried out to image to be detected, obtains the semantic information of each pixel in image to be detected；According to the semantic information of each pixel in each couple candidate detection result and image to be detected, processing is filtered to each couple candidate detection result, obtains final detection result.The application assists the target detection to image to be detected using the semantic information of pixel in image to be detected, can effectively promote the precision of target detection.

title: Vehicle parking assist system with vision-based parking space detection
abstract: A parking assist system of a vehicle includes a camera that, when disposed at the vehicle, has a field of view exterior of the vehicle. An image processor is operable to process image data captured by the camera to detect parking space markers indicative of a parking space and to identify empty or available parking spaces. The image processor includes a parking space detection algorithm that detects parking space markers by (i) extracting low level features from captured image data, (ii) classifying pixels as being part of a parking space line or not part of a parking space line, (iii) performing spatial line fitting to find lines in the captured images and to apply parking space geometry constraints, and (iv) detecting and selecting rectangles in the captured images.
text: Vehicle parking assist system with vision-based parking space detection A parking assist system of a vehicle includes a camera that, when disposed at the vehicle, has a field of view exterior of the vehicle. The image processor includes a parking space detection algorithm that detects parking space markers by (i) extracting low level features from captured image data, (ii) classifying pixels as being part of a parking space line or not part of a parking space line, (iii) performing spatial line fitting to find lines in the captured images and to apply parking space geometry constraints, and (iv) detecting and selecting rectangles in the captured images.

title: Object detection method, information processing device, and storage medium
abstract: An object detection method includes extracting an object candidate by grouping a plurality of characteristic points from two images acquired at different times by a camera; calculating, for each of characteristic points included in the object candidate, an observation flow amount indicating an amount of positional shift on the two images and a virtual road surface flow amount indicating an amount of positional shift on the two images while assuming that the characteristic point is located on a road surface; generating, for each of the characteristic points, a flow difference distribution of the object candidate by calculating a difference between the observation flow amount and the virtual road surface flow amount; and determining whether the object candidate is an object existing on and protruding from the road surface by comparing the flow difference distribution with a plurality of flow difference distribution models generated for predicted inclined states of the surface.

title: Xinjiang cotton region identification method and system based on satellite image data
abstract: The invention discloses a Xinjiang cotton area identification method and system based on satellite image data, belongs to the technical field of remote sensing crop classification identification, and solves the problem of low cotton area identification precision in the prior art. A Xinjiang cotton area identification method based on satellite image data comprises the following steps: satellite image data of a cotton seedling stage, a cotton boll stage and a harvesting stage are obtained, and data preprocessing is respectively carried out on the satellite image data of the cotton seedling stage, the cotton boll stage and the harvesting stage; carrying out normalized vegetation index calculation on the satellite image data after data preprocessing to obtain a normalized vegetation index value NDVI; determining a vegetation area and a non-vegetation area according to the normalized vegetation index value NDVI, determining a crop area according to the spectral reflectance difference between the crop area and the non-crop area in the vegetation area, and determining a cotton planting area according to the spectral reflectance difference between the cotton area and the non-cotton area in the crop area. The identification precision of the cotton area is improved.

title: Controller of travelling body
abstract: PURPOSE:To control a travelling course effectively by indicating optionally the course of a travelling body on a picture display with a course indicating device and allowing the travelling body to travel in an unspecific range through a picture processing device and a control mechanism. CONSTITUTION:A TV camera 4 for getting a travelling body 1 having a mark 3 and circumstances around it is set on a supporting base 5. The video signal attained from the camera 4 is sent to a picture processing device 7 installed in a monitor room through a cable 6, and a processed picture is displayed on a CRT8. If an obstacle 9 is displayed on the CRT8, a light pen 10 is used to indicate a route of the mark 3 so that the travelling body 1 travels while avoiding the obstacle 9. This route 11 is inputted to a control mechanism 12 through the device 7, and the travelling body 1 travels along the route 11 by a control signal outputted from the mechanism 12.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEMS FOR SUPPORTING THE OPERATION OF A ROAD VEHICLE WITH A FLIGHT DROME
abstract: Methods and systems are provided for supporting the operation of a road vehicle with a flying drone. In an exemplary embodiment, a method of assisting the operation of a road vehicle with a flight drone includes flying the drone on a route in front of the road vehicle and detecting an object at a position on the route in front of the road vehicle with the drone. Further, the method includes communicating data associated with the object and / or location to the road vehicle. Likewise, the method includes using the data to operate the road vehicle.

abstract: The invention discloses a 360-degree suspended type quasi-three dimensional (quasi-3D) display device, which comprises a projector, a screen and pyramidal reflecting mirrors, and maps images to different depths in the perpendicular direction of image surfaces by adopting a plurality of parallel mirror surfaces based on the reflecting mirror image principle, wherein, all the reflecting mirrors are made of partially reflecting and partially transmitting materials, so that the images have a very good suspension effect. The display device has the advantage of simple structure, ensures the 360-degree surround view and realizes the large-area quasi-3D display covering dozens of square meters.

title: A kind of high-precision underground navigation map building system and construction method
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of high-precision underground navigation map building system and construction methods, based on including underground GIS-Geographic Information System, essential safe type model building device, and it is laid in system designed by each essential safe type ULTRA-WIDEBAND RADAR UWB anchor node in each tunnel in underground, further design introduces construction method, entire design being capable of rapid build high-precision underground navigation map, and dynamic updates environmental model function, and by GIS-Geographic Information System under modeling result input well, building can be underground autonomous vehicle, the multi-level cartographic model of auxiliary positioning and path planning is provided.

title: Method and system for providing feedback based on driving behavior
abstract: Providing feedback based on driving behavior. At least some of the illustrative embodiments are methods including: determining an indication of driving behavior of a driver, the determining by: identifying the driver in a vehicle; detecting movement of the vehicle; collecting data related to the driving behavior of the driver; and issuing an alert related to the driving behavior of the driver for the purpose of providing feedback related to the driving behavior.

abstract: The invention discloses the SAR image recognition methods learnt based on Analysis On Multi-scale Features and width and devices, area-of-interest is extracted to original SAR image by center coordination method, to image rotation and noise is added to enhance data volume, to image down sampling processing, extract LBP feature, LPQ feature is extracted, by LBP feature vector, X LBP With LPQ feature vector, X LPQ Fusion feature data X is obtained by principal component analytical method dimensionality reduction after cascade m , input fusion feature data X m Image recognition is carried out to width learning network and exports recognition result；Redundancy is reduced while making full use of complementary information by fusion LBP feature and LPQ feature, using width learning network training for promotion speed, reduces time cost；So that recognition effect is more stable, robust, reliable.

title: The rail cars control method of view-based access control model analysis
abstract: The invention belongs to fields of automation technology, more particularly, to a kind of rail cars control method of view-based access control model analysis, characterized by comprising: step 1, locomotive operation positioning；Step 2, signal lamp identification；The detection of other objects such as step 3, people, vehicle, roadblock；The character recognition of step 4, locomotive unit number；Step 5, the judgement of the state of pantograph.The present invention replaces the control means of conventional method to realize the automation of locomotive system using principle of stereoscopic vision, target detection, character recognition scheduling algorithm.Touchless visual control method, both manpower is saved under mine and, it is conducive to Central Control Center again to observe situation under mine in real time and operated control, introduce binocular camera shooting system, traditional two dimension monitoring is expanded into three-dimensional space, the three dimensional local information of target, and the function that cannot be completed using conventional planars camera systems such as operation positioning, target detection and the range estimations of the information realization rail cars are obtained using stereoscopic vision principle of parallax.

title: Method for operating a motor vehicle and motor vehicle
abstract: Method for operating a motor vehicle (1), comprising the steps of: - Acquisition of sensor data relating to a person (6, 11, 16) in the vicinity of the motor vehicle (1) by at least one sensor device (3) of the motor vehicle (1) - Evaluation of the sensor data to determine gesture information from the posture of at least one limb (7, 12) or the head (13, 17) of the person (6, 11, 16) and / or from an eye position (18) of the person (6, 11, 16) and / or depends on a change in posture or eye position (18), and determination or modification of at least one driving intervention for the motor vehicle (1) as a function of the gesture information.

title: Propane fuel supplement system and method
abstract: A propane injection system for supplementing gasoline or diesel engines in vehicles such as automobiles and marine vessels. The invention would also be appropriate for use in turbines and jet engines by providing a secondary fuel source for improved fuel economy. A propane tank is mounted into the vehicle, such as within a cavity within the trunk of an automobile, and is connected to the air intake, exhaust, and turbo charger of the vehicle's stock engine system. A switch is used to activate the injection of propane directly into the engine cycle at two points to increase engine performance. The switch could be incorporated into an existing switch, such as the cruise control of an automobile, and may be canceled by depressing the brake pedal of the vehicle.

title: Obstacle-detecting eyeglasses for the blind.
abstract: This invention relates to obstacle detection glasses for the blind with a frame (1) consisting of infrared transmitters (6, 7), an infrared receiver (4), reflectors (2, 3), a megaphone (5) and a box (8) inside which is a printed circuit (9) containing the infrared transceiver and a vibrator (10) with a battery (14) and switches (11), (12) and (13).The infrared transmitter emits infrared rays at a distance. When these encounter an obstacle the ray is reflected back and detected by the infrared receiver which then activates the megaphone or vibrator to warn that an obstacle exists. The advantage of this invention is that using these glasses the blind wearer knows that there is an obstacle in front of him/her up to face level and in the direction in which he/she is facing and thus the obstacle can be avoided.

title: In-vehicle camera
abstract: In an in-vehicle camera  1,  when an in-vehicle camera body  5  is hooked on a hook portion  33  of a bracket  3  attached to a windshield, a leaf spring  34  presses the in-vehicle camera body  5  against the bracket  3  to fix the in-vehicle camera body to the bracket  3.  Therefore, the in-vehicle camera body  5  can be attached to the windshield without permitting the windshield to come off from the vehicle by the bracket's being strongly pushed such as by a jig, or without permitting the jig to scratch the windshield. Since the in-vehicle camera body is fixed to the bracket  3  by being pressed against the bracket  3  by the leaf spring  34,  there is no problem of causing backlash relative to the bracket  3.
text: In-vehicle camera In an in-vehicle camera 1, when an in-vehicle camera body 5 is hooked on a hook portion 33 of a bracket 3 attached to a windshield, a leaf spring 34 presses the in-vehicle camera body 5 against the bracket 3 to fix the in-vehicle camera body to the bracket 3. Therefore, the in-vehicle camera body 5 can be attached to the windshield without permitting the windshield to come off from the vehicle by the bracket's being strongly pushed such as by a jig, or without permitting the jig to scratch the windshield. Since the in-vehicle camera body is fixed to the bracket 3 by being pressed against the bracket 3 by the leaf spring 34, there is no problem of causing backlash relative to the bracket 3.

title: Image entity extraction method based on Mask R-CNN and GAN
abstract: The invention relates to an image entity extraction method based on Mask R-CNN and GAN, belonging to the technical field of computer vision and object detection. The method replaces a cross entropy loss calculation part in Mask R-CNN with a generation confrontation network GAN, takes a part of the network generating a Mask as a generator, adds a discriminator, classifies the Mask and a true value generated by the generator, and enables the marking of the object pixel by the network to be more in accordance with the true value through confrontation learning so as to obtain a more accurate marking result. According to the method, a Mask R-CNN network is adopted for training, network parameters are obtained and serve as initial parameters, a discriminator is added to replace cross entropy loss in the Mask R-CNN network, and the network parameters are further optimized, so that the network can more accurately mark pixels belonging to an object, and more accurate object detection results are obtained.

title: Imaging apparatus, control method thereof, program, and storage medium
abstract: To obtain a foreign substance information profile by photographing a uniform subject such as a white wall to obtain a foreign substance information profile.   A lens unit is interchangeably mounted, an image pickup device 40 that photoelectrically converts a subject image, a communication unit 15a that communicates with the lens, and a communication unit to acquire information unique to the lens from the lens. And at least a foreign object detection image including an image of a foreign object attached to the surface of the imaging element or the surface of the optical element arranged in front of the imaging element, which is captured by the imaging element. Based on the information specific to the lens acquired by the acquisition unit, the foreign object information generation unit 40 that generates foreign object information, which is information including information on the position and size of the foreign object, and the lens mounted on the main body unit is used for foreign object detection. And a restriction unit 1 that prohibits imaging of a foreign object detection image when it is determined that the lens is inappropriate for imaging an image.

title: Air conditioner wind sensing control method, apparatus, air conditioner and readable storage medium storing program for executing
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of air conditioner wind sense control method, the air conditioner is equipped with infrared sensor, and the air conditioner wind sense control method includes the following steps：In cooling mode, the infrared data that infrared sensor is detected in object detection area is obtained, wherein, the infrared data includes the location information and body temperature of detection object；According to the location information and body temperature, the air conditioner is controlled to perform wind sense strategy.The invention also discloses a kind of device, air conditioner and readable storage medium storing program for executing.The present invention disclosure satisfy that the different blowing feeling demands of different user, and then reduce the blowing feeling experience that user does not feel well in environment indoors, reach the advantageous effect for improving user experience.

title: A kind of tabletting screening plant
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of tabletting screening plant, including blow tank, multiple sieve pores are equally spaced arranged on blow tank, collection powder case is provided with immediately below sieve pore, and the powder that is scattered is fallen into collection powder case under vibrator effect through sieve pore；Right baffle-plate, right shell body and thickness sideboard are provided on blow tank；Thickness sideboard is that the left and right two tilted down is fanned, and is connected and fixed between two fan of left and right by fixing bolt；Thickness sideboard side is provided with height-regulating device, the spacing between adjustable thickness sideboard and blow tank；Foreign object detection sensor is provided on thickness sideboard, foreign object detection sensor is electrically connected with combined aural and visual alarm.The utility model is arranged multiple thickness sideboards and adjusts the spacing of thickness sideboard and blow tank bottom according to the thickness requirement of tablet, realizes the screening of sheet, qualified piece and thin slice；Utilize sieve pore and baffle separation powder and tablet, powder recoverable；Foreign object detection sensor is set, operator can be reminded to clear up in time when tablet is stuck between sideboard and blow tank.

title: Game device
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a game device capable of improving interest corresponding to game conditions.  <P>SOLUTION: In a pusher game device, while an object which falls from a fixed plate can be obtained when the object deposited on the fixed plate is pushed out by a reciprocating movable plate, a sub game capable of specially putting out the plurality of objects onto the fixed plate or the movable plate is provided, and the acquisition possibility of the object is changed by the result of the sub game. The game device is provided with a lottery game execution means 120 for performing a lottery game as the one belonging to the sub game, an object detection means 32a for detecting the object at a prescribed position at the periphery of the fixed plate or the movable plate, a detection number-of-times counting means 130 for counting the number of times of detection by the object detection means 32a, and a probability varying means 140 for varying the probability of generating a winning in the lottery game corresponding to the number of times of the detection.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2007,JPO&INPIT

title: Magnetic object detection device
abstract: A compact magnetic object detection device with high degree of freedom for installation can be provided. The magnetic object detection device includes magnetic field generating mechanism for radiating an alternating magnetic field in a vicinity space; one or a plurality of loop antennas which convert the magnetic field in the vicinity space into an electric signal; determining mechanism for analyzing an existence of magnetostriction and determining an existence of a magnetic object, the magnetostriction generated by the magnetic object existing in the vicinity space based on the electric signal of each of the loop antennas. An installation member, attached with at least the magnetic field generating mechanism and each of the loop antennas, has a pole shape.

title: Frame structure, a device for receiving a communication signal, a device for sending a communication signal, and a method for receiving or sending a communication signal
abstract: A frame structure for network communication, in particular for device-to-device network communication, with high and low priority data. The frame structure includes a control channel related to a first communication resource, a high priority data channel related to a second communication resource, and a low priority data channel related to a third communication resource. The control channel includes a high priority data channel control portion configured to communicate control data that is related to the high priority data channel, and a low priority data channel control portion configured to communicate control data that is related to the low priority data channel.

title: Controlling use of a single multi-vehicle parking space using multiple cameras.
abstract: A method of tracking use of a single multi-vehicle destination location and at least one restricted location within the single multi-vehicle destination location is disclosed. Initially, pluralities of vehicle images captured by a plurality of cameras are received. Next, the times that a first vehicle began use and completed use of the single multi-vehicle destination location are determined. Finally, it is determined that a second vehicle is stopped in the at least one restricted location within the single multi-vehicle destination location.

title: Systems and methods for enhancing machine vision object recognition through accumulated classifications
abstract: The disclosed technology includes systems and methods for enhancing machine vision object recognition based on a plurality of captured images and an accumulation of corresponding classification analysis scores. A method is provided for capturing, with a camera of a mobile computing device, a plurality of images, each image of the plurality of images comprising a first object. The method includes processing, with a classification module comprising a trained neural network processing engine, at least a portion of the plurality of images. The method includes generating, with the classification module and based on the processing, one or more object classification scores associated with the first object. The method includes accumulating, with an accumulating module, the one or more object classification scores. And responsive to a timeout or an accumulated score exceeding a predetermined threshold, the method includes outputting classification information of the first object.
