title: Object detecting device
abstract: An object detection device (1) for detecting a target object in an input image. The apparatus has a memory (11) storing, for each of a plurality of partial areas forming an area subjected to image recognition processing, image recognition directories used to recognize a target object, and in accordance with changes in the appearance of a part of the target object to be captured in the subarea. A sub-point calculation unit (460, S160, S65) calculates, for each of the subregions, a sub-score indicating a degree of similarity between the sub-region and each of at least some of the image-recognition directories. An integrated score calculation unit (500, S170, S175, S190, S192, S194) calculates an integrated score that is a weighted sum of the sub-score numbers for the respective divisions. A determination unit (510, S210) determines, based on the integrated score, whether or not the target object exists in the subject area.

title: Operation video flow identification method based on edge information
abstract: The invention discloses an operation video flow identification method based on edge information, and belongs to the field of artificial intelligence and medical application. The method comprises the following steps: s1: sampling an operation video, extracting an original image, and extracting marginalized information of the original image; s2: processing the original image and the edge information by adopting two parallel convolution neural networks respectively; s3: splicing the outputs of the two convolutional neural networks; s4: classifying and identifying the splicing information by adopting a classifier, and judging the operation video flow stage corresponding to the current original image; s5: and training the convolutional neural network and the classifier by adopting the classified training set operation video, evaluating the identification effect of the operation video flow stage, and determining related parameters. The invention provides an operation video flow identification method based on edge information, which can automatically, accurately and quickly extract and classify operation video images and realize automatic identification of operation flows.

title: Construction site fence panel foot boot
abstract: A construction site fence, or barrier foot plate base unit or foot cover attachment for separating the barrier from traffic and to guide traffic. The base unit attaches a traffic delineator thereon top of the base unit. Also, the base unit may include a pad that is tapered away from the construction site barrier panel foot, creating a gentle sloping ramp, including a combination of the sloping ramp and the delineator mount.

title: A kind of interim energy saving traffic lights for crossroad
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of interim energy saving traffic lights for crossroad, including pedestal, mobile mechanism, solar panels and lamp box；The pedestal lower end is symmetrically arranged with supporting leg, and mobile mechanism is provided on the inside of the supporting leg；The upper end of the pedestal is symmetrically arranged with solar panels, and the lower end of solar panels is hinged with electric telescopic rod A and electric telescopic rod B, and setting is fluted on the inside of the pedestal, and the upper end of scissor type telescopic bar and the lower end of lamp box are hinged；Three groups of LED lights are both provided on four sides of the lamp box.It is of the invention novel in design; it is moved easily; and play the role of protection in the case of not used to lamp box; improve the service life of the device; by the solar panels of setting and wind-driven generator can by solar energy with wind energy transformation into electric energy for electric device power consumption in the device, it is energy saving by new energy; meet setting growth requirement, it is highly practical.

title: Apparatus and methods for identity verification
abstract: A device identity verification comprising a modem telecommunications cell and fingerprint scanner coupled to the modem, wherein the verification device configured to store first fingerprint data in a registration process and being operable, in response to receiving by the modem of a check command through a cellular telecommunications network to perform a verification process where the fingerprint scanner scans a fingerprint for second fingerprint data, the first and second fingerprint data They are compared with each other, and in the case of a match between the first and second fingerprint data, the modem transmits a response signal to a predetermined destination via a telecommunications network.  The device can be used in a telecommunications system network where electronic transactions may be initiated by smart cards and other devices.

title: Method, apparatus, system, service platform and the medium that traffic accident responsibility determines
abstract: The invention discloses method, apparatus, system, service platform and media that a kind of traffic accident responsibility determines, which comprises acquisition and storage real-time traffic video pictures；The position collimation mark for judging whether to have in video traffic accident occurs and each accident side occurs in accident video whole story frame number and accident that start frame occurs is determined；The driving parameters of each accident side each frame in video are obtained, and picture capturing is carried out to each accident side；According to the driving parameters of each accident side each frame in video, the picture that divisions of responsibility result is intercepted with each accident side is corresponded；The divisions of responsibility of each accident side's capturing picture and each accident side is exported as a result, and providing and inquiring using the function of internet device search for party.Present invention reduces the times for arriving result judgement from the accident, reduce the consumption of the time resource of party and the human resources of traffic police, can make accident responsibility judgement in the shortest possible time, as early as possible traffic order back to normal.

title: Method for providing an obstacle-free path using image identification and mobile assistive device
abstract: Disclosed are a method for providing an obstacle-free path using image identification and a mobile assistive device. The method simulates a user's vision and shoots images on spot in real time, runs analyses based on objects in the field of the shot images so as to generate path information, and based on the path information to run analyses on obstacles in the surroundings of the shot spot and the three-dimensional coordinates of the obstacle's spot, then applies an obstacle detection process to work together with the present location and map information in order to generate an obstacle-free path for guiding the user. The disclosure is able to apply the aforementioned technology to provide a path option and fix the path in real time to generate an obstacle-free path, thereby ensuring a safe and convenient moving path.

title: Method and system for figure detection, body part positioning, age estimation and gender identification in picture of network
abstract: The invention provides a method and system for figure detection, body part positioning, age estimation and gender identification in a picture of a network. The method includes the steps that  by means of a face detection technique based on Haar-Like characteristics and Adaboost trainings and a pedestrian detection technique based on HOG characteristics and SVM trainings, a face area and an overall body area are primarily detected, and then a further fusion is carried out so that a face can correspond to a body if the body exists; active appearance models (AAM) are used in the face part so as to position the positions of the five sense organs of the face, and the position of the upper half body, the position of the lower half body, the positions of the left hand and the right hand, and the position of feet are confirmed on a body part according to a human body geometric model; eventually, identification of gender and age is carried out on the face part according to GIST characteristics and an SVM. Therefore, whether a figure exists in the picture of the network and various biological characteristics of the figure can be obtained through calculation.

title: A scanning omnibearing moving object detection radar
abstract: The utility model discloses a scanning omnibearing moving object detection radar and relates to the improved technology of radar detectors. The scanning omnibearing moving object detection radar comprises a holder, a disc-shaped pedestal disposed under the holder, a rotating shaft vertically disposed on the holder, and a detection radar mounted on the rotating shaft. The detection radar comprises a radar housing, a radar fixing body, and detection radar cores. The radar housing is a frame structure with an opening on the left side of the frame. The radar fixing body is disposed on the center of the radar housing. Three detection radar cores are vertically disposed on the front side and the back side of the radar fixing body. The utility model resolves a problem that a conventional detection radar cannot detect surrounding environment omnibearingly from 360 degree.

title: Vehicle-mounted camera case and vehicle-mounted camera device
abstract: A vehicle-mounted camera case mounted on an outer surface of a vehicle to house a camera is provided. The vehicle-mounted camera case includes an air inlet, an air outlet, and a shield. The air inlet takes air into the vehicle-mounted camera case when the vehicle moves forward. The air outlet discharges the air taken in from the air inlet and is formed in at least a lower portion of a rear end face of the vehicle-mounted camera case. The shield protrudes downward from an upper portion of the vehicle-mounted camera case.

title: Deceleration-end geographic point storage system, drive support system, drive support method, and computer program
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide: a deceleration-end geographic point storage system capable of appropriately storing a deceleration-end geographic point at which a vehicle has ended deceleration in a decelerating action, even for a road, such as a road with a lot of traffic volume, where content of the decelerating action tends to be varied due to disturbance; and a drive support system, a drive support method, and a computer program, which enables an appropriate vehicle drive support on the basis of the stored deceleration-end geographic point.SOLUTION: When a decelerating action of a vehicle is performed, a deceleration-end geographic point at which the vehicle has ended deceleration in the decelerating action is identified, and also a variation range in accordance with a road category having the deceleration-end geographic point is set; and if learning-data of other deceleration-end geographic points that are within the variation range set for the present deceleration-end geographic point already exists in learning-data stored in a learning DB 32, the learning data is stored as the learning data for the same deceleration-end geographic point.

title: Drive assistance system and vehicle with drive assistance system
abstract: A drive assistance system includes a primary target setter to designate an object determined based on a current movement locus of the own vehicle to be a primary target probably interfering with the own vehicle; a prediction locus estimation unit to estimate a prediction locus along which the own vehicle moves when primary avoidance control is executed in the own vehicle to avoid the interference with the primary target; and a secondary target setter to designate another object determined based on the prediction locus as a secondary target probably interfering with the own vehicle. The drive assistance system also includes a drive assistance controller to execute drive assistance control in the own vehicle based on a determination of whether the interference by the secondary target can be avoided by executing a secondary avoidance control in the own vehicle to avoid the interference by the secondary target.

title: Method and system of sparse code based object classification with sensor fusion
abstract: A system and method for object classification based upon the fusion of a radar system and a natural imaging device using sparse code representation. The radar system provides a means of detecting the presence of an object within a predetermined path of a vehicle. Detected objects are then fused with the image gathered by the camera and then isolated in an attention window. The attention window is then transformed into a sparse code representation of the object. The sparse code representation is then compared with known sparse code representation of various objects. Each known sparse code representation is given a predetermined variance and subsequent sparse code represented objects falling within said variance will be classified as such. The system and method also includes an associative learning algorithm wherein classified sparse code representations are stored and used to help classifying subsequent sparse code representation.

title: Robot cleaner
abstract: A robot cleaner includes a body to travel on a floor; an obstacle sensing unit to sense an obstacle approaching the body; an auxiliary cleaning unit mounted to a bottom of the body, to be extendable and retractable; and a control unit to control extension or retraction of the auxiliary cleaning unit when the obstacle is sensed. The control unit prevents the auxiliary cleaning unit from extending if a signal is received from a charger.

title: Object detection from image content
abstract: Non-limiting examples of the present disclosure relate to object detection processing of image content that categorically classifies specific objects within image content. Exemplary object detection processing may be utilized to enhance visual search processing including content retrieval and curation, among other technical advantages. An exemplary object detection model is implemented to categorically classify an object. In doing, so an exemplary object detection model may classify objects based on: analysis of specific objects within image content, positioning of the objects within the image content and intent associated with the image content, among other examples. The object detection model generates exemplary categorical classification(s) for specific data objects, which may be propagated to enhance processing efficiency and accuracy during visual search processing. Exemplary categorical classifications may comprise hierarchical classifications of a detected object that can be used to retrieve, curate and surface content that is most contextually relevant to a detected object.

title: Remote tracking directing system based on mobile phone
abstract: The invention discloses a remote tracking directing system based on a mobile phone. According to the system, the following steps are included, namely S1. moving requirement representing, wherein a way searcher tells the moving requirement of the way searcher to a helper; S2. route planning, wherein the helper obtains the current position of the way searcher through intelligent terminal GPS software and plans the moving route of the way searcher according to GPS information; S3. route sending, wherein the helper sends the planned route to the mobile phone of the way searcher through intelligent terminal software; S4. directing, wherein the way searcher starts off according to the route information in the mobile phone; and S5. position tracking, wherein the helper observes whether the route of the way searcher is correct through the intelligent terminal GPS software. The GPS positioning technology is used, the helper can direct the way searcher through the mobile phone of the way searcher, and the way searcher is helped to reach a destination by the shortest route.

title: Method for reading and editing video images in real time
abstract: Several video cameras (11) provide images as analog signals. These are digitized and the digital images stored in a memory (19). The stored images are assembled into a common image, which is converted into an analog signal and fed to a monitor (16). In order to prevent outdated pictures from being displayed, all incoming video pictures are provided with a time stamp during digitizing, which is stored together with the video pictures in the memory (19). Then, when the stored images are composed and converted to an analog signal, the timestamps of the video images are read out and compared with the current time. Only when the time stamp is a maximum of a predetermined period of time, the analog signal is fed to the monitor (16). If the analog signals arriving from the video cameras (11) are first fed to inputs of a video matrix (13) which forwards the analog signals to specific outputs, it is expedient if an identification code (26) is modulated onto the analog signals and after the video matrix (FIG. 13) is demodulated to verify that the correct analog signal has been turned on.

title: Processing circuit and method for time-of-flight image sensor
abstract: A time-of-flight imaging device comprises an image sensor comprising a pixel array including a plurality of pixel circuits, respective ones of the plurality of pixel circuits including a first tap output configured to output a first tap signal, and a second tap output configured to output a second tap signal; and a signal processing circuit including a time-of-flight processing circuit configured to perform at least one logical operation on the first tap signal and the second tap signal based on a mode of the signal processing circuit, and a counter configured to output a digital signal based on an output of the time-of-flight processing circuit.

title: Using Mobile Unit Battery Level And Drain Rate To Control Handover
abstract: A base station determines whether a mobile unit should handoff based upon the battery level and battery drain of the mobile unit battery. The battery level and battery drain are sent from the mobile unit to the base station. The base station uses this information to determine whether the mobile unit should power up or power down LTE-U or WiFi radio connections and services. In addition, this information allows the base station to determine whether the mobile unit should handoff between LTE-L and LTE-U base stations, in order to control power consumption of the mobile unit and prolong the battery life of the mobile unit.

title: Method and apparatus for sub-harmonic contrast imaging
abstract: A non-linear response may be measured by transmitting a first pulse at an amplitude and transmit frequency, using an aperture having N elements. A first response is measured at a sub-harmonic frequency based on the transmit frequency. At least second and third pulses are transmit at the amplitude and transmit frequency. At least second and third responses are measured at the sub-harmonic frequency. The second and third pulses have the same phase with respect to each other and use first and second sub-apertures that have different ones of the N elements. A sum of the elements within the first and second sub-apertures is equal to N. Alternatively, at least two pulses having the same aperture and different amplitudes may be transmit, and the responses measured at the sub-harmonic frequency. The responses are combined to suppress linear echoes and determine a non-linear response.

title: Movable object detection device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a movable object detection device excellent in airtightness between a case and a cover, even in a simple assembly work.SOLUTION: A movable body detection device includes: a magnet 3; a magnetism detection element 2 configured to output an electric signal depending on change of a magnetic filed due to the magnet 3; a case 6 holding the magnet 3 and the magnetism detection element 2; a cover 7 storing the magnet 3 and the magnetism detection element 2 as well as the case 6; and a packing 10a interposed between the case 6 and the cover 7, and configured to make a storage space for the magnet 3 and the magnetism detection element 2 into an airtight state. The cover 7 includes an inclination surface 74 that is an opposite surface to the case 6 and is provided in a direction of separating from the case 6 on an opening end part 75 side of the cover 7 with respect to a contact position with the packing 10a.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

title: Device and method for detecting object buried in ground
abstract: (57) Abstract: The present invention makes it possible to accurately perform reception level correction by an altitude sensor by eliminating the level fluctuation of a reflected wave of a radio wave caused by vibration during scanning of a ground scanner, and burying the radio wave. A display method that allows the correlation between the position of the object on the plane and the position in the depth direction of the ground to be seen in three dimensions, and buried deep in the ground by correcting the attenuation of radio waves in the ground An object of the present invention is to make it easy to identify large buried objects and small buried objects buried shallowly in the ground by accurately displaying them. SOLUTION: An underground object is detected by using a continuous wave high frequency signal and a pulse wave high frequency signal, and a scanning unit is constituted by a continuous wave high frequency signal and a pulse wave high frequency signal aerial and an altitude sensor. In addition, only the scanning unit is moved with respect to the main body of the underground object detection device to detect the underground object, and the detection result is displayed three-dimensionally.

title: Door open-close device for car and method for controlling opening and closing of door for car
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To reliably grasp an obstacle in the vicinity of a door when the door is opened and closed, does not collide with the obstacle, and a passenger exists outside the door opening range. The present invention provides a vehicle door opening and closing device that allows the door to be opened.   The present invention provides a door opening / closing drive unit that opens and closes a door, obstacle detection means for detecting the presence of an obstacle on the side of a vehicle and outputting an obstacle presence signal, and an automatic door opening / closing signal. Controlling the door opening and closing drive unit based on the detection means, a detection unit for detecting a door automatic opening / closing signal from the operation unit and an obstacle presence signal from the obstacle detection unit, and a signal detected by the detection unit The present invention relates to a vehicle door opening and closing device including a control unit. When the operation means is a door handle and receives an automatic door opening / closing signal from the door handle and the obstacle sensor does not detect an obstacle for a predetermined time, the door opening / closing drive unit performs the door opening / closing operation. To control.   [Selection] FIG.

title: Security message transmission method and device
abstract: The present invention relates to a security message transmission method and device, the method comprising: a vehicle-mounted terminal generates a first security message carrying message type information; according to the message type information, adding the priority indication information of a security message to a geographic information layer to obtain a second security message; determining the transmission path of the security message in a medium access control (MAC) layer according to the priority indication information; and transmitting to a receiver the second security message via a physical layer corresponding to the determined transmission path, to enable the receiver to forward the second security message. The present invention forwards the security message to the vehicle-mounted terminal in a predetermined distance range by combining VDC technology with an LTE cellular network.

title: Autonomous home security devices
abstract: An autonomous vehicle such as a drone or a robot is programmed or configured to respond to reports of alarm events or conditions within one or more spaces of a facility. The autonomous vehicle travels to a location of a reported alarm event or condition and captures data using onboard sensors. The autonomous vehicle independently determines whether the reported alarm event or condition is false, or is otherwise properly addressed by resources that are available at the location, using images or other data captured by the onboard sensors. Alternatively, the autonomous vehicle transmits a request for additional resources to be provided at the location, where necessary. A physical map of the location generated based on the images or other data captured by the onboard sensors may be utilized for any purpose, such as to make one or more recommendations of products that are appropriate for use at the facility.

title: Modifying a Simulated Reality Display Based on Object Detection
abstract: Various implementations modify a simulated display based upon object detection. A simulated reality device displays at least some computer-generated graphics on a display. In some implementations, the computer-generated graphics are visually overlaid on a real world scene to provide augmented information. Alternately or additionally, the computer-generated graphics visually replace a user's view of the real world scene to provide a virtual reality. While displaying the computer-generated graphics, the simulated reality device detects a real world object, such as by detecting the real world object is within a predetermined distance of the simulated reality device and/or by detecting the real world object is moving in one or more directions. Upon detecting the real world object, various implementations of the simulated reality device modify the computer-generated graphics to display a notification of the real world object.

title: A kind of runway FOD image detection method and devices
abstract: The present invention relates to based on 2D images object detection and object identification field, more particularly, to a kind of runway FOD image detection method and devices.In view of the problems of the existing technology the present invention, provides a kind of runway FOD image detection method and devices, obtain the Characteristic Distribution that runway itself inherent structure is imaged under a variety of meteorological and illumination conditions by training, establish the troubleshooting model of non-FOD targets；And carried out in FOD detection process on practical runway, carrying out edge detection to local appearance difference first obtains suspected target, and then carrying out quickly non-FOD targets by the troubleshooting model that early period, training obtained excludes, and finally obtains FOD targets and alarms.The present invention calculates separately and counts the identification parameter that four class runway surface objects are different from negative sample image collection by establishing the troubleshooting models of non-FOD targets from four positive sample image collections, realize and detected to the complete FOD of runway monitor area.

title: Photonic-assisted rf spectrum scanner for ultra-wide band receivers
abstract: Disclosed herein is a photonic-assisted radio frequency spectrum scanning device for use in a receiver (100), including: a first optical waveguide arm (110) comprising, in cascade, an input end, a first electro-optical modulator (111), a tunable optical filter (112) and an output end, wherein said first electro-optical modulator (111) is designed to be connected to an antenna to receive therefrom an incoming radio frequency signal; a second optical waveguide arm (120) comprising, in cascade, an input end, a second electro-optical modulator (121), an optical delay line (122) and an output end; a mode-locked laser (101) connected, through an optical splitter (102), to the input ends of the first and second optical waveguide arms (110,120) to supply the latter with optical pulses; an optical hybrid coupler (105) connected to the output ends of the first and second optical waveguide arms (110,120) and operable to combine optical signals received from the latter to produce corresponding output optical signals; and photodetection means (131,132) connected to the optical hybrid coupler (105) to receive the output optical signals and configured to convert the latter into corresponding baseband electrical analog signals. The first electro- optical modulator (111) is configured to modulate the optical pulses supplied by the mode-locked laser (101) by means of the incoming radio frequency signal so as to carry out an optical sampling of the latter, whereby a modulated optical signal is produced, which is indicative of said optical sampling. The tunable optical filter (112) is operable to filter the modulated optical signal so as to select a portion of spectrum of the latter. The second electro-optical modulator (121) is operable to decimate the optical pulses supplied by the mode-locked laser (101). The optical delay line (122) is operable to delay the decimated optical pulses.

abstract: A method of marking an outline of a graphic element on a surface site such as a roof, floor, road, airfield or sports ground or similar large scale surface, comprising: -preparing outline data representing the outline of the graphic element; -feeding the outline data to a robot, wherein the robot marks the outline (11) of the graphic element on the surface site based on the fed outline data.

title: Water-surface profilometer
abstract: A water-surface profilometer comprises a light source 1, a modulator 3 controlled by an oscillator 4 which is capable of amplitude modulating a light beam from the source at a suitable frequency, the beam being directed through a lens 6 onto the water surface 8 to be measured, a proportion of the said transmitted beam being scattered from the body of the water adjacent to the surface and forming a return beam which is directed onto a photodetector 13 to produce an electrical signal. This signal is compared in a phase detector 14 with the oscillator 4 output to produce a phase difference representative of the water-surface distance from the apparatus. <IMAGE>

title: A transparent soundproof frame assembly
abstract: The present invention relates to a transparent soundproof frame assembly of which both lateral surfaces are detachable enabling the sole replacement of a damaged soundproof panel without separating all soundproof panels from both sides of a soundproof wall wherein the soundproof panels are stacked and joined to a post such as an H-beam. The transparent soundproof frame assembly of which the both lateral surfaces are detachable includes a first attaching means preventing the separation of the soundproof panel from one side of a supporting plate and a second attaching means preventing the separation of the soundproof panel from the other side of the supporting plate.

title: Automatic extraction of attributes of an object within a set of digital images
abstract: The invention relates to a method for the recognition of objects of a predefined type among a set of types, within a set of digital images, comprising - detecting (11) an object of this predefined type at within a digital image (10) of said set, and determining (12) an area (13) of said image encompassing the detected object; the generation (14) of a signature (15) by a convolutional neuron network from this zone, allowing unambiguous identification of the object; determination (16) from the signature of a set of attributes (17); storing (18) in a database (19) a record relating to said object associating the signature with the set of attributes; wherein the neural network is trained on a learning set composed of a first set of objects associated with a set of attributes and a second set of objects not associated with a set of attributes,

abstract: A mobile underwater device (10, fig.1) such as a ROV (14, fig.1) and method for surveying a subsea environment the device may include a water proof casing (12, fig.1) to house a CFA imaging device (20a, fig.1), a Colour or generic imaging device (20b, fig.1), a data link and data processor (18, fig.1). title: Device for shipping car and method thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a method and apparatus for processing a transportation request for a transportation vehicle. According to a first aspect of the present invention, there is provided an apparatus for processing a transportation request assigned to a dispatched transport vehicle by region, the apparatus comprising: an inventory information transmitting / receiving unit for transmitting and receiving inventory information including information on the type and quantity of the goods loaded on the transportation vehicle A transportation request management unit for acquiring and managing a transportation order of the article with respect to the transportation request of the transportation requester; an article list providing unit for providing the article list including at least one article included in the transportation order; And a movement path providing unit for providing the movement path information of the transportation vehicle set on the basis of the setting information.

title: Methods and systems for stitching along a predetermined path
abstract: Disclosed is a guiding apparatus for use with a machine to facilitate performing an action along a self-guided path on a substrate. The guiding apparatus may include a support member configured to be attached to at least a portion of the machine. Further, the guiding apparatus may include one or more of lighting units, optical sensors, controllers, and user interface components, mounted on the support member, configured to identify an object, obtain position of the object on a substrate and perform an action along a self-guided path in association with that object on the substrate.

title: equipment for detecting leakage of gas conveying pipeline for exploiting seabed natural gas hydrate
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of gas leakage monitoring, in particular to equipment for detecting leakage of a gas transmission pipeline for exploiting seabed natural gas hydrate, which comprises a seabed track, a deep submerging robot and a hydroacoustic positioning system, wherein the seabed track is fixedly arranged on the seabed gas transmission pipeline and extends along the seabed gas transmission pipeline, a plurality of power supply stations are distributed at equal intervals beside the seabed track, and the deep submerging robot is provided with a power supply unit, a guide module, an obstacle detection module, an obstacle clearing module, a propulsion module, a control module and a methane sensor; the guide module, the obstacle detection module, the obstacle clearing module, the propulsion module, the control module and the methane sensor are all electrically connected with the power supply unit; the equipment can directly position the leakage position of the submarine gas conveying pipeline and can provide image data of the pipeline damage condition for workers.

abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an attachment method of an on-vehicle camera which is inexpensive and which facilitates angle adjustment of an optic axis.SOLUTION: An attachment method of an on-vehicle camera is configured to: assume in advance, plural inclination angles as an inclination angle of a glass surface; assume in advance, plural positioning angles whose number is smaller than a number of the plural inclination angles; identify the inclination angle of the glass surface of a vehicle body to which the on-vehicle camera is attached; supply the on-vehicle camera; select at least one positioning angle from the assumed plural positioning angles; then prepare a positioning member having a prepared positioning angle; then fix the on-vehicle camera to the glass surface through the selected positioning member.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 8

title: Early warning and collision avoidance
abstract: Among other things, equipment is located at an intersection of a transportation network. The equipment includes an input to receive data from a sensor oriented to monitor ground transportation entities at or near the intersection. A wireless communication device sends to a device of one of the ground transportation entities, a warning about a dangerous situation at or near the intersection, there is a processor and a storage for instructions executable by the processor to perform actions including the following. A machine learning mode! is stored that can predict behavior of ground transportation entities at or near the intersection at a current time. The machine learning model is based on training data about previous motion and related behavior of ground transportation entities at or near the intersection. Current motion data received from the sensor about ground transportation entities at or near the intersection is applied to the machine learning model to predict imminent behaviors of the ground transportation entities. An imminent dangerous situation for one or more of the ground transportation entities at or near the intersection is inferred from the predicted imminent behaviors. The wireless communication device sends the warning about the dangerous situation to the device of one of the ground transportation entities.

title: Controlling use of parking spaces using cameras and smart sensors
abstract: Tracking use of a destination location is disclosed. Based on a first vehicle image showing a first vehicle at a first location and on the first location of the first vehicle received based on a sensor located within the first vehicle, it is determined that the first vehicle is occupying the destination location at the first time. Next, based on a second vehicle image showing the first vehicle at a second location and on the second location of the first vehicle received based on the sensor located within the first vehicle, it is determined that the first vehicle has left the destination location at the second time. Finally, it is indicated that the first vehicle began use of the destination location at the first time and that the first vehicle completed use of the destination location at the second time.

title: Hand-held reflection electric observing-aiming and object positioning integrated apparatus
abstract: The invention brings forward a hand-held reflection electric observing-aiming and object positioning integrated apparatus. On the basis that an original reflection electric object detection module can only detect a head-on observing-aiming photoelectric/optical object, a matching design improvement is made on a light beam shaping device and a laser echo optical receiving assembly of an original phase laser distance measurement module, and conventional circular distance measurement light spots are designed to be rectangular distance measurement light spots so that distance measurement of a searched object can be realized; a global geological positioning assembly and a magnetic compass assembly are compounded so that the searched object is positioned; and an integrated information processing module is compounded so that solution of equipment local point position information, object position information and position information of the object relative to the center of a view field and OSD superposition of the information on a scene image are realized, and an object position auxiliary observation module and a binocular OLED display module are compounded so that scene information and object positioning orientation information are displayed and the searched object is positioned.

title: Object detecting system and method thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to an object sensing system and method, comprising: an ultrasonic sensor for generating an ultrasonic signal and receiving an ultrasonic signal reflected by an object; It provides a standard noise reference value for determining whether the ultrasonic signal received from the ultrasonic sensor is noise, and a warning reference value for determining whether the ultrasonic signal is an object, and in case of rain, it provides a rain noise reference value changed from the standard noise reference value. Sensor control unit; In rainy weather, it is determined whether the noise of the ultrasonic signal received from the ultrasonic sensor by applying the noise reference value for the rain, and includes an object determination unit for determining whether the ultrasonic signal exceeding the warning reference value is noise or objects caused by rain. As a result, it is possible to prevent the occurrence of an alarm due to the erroneous detection of raindrops, so that the discomfort of the driver can be eliminated and the dissatisfaction of the driver can be solved.

title: Construction establishment method and the structure that use small size steel pipe propulsion
abstract:
The present invention is to provide a cement structure therein after pushing and installing a variety of small pipes (Pipe) crossing the railroad or road without breaking, 
     More specifically, by excavating through the propulsion and pushing a variety of small steel pipes and then filling during the promotion of small steel pipes to prevent leakage from the inside and to remove soil from the inside of the basement or various electrical or drainage facilities, etc. It relates to a structure installation method using a small steel pipe propulsion so as to penetrate the facility and its structure. 
      This invention penetrates the ground (4) while filling the filler (5) to the outside of the propulsion steel pipe 10 while driving the propeller 20 to propel the small propulsion steel pipe 10 from the back of the excavator (30). Protruding portion 40 and the guide groove 41 is coupled to the steel pipe propulsion step to be integrally coupled to ensure water tightness; Removing soil of the ground 4 while installing the H-beam 42 inside the propulsion steel pipe 10 and installing a cement structure 43 therein; By filling the cement mortar in the filling space 45 formed between the cement structure 43 and the propulsion steel pipe 10, it is characterized in that it is used as an underground walkway or an electrical or drainage facility.

title: Reflector road sign
abstract: A reflector road sign includes a reflector body received within a casing, the reflector body being made of a tempered glass and having the lower half part covered with a reflector paper, the casing having a corrugated inside surface covered with a layer of bonding resin for binding the reflector body and a plurality of recesses spaced around the outside wall thereof for binding to the mounting hole on the road by a bonding resin.

title: Reflection type road divider
abstract: PURPOSE:To eliminate unpleasant feeling during running period due to no unevenness, and secure exact visual confirmation by a method in which a transparent part of glass, etc., is set on the upper opening of a box body and a pair of light reflectors are vertically set in a mutually facing manner in the box body. CONSTITUTION:A rectangular box consists of a bottom wall 10a, vertical side walls 10, an upper opening formed by recessed tiers 10c and the side walls 10, a flange 10b extended from the top to outside of the side walls 10, and a pair of three ribs 10d connecting the side walls 10 with the flange 10b. Plate reflectors 12a and 12b consisting of light-reflecting prism groups are vertically fixed to the inside of the side walls 10 facing in the lengthwise direction of the box 1 and a transparent glass plate 11 is attached to the tiered portion 10c on a level with the tops of the walls 10. Light can thus be reflected to the reflector 12b of the adjacent divider R as it runs to clearly display the line.

title: System for guidance and navigation in a building
abstract: A system for guidance and navigation in a building. For example, the system may determine a route for egress or rescue of one or more people from a building with a hazardous condition. The system may process the route into waypoints and segments developed within a set of constraint rules. Semantic information about the building may be associated with the waypoints and/or segments. The waypoints and segments may be processed into navigation commands. The navigation commands may be formed in natural language from sentence templates. The system may additionally have 3D beacon audio to assist in guidance and navigation of the one or more people in the building.

title: A kind of big data intellectualized analysis platform of security fields towards the society
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of big data intellectualized analysis platforms of security fields towards the society, it include: relational network analysis module, for according to multi-source data, construct one or more thematic libraries, based on thematic library, tectonic network topological structure, and obtain the label of each node in the network topology structure, and the scene task according to setting, the excavation of key node and/or community structure is carried out in network topology structure；Behavioural analysis module in track according to track data, generates different types of locus model, and be based on all kinds of locus models, carries out trajectory analysis for obtaining different types of track data；Video intelligent analysis module obtains the Analysis On Multi-scale Features of pedestrian for the pedestrian detection and tracing algorithm according to setting, according to Analysis On Multi-scale Features, semantic feature, gait feature and the visual signature of pedestrian is extracted, to carry out identification search to pedestrian.The present invention can effectively improve pre-alerting ability, early warning level in advance, provide strong technical support for emergency response.

title: Image processing apparatus and rear view camera system employing the same
abstract: An image processing apparatus capable of easily recognizing a situation in a depth direction behind a vehicle without causing a passenger to feel uncomfortable.   When an obstacle detecting means 9 mounted on a vehicle (A) detects an obstacle within a predetermined distance from the vehicle (A), an image processing unit 3 is applied to an image picked up by a rear view camera 1. Performs a bird's-eye view conversion process and displays a bird's-eye view image on the monitor 5. On the other hand, when the obstacle detection means 9 does not detect an obstacle within a predetermined distance from the vehicle (A), a rear view image is displayed on the monitor 5. .   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Mobile gas station
abstract: The utility model discloses a mobile gas station, which is formed by a gas room and an office equipment room; one dual-oil dual-gun tax-control fuel dispenser and two manual fuel dispensers are arranged in the gas room; a gear pump, a waist wheel flowmeter and a filter are arranged at one side of the office equipment room; a first valve is mounted at the outer wall of the office equipment room and is connected with the gear pump; the gear pump is connected with an oil conveying pipeline by a second valve, and is connected with the oil conveying pipeline by a third valve, the filter and the waist wheel flowmeter, which are sequentially arranged; the oil conveying pipeline penetrates through the office equipment room to be respectively connected with a first oil tank interface and a second oil tank interface by a first branch and a second branch; the first branch is provided with a sixth valve; the second branch is provided with a fourth valve; the first oil tank interface is connected with one oil path of the dual-oil dual-gun tax-control fuel dispenser by a seventh valve; and the second oil tank interface is connected with the other oil path of the dual-oil dual-gun tax-control fuel dispenser by a fifth valve. The gas station can be used as a business gas station, and can also be used for managing the daily fuel for the fleet management in an enterprise.

title: Method and device for detecting road dividing object
abstract: Disclosed is a method of detecting at least one road dividing object. The method comprises a first obtainment step of obtaining an image including a road region; a region detection step of detecting at least one road dividing object region in the road region of the image; a feature point detection step of detecting plural feature points of the at least one road dividing object in the at least one road dividing object region; and a determination step of determining, based on the plural feature points of the at least one road dividing object in the at least one road dividing object region, the at least one road dividing object.

title: Display device sensing fingerprint
abstract: A fingerprint recognition type display device comprises: a display panel; a fingerprint sensing module coupled to the display panel; a battery providing power for driving the display panel and the fingerprint sensing module; and a circuit board including a power management circuit unit to which the power of the battery is applied. The power management circuit unit includes a switching regulator and a first linear regulator regulating battery power. In addition, the fingerprint sensing module includes a second linear regulator and a fingerprint recognition sensor. An output voltage output from the switching regulator of the power management circuit unit is input to the second linear regulator. The fingerprint recognition sensor is driven by the output voltage output from the second linear regulator and the fingerprint recognition sensor senses the fingerprint of a user. The fingerprint recognition type display device can perform a fingerprint recognition function for the user more reliably.

title: Transportation and freight capacity units
abstract: Implementations of a computer implemented method and system to transform transportation and freight capacity units with two waypoints or a destination waypoint or a series sequence of waypoints into multi-modal objects which are tradable as commodities such as wheat, oil, corn, stocks, foreign exchange, fixed income or other forward or securitized markets. The present disclosed invention relates to combining the concepts of objected oriented programming and navigation systems and social networking, price-time priorities queues, replacement costs, termination valuations, financial markets, commodity structuring transformation and transportation and freight as a fungible asset class or tradable market.

title: Charging system and charging method, computer storage medium
abstract: A charging method applied to a first electronic device, comprising: acquiring a first image by means of an image acquisition unit (S11); analysing the first image, and generating a first analysis result (S12); when the analysis result indicates that the first image includes at least a part of a second electronic device, calculating a relative position and attitude relationship between the first electronic device and the second electronic device (S13); according to the relative position and attitude relationship, controlling a moving unit of the first electronic device to move relative to the second electronic device, so as to enable the first electronic device to be accurately located relative to the second electronic device (S14); and controlling the first electronic device to interact with the second electronic device, so as to enable the second electronic device to charge the first electronic device (S15). Also disclosed are a charging system and a computer storage medium.

title: Contact lenses
abstract: Apparatus, systems and methods for facilitating iris-scanning contact lenses and/or biometric identification employing iris scanning contact lenses are provided. In one implementation, the contact lens can include: a transparent substrate formed to cover at least a portion of an iris of an eye; and a circuit. The circuit can include: one or more light sensors disposed on or within the transparent substrate and that detects light filtered through the iris and incident on the one or more light sensors; readout circuitry, operably coupled to the one or more light sensors, that outputs information indicative of the light filtered through the iris and incident on the one or more light sensors; and a power component that supplies power to the readout circuitry. In various implementations, the contact lens can be employed in systems and/or methods associated with authentication and identification.

title: A kind of video detecting method and server
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a kind of video detecting method and servers.The method includes：Obtain the first video data to be detected；Processing is decoded to first video data, obtains the audio data of first video data；Analysis identifies the audio data, obtains the corresponding audio fingerprint data of the audio data；Inquire audio-frequency fingerprint library；When in the audio-frequency fingerprint library including the audio fingerprint data, the corresponding video tab of the audio data and time parameter are obtained；Video copy library is inquired, obtains the first picture that the video tab is corresponding, meets the time parameter, and extract the second picture for meeting the time parameter in first video data；The fisrt feature parameter of first picture and the second feature parameter of the second picture are extracted respectively；The fisrt feature parameter and the second feature parameter are compared, determines whether first video data and the video in video copy library are consistent based on comparison result.

title: Work machine
abstract:
PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To suppress contact of a lifted load with an obstacle caused by swinging of the lifted load. 
     SOLUTION: A work machine (1) provided with a lifting device (7) that lifts a lifted load (100) via a traction member (43) comprises: a warning device (77) that issues a warning in a prescribed warming mode; an obstacle detection device (51) that detects location of an obstacle around the lifted load; and a controller (70) that controls the warning device. The controller includes a shape estimation unit (71a) that determines a shape of the lifted load, and a swinging range determination unit (74) that determines the swinging range of the lifted load, and operates the warning device when the obstacle detection device detects location of the obstacle within the swinging range.

title: Radar device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To eliminate object detection errors. SOLUTION: Oscillated waves from an oscillation antenna 3 are reflected by multiple reflective objects and received by a receiving antenna 4, and a mixed signal is generated by a mixing means 7. An FFT means 13 obtains multiple frequency components by Fourier transformation of a mixing signal for every preset cycle. An extraction means 14 discriminates frequency components and reference levels by levels and extracts frequencies corresponding to reflective objects. A constant operation means 15 obtains a reliability constant corresponding to multiple operation conditions individually to the frequency of reflective objects, and accumulates reliability constants for each frequency.  A selection means 16 compares cumulative values of reliability constants of the frequency of each reflective object with predetermined reference cumulative values and selects frequencies whose cumulative values are higher than the reference cumulative values. A position operation means 17 computes a vehicle carrying an object of detection and a radar and a relative distance and a relative speed from the selected frequencies.

A position operation means 17 computes a vehicle carrying an object of detection and a radar and a relative distance and a relative speed from the selected frequencies.

title: A plurality of monitor selection transfer systems of mobile device data
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide a plurality of mobile device data that can easily and quickly display an image of a mobile device when a mobile device is brought into the vehicle and the mobile device is brought into the vehicle. "Monitor selective transfer system".   When a mobile device carried by a user is brought into the vehicle, the device communicates with a monitor display device that displays images on a plurality of monitors provided in the vehicle, and one of the plurality of monitors is connected to the user. title: Cell broadcast updates to application software
abstract: A system for providing information services via broadcast messages to mobile stations and other devices. The broadcast messages are encrypted prior to being communicated to devices within a geographic area. A client application retrieves cryptographic keys associated with the information services to which a customer is subscribed. When the mobile station or device receives encrypted broadcast messages, the client application determines if it has the cryptographic key to decrypt the message. If so, the information contained in the message is displayed. If not, then the message is ignored by the mobile station. The information may be used to provide or retrieve near real time information from devices to provide such services as traffic alters, fleet management, etc.

title: Vehicle vision system with targetless camera calibration
abstract: A camera calibration system for a vehicle includes a camera disposed at the vehicle and an image processor operable to process image data captured by the camera. The camera calibration system generates camera calibration parameters at least in part by iteratively refining calibration parameters starting from at least one of (i) an initial estimation and (ii) an intrinsic parameter of the camera. The camera calibration system uses a kinematic model of vehicle motion derived at least in part from image processing of multiple frames of captured image data. Responsive to such image processing, the camera calibration system extracts and matches features determined in multiple frames of captured image data. Responsive to image processing during movement of the vehicle along an arbitrary path, and responsive to generation of camera calibration parameters, the camera calibration system calibrates the camera as the vehicle navigates the arbitrary path.

title: Fork-lift truck
abstract: A fork-lift truck 1, 1', comprising a load carrier 2, an optical detector 3, 3' having a first field of view and arranged to provide an output, wherein the optical detector 3, 3' is movable together with the load carrier 2, an optical analysing unit 4, 4' arranged to analyse the output from said optical detector 3, 3'. The optical analysing unit 4, 4' is arranged to analyse the output from the optical detector 3, 3' so as to identify a first three-dimensional object, said first three-dimensional object being the load carrier 2, and a second three-dimensional object based on the output from the optical detector 3, 3', and to determine the three-dimensional position of the identified load carrier 2 relative to the identified second three-dimensional object. Further a method for operating a fork-lift truck, a method for modifying a fork-lift truck and a computer program product.

title: Roof inspection systems and methods of use
abstract: Devices, systems, and methods for inspecting and objectively analyzing the condition of a roof are presented. A vehicle adapted for traversing and inspecting an irregular terrain includes a chassis having a bottom surface that defines a higher ground clearance at an intermediate location, thereby keeping the center of mass low when crossing roof peaks. In another embodiment, the drive tracks include a partially collapsible treads made of resilient foam. A system for inspecting a roof includes a lift system and a remote computer for analyzing data. Vehicles and systems may gather and analyze data, and generate revenue by providing data, analysis, and reports for a fee to interested parties.

title: Data-array processing system
abstract: A data-array processing system with a memory for storing an array of data-elements, a processor to perform a series of operations on data elements stored in a first section (832) of the memory and to copy data from the first section to a second section (830) of the memory after each series of operations, and output hardware, such a video processor and monitor, for outputting the data-elements in the second section. In order to reduce unnecessary copying of data-elements from the first section to the second section, the processor sets flags indicative of each of the of portions (e.g. P, Q, R, S) of the first section which is modified during that processing operation, and checks the flags during the subsequent copying operation to copy only the flagged portions.

title: Noise prevention structure of acoustic sensor equipment and its manufacturing method
abstract:
The present invention relates to a structure of the acoustic sensor equipment mainly used in water and a manufacturing method thereof.   The structure according to the present invention comprises a sensor housing equipped with an acoustic sensor, a polyurethane molding surrounding the sensor housing, and a polyurethane tube between the sensor housing and the polyurethane molding.   
    The method according to the present invention comprises forming a groove in a corresponding portion of the sensor housing, inserting a polyurethane / tube into the groove, and injection molding to form a polyurethane molding covering the polyurethane tube.

title: Systems and methods of feature correspondence analysis
abstract: A method and system, the method including receiving semantic descriptions of features of an asset extracted from a first set of images; receiving a model of the asset, the model constructed based on a second set of a plurality images of the asset; receiving, based on an optical flow-based motion estimation, an indication of a motion for the features in the first set of images; determining a set of candidate regions of interest for the asset; determining a region of interest in the first set of images; iteratively determining a matching of features in the set of candidate regions of interest and the determined region of interest in the first set of images to generate a record of matches in features between two images in the first set of images; and displaying a visualization of the matches in features between two images in the first set of images.

title: Machine and method for the determination of nervous-system-generator parameters using lead fields
abstract: The invention is an improved machine and method for converting recordings of electric potentials into nervous-system-generator parameters that can be used by clinicians and researchers to evaluate generators of central or peripheral nervous system activity. The machine and method utilize as inputs physiological recordings made at sites remote from the generator, data on shapes of boundaries, locations of recording points and electrical conductivity of volumes to be analyzed. The invention teaches how to compute the weight function values, corresponding to electric potentials and/or electric fields across a pair of electrodes due to unit source current by the use of the Lead Field Analysis in a boundary element method.

abstract: A method of obtaining an acoustic echo signal by a sonar apparatus (receiver array 100, 101). The method comprises measuring phases and magnitudes of at least one predetermined acoustic calibration signal received from a plurality of respective directions 109 by the sonar apparatus; determining a complex directional response from the measured phases and magnitudes; receiving an acoustic echo signal; compensating the received acoustic echo signal for the determined complex directional response.

abstract: Communication network architectures, systems and methods for supporting a network of mobile nodes. As a non-limiting example, various aspects of this disclosure provide communication network architectures, systems, and methods for supporting a dynamically configurable communication network comprising a complex array of both static and moving communication nodes (e.g., the Internet of moving things). title: Crane obstacle detection device
abstract: The crane obstacle detection device comprises a shell. An X-axis lens driven by an X-axis servo motor to rotate is arranged in the shell. The shell is provided with a Y-axis lens driven by a Y-axis servo motor to rotate. The two lenses are arranged in mirror opposition. The front of the Y-axis lens is provided with a transmitting lens, and the lower part of the Y-axis lens is provided with a receiving lens and a laser receiver. The light path of the transmitting end of the laser transmitter faces the X-axis lens. A deflection lens can be arranged between the laser emitter and the X-axis lens. The corresponding rotation of the lens can scan the front set area, so that effective front obstacle information can be obtained, and the problems of frequent collision, scratch, tipping and other accidents in the automatic operation of the crane can be solved.

title: Digital electric sign board for road condition sign of accident area
text: Digital electric sign board for road condition sign of accident area The present invention checks the pavement road surface temperature and humidity conditions of the curve road or steep slope road (hereinafter referred to as "accident area") zone, which is a high risk of traffic accidents, and determines the road surface condition based on the road surface temperature. Based on the signal, the recommended driving speed can be determined, and the road conditions and recommended driving speeds are displayed in real time to the driver who wants to proceed in this section, and the situation can be notified to the traffic situation room using the track. One accident-related area is a digital signage for road surface indication. In particular, a digital sign board is installed on each side of the ramp in the accident frequent area section; A temperature sensor and a humidity sensor installed in the pavement layer at intervals of the accident occurrence area at several intervals; Collecting a signal input from the temperature and humidity sensor, and compares the detected detection signal with a predetermined reference data value to determine and deliver the determined signal to the digital scoreboard and traffic information integrated situation room Characterized in that it comprises an information collection device integrally.

title: Method and device for displaying parameters of the trajectory of at least one moving object
abstract: In Fig. (1) it is possible to see a simplified drawing of a football pitch (1) and two goals (2 and 3) which are located at opposite ends of the playing field (1). The device for carrying out the method for displaying the parameters of the trajectory of at least one moving object comprises two sets (6, 7) of radar sensors (5), whereby one of said set of sensors is respectively arranged in the region of one of the goals (2,3) of the playing field (1). The sensors (5) of each respective set (6, 7) are connected to a data concentrator (8) which combines signals received from individual sensors to form one or several signals before said signals are forwarded to a computer (9). The computer (9) then forwards the processed signals in the form of video signals to a video mixing desk or directly to a large display (10) such as those which are often installed in stadiums.

title: Target detection method and device
abstract: The application provides a target detection method and a device thereof, wherein the method comprises the following steps: determining the scaling coefficient of each block in the image to be detected by using a pre-trained scale regression network; scaling each block according to the scaling coefficient; respectively carrying out target detection on each zoomed block; and performing fusion output on the targets in the blocks to obtain a target detection result in the image to be detected. The method can reduce the complexity and the training difficulty of the target detection model and improve the accuracy of target detection.

title: Headlight control device for electric automobile
abstract: An electric vehicle head improved by automatically adjusting the brightness of a headlight according to the brightness of a driving road and the driving condition of a vehicle, so that energy saving driving can be achieved while keeping battery power consumption low. Provide a light control device.   A headlight control device for an electric vehicle that travels using a battery as a power source. The optical sensor detects the brightness of a road during traveling, an optical sensor such as an in-vehicle camera, and the like. A control unit 4 that generates a brightness information signal based on the information and a headlight control circuit 3 that controls the light intensity of the headlight 1 in response to the brightness information signal. In response, the brightness of the headlight 1 is controlled in real time. In addition, the headlights are automatically dimmed and controlled based on the traffic congestion information acquired by the navigation 7 in the driving situation of the noronoro driving. title: Object detection method and apparatus
abstract: Disclosed are an object detection method and apparatus. The object detection apparatus comprises: a heterogeneous processor and a memory. The heterogeneous processor comprises: a processing unit and a programmable logic unit. The programmable logic unit is used for receiving an image to be detected from an image acquisition device, performing feature extraction on the image to be detected, and writing extracted features into the memory. The processing unit is used for reading the features from the memory, detecting a target object according to the features, and outputting a detection result to the programmable logic unit. The programmable logic unit is further used for receiving the detection result, and generating and outputting prompt information according to the detection result.

title: Method and device for marking value labels
abstract: The invention relates to a method for the automatic verification of the authenticity of a postage indicium that has a value indication and that has a luminescent area, whereby the postage indicium has been applied onto the surface of a mailpiece, and whereby the surface of the mailpiece is illuminated with light having wavelengths from a spectral region, then a first image of the surface of the mailpiece is taken with a camera system and this first image is evaluated regarding the place of the postage indicia applied onto the surface of the mailpiece, subsequently the postage indicium is irradiated with light having wavelengths from a second spectral region, whereby this light is capable of exciting the luminescence of the luminescent printing ink.

title: Leveraging temporal, contextual and ordering constraints for recognizing complex activities in video
abstract: A system (and a method) are disclosed for recognizing and representing activities in a video sequence. The system includes an activity dynamic Bayesian network (ADBN), an object/action dictionary, an activity inference engine and a state output unit. The activity dynamic Bayesian network encodes the prior information of a selected activity domain. The prior information of the selected activity domain describes the ordering, temporal constraints and contextual cues among the expected actions. The object/action dictionary detects activities in each frame of the input video stream, represents the activities hierarchically, and generates an estimated observation probability for each detected action. The activity inference engine estimates a likely activity state for each frame based on the evidence provided by the object/action dictionary and the ADBN. The state output unit outputs the likely activity state generated by the activity inference engine.

title: A kind of road guard based on urban construction
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of road guards based on urban construction, including column, upper beam, lower beam and multiple vertical spacing side by side, the pillar between upper beam and lower beam is set, the upper beam and lower beam are arranged in parallel, and upper beam and lower beam both ends are fixedly connected with column, the column installation is on the ground.It is arranged with the anti-collision sleeve that can be rotated around pillar axes on the pillar, is provided with several rack gears extended longitudinally on the anti-collision sleeve surface, the rack gear intermeshing on the anti-collision sleeve that adjacent struts are arranged；The anti-collision sleeve is the rubber anti-collision set or silica gel anti-collision sleeve that surface is provided with coarse particles.The present invention can effectively absorb the impact kinetic energy of vehicle and guardrail, and stop vehicle rapidly, effectively mitigate and lose caused by traffic accident.

title: Document processing device and program
abstract:
PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To increase the number of contents of documents which can be exhibited, relative to a method for controlling so as to exhibit or so as not to exhibit a document as a unit. 
     SOLUTION: A document division part 102 divides an input document into partial structures such as a page, a chapter, and a paragraph. A content analysis part 104 divides for every partial structure, the partial structure into content elements such as words or images, and identifies a type of each content element, the type is a person name, a general noun or the like. A determination part 106 refers to a secret rule management part 108 for determining whether or not the types of the respective content elements correspond to a secret object, and if one or more content elements being a secret object are present in the partial structure, determines that the partial structure cannot be exhibited. A UI part 110 presents for every partial structure, a screen which clearly indicates the content of the partial structure, a determination result of whether or not exhibition is permitted, the content element being the secret object included in the partial structure, and a determination result of whether or not the partial structure can be exhibited, to a user. The user views the screen and corrects the determination result of whether or not the partial structure can be exhibited according to necessity.

title: Scanning range sensor
abstract:
A scanning range sensor includes an outer cover having a transparent window that is
horizontally annular, a vertical type cylindrical rotary member inside the outer cover, a light
receiving window with an optical lens of the cylindrical rotary member, a light projector between
the outer cover and the cylindrical rotary member, an optical system for leading light
from the light projector along the direction of the rotational axis of the cylindrical rotary
member by the mirrors on the inner surface of the cylindrical rotary member, a photodetector
that within the interior of the cylindrical rotary member is fixed and arranged separately from
the cylindrical rotary member so as to coincide with the rotational axis of the cylindrical rotary
member and is connected to a distance computation circuit, and a reflecting mirror and
scanning mirror along the rotational axis of the cylindrical rotary member.

title: Autonomous multi-mode composite pipe positioning and exploration system and implementing method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses an autonomous multi-mode composite pipe positioning and exploration system and an implementing method thereof. The positioning and exploration system comprises a sensing module, a data acquisition module, a multi-mode composite processing module, a calibration module, an off-line trajectory generation module, a pipeline track positioning and displaying module and an autonomous traction and movement platform, wherein the sensing module comprises a sonar sensor, an ultrasonic sensor, an MEMS (micro-electromechanical system) sensor and a speed and distance measuring module; the data acquisition module comprises a data acquisition device, a data packaging device and a data sending device; the multi-mode composite processing module comprises a data receiving and subpackaging device, a multifunctional ARM processor, a data packaging device and a data storage device; the off-line trajectory generation module comprises a computer and related data processing software. With the adoption of the system, positioning and exploration requirements of a long-distance pipe buried deep underground can be met, a laying trajectory of the pipe can be obtained, the pipe can be positioned, and the current problem about exploration of the pipe can be solved.

title: Robust training of large-scale object detectors with a noisy dataset
abstract: Systems and methods are described for object detection within a digital image using a hierarchical softmax function. The method may include applying a first softmax function of a softmax hierarchy on a digital image based on a first set of object classes that are children of a root node of a class hierarchy, then apply a second (and subsequent) softmax functions to the digital image based on a second (and subsequent) set of object classes, where the second (and subsequent) object classes are children nodes of an object class from the first (or parent) object classes. The methods may then include generating an object recognition output using a convolutional neural network (CNN) based at least in part on applying the first and second (and subsequent) softmax functions. In some cases, the hierarchical softmax function is the loss function for the CNN.
