title: In-vehicle lighting device for driving support and in-vehicle driving support device and driving support system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a driving support system, an in-vehicle lighting device for driving support and an in-vehicle driving support device for efficiently achieving driving support by accurately detecting the traveling state of a preceding vehicle with simple configurations.SOLUTION: The image of a high mount lamp 2 of an in-vehicle lighting device 3 for driving support loaded on a preceding vehicle is extracted from a photographic image photographed by an in-vehicle camera 1, and the lighting state of an LED is detected from the extracted image of the high mount lamp 2, and the driving operation of the preceding vehicle and the state of traveling corresponding to the detected lighting state of the LED are detected on the basis of an information code in which the driving operation of the vehicle and the state of traveling are associated with the lighting state of the LED, and information to be presented to a driver is selected from information showing the content of preliminarily set driving support on the basis of the detected driving operation of the preceding vehicle and the detected state of traveling, and the driving support of the self-vehicle is achieved on the basis of the information.

abstract: The embodiment of the utility model provides a relate to the daily necessities field, especially relate to a sports shoes, include: sports shoes body, barrier detection device, moisture detector, camera, suggestion device and controller. The controller controls the prompting device to give a prompt when the obstacle detection device detects an obstacle in front of the sports shoe; the controller is in the humidity detector detects that the humidity around the sports shoes is less than the preset threshold value, and controls the prompting device to send out the suggestion when determining that ponding exists in the front of the sports shoes according to the image collected by the camera. abstract: The invention relates to a method for operating an obstacle recognition function of a driver assistance system in a motor vehicle, wherein the obstacle recognition function is designed to output a warning signal to a driver of the motor vehicle depending on a distance to an object in the vehicle environment, comprising the following steps: detecting a manual deactivation of the vehicle Obstacle detection function; - after detection of manual deactivation, automatic activation of the obstacle detection function on detection of a pending start of a journey or a started journey depending on a distraction indication indicating to what extent the driver is no longer aware that the obstacle detection function is deactivated.

title: Control system for adjusting forming shield of windrowing work vehicle
abstract: A forming shield arrangement configured for a windrowing work vehicle is supported for movement by a support structure. The forming shield arrangement is configured to at least partly shape a windrow of a crop material. A method of operating the forming shield arrangement includes receiving, by a processor of a control system from a memory element, a stored position setting that corresponds to a position of the forming shield arrangement relative to the support structure. The method also includes processing, by the processor, a positioning control signal based, at least in part, on the stored position setting. Moreover, the method includes changing, with an actuator, the position of the forming shield arrangement according to the positioning control signal.

title: Methods and a computing device for determining whether a mark is genuine
abstract: The present disclosure is generally directed to a method and computing device for determining whether a mark is genuine. According to various implementations, a computing device (or logic circuitry thereof) uses unintentionally-produced artifacts within a genuine mark to define an identifiable electronic signature, extracts certain attributes of the signature (such as deviation from the mean value for each band of the signature), and assigns numerical values to the extracted attributes in order to create a hash identifier that is significantly smaller than the electronic signature itself. The hash identifier is then used as an index for a database of electronic signatures (of genuine marks) to enhance the ease and speed with which numerous genuine signatures can be searched (e.g., in a database) and compared with signatures (of candidate marks.

title: Method for judging traffic jam cause based on feature importance
abstract: The invention relates to a traffic jam cause analysis method, in particular to a method for judging a traffic jam cause based on feature importance; extracting the traffic congestion level and relevant features of a congestion point segment, obtaining a cause library of the congestion point segment based on a prediction residual integrated feature importance evaluation method, and analyzing the specific cause of certain congestion based on an association rule mining method; the feature importance is evaluated by adopting various supervised learning methods including a Lasso model, a random forest model and a linear model, and the feature importance evaluated by the three methods is weighted according to the prediction error, so that the feature importance analysis can obtain a more accurate and more stable result, and the correctness of the traffic jam cause analysis is ensured.

title: Driving support apparatus
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a driving support apparatus capable of suppressing discomfort of a driver due to a warning sound.SOLUTION: A driving support apparatus comprises: corner sensors 2 each as an obstacle detection sensor for detecting a proximity of an obstacle 14 to a vehicle 10; a warning sound generator 3 for generating a warning sound; an alarm control section 4 for controlling the warning sound generator 3 to sound the warning sound when an approach of the obstacle 14 is detected by the corner sensor 2; a driver state detecting section 5 for detecting at least one of expression information and physiological information of a driver 11; and a discomfort feel estimation processing section 6 for estimating a presence or absence of discomfort of the driver 11 on the basis of the detection result by the driver state detection section 5, wherein when the discomfort feeling estimation processing unit 6 estimates that the driver 11 has discomfort during the sounding of the warning sound, the warning control unit 4 causes the warning sound generating device 3 to stop sounding the warning sound.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

title: Visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method, device, and electronic apparatus
abstract: The present application discloses a visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method, a visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building device, and an electronic apparatus. According to one embodiment, the visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method comprises: performing object detection on an image acquired by an image acquisition apparatus, and acquiring pixel targets in the image and attribute information thereof; determining position information of each pixel target in the image; combining the attribute information and the position information of each pixel target, and generating a semantic point cloud; and building a semantic vector map on the basis of the semantic point cloud. The visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method completes high-resolution map building at an extremely low cost simply by using images and a small amount of priori information of an external sensor.
text: Visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method, device, and electronic apparatus The present application discloses a visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method, a visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building device, and an electronic apparatus. According to one embodiment, the visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method comprises: performing object detection on an image acquired by an image acquisition apparatus, and acquiring pixel targets in the image and attribute information thereof; determining position information of each pixel target in the image; combining the attribute information and the position information of each pixel target, and generating a semantic point cloud; and building a semantic vector map on the basis of the semantic point cloud. The visual point cloud-based semantic vector map building method completes high-resolution map building at an extremely low cost simply by using images and a small amount of priori information of an external sensor.

title: A traffic surveillance and guidance system
abstract: A traffic surveillance and guidance system comprising a traffic server system is disclosed. The traffic server is configured to receive and update and record data of geographical positions of registered road users, and wherein each registered road user is registering a replaceable and modifiable geometrically shaped model of a field of view representing the respective road users observation space and observation ability of possible traffic incidents around geographical positions the respective road users are located on at any time.

title: Method and apparatus for cellular handover including side link communication
abstract: In one aspect of the present teachings, the radio network node (20) associated with the source cell (22-1) is side to the radio device (16) where handover to the target cell (22-2) is to be performed. title: Vehicle dimensions and position broadcasting for optical distance measurements
abstract: A method for estimating a distance from a present vehicle to a neighbouring vehicle. Broadcast data is received from the neighbouring vehicle and image data is received from a vehicle camera of the present vehicle. An image portion of the vehicle image is identified that corresponds to the visual feature of the neighbouring vehicle. A distance between the present vehicle and the neighbouring vehicle is estimated by correlating the received distance information with the identified image portion.

title: Automatic calibration of vehicle camera
abstract: In various embodiments, a method, system and vehicle for calibrating a vehicle camera are provided. In certain embodiments, a vehicle includes a camera, a memory, and a processor. The camera is provided on the vehicle, and is configured to generate a camera image in which an object is detected on the vehicle. The memory is configured to store map data relating to the detected object. The processor is disposed on the vehicle and configured to perform an initial projection using the map data and an initial value of a calibration parameter of the camera; and updating the values of the calibration parameters using the comparison of the initial projection and the captured image.

title: A kind of traffic road barricade with air-cleaning function
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of traffic road barricade with air-cleaning function, including base, upper support column, dust delivering tube and solar panels, the base is fixedly arranged above roadblock main body, and the bottom surface of roadblock body interior is provided with lower support column, hydraulic cylinder is mounted at left and right sides of the lower support column, and the outer wall of hydraulic cylinder is mounted with connecting rod, the first extension board is provided with the outside of the connecting rod, and first the outer surface of extension board be mounted with the first phosphor strip, the upper support column is located at the upper end of roadblock main body, and air cleaning box is both provided with left and right sides of upper support column, the outer surface of the air cleaning box is inlaid with observation panel, and the left and right ends of air cleaning box are respectively connected with sweep-up pipe.The beneficial effects of the invention are as follows：This carries the traffic road barricade of air-cleaning function, is provided with air cleaning box, the dust in air can be drawn into air cleaning box from sweep-up pipe by the first air pump and be collected.

title: High-precision adhesion degree detection device
abstract: The utility model discloses a high-precision adhesion degree detection device, which comprises a base, a fixing piece arranged at the center above the base, a supporting piece symmetrically fixed on the fixing piece, an extrusion component arranged on the supporting piece, and an adsorption component arranged on the extrusion component; the extrusion assembly comprises a bidirectional screw rod arranged right above the supporting piece, moving pieces in threaded symmetrical connection with two sides of the bidirectional screw rod, and a roller which is rotatably arranged on the lower portion of the moving pieces and is in rolling connection with the supporting piece. The utility model discloses utilize check valve and rubber bowl laminating extrusion plate object to extrude the air in the rubber bowl, make the rubber bowl and the laminating of adhesive plate object fastening of both sides with the help of external atmospheric pressure, thereby calculate the size of deriving the bonding dynamics through the elastic variable that separates the plate object detection elastic component, by lead screw drive extrusion and separation, have laborsaving and detect accurate characteristics.

title: On-vehicle camera system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an on-vehicle camera system where supervisory objects can clearly be displayed on a monitor even when the contrast of the objects is large. SOLUTION: A running vehicle 5 is mounted with a front supervisory camera 1, side supervisory cameras 2, 3 and a rear supervisory camera 4 that synthesize two pictures with optionally different exposure times into one picture together with their microphones. The front and side supervisory cameras 1-3 recognize objects (photographing objects) whose contrast is large such as an object at an entrance/exit of a tunnel, an object emitted by the evening (morning) sun, an object lighted by a head light at night and its vicinity and an object at a sunny and shady place so as to convert information at the outside of the vehicle into a video signal or a voice signal, the converted signal is digitized further, processed and the resulting signal is expressed for a driver in the vehicle as a picture or voice (sound).

title: The small and weak moving ship real-time detection method in sea based on deep learning
abstract: The present invention relates to the small and weak moving ship real-time detection methods in sea based on deep learning, and step includes: step 1 carries out object detection process to the image in marine monitoring system video；Step 2 carries out uniform sizes operation to input picture size；Step 3 extracts Small object feature using the first part of network structure；Step 4, the feature for extracting, using network structure second part classifier to image from the validity feature of shallow-layer e-learning Small object, then the location information of comprehensive deep layer network finally classifies to Small object.The network structure is full convolutional network type, and includes two parts, and the effect of first part is the validity feature for extracting target；The effect of second part is detection target and determines final detection result.

title: Solid object detection system using laser and radar sensor fusion
abstract: A light detection and ranging device associated with an autonomous vehicle scans through a scanning zone while emitting light pulses and receives reflected signals corresponding to the light pulses. The reflected signals indicate a three-dimensional point map of the distribution of reflective points in the scanning zone. A radio detection and ranging device scans a region of the scanning zone corresponding to a reflective feature indicated by the three-dimensional point map. Solid objects are distinguished from non-solid reflective features on the basis of a reflected radio signal that corresponds to the reflective feature. Positions of features indicated by the reflected radio signals are projected to estimated positions during the scan with the light detection and ranging device according to relative motion of the radio-reflective features indicated by a frequency shift in the reflected radio signals.

title: Target detecting method and system
abstract: A method and a system for detecting a target are disclosed. The method includes predicting feature regions based on history information of images of a plurality of sequential frames before the current frame; performing matching of the feature regions between the predicted feature regions and feature regions in a previous frame based on extracted features; performing a target set analysis for the feature regions to obtain a set of the feature regions based on displacement vectors and spatial adjacency and tracking information; performing clustering for unmatched points based on the extracted features and the spatial adjacency; and updating the feature regions and the features using the result of the target set analysis and the result of the clustering.

abstract: The invention relates to a method for operating a laser scanner, comprising a laser light source for emitting a laser beam, a deflection unit for deflecting the laser beam in a measurement plane, a widening unit for expanding the laser beam transversely to the measurement plane and a detection unit for detecting an intensity of a reflection of the laser beam an intensity profile (400), wherein in a step (702) of the filtering the intensity profile (400) is filtered using a first function (704) for obstacle detection (708) and the intensity profile (400) using a second function (706) for localization (710) is filtered.

title: Controller for vehicle
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To solve space and weight problems and to improve vehicle productivity when various controllers are loaded in a vehicle. SOLUTION: First and second pumps 120 and 130 are connected to the rotary shaft 111 of an electronic motor 110. By the actuation of the electric motor 110, compressed air is discharged to a car height adjusting fluid type controller by the first pump 120 and hydraulic oil is discharged to an anti-lock brake (or traction stability control) fluid type controller by the second pump 130. The car height adjusting fluid type controller is often actuated during a stop until a vehicle is started, the anti-lock brake (or traction stability control) fluid type controller is often actuated when the vehicle is started or during traveling and, since there is little possibility of simultaneous actuation for these fluid type controllers, the functions thereof are not lost and the electric motor 110 is effectively used.

title: Methods and apparatuses related to transformable remote controllers
abstract: A remote controller for operating an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) can comprise a user input component configured to receive user input from a user; and a communication unit for at least one of transmitting and receiving data between the remote controller and the UAV or a load carried by the UAV. The communication unit can be configured to transmit an instruction to operate at least one of the UAV and the load based on the user input. The remote controller can be configured to transform between (1) a single-hand operation mode that enables the user to control an operation of both the UAV and the load using the user input from a single hand while being held by the single hand, and (2) a multi-hand operation mode that enables the user to control the operation of both the UAV and the load using at least two hands while holding the remote controller using the at least two hands.

title: Methods and apparatus for neighbor cell range extension
abstract:
FIELD: communication. 
     SUBSTANCE: invention relates to mobile communication. User equipment (UE) located in an extended-range area of a neighbor base station cell in a communication network, such as a low-power cell in a heterogeneous network, can inform its serving base station, such as a macro cell overlying the low-power cell, of the UE's capability of canceling interference from other cells' transmissions. Information enables the serving cell to decide based on more information whether range extension of the neighbor cell is beneficial for a number of UEs. 
     EFFECT: technical result consists in efficient radio resource utilization.

title: Methods for monitoring structural health conditions
abstract:
The present invention uses a diagnostic network patch (DNP) system having a plurality of patches to investigate the defects of the main structure (structures such as bridges, aviation, space, drones, oil and chemical facilities, ships, vehicles, high-rises, etc.) Provide a method. The irradiation module divides the plurality of patches into subgroups and measures sensor signals generated and received by the actuator and the sensor patch, respectively. The processing module then loads the sensor signal data to confirm the lamb wave mode, to calculate the arrival time of that mode, and to generate the tomographic image. In addition, the distribution of state indices of other structures is determined to produce tomographic images of the main structure. A series of tomographic images can be stacked to produce a hyperspectral tomographic cube. The classification module generates a codebook based on the K averaging / reaming vector quantization algorithm, and uses a neural-fuzzy-inference system to determine the type of defect in the main structure. 
       
     Structures, conditions, defects, predictions, diagnostics

title: 3D face dynamic reconstruction method based on estimation compensation
abstract: The invention discloses a 3D face dynamic reconstruction method based on estimation compensation. According to the technical scheme of the method, firstly, a face image is obtained, and the deformation degree value of a 3D scene for translational and rotational motions is obtained through calculating the deformation degree based on the discrete element method. Secondly, the figure centre of a non-rigid face is calculated, and a weighting coefficient in association with the covariance in two directions is obtained. Finally, the lost problem of face data in the motion process is handled with, and then the skeleton diagram of a human body is obtained. The structure of lost feature points in a non-rigid 3D face is recovered in a dynamic image sequence. Meanwhile, within an extremely small feature space, lost feature points are estimated, compensated and reconstructed based on the dynamic association of feature points. Therefore, the feature point cloud information of a face model, estimated and reconstructed based on 3D motions, are recovered as much as possible. In this way, a 3D face model used for recognition purpose and higher in plumpness can be formed.

title: Inter-door obstacle detector
abstract:
PURPOSE: To improve obstacle detection ability by providing a light scattering surface in a wide range along the end surface on the exterior side of a car door, and by measuring the brightness of the image on the light scattering surface image-formed by a lens through finely divided lines of receiving light devices, in each part.  
     CONSTITUTION: A light scattering surface 10 is formed on the entire region along the height of a door 1, adjacent to one end of the exterior side of the door 1 of a car, and perpendicular to a door surface. A lens 11 is provided on one end of the door 1 opposed to the light scattering surface 10, and the reflected light from the light scattering surface 10 is received thereby and the image of the light scattering surface 10 is formed, which is injected into a light receiving device 12. The light receiving device 12 is composed of finely devided lines of receiving light devices for generating a signal S of quantity of light corresponding to each part of the light scattering surface 10. At a calculation processer 20, each signal of quantity of light received before the door is opened is stored in a first memory 21, while that received after the door is closed in a second memory 22, and an obstacle detection signal E is output by making a comparison between the difference in each signal of quantity of light from each memory 21, 22 and a reference.

title: Method of manufacturing jig for conductive foreign matter detection device
abstract: An object of the present invention is to manufacture a jig capable of detecting conductive foreign matter attached to a metal bracket.   A conductive foreign object detection device includes a jig. The jig includes a plurality of recesses defined by the protrusions. In the recess, the first wiring electrodes 42 and the second wiring electrodes 43 are alternately arranged. The protrusions prevent the first wiring electrode 42 and the second wiring electrode 43 from coming into contact with the bracket. When the conductive foreign matter adheres to the bracket, the first wiring electrode 42 and the second wiring electrode 43 are short-circuited by the conductive foreign matter straddling the plurality of recesses. The resistance detector measures a resistance value when the first wiring electrode 42 and the second wiring electrode 43 are short-circuited by the conductive foreign matter. The first wiring electrode 42 and the second wiring electrode 43 are formed by plating. The ridge is formed by discharging a liquid rubber material by an ink jet method.   [Selection] Figure 8

abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] An object of the present invention is to provide an object detection device capable of excellently detecting a stationary object in a state in which a stationary object and a moving object are mixed, in particular, in a state where the stationary object overlaps the shadow of the moving object to be seen and hidden. And [Structure] A reference image storage unit 20 for previously capturing an image signal from an ITV camera 10 for capturing a scene to be detected as a background image, and a difference image between the reference image and an input image is obtained 2   An object extraction unit 50 that binarizes and accumulates difference images and extracts a region of an object that is stationary for a certain time; an object determination unit 140 that determines the presence or absence of a stationary object in the detection target scene from the extracted image; The object detection device is configured by the notification unit 150 that notifies the result obtained from the determination unit 140. title: System, method and apparatus for collecting telematics and sensor information in a delivery vehicle
abstract: The invention is directed to a data collection and evaluation system that includes a telematics device for collecting, time-stamping, and storing vehicle sensor data. Example of the type of data collected include door data, ignition data, speed data, global positioning data, and diagnostic and trouble code data. The system further includes an external data acquisition device, such as a mainframe computer system or a hand-held computing device like an iPAQ. The external data acquisition device is configured to communicate with the telematics device over a wireless network, which enables the telematics device to transmit the time-stamped data to the external data acquisition device and receive information and instructions from the external data acquisition device. The ability of the system to automatically collect and transfer data and communication with an external data acquisition device allows for the automation of fleet management processes, vehicle maintenance and repair processes, and certain security features.

title: Protrusion visible roadsurface indicating line which have groove discharge rainwater constructed by hot melting method
abstract:
The present invention is a road marking road surface display made of a predetermined width and thickness for identification of the road surface, the primer adhesive layer is provided on the road surface; A composition layer coated on the upper surface of the primer adhesive layer by mixing a synthetic resin and glass beads having a diameter of 400 to 700 μm to a thickness of 1.5 to 3 mm; At least one protrusion formed by convexly protruding a portion of the mixed layer, which is formed at a predetermined interval in the longitudinal direction of the road surface display, and includes a glass bead of 1000 to 2000 μm sprayed on the protrusion. Ultra-high brightness projected road surface with rainwater discharge grooves formed by fusion construction method. 
     The construction of the present invention enables the construction on the spot, and the advantages of reducing the traffic congestion and the construction of all the processes by automated vehicles, etc., can prevent the reduction of manpower and safety accidents in advance, as well as maintain constant quality and construction. The construction time of road markings is shortened, and the durability of quality is excellent even after construction, so that the shape and brightness of road markings can be maintained and provided even after painting every two to three years.

title: The control method and air-conditioning system of air-conditioning system
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of control method of air-conditioning system and air-conditioning systems.Air-conditioning system includes air conditioner and remote controler.Control method includes: the acquisition fingerprint image for acquiring user and inputting on a remote control；Processing acquisition fingerprint image is to obtain acquisition fingerprint characteristic；Matching and the acquisition associated operating mode of fingerprint characteristic；It is run with control air conditioner with operating mode.The control method and air-conditioning system of air-conditioning system of the present invention acquire fingerprint characteristic by remote controler and identify user identity, then matching and the acquisition associated operating mode of fingerprint characteristic, and air conditioner is controlled to run with the associated operating mode of acquisition fingerprint characteristic, so, user can directly set the operating mode of air conditioner using fingerprint, simple to operate.

title: Driving support system, driving support apparatus and driving support method
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a driving support system capable of allowing a driver to obtain detailed information relevant to a destination peripheral area.SOLUTION: A driving support system includes: plural vehicles; and a driving support apparatus that delivers to the vehicles driving support information for supporting driving of a vehicle. A vehicle transmits an image acquired by an on-vehicle camera to the operation support apparatus and receives driving support information from the driving support apparatus. The driving support apparatus recognizes a landmark included in the image received from the vehicle, and delivers to the vehicle driving support information corresponding to a position of the vehicle determined based on the predetermined landmark position.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

title: Alarm device for vehicle
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an alarm device for vehicle capable of surely recognizing the presence or absence of an obstacle in a running direction by surely identifying a tone generated at the start of running as to whether the tone indicates that the obstacle is present or not. SOLUTION: This alarm device for vehicle comprises an obstacle detection switch 53 for detecting the presence or absence of the obstacle at the rear of a body and an obstacle alarm device for alarming the presence of the obstacle 7 when the detection switch 53 detects the obstacle 7. When the obstacle 7 is detected when the body moves backward, an alarm for backward movement is given by a first buzzer 51, and then the alarm is switched to an obstacle alarm by a second buzzer 52 and given by the second buzzer 52.

title: A kind of recognizable elevator of capacity
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of capacity of elevators field application can recognize elevator.Its structure includes elevator accommodating chamber and external lifts door, the elevator accommodating chamber includes bottom plate, top plate, side plate and internal elevator door, the bottom plate is evenly dividing as several receiving areas, the elevator accommodating chamber is provided with several detection devices corresponding with receiving area, the detection device is used to carry out object detection to receiving area, and receiving area detection viewing area is provided with above the external lifts door.Passenger can intuitively watch internal capacity when carrying out button click at this time, to choose whether to be clicked according to the actual situation.If judge that internal capacity cannot achieve the carrying of corresponding article, passenger can run in elevator by clicking again when the floor, so as to avoid the invalid stop of elevator and opening operation, avoid passenger's waste of time, elevator working efficiency is effectively increased, power-save operation is realized.

abstract: The invention discloses a kind of parking occupancy management system, including server, client terminal device and parking lot control device；Server, client terminal device and parking lot control device are connected by network；Parking lot control device is according to the service condition real-time update parking space information of parking stall in parking lot, and the parking space information of renewal is sent in real time in server；In server, storage has the parking space information of the real-time update in multiple parking lot；Client terminal device is for sending parking stall inquiry request to server, and parking stall inquiry request includes destination or parking rate；The parking stall Query Result that server mates with parking stall inquiry request according to parking stall inquiry request search parking stall information acquisition sends client terminal device.The present invention realizes issuing the management of parking position with information, enables users to the parking stall around long-range search destination and subscribes parking stall, and can self-navigation and Automatic-settlement, it is achieved that intelligent management parking stall.The invention also discloses a kind of parking stall management method.

title: System and method for providing distributed on-street valet parking with the aid of a digital computer
abstract: A system and method for providing distributed on-street valet parking with the aid of a digital computer is provided. Parking spaces for valet services are reserved. One of the reserved parking spaces is designated as a valet drop-off parking space. A motor vehicle is detected in the valet drop-off parking space and a notification that the motor vehicle requires parking is provided to a valet of the detected motor vehicle. A search is conducted for the reserved parking spaces available for valet services for the motor vehicle. At least one of the reserved parking spaces available for the motor vehicle is identified and the motor vehicle is parked in the identified reserved parking space.

title: Power distributed oil and electricity hybrid power system integrated with flywheel battery
abstract: A power distributed oil and electricity hybrid power system integrated with a flywheel battery comprises a primary planet carrier connected with an output shaft of an internal combustion engine. A secondary planet carrier is connected with a last-stage planet gear and a last-stage planet carrier through first clutches, a last-stage inner gear ring is connected with an external fixing end through a second clutch, a secondary inner gear ring is connected with a motor rotor in a flywheel battery unit, a motor stator is arranged on the inner side of the motor rotor, and the motor rotor is connected with a flywheel through a magnetic powder clutch. A primary sun gear, a secondary sun gear and a last-stage sun gear are sequentially installed on an output shaft of a second servo motor, and a last-stage planet carrier in a planet coupling device serves as a power output port. The power distributed oil and electricity hybrid power system has an input distribution mode and a composite distribution mode, the flywheel battery is integrated into a power distributed hybrid power system, and thus it is ensured that the hybrid power system has high transmission efficiency within the full-speed range.

title: Face living body detection method, related device, equipment and storage medium
abstract: The application discloses a method for detecting a human face living body, which is applied to the field of artificial intelligence and comprises the steps of obtaining an initial human face image and a human face image set corresponding to N illumination directions; acquiring N differential images according to the initial face image and the face image set; generating a normal map and a reflectivity map according to the N differential images and the N illumination directions; and determining the human face living body detection result according to the N difference images, the normal image and the reflectivity image. The application also discloses a related device, equipment and a storage medium. According to the method and the device, the three-dimensional geometric information and the surface material information of the face image are considered at the same time, so that the authenticity of the face image can be identified, and different face living body attack modes can be effectively resisted.

title: Sound barrier
abstract: The noise barrier consists of juxtaposed and / or stacked gabions and at least one noise protection element. It is designed to carry at least one of the gabions. The noise protection element thus not only serves to protect against noise, but also forms the support of the at least one gabion. This design of the noise protection element contributes to a simple and cost-effective production and installation of the noise barrier.

title: Boundary line recognition device
abstract: This invention is provided with: a camera (10) for capturing the image of a travel path; an edge point extraction unit (32) for extracting edge points on the basis of the brightness of an image captured by the camera (10); a candidate line extraction unit (33) for extracting, on the basis of the succession of the extracted edge points, a candidate line for a boundary line demarcating the travel path; a frequency calculation unit (34) for calculating, on the basis of edge points belonging to the candidate line extracted by the candidate line extraction unit (33), the frequency distribution of the edge points for a parameter that specifies the width of the boundary line; a probability generation unit (35) for calculating, on the basis of the frequency distribution calculated by the frequency calculation unit (34), the distribution for the probability that the candidate line at the parameter is the boundary line; and a boundary line recognition unit (37) for recognizing the boundary line on the basis of the probability distribution calculated by the probability generation unit (35).

title: Automatic generation method of facial cosmetic recommendation scheme
abstract: The invention discloses an automatic generation method of a face-lifting recommendation scheme. The main process of the invention is as follows: firstly, acquiring a high-definition face front photo of a user, and inputting the face photo into a face feature parameterization model to obtain face parameterization data of the user; and secondly, comparing the user face parameters with facial features and facial features of the star face in the constructed star face library to obtain the most similar star face and the deformation vector of the parameters of the five sense organs of the user. And then, inputting the picture and the deformation vector of the user into a face-beautifying effect model, and automatically generating a scheme of the corresponding effect after face-beautifying and quantization of the user. In the whole process, a user can automatically complete the generation of the whole face-lifting recommendation scheme only by matching with the shooting of a high-definition face picture, the face-lifting recommendation method has the advantages of convenience in operation, short time consumption and high precision, and parameterized data difference before and after facial lifting and high-precision face-lifting portrait effect are provided for the user.

title: Apparatus and method for providing contents linked with information of vehicle
abstract: According to an embodiment of the present invention, a device for providing content associated with information provided from a vehicle comprises: a storage unit which stores a plurality of event data and a plurality of background data; a communication unit for receiving vehicle information including character matching information; and a control unit which selects event data including a character designated by the character matching information from among the plurality of event data, selects background data including an event designated by the event data from among the plurality of background data, and transmits content data including the selected event data and the selected background data through the communication unit. According to an embodiment of the present invention, at least one of an autonomous vehicle, a user terminal, and a server can be associated or fused and combined with an artificial intelligence module, a drone (unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)), a robot, an augmented reality (AR) device, a virtual reality (VR) device, and devices related to 5G services.

title: Can-spray spray drones for building repair
abstract: The present invention relates to a can-spray spray drone for building maintenance. The can-spray spray drone includes: an unmanned air vehicle (1) piloted by the induction of a radio wave by a controller (1a); a mounting part (20) integrated with the lower part of the body (11) of the unmanned air vehicle (1) to be equipped with a detachable can spray (A); a contact member (30) installed to be able to be slid forward and backwards along a guide part (113) formed in the body (11), while having a front end protruding from the front side of the body (11) to come into contact with the outer surface of a structure (S) requiring a partial repair; and a lever member (40) hinged to be rotatable to enable the elastic force of a first elastic member (403) to work on the top of the mounting part (20), thereby pressing a nozzle button (B) of the can spray to enable the can spray to be sprayed by being rotated by pressure delivered through the contact member (30). According to the present invention, as various types of can sprays which are sold on the market can be mounted and remotely sprayed, partial maintenance or partial construction for various buildings or structures can be conveniently, quickly and safely performed.

title: Signaling flows and buffer status report for a group in device-to-device broadcast communication
abstract: Methods, systems, and devices are described for device-to-device (D2D) wireless communication. A device may transmit an initiation message to a base station indicating that the device desires to initiate a D2D communication session. The device may then receive a response from the base station that includes parameters for configuration of the D2D session. When it has data to send to another device, the device may transmit buffer status report (BSR) to the base station. The base station may respond with a grant of D2D scheduling assignment (SA) configured according to the previously sent parameters. For example, the message may be scrambled with a D2D temporary identity sequence. In some cases, the device may transmit a group identification (ID) code to the base station, and the group ID may be associated with an index, so an SA for that group can be reference by index.

title: Traffic jam charging method and device based on extra-large city free flow non-stop
abstract: The application provides a traffic jam charging method and device based on no stop of free flow in an extra-large city, which comprises a Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) subsystem, a license plate identification subsystem and an industrial control subsystem in communication connection with the RFID subsystem and the license plate identification subsystem respectively.

title: Pet walking protector
abstract: The invention provides a pet walking protector, which belongs to the field of pet appliances and comprises a protective cover, wherein the protective cover is provided with an outer cover, the outer cover comprises a bottom plate, the middle part of the bottom plate forms an active area, and the edge of the active area is provided with a check ring with a rectangular structure; the bottom of the bottom plate is provided with four rollers, a storage battery and a controller are arranged in the outer cover, and the controller is connected with a driving motor; at least one first obstacle detection sensor is arranged around the retainer ring. The protector can protect the pet, separate the pet from strangers, and enable the pet to walk flexibly and freely, so that public places are harmonious and harmonious, and the pet can be fed more interestingly and easily.

title: Moving object detecting device using image
abstract: A moving object detection apparatus using an image that detects the presence or absence of a moving object in an image even during the enlargement of an image and can confirm the presence or absence of the moving object in the image even during the enlargement of an image. provide.   An image pickup means 10 continuously picks up an image of a target space as time elapses. An edge image is generated from the image captured by the imaging means 10, and the edge image is stored in the edge image storage unit 13. The logical operation unit 14a and the movement determination unit 15a perform silhouette matching using three edge images, and extract a movement region in the image. When the moving area is extracted, the enlarged image generating unit 16 generates an enlarged image obtained by enlarging the partial area including the moving area to the size of one screen. The logical operation unit 14b and the movement determination unit 15b detect the presence / absence of a moving region based on a difference image between two enlarged images adjacent in time series until at least three enlarged images are obtained.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Salient object detection method based on histogram power function fitting
abstract: A salient object detection method based on histogram power function fitting comprises the four steps of the histogram power function fitting, a superpixel classification, a salient region problem and salient object detection. The salient object detection method based on the histogram power function fitting has the advantages that gray threshold is obtained through using an FT saliency map, a figure manifold sorting method, an SLIC method superpixel classification and the histogram power function fitting, under the situations of multiple images, multiple targets and complex scenes, the detection efficiency is high, the performance is good, the precision is good, the problem in salient object detection fields is solved, by means of the salient object detection method based on the histogram power function fitting, the execution speed is high, and the complexity of algorithm is low; meanwhile, higher detection precision can be guaranteed.

title: Apparatus and method for generating training data for training neural network determining information related to road included in an image
abstract: The learning data generation apparatus can acquire map data corresponding to the position at which the image is photographed, using the position at which the image and the image are photographed. The learning data generation apparatus can generate learning data used for learning the neural network from the acquired map data. The learning data may include truth data that includes information relating to the road and the road determined from the image and the acquired map data. By the learning data generating apparatus learning the neural network, the output data generated by the neural network based on the image can converge to the truth data. The learned neural network can be utilized by the road recognizing device to determine information related to the road from the image. The road-recognizing apparatus can control the vehicle using information related to the determined road.

title: Alarm device for around forklift truck
abstract: The present invention relates to a peripheral warning device for a forklift, comprising a proximity sensor (ultrasonic sensor) for sensing an obstacle around a forklift and outputting a first obstacle detection signal, a sensor for detecting heat generated from an obstacle around the forklift, A sensor for outputting a seat occupancy sensing signal when a driver of the forklift sits on a chair, a first obstacle sensing signal from the proximity sensor (ultrasonic sensor) and a heat sensing sensor in response to the seating sensing signal, A controller for determining whether at least one of the first obstacle detection signal and the second obstacle detection signal is inputted and outputting an alarm output control signal when at least one of the first obstacle detection signal and the second obstacle detection signal is inputted, And an alarm signal output unit for outputting an alarm signal. Accordingly, when an obstacle such as a person or an object comes in within a predetermined radius around the forklift so that an accident does not occur due to a person or an object in the vicinity of the forklift while the forklift is performing the work, an alarm is made.

title: Integrated vehicle traffic camera
abstract: An exemplary representation of a vehicle video recording system may include: a vehicle camera that generates a video signal displaying video data; at least one sensor; a RAM device and a controller which is communicatively coupled to the camera, the sensor and the RAM device. The controller can determine a recording duration based on sensor data received from the sensor. Furthermore, the controller can store the video data and the associated sensor data for the recording duration in the RAM device. The controller may transfer video data and associated sensor data from the RAM device to a storage device in response to receiving a safe event signal from the sensor.

title: Object detection device, velocity detection device, and vehicle
abstract: An object detection device to be mounted on a mobile body includes: a transmit antenna; a receive antenna; first circuitry that causes the transmit antenna to alternately switch between first and the second beams and transmits radio signals, and that receives, by using the receive antenna, reflected wave signals; and second circuitry that detects a ground velocity of the mobile body corresponding to an azimuth, on the basis of a radio signal transmitted by using the first beam and a reflected wave signal obtained as a result of radio waves of the radio signal being reflected on a road surface, and that detects a relative velocity of the object regarding the mobile body, on the basis of a radio signal transmitted by using the second beam and a reflected wave signal obtained as a result of radio waves of the radio signal being reflected on an object.

title: Train operation apparatus
abstract: The present invention relates to an on-vehicle device mounted inside an electric vehicle, and an object of the present invention is to provide an on-vehicle device that enables an electric vehicle crew to monitor or control the opening and closing state of the landing screen door in the electric vehicle. To this end, the present invention, a vehicle on-vehicle device applied to the electric vehicle system mounted on the electric vehicle, an electric vehicle wireless communication unit for performing communication with the platform system installed in the platform; An input unit for receiving a control signal for opening or closing landing screen doors driven by the landing system; An output unit for outputting operation state information of the landing screen doors; A controller for controlling the electric vehicle wireless communication device to transmit a control signal transmitted through the input device to the platform system, and controlling the output device to output the information transmitted through the electric vehicle wireless communication device; And a storage unit for storing information generated according to the driving of the electric vehicle under the control of the controller.

title: System and method for providing geographic information
abstract:
The present invention relates to a geographic information service system and method for providing geographic information at the request of a client terminal. 
     It reads the configuration information of each layer for visualization from the geographic information of the database, and stores the information necessary for visualization based on the configuration information as cache information in the main memory storage and creates an index. Then, upon request of the client terminal, the drawing service is provided using the cache information stored in the main memory storage unit. On the other hand, if a change occurs in the geographic information stored in the database, the change is synchronized with the cache information of the main memory storage. In this way, by taking advantage of the memory database and reducing its size relatively, it provides geographic information service in real time using relatively less server resources, and synchronizes the data in main memory immediately when a change occurs in the original data. Can provide accurate drawing services.

title: Fence structure
abstract:
The present invention is a joint state in which the mating surface and the engaging portion is overlapped between two neighboring fence members, a pair of hooks of the clamp fastened and fixed to the transverse pipe of the support frame is inserted through the through holes formed on the mating surfaces of both fence members It is to provide a fence installation structure by binding the locking portion to restrain the mounting portion, to keep the installation state of the fence member more robust and stable. 
     The fence mounting structure of the present invention superimposes the contact surface and the engaging portion of one joint portion formed on one side of one of the neighboring fence members and the engaging portion and the engaging portion of the other joint end formed on the other side of the other fence member. In the case where the fence is installed by binding a pair of hooks of the clamp fastened to the transverse pipe of the support frame separately installed and restrained by the engaging portions of both fence members superimposed on one, the fence member has one side end portion The pair of hooks of the clamps are adjacently stacked on one side by forming two through-holes, each of which is formed in a pair to correspond to the pair of hooks of the clamp on the contact surface and the contact surface of the other joint end. It is fitted through the through-holes formed in the opposing surfaces of both fence members to bind to the engaging portion.

title: Stereo CCD line sensor has simple hardware circuit performing all time-critical signal processing steps for single sensor so subsequent processing can be conducted without problems
abstract: The line sensor (1) covers a two-dimensional, triangular monitoring field with its aperture angle (3) and detects both an object (4) entering the field and its width in quasi-real time and outputs the data to the following evaluation circuits that can be universally programmed for various applications. All time-critical signal processing steps of a single-line sensor are performed by a simple hardware circuit contg. the evaluation functions and outputting the detected data so that subsequent signal processing corresp. to the current task can be conducted without problems.

title: Electrocardiosignal processing method, electrocardiosignal processing device and electronic equipment
abstract: The disclosure provides an electrocardiosignal processing method and device and electronic equipment. The electrocardiosignal processing method comprises the following steps: an electrocardiographic signal is acquired, which includes a plurality of prescribed waves. A sequence of intervals for the plurality of specified waves is then determined. Based on the sign dynamics, the interval sequence is converted into a sequence of sign values and the shannon entropy of the sequence of sign values is determined. And then classifying the acquired electrocardiosignals based on the numerical value of the Shannon entropy of the symbol value sequence.

title: Shock absorbing hood
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To prevent an air bag in a front hood of an obstacle protection vehicle from deforming and obstructing the forward view in case of a collision due to the effect of wind pressure or the like because the vehicle is very likely to run at a high speed in case of the collision. SOLUTION: A hood 5 comprises an outer panel 51, an inner panel 52 bonded to the outer panel 51, an air bag 6a, and a reaction force plate 7, with the air bag 6a and the reaction force plate 7 interposed between the outer and inner panels 51 and 52. When an obstacle detection means disposed on a vehicle detects a collision with an obstacle, an actuation signal is sent to the air bag 6a to expand it. Here, as a downward load is supported with the reaction force plate 7, the air bag 6a expands upward, the expansion force of the air bag breaks up the bond between the outer panel 51 and the inner panel 52, and the outer panel 51 moves upward. Since a stroke amount is produced corresponding to the air bag which has expanded below the outer panel 51 of a thin sheet structure, the shock due to a secondary collision is alleviated.

title: Object sensing system
abstract: An object sensing system includes a radar system including at least one aperture through which a radar signal is transmitted and at least one aperture through which reflected radar signals are received. The sensing system also includes a stereo vision system including a first sensor and a second sensor. The first sensor and the second sensor are separated by an offset. The stereo vision system is mounted to the radar system to form a single assembly. The radar system is positioned in the offset between the first sensor and the second sensor.

title: Method and device for sending alarm message
abstract: The invention discloses a method and a device for sending an alarm message, and belongs to the technical field of computers. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring a detection image shot by the camera equipment; detecting a face image region and a head and shoulder image region in the detection image based on a preset face and head and shoulder detection algorithm model; determining a target detection area in the detection image according to the detection results of the face image area and the head and shoulder image area; and detecting the person call state information corresponding to the image of the target detection area according to a preset call judging algorithm model, and if the person call state information is a call, sending a first alarm message to a server. By adopting the invention, security personnel can timely know and process the possible deceived users, thereby avoiding the property loss of the users.

title: Binocular vision-based method and apparatus for detecting barrier in indoor shadow environment
abstract: The invention discloses a binocular vision-based method for detecting a barrier in an indoor shadow environment. A binocular vision system is adopted. The method comprises the steps of (1) removing a shadow, extracting color saturation of an original image, performing fusion with image information subjected to shadow removal, and adaptively adjusting and increasing grayscale difference of the ground and the barrier through environmental brightness information; (2) filling a ground region of a fused image by utilizing a seed filling algorithm, and obtaining a barrier region through threshold segmentation, corrosion and expansion operations; and (3) performing matching in a right camera image by taking the obtained barrier region as a template through applying the binocular vision system to calculate parallax of a central point, and calculating three-dimensional coordinates of the central point and the width and distance of the barrier. The invention furthermore discloses a binocular vision-based apparatus for detecting the barrier in the indoor shadow environment. According to the method and the apparatus, the barrier can be completely extracted in the indoor shadow environment; and the method and the apparatus are simple and efficient, have relatively good real-time property and relatively high precision, and are suitable for mobile robot navigation and barrier avoidance.

The method comprises the steps of (1) removing a shadow, extracting color saturation of an original image, performing fusion with image information subjected to shadow removal, and adaptively adjusting and increasing grayscale difference of the ground and the barrier through environmental brightness information; (2) filling a ground region of a fused image by utilizing a seed filling algorithm, and obtaining a barrier region through threshold segmentation, corrosion and expansion operations; and (3) performing matching in a right camera image by taking the obtained barrier region as a template through applying the binocular vision system to calculate parallax of a central point, and calculating three-dimensional coordinates of the central point and the width and distance of the barrier. The invention furthermore discloses a binocular vision-based apparatus for detecting the barrier in the indoor shadow environment. According to the method and the apparatus, the barrier can be completely extracted in the indoor shadow environment; and the method and the apparatus are simple and efficient, have relatively good real-time property and relatively high precision, and are suitable for mobile robot navigation and barrier avoidance.

title: Support assembly for a horizontally-extending member

The legs of the support devices are secured together with the legs diverging downwardly from and laterally of the horizontally-extending member in a member supporting configuration.

title: Circuit diagram of a device for automatic sensing of  televiewing distance
abstract: ABSTRACT         An apparatus for automatically sensing televiewing distance to determine whether or not a televiewer is standing within a predetermined potentially harmful distance in front of a television set by making use of the elapsed time difference be-tween an ultrasonic pulse generated and emitted from a transmitter located on the television set and which is then reflected from a televiewer located in front of the television set.  The reflected pulse is then received by an ultrasonic wave receiver also located on the television set and in the event that the televiewer stands within the predetermined distance for a time longer than is required, for example, to make a manual adjustment to the tele-vision set, a signal is generated which deactivates the video portion of the television set until such time that the televiewer moves to a safe distance away from the set beyond the predetermined potentially harmful distance at which time the video portion is again reactivated.

title: Method for displaying video images for a vehicular vision system
abstract: A method for displaying video images includes providing a plurality of cameras and an electronic control unit at the vehicle. One of the cameras functions as a master camera and other cameras function as slave cameras. During a forward driving maneuver of the vehicle, the forward viewing camera functions as the master camera and at least the driver-side sideward viewing and passenger-side sideward viewing cameras function as slave cameras, during a reversing maneuver of the vehicle, the rearward viewing camera functions as the master camera and at least the driver-side sideward viewing and passenger-side sideward viewing cameras function as slave cameras. Exposure, gain and white balance parameters of the master camera are used at least by the master camera and the slave cameras. A composite image is displayed, with adjacent image sections of the composite image appearing uniform in brightness and/or color at the borders of the image sections.

abstract: This road map generation system (1) collects, from multiple vehicles (A) mounted with a vehicle-mounted camera (4), camera image data obtained by imaging the road being traveled by said vehicles (A) and generates road map data on the basis of said camera image data, and is provided with: a determination device (14) which determines the road surface state of the aforementioned imaged road, and a lane centerline calculation device (14) which, on the basis of the aforementioned road surface state, calculates the travel centerline of the vehicle travel lane of the aforementioned road.

abstract: The method involves selecting images of an object i.e. visage, from selectable object images, where a current similarity score (SS) is comprised between two thresholds or higher than one threshold for performing the selection. title: Method and apparatus for abberation correction in the presence of a distributed aberrator
abstract: Disclosed is an ultrasonic phase aberration correction method and apparatus. One preferred embodiment employs a translating transmit aperture for transmitting two separately transmitted pulses through two different transmit apertures but which are focused to the same predetermined target in the human body. A receiver element measuring a first echo from a first transmit pulse is matched with a receiver element measuring a second echo from a second transmit pulse from a translated aperture, the match corresponding to receivers with a separation equal and opposite to the spatial translations of the translated transmit apertures. The matched elements are compared for signal variations which estimate phase aberrations and especially improve on estimates of distributed aberrations. The transmit or receive signals can then be compensated for or adjusted based on the signal comparison and variation estimates. It is also disclosed that the use of phase spectra analysis with a translating aperture improves aberration correction. Further, the use of a translating aperture with cross-correlation techniques also indicates improved correlations.

title: Obstacle detector
abstract: PURPOSE: To detect other obstacles surely even when a forward vehicle moves perpendicularly to the radiating direction of radio wave by dividing the area, where an obstacle to a host vehicle exists, into a left section, a central section and a right section and controlling the rotation of a plurality of distance measuring sensors in same direction so that the obstacle is captured at a most appropriate position in a detection area. CONSTITUTION: Left side and right side distance measuring sensors 11, 12 are fixed to a rotary table 13 and disposed in the center at the front part of a host vehicle. The sensors 11, 12 have laser beam detection ranges A1, A2 which are partially overlapped in the center of the host vehicle thus forming an obstacle detection area A. A control unit 15 calculates the direction and distance of the obstacle based on the detection values of the sensors 11, 12 and an angle sensor 14 and controls rotation of the rotary table 13. In other words, the rotary table 13 is controlled such that an obstacle existing in the left side area is captured at a left side position in the detection area A, an obstacle existing in the central area is captured at a central position, and an obstacle existing in the right side area is captured at a right side position.  Consequently, other obstacles can be detected surely while following up other obstacles.

title: Data object classification method and device, computer equipment and storage medium
abstract: The application belongs to the field of data processing and discloses a data object classification method and device, computer equipment and a readable storage medium. The method comprises the steps of obtaining basic data of each object to be classified as data to be processed, and dividing the data to be processed into standard data and associated data according to preset screening requirement data; obtaining standard nominal variables according to the standard data, performing feature classification on the standard nominal variables, and performing fusion processing on classified results to obtain comprehensive classification results; obtaining a correlation nominal variable according to the correlation data, and performing data evaluation on the correlation nominal variable to obtain an evaluation score of the correlation nominal variable; and determining the target objects in each category in the comprehensive classification result according to the evaluation scores. By adopting the method, the accuracy of data object classification is improved, and the technical problem of inaccurate data object classification in the prior art is solved.

title: syntax-based method of providing object classification for compressed video
abstract: The present invention generally relates to a technique for effectively performing object classification from compressed images such as H.264 AVC and H.265 HEVC. More specifically, the present invention, for example, the syntax information obtained by parsing the compressed image data rather than recognizing the existence of the object and classifying the object type through the complex image processing, for example, for the compressed image generated by the CCTV camera Motion vector, coding type) to extract a region of significant motion in the image, that is, a moving object region, and to learn the motion vector pattern of the moving object region in a deep neural network, and to apply it to object classification. . According to the present invention, there is an advantage in that object classification can be effectively performed from CCTV compressed images without complex processing such as decoding, downscale resizing, difference image acquisition, image analysis, and the like. In particular, it is possible to perform object classification with a calculation amount of about 1/10 compared with the prior art, which has an advantage of increasing the number of receiving channels of the image analysis server by approximately 10 times or more.

title: Information processing device, control method, program and storage medium
abstract: On the basis of a segment signal Sseg outputted by a core unit 1, a signal processing unit 2 of a LIDAR unit 100 generates a polar coordinate space frame Fp indicating the received light intensity of laser light with respect to each scan angle that indicates the outgoing direction of the laser light and its corresponding target distance Ltag. Then, the signal processing unit 2 converts the polar coordinate space frames Fp into an orthogonal coordinate space frame Fo and outputs it to a display control unit 3. Further, for an outgoing direction of the laser light in which the segment signal Sseg outputted by the core unit 1 indicates a received light intensity equal to or larger than a threshold Apth, the signal processing unit 2 generates the measurement point information Ip and outputs it to a point group processing unit 5.

title: Scene-aware selection of filters and effects for visual digital media content
abstract: Provided are mechanisms and processes for scene-aware selection of filters and effects for visual digital media content. In one example, a digital media item is analyzed with a processor to identify one or more characteristics associated with the digital media item, where the characteristics include a physical object represented in the digital media item. Based on the identified characteristics, a digital media modification is selected from a plurality of digital media modifications for application to the digital media item. The digital media modification may then be provided for presentation in a user interface for selection by a user.

title: A kind of quantity of underwater animal and its detection method and equipment of track

title: Adaptive interactive voice system
abstract: In one embodiment, an apparatus for adaptively interacting with a driver via voice interaction is provided. The apparatus includes a computational models block and an adaptive interactive voice system. The computational models block is configured to receive driver related parameters, vehicle related parameters, and vehicle environment parameters from a plurality of sensors. The computational models block is further configured to generate a driver state model based on the driver related parameters and to generate a vehicle state model based on the vehicle related parameter. The computational models block is further configured to generate a vehicle environment state model based on the vehicle environment parameters. The adaptive interactive voice system is configured to generate a voice output based on a driver's situation and context as indicated on information included within at least one of the driver state model, the vehicle state model, and the vehicle environment state model.

title: Object detection device
abstract: The purpose of the present invention is to obtain an object detection device capable of tracking-travel control that does not give a driver a sense of unease. This object detection device (104) detects a target object (102) in front of a vehicle (103) on the basis of an image of outside the vehicle, captured by imaging devices (105, 106) mounted on the vehicle; and calculates the relative distance to the target object (102) or the relative speed. The object detection device (104) is characterized by having a risk factor determination unit (111) that determines if there is a risk factor present that is a travel risk for the vehicle (103), on the basis of the image.

title: Median strip comprised emergency u-turn device
abstract: In the event of an emergency, the center of the road has a reference point for surveying that allows the vehicle to be U-TURN while blocking the progress of the vehicle, as well as providing a reference point for surveying to ensure the accuracy of the survey and increase the efficiency of the survey. An emergency u-turn device for a separator is disclosed. Emergency U-turn apparatus according to the present invention, the support portion embedded in the center portion of the installation space provided by cutting the central separator, the rotary drive unit rotatably disposed inside the support, and the upper portion of the rotary drive unit is usually adjacent Parallel to the central separator in parallel, and in the event of an emergency consists of a variable separator, allowing the vehicle to U-turn (U-TURN) through the installation space while rotating along the rotary drive.

title: Light pipe for low profile optical navigation systems
abstract: A light pipe for an optical navigation system. The light pipe includes a collection surface, a collimation surface, and a reflective surface. The collection surface is to accept incident light into the light pipe from a light source. The collimation surface is to collimate the light and to direct the collimated light to a navigation plane for detection by a navigation sensor. The reflective surface is between the collection surface and the collimation surface and is to reflect the light along a reflective path as the light travels within the light pipe from the collection surface to the collimation surface. The reflective surface has a curved geometry oriented substantially along the path of travel of the light through the light pipe. The curved geometry of the reflective path facilitates convergence of the light with respect to a first axis.

title: Wall turning detection method based on video analysis
abstract: A video analysis-based wall-turning detection method includes erecting a camera on an enclosing wall, transmitting video streams to a deep learning server through a switch, detecting and analyzing the video streams frame by the deep learning server through a deep learning algorithm, pushing a frame of picture to a management server when a wall-turning behavior of a certain frame is detected, displaying an alarm picture on a management platform by the management server to prompt a manager that suspicious personnel turn over the wall, and judging whether the wall-turning behavior is accurate by the manager; the invention can accurately detect the wall turning behavior of people, monitor and alarm the wall turning behavior of suspicious people in violation in real time, and avoid unnecessary false alarm; meanwhile, the system can replace manual patrol, and protect personal and property safety in the park.

title: Vehicle ignition method and system based on face recognition and vehicle
abstract: The invention discloses a vehicle ignition method based on face recognition, wherein a vehicle is triggered to start ignition after being unlocked by establishing Bluetooth connection with a preset terminal device, and the ignition method comprises the following steps: the vehicle control unit receives a notification message of successful face recognition sent by a vehicle-mounted large screen; the vehicle control unit acquires a message for confirming the current vehicle-mounted large screen safety state from the vehicle-mounted safety unit; and when the vehicle-mounted large screen is in a safe state, the vehicle control unit sends an ignition instruction to realize vehicle ignition operation. The invention also discloses a vehicle ignition system and a vehicle based on face recognition, wherein the ignition process of the method of the invention collects face images through a vehicle-mounted large screen, and the face recognition further verifies the ignition operation so as to ensure the ignition operation under the condition of vehicle safety, thereby ensuring the safer vehicle ignition operation and higher user experience.
