title: Occupancy monitoring
abstract: An apparatus for monitoring an object occupying furniture is provided. The device has a projector that is fixedly attached to a movable part of the furniture, which changes its position and / or orientation relative to the surface in response to the movement of the object occupying the furniture. The projector is configured to project a pattern on the surface. The apparatus further comprises at least one camera configured to capture a continuous image of the surface and a processing unit. The processing unit receives an image from at least one camera, detects a projected pattern in the received image, detects a change to at least one feature of the projected pattern in the received image, and detects the detected change Is determined to satisfy at least one predefined criterion of the subject exit event and is configured to output a signal based on the determination.

title: Imaging apparatus and control method therefor
abstract: In an imaging apparatus, an autofocus mode is easily selected as intended by a photographer.   A display means for displaying image data picked up by an image pickup device, an autofocus control means for controlling a lens driving means to focus on a desired subject, and a gaze position of a photographer on a display section are detected. A line-of-sight detection means and a subject detection means for detecting a subject included in the image data, wherein the trajectory of the photographer's line-of-sight detected by the line-of-sight detection means coincides with the locus of the subject detected by the object detection means Has an autofocus mode switching means for changing the autofocus mode so that the autofocus mode is set to continuous AF, and when the line of sight is fixed at one point for a predetermined time, the autofocus mode is set to one shot AF. title: Mechanism for thrust vector control using multiple nozzles and only two yoke plates
abstract: In a missile thrust vector control (TVC) system, two yoke plates are used which surround a pair of pivotably-mounted rocket nozzles. The rocket nozzles pass through corresponding elongated slots disposed on each yoke plate, the elongate slots engaging said rocket nozzles and operating to actuate the movement of the rocket nozzles in accordance with command signals issued by the missile autopilot. The actuator yoke plates are mounted for movement in orthogonal directions, and for rotation in unison. The orthogonal movement of the yoke plates effects corresponding movement of the rocket nozzles in the yaw and pitch directions. Simultaneous rotation of the yoke plates produces a relative twisting of the pivotably-mounted rocket nozzles causing thrust angles to deviate from the missile central axis in opposite directions but equal degree, thereby imparting a roll moment to the missile. In this fashion, any combination of movements of the missile during flight is made possible.

title: Device and method for sensing object using hierarchical neural network
abstract:
The present invention relates to an apparatus and method for detecting an object using a hierarchical neural network. The apparatus for detecting an object using a hierarchical neural network includes: a preprocessing unit configured to preprocess an input image to reduce an influence of noise and ambient light changes mixed in the input image; A low resolution conversion unit for converting the preprocessed image into an image having a low resolution; An object candidate block inspection unit which searches a low resolution image by a predetermined block unit and finds a block in which an object may exist from an output of the first neural network that inputs each pixel value in the block; A position storing unit of the object candidate block for storing the position of the object candidate block found by the object candidate region inspecting unit; A high resolution converting unit for converting an image corresponding to the selected block into an image having a higher resolution than the low resolution image by selecting only a block corresponding to a position stored in the position storing unit in the preprocessed image; And an object detecting unit configured to detect an object according to an output value of the second neural network that receives each pixel value of the image converted into a high resolution. 
     According to the present invention, the object detection speed is high in the image because the object is detected by searching for a block in which there may be an object in a low resolution image, and the object is detected by increasing the resolution only in the searched block.

title: Information presentation server, information presentation system, and information presentation method
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To detect behavior of an occupant of a vehicle, present information on what the occupant is directly or potentially interested in, and arouse the occupant's interest to support promotion of promotion. A cloud server 10 is communicably connected to a bus 70. The cloud server 10 includes a communication circuit 10y that receives attribute information of a customer who is scheduled to board the bus 70, which is registered in the customer interest DB 30. The cloud server 10 allows the customer to directly or implicitly detect the behavior of the customer detected by the in-vehicle camera or the like mounted on the bus 70 and the attribute information of the customer while boarding the bus 70. A processor 10z that infers interests of interest. The processor 10z displays the information on the inferred interest in the vehicle-mounted terminal 75 mounted on the bus 70 so that the information can be viewed via the communication circuit 10y. title: Launching device of life boat for ships
abstract: The present invention provides a lifesaving boat launching device for a ship. According to the present invention, the lifesaving boat launching device comprises: a support frame having a glide installed in a hull to have a predetermined gradient to enable a lifesaving boat to be slid; a propulsion force generation unit provided to the lifesaving boat and providing a propulsion force by using compressed air; and an obstacle detection unit detecting an obstacle of a launching prediction point of the lifesaving boat.

title: Wireless camera system for vehicle and trailer
abstract: A vision system for a vehicle towing a trailer includes a vehicle transceiver disposed at the vehicle and at least one trailer camera disposed at the trailer being towed by the vehicle and having a field of view exterior of the trailer. A trailer transceiver is disposed at a front exterior portion of the trailer and is operable to receive image data captured by the at least one trailer camera and to wirelessly transmit captured image data to the vehicle transceiver disposed at the vehicle when the vehicle is towing the trailer. A video display screen is disposed at the vehicle and viewable by a driver of the vehicle when the vehicle is towing the trailer. The video display screen is operable to display video images derived from captured image data received by the vehicle transceiver disposed at the vehicle.

title: Systems and methods for generating data that is representative of an insurance policy for an autonomous vehicle
abstract: Systems and methods for generating data representative of insurance coverage for autonomous vehicles are provided. In particular, systems and methods for generating data representative of insurance coverage for autonomous vehicles based on data representative of autonomous vehicle reliability are provided. The data representative of autonomous vehicle reliability may include data representative of the autonomous vehicle original equipment manufacturer test results, autonomous vehicle system manufacturer test results, autonomous vehicle system component manufacturer test results, insurance company autonomous vehicle, systems and/or component test results, and/or third party test results of the autonomous vehicle, systems and/or components.

title: System and method for detecting and tracking objects
abstract: Methods of and systems for operating an embedded system of a vehicle during a coupling operation of the vehicle with a trailer having a coupler. The method comprises accessing a video stream generated by a video camera; operating an object detection module on the video stream so as to detect the trailer and/or the coupler and establish one or more regions of interest. The method also comprises generating a vehicle referential point estimated position of a vehicle referential point and generating a coupler position with respect to the vehicle referential point estimated position based on the one or more regions of interests and the vehicle referential point estimated position.

title: Methods and systems for object detection using multiple sensors
abstract: Methods and systems for object detection using multiple sensors are described herein. In an example embodiment, a vehicle's computing device may receive sensor data frames indicative of an environment at different rates from multiple sensors. Based on a first frame from a first sensor indicative of the environment at a first time period and a portion of a first frame that corresponds to the first time period from a second sensor, the computing device may estimate parameters of objects in the vehicle's environment. The computing device may modify the parameters in response to receiving subsequent frames or subsequent portions of frame of sensor data from the sensors even if the frames arrive at the computing device out of order. The computing device may provide the parameters of the objects to systems of the vehicle for object detection and obstacle avoidance.

title: Narrow bandwidth high resolution fiber optic ccd scanner/camera for b and w/color 3-d or 2-d images
abstract: NARROW BANDWIDTH HIGH RESOLUTION FIBER OPTIC CCD SCANNER/CAMERA FOR B&W/COLOR 3-D OR 2-D IMAGES               ABSTRACT OF THE DISCLOSURE      A color CCD scanner is disclosed which comprises a fiber optics based color separator that accomplishes several functions such as the finer detection of any specific narrow/broad spectral information within the input image, cancellation of the chromatic aberrations of the imaging lens , no astigmatism , higher scanning resolution, real time auto-focus  for the highest MTF, ghost free images,sensible faster scanning time,remote image transmission and on-the-fly connection to output image printing equipment . Other innovative features of the said scanner are included in the illumination system, dual displaying mode , input image cassettes, color filters , B&W or luminance option , CCD sensors, fibers spatial distribution , coherence conversion of the fiber bundles and CCDs assembling technology .

title: Object detection system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To obtain an object detection system to detect a cooking utensil arranged on the heating element of a cooking table. SOLUTION: The object detection system is installed with a driver loop 32, a sensor loop 36, an electric current source to supply AC current to the driver loop, and a controller. The driver loop 32 generates a time-variable magnetic field by applying AC current. The sensor loop 36 generates a sensor signal by the time-variable magnetic field when no cooking utensil is present. When a metallic cooking utensil is arranged in the vicinity of the driver loop 32, the strength of the sensor signal of the sensor loop 36 is reduced. The controller monitors the sensor signal to judge the presence of a cooking utensile and controls the heating element according to the presence or absence of the cooking utensil. The driver loop 32 is connected electrically to the sensor loop 36.

abstract: A trailer hitching assist system for a vehicle includes a camera disposed at a rear portion of a vehicle and having a field of view rearward of the vehicle. A control includes an image processor operable to process image data captured by the camera. The image processor, via image processing of image data captured by the camera, detects a trailer and trailer hitch rearward of the vehicle and determines a first path of travel for the vehicle to follow so as to maneuver the vehicle so as to have its tow ball aligned with the trailer hitch. The control maneuvers the vehicle along the determined first path of travel. Responsive to detection of an object entering the first path of travel, the control determines a second path of travel and maneuvers the vehicle along the second path of travel to avoid the detected object entering the determined path of travel.

title: Object detection utilizing geometric information fused with image data
abstract: Two-dimensional and three-dimensional data of a physical scene are combined and analyzed together to identify physical objects physically present in the physical scene. Image features obtained from the two-dimensional data and geometric features obtained from the three-dimensional data are combined with one another such that corresponding image features are associated with corresponding geometric features. Automated object detection mechanisms are directed to the combination of image and geographic features and consider them together in identifying physical objects from the physical scene. Such automated object detection mechanisms utilize machine learning such as selecting and tuning multiple classifiers, with each classifier identifying potential objects based on a specific set of image and geographic features, and further identifying and adjusting weighting factors to be applied to the results of such classifiers, with the weighted combination of the output of the multiple classifiers providing the resulting object identification.

title: Apparatus and method for inpainting three-dimensional stereoscopic image
abstract: An apparatus and a method for rendering three-dimensional stereoscopic images are provided. The apparatus comprises a multi-view processor, an object device, a depth device, and a block filling device. The multi-view processor obtains depth related data of a first pixel and a second pixel which are adjacent to each other on the input image, calculates a difference between the depth related data and determines whether the first pixel and the second pixel are continuous according to the difference. The object device executes a process of object detection to output contour information. The depth device executes a process of object judgment to output distance information. The block filling device detects a hole region in each viewpoint image, searches a search region adjacent to the hole region for a number of original pixels, and fills the hole region.

title: Object detection apparatus, traffic monitoring system, method of controlling an object detection apparatus and program
abstract: An object detection apparatus is provided with a discriminator applier and a candidate area calculator. The discriminator applier applies a discriminator which detects an object to images acquired in past and calculates object detection information including at least location information of the object detected by the discriminator, in a learning phase. The candidate area calculator performs a machine-learning by use of the object detection information and calculates object candidate area information including at least information specifying a candidate area in which the object may appear in an image.

title: Method for training human body sensing classifier based on HOG features
abstract: The invention relates to a human body sensing classifier based on HOG features, and provides a fast and accurate method for training the human body sensing classifier based on the HOG features. According to the technical scheme, a human body detection algorithm based on the HOG features is adopted for carrying out optimal computation on a human body image and achieving fast object detection; in the process of training the classifier based on the HOG features, the portions above the shoulders of the human body are specifically sampled to generate positive samples, training is gradually carried out through increase of enough cascades of weak classifiers to obtain higher classification capacity, multiple detection results are analyzed through the cascaded classifiers, a first-level classifier with the highest time operation efficiency in each cascade is obtained through summarization, and then the final pedestrian detection classifier is obtained by combining the classifiers for the XML. The method is suitable for the field of computer vision.

title: Sheet processing device and image forming device incorporating same
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To prevent loaded sheets from being curved or bent, by moving a stopper for positioning a sheet fed onto a discharge tray in dependence upon whether an obstacle is present or not. SOLUTION: In order to load a sheet to be discharged to a discharge direction 520 onto a discharge tray 500 at an appropriate position for the size of the sheet, a sheet stopper 501 is moved in directions indicated by the arrows 520, 521. When the sheet stopper 501 is moved in a direction 521 reverse to the discharge direction of the sheet, if an obstacle (for example, loaded sheets) is detected by an obstacle detection sensor 502, the movement of the sheet stopper is inhibited so as to prevent the sheet from being curved or bent.

title: Method for constructing precast module of aeronautical light aids
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for constructing a precast module for use in an air navigation system that provides flight information so that a pilot can visually confirm the entry direction of an runway and the like in a daytime, nighttime, and bad weather conditions so as to safely land the aircraft.   The present invention adopts a method in which a precast module having an air-conditioning lighting facility built therein is pre-manufactured in a factory, and then the precast modules are connected to each other in the field, and in particular, a concrete casting method It is possible to drastically shorten the entire construction period such that the construction work can be carried out more quickly and easily and the construction cost can be drastically reduced due to shortening of the workforce and shortening of the construction time, Especially, by implementing a new construction method for constructing connection part between precast modules by applying a stepwise stepped connection method, it is possible to secure workability and economical efficiency through pre-production, Durability such as keeping the binding state stable And aviation landscape lighting facilities to promote the construction quality cast module provides a construction method.

title: Apparatus and method for neighbor base station scanning of handover in mobile communication system
abstract:
The present invention relates to a method and an apparatus for handover scanning in a mobile communication system in which a mobile base station and a nomadic base station coexist, Determining a representative base station for each of the plurality of classified groups and broadcasting the determined representative base station; and transmitting, when an information transmission request for a specific representative base station group is received from the terminal, And transmitting the information of the MSs to the MS when the handover from the mobile mode to the Nomadic mode occurs, the MS in the mobile mode having no information about the neighboring Nomadic BS, It is possible to grasp the information on the base station and to speed up the handover target nomadic base station And to set it is possible to reduce the scanning time and power consumption of the terminal.

title: Digest creating device and its program
abstract: A digest creating device and its program for creating an adequate digest of a content in accordance with the content type. The digest creating device comprises a content acquiring section (20) for acquiring a content including at least either video information or audio information and content additional information added to the content, a content type detecting section (32) for detecting the content type classified by the matter of the content, according to the content additional information, an object segment determining section (33) for determining the object segment from all the content segments according to the detection result, a partial scene extracting section (34) for extracting a partial scene to be used as an element to create a digest of the content from the determined object segment, and a digest creating section (35) for creating a digest by using the extracted partial scene.

title: Mobile communication terminal and optimization method of communication network thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a mobile communication terminal and an optimization method of a communication network thereof. The mobile communication terminal comprises a communication network scanning module, a communication network selecting module and a communication network connecting module. The communication network scanning module is used for scanning available communication networks by the mobile communication terminal. The communication network selecting module is used for determining a to-be-connected communication network from the available communication networks by the mobile communication terminal according to a preset network selection rule. The communication network connecting module is used for establishing connection between the mobile communication terminal and the to-be-connected communication network which is determined by the communication network selecting module. According to the mobile communication terminal and the optimization method of the communication network thereof, through sequencing the searched available communication networks and performing network selection according to communication cost or communication quality, a low-cost operator network or a free WIFI network is selected, or a communication network with optimal communication quality is selected, thereby saving cost of the mobile communication terminal and obtaining communication connection with higher communication quality.

title: Laser radar for vehicle using cylinder reflector and method for control the same
abstract:
The present invention relates to a vehicle laser radar using a cylindrical reflector and a control method thereof, and more particularly, to a vehicle radar using a cylindrical reflector having a structure in which a plurality of reflecting mirrors having a reflection precision of 0.5 ° unit is attached to an inner diameter surface. The present invention relates to a laser radar for a vehicle and a control method thereof using a cylindrical reflector, which can perform a laser scanning operation more stably, and allow for long-range and short-range detection alternately. 
     To this end, the present invention is a cylindrical reflector comprising a cylindrical body and a plurality of reflective mirrors mounted along its circumferential direction at the inner diameter surface of the cylindrical body; Rotary drive means for rotating the cylindrical reflector; A laser light receiving unit disposed in the hollow hole of the cylindrical reflector; A left / right laser light emitting unit disposed symmetrically at a rear position of the cylindrical reflector; A position detecting unit detecting a rotation angle of the cylindrical reflector; A control unit for receiving signals of the laser light receiving unit and the position detecting unit; It provides a vehicle laser radar using a cylindrical reflector, characterized in that it comprises a modulation circuit for adjusting the modulation frequency of the laser according to the detection signal of the position detector.

title: Control device for profile control robot

Control to follow.

title: Automatic calibration system for AVM look around
abstract: The utility model relates to an automatic calibration system of AVM look around, which comprises a calibration controller, a vehicle-mounted central control multimedia large screen, an AVM look around controller and a look around camera; the calibration controller is inserted into an OBD port of the whole vehicle and is electrically connected with the large vehicle-mounted central control multimedia screen, the large vehicle-mounted central control multimedia screen is electrically connected with the AVM surround view controller, and the AVM surround view controller is electrically connected with the surround view camera. The utility model has the advantages of simple and reasonable design, convenient to use, stable, reliable, the cost is lower, can simplify and mark the flow, optimizes and marks the process, accomplishes AVM look around's automatic calibration fast, improves the production efficiency who rolls off production line and mark of whole car.
